facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 11. 29. 23:15경 8층 엘리베이터 앞에서 '소리를 지르며 소란을 피우는 사람이 있다'는 내용의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경찰관 경위 E등으로부터 귀가 요청을 받자 화가 나, "이 씹할 놈들아, 너희가 무슨 상관이냐? 내가 범죄를 저질렀냐? 이 씹할놈들아."라고 욕설을 하면서 손으로 위 E의 가슴 부위를 1회 밀치고, 같은 지구대 소속 순경 F의 어깨 부위를 각각 1회 밀쳐 폭행하였다.
계속해서 피고인은 위 아파트 C동 G호에 있는 피고인의 주거지 앞에 이르러, 귀가를 요청하는 위 E 및 같은 지구대 소속 경사 H에게 "이 씹새끼들아, 체포하려면 해봐라, 이 개새끼들아."라고 욕설을 하면서 손으로 위 E 및 H의 복부를 각각 1회 밀치고, 이어, 위 주거지 내부에 들어가 피고인을 귀가 시키고 밖으로 나가려는 위 경찰관들을 따라나와, "이 씹새끼들이, 내가 무슨 범죄를 저질렀냐? 이 씹할놈들아."라고 욕설하며 손으로 위 E과 같은 지구대 소속 순경 I의 복부를 1회 밀치고, "이 씹할놈아, 내가 너희들 다 죽인다."라고 욕설하며 손으로 위 H의 가슴 부위를 1회 밀쳐 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 피고인의 법정진술
1. H, E에 대한 각 진술조서
1. J, I, F에 대한 각 진술서
1. 현장사진

facts_en:
On November 29, 2021, at approximately 23:15, in front of the elevator on the eighth floor, the defendant, having received a request to return home from Police Officer Gyeongwi E and other officers from the D Precinct of the local police station who had responded to a 112 emergency report containing information that "there is a person making loud noises and causing a disturbance," became angry and uttered the following profanity: "You fucking bastards, what the hell is it to you? Did I commit a crime? You fucking bastards." While doing so, the defendant pushed Officer E in the chest area once with his hand and pushed Police Officer F, also of the same precinct, in the shoulder area once, thereby committing assault.

Subsequently, the defendant proceeded to the front of his residence at Unit G, Building C of the aforementioned apartment and, in response to Officer E and Police Officer H, also of the same precinct, who requested him to return home, uttered profanity: "You fucking bastards, try arresting me if you dare, you fucking dogs." While doing so, the defendant pushed Officer E and H in the abdomen area once each with his hand. The defendant then entered his residence, exited following the police officers who were attempting to leave after seeing the defendant home, and uttered profanity while saying, "You fucking bastards, what the hell crime did I commit? You fucking bastards," pushing Officer E and Police Officer I, also of the same precinct, in the abdomen area once with his hand. Subsequently, the defendant uttered profanity: "You fucking bastard, I'm going to kill all of you," and pushed Police Officer H in the chest area once with his hand, thereby committing assault.

By these acts, the defendant obstructed the legitimate official duties of police public servants in the processing of a 112 emergency call matter.

SUMMARY OF EVIDENCE:
1. Testimony of the defendant in court
2. Statement records of H and E
3. Written statements of J, I, and F
4. Photographs of the scene

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 5. 15. 22:52경 B에 있는 'C' 앞 노상에서, '술을 먹고 행패 난동을 부린다./남자 한 명/흉기 등 없음'이라는 112신고를 받고 출동한 D파출소 소속 경장 E에게 위치추적을 통해 휴대전화기를 찾아줄 것을 요구하고, E로부터 "잃어버린 휴대폰이 범죄로 인해 없어진 것인지 당장 확인이 어려우니 사건 접수를 해주겠다."라고 절차를 알려주고 귀가를 종용 받자, 당장 위치추적을 해주지 않는다는 이유로 "내가 세금을 삼천만 원씩 내는데 돈이 아깝다. 부끄럽지도 않으냐, 씨 발새끼들, 개새끼들."이라며 욕설하면서 E의 가슴을 쿡쿡 찌르고 같은 소속 순경 F의 상체를 어깨로 밀쳤다.
계속하여 피고인은 E가 설명을 끝내고 더 이상 안내할 내용이 없음을 고지한 뒤 순찰 업무 및 112신고 대비를 위해 62호 순찰차에 탑승하여 현장을 떠나려고 하자, "가긴 어딜가노, 당신들 분명 일을 잘못하고 있다, 당신 부모가 이런 일을 당해도 너희들 이렇게 일 처리 할꺼냐, 씨발, 같이 경찰서에 가보자, 체포하려면 해봐."라고 하면서 위 순찰차 본네트에 양손을 올리고 몸으로 가로막아 이동하지 못하게 하는 등 약 10분간 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원들의 112신고사건처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On May 15, 2020, at approximately 22:52, in front of 'C' on a street in B, the Defendant made a request to Officer E, a police sergeant attached to the D Police Box, who had responded to a 112 emergency call reporting "a person consuming alcohol and engaging in disorderly conduct/one male/no weapons or other dangerous instruments," to locate and retrieve his mobile phone through location tracking. When Officer E explained the procedure, stating "It is not immediately possible to confirm whether the missing mobile phone was lost due to criminal conduct, so I will file a report on the matter," and urged the Defendant to go home, the Defendant, on the grounds that location tracking was not being performed immediately, verbally abused the officers, stating "I pay thirty million won in taxes each year—what a waste of money. Aren't you ashamed, you fucking bastards, you fucking dogs," while poking Officer E's chest repeatedly and pushing the upper body of Officer F, a police officer of the same station, with his shoulder.

Subsequently, after Officer E completed his explanation and indicated there was no further information to provide, the officers moved to depart the scene, boarding a patrol car numbered 62 to resume patrol duties and prepare for 112 emergency calls. The Defendant then stated, "Where are you going? You clearly are not handling this matter properly. If your parents faced such a situation, would you officers process it this way? Fuck it, let's go to the police station together. If you're going to arrest me, go ahead," placed both hands on the hood of the patrol car, blocked its path with his body, and engaged in assault for approximately ten minutes, preventing the vehicle from moving.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by police officers in processing the 112 emergency call matter.

facts_kr:
1. 피고인은 2021. 5. 7. 16:22경 B아파트 앞 삼거리 도로에서 ‘교통사고가 났다. 음주운전이다'라는 112신고를 받고 출동한 C지구대 소속 경위 D으로부터 음주측정을 요구받자 "했자나 했자나 씨발넘아, 씨발넘아 내가 이런걸"이라고 욕을 하며, 오른 손 손바닥으로 음주측정기를 들고 있는 위 D의 손을 2회 내려쳐 폭행하였다.
2. 피고인은 제1항과 같은 이유로 음주측정거부 및 공무집행방해로 현행범인 체포되어 제1항과 같은 날 16:50경 익산시에 있는 C지구대로 인치되어 체포구속피의자 신체확인서를 작성하던 중 위 D으로부터 "어디 아픈 곳 있으시냐."라는 질문을 받자, "이 씨벌넘이 너같은 거 한주먹 감이야 나한테"라고 말하며 주먹을 들어 위 D을 때릴 듯한 태도를 보여 위 D이 이를 제지하자 재차 "어휴 이 씨벌넘아"라고 욕을 하며 주먹으로 경위 D의 미간 부위를 1회 때려 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112 신고처리 및 사건 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 각 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## Offense 1: Assault and Obstruction of a Police Officer's Lawful Duties (First Incident)

On May 7, 2021, at approximately 16:22 hours, at a three-way intersection in front of B Apartment, the Defendant, having received a 112 emergency call reporting "there has been a traffic accident; it is suspected drunk driving," was approached by Police Officer D, assigned to C Police Box, who requested that the Defendant submit to a breath-alcohol measurement test. Upon this request, the Defendant cursed, saying "you fucking bastard, you fucking bastard—what the hell is this to me" (했자나 했자나 씨발넘아, 씨발넘아 내가 이런걸), and struck Police Officer D's hand—which was holding the breath-alcohol measurement device—twice with the palm of his right hand, thereby committing assault.

## Offense 2: Assault and Obstruction of a Police Officer's Lawful Duties (Second Incident)

For the same reasons as set forth in Offense 1, the Defendant was arrested in flagrante delicto on charges of refusing to submit to a breath-alcohol measurement test and obstructing the execution of an officer's official duties. On the same date, at approximately 16:50 hours, the Defendant was brought into custody at C Police Box, located in Iksan City. While Police Officer D was completing an arrest-custody body examination form, the Officer asked the Defendant, "Is there anywhere on your body that hurts?" In response, the Defendant stated, "you fucking bastard—you're nothing compared to one punch from me" (이 씨벌넘이 너같은 거 한주먹 감이야 나한테), raised his fist in a threatening manner as though to strike Police Officer D. When Police Officer D moved to restrain him, the Defendant cursed again, saying "ugh, you fucking bastard" (어휴 이 씨벌넘아), and struck Police Officer D once in the area between the eyebrows with his fist, thereby committing assault.

Through these acts, the Defendant obstructed Police Officer D's lawful execution of official duties in two distinct respects: (1) the processing of the 112 emergency call, and (2) the investigation of the underlying incident.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 12. 10.경 남자친구 B, 직장동료 C과 함께 피고인의 주거지인 D건물 E동에서 술을 마시던 중 말다툼을 하여 이들을 집 밖으로 쫓아낸 후, 같은 빌라 F동에 있는 C 주거지로 찾아가 항의를 하려고 하였으나, C 등이 문을 열어주지 않자 화가 나 그곳 주차장에 있던 B의 (차량번호 1 생략) 소나타 승용차를 운전하려고 하였다.
피고인은 같은 날 23:30경 위 빌라 주차장에서 ‘직장 동료인 여자가 문을 두드리고 벨을 계속 누르고 소화기를 던진다', ‘음주상태로 차를 몰려고 하니 빨리 잡아달라'는 112 신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 G파출소 소속 경장 H, 경장 I로부터 인적 사항 제시 및 음주 측정을 요구받자 이를 거부하며 경찰관들에게 "나는 운전을 하지 않았다"고 고함을 치면서 위 H의 어깨와 배 부분을 2회 밀쳤다.
계속하여 피고인은 위 빌라 F동 1층 복도에서, C의 주거지로 올라가려다가 제지당하자 위 경찰관들에게 "씨발 도저히 열 받아서 안 되겠네"라고 욕설을 하며 그곳 바닥에 있던 소화기를 들어 경찰관들이 서 있던 바닥을 향하여 집어던지고, 위와 같은 이유로 현행범인으로 체포되는 과정에서 이로 위 H의 손목 부분을 깨무는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관들의 112 신고 처리 및 현행범인 체포에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On approximately December 10, 2020, the Defendant, together with her boyfriend B and workplace colleague C, was drinking at the Defendant's residence located in Building D, Unit E of the villa complex. During their time there, a verbal altercation ensued, following which the Defendant forcibly ejected B and C from her residence. Subsequently, the Defendant proceeded to Unit F of the same villa complex, where C resided, with the intent to lodge a complaint. However, when C and others refused to open the door, the Defendant became enraged and attempted to operate a Sonata sedan (license plate number 1 omitted) belonging to B, which was parked in the parking lot of the villa complex.

At approximately 23:30 on the same day, a 112 emergency call was placed from the villa parking lot, reporting that "a female workplace colleague is knocking on the door, continuously ringing the bell, and throwing a fire extinguisher" and that "the person is attempting to drive while intoxicated; please apprehend her immediately." In response to this report, Senior Constable H and Senior Constable I, both assigned to Police Substation G, arrived at the scene and requested that the Defendant provide identification and submit to an alcohol breath test. The Defendant refused these lawful requests and shouted at the police officers, "I did not drive," while pushing Senior Constable H's shoulder and abdomen twice.

Subsequently, while the Defendant was in the first-floor corridor of Unit F of the villa complex and was attempting to ascend to C's residence but was prevented from doing so, she directed profanities at the police officers, stating "Fuck, this is absolutely infuriating and unbearable," picked up a fire extinguisher that was located on the floor, and threw it in the direction of the floor where the police officers were standing. During the process of her arrest as a flagrant offender for the aforementioned reasons, the Defendant further committed assault by biting Senior Constable H's wrist area.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the police officers' lawful execution of their duties pertaining to the processing of the 112 emergency call and the apprehension of a flagrant offender.

facts_kr:
2019고단4675
피고인은 2019. 5. 26. 04:10경 B에 있는 C노래연습장에서 술에 취해 잠들었다가 112 신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 D파출소 소속 순경 E이 피고인을 깨워 귀가할 것을 요구하자, 욕설을 하면서 위 E의 코를 팔꿈치로 가격하고 목을 팔로 누르는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 범죄단속 및 질서유지에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2019고단5142
피고인은 2019. 7. 23. 00:05경 F에 있는, 'G' 주점에서 '손님이 술값을 지불하지 않고 있다'는 내용의 112 신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 H지구대 소속 경찰관인 순경 I으로부터 인적사항을 알려달라는 질문을 받자 위 경찰관에게 "씨발놈아"라고 욕을 하며 양손으로 위 경찰관의 가슴을 밀어 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 위 경찰관의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2019고단6165
피고인은 2019. 8. 4. 02:30경 J에 있는 K노래방에서 술에 취한 사람이 행패를 부린다는 신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D파출소 소속 경찰공무원인 순경 L으로부터 퇴거를 요청받자 화가 나 위 L에게 욕설을 하면서 몸으로 위 L의 몸을 수 회 밀친 후 왼쪽 어깨로 위 L의 몸을 들이받았다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 국민의 생명·신체 및 재산의 보호와 범죄의 예방에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
**Case No. 2019고단4675**

On May 26, 2019, at approximately 04:10, the Defendant, who had fallen asleep intoxicated at Karaoke Room C located in B, was awakened by Police Constable E of D Police Box in response to a 112 emergency report and a police dispatch to the scene. When Police Constable E requested that the Defendant return home, the Defendant uttered profanities and committed assault against Police Constable E by striking E's nose with his elbow and pressing E's neck with his forearm.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties of a police officer pertaining to criminal investigation and maintenance of public order.

**Case No. 2019고단5142**

On July 23, 2019, at approximately 00:05, the Defendant, responding to a 112 emergency report containing information that "a customer was not paying for drinks" at Bar 'G' located in F, was questioned by Police Constable I, a police officer of H Police District of the Police Station, regarding the Defendant's personal identification information. The Defendant then directed profanity toward the police officer, uttering "You fucking bastard," and committed assault by pushing the police officer's chest with both hands.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties of the aforementioned police officer.

**Case No. 2019고단6165**

On August 4, 2019, at approximately 02:30, the Defendant, in response to a report that a person intoxicated had engaged in disruptive behavior at Karaoke Room K located in J, was requested to vacate the premises by Police Constable L, a police civil servant of D Police Box. Angered by this request, the Defendant directed profanities toward Police Constable L and, after pushing L's body multiple times with his body, struck L's body with his left shoulder.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties of a police civil servant pertaining to the protection of citizens' lives, bodily integrity, and property, and the prevention of crime.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 10. 12. 23:48경 B아파트 부근에서 술에 만취하여 길을 잃자 112 상황실에 수차례 신고하기를 거듭하던 중, 신고를 받고 순찰 중이던 경찰서 C파출소 소속 경장 D 등이 피고인을 발견하고 다가가자 갑자기 그곳에 주차되어 있던 차량을 밟고 올라가 철제 울타리를 넘어 건너편 아래쪽으로 뛰어내린 후, 괜찮은지 묻는 위 D 등을 뒤로 한 채 현장을 이탈하였다. 그 후 피고인은 같은 날 23:55경 차도를 돌아다니던 중 피고인의 안전을 염려하여 계속 순찰 중이던 위 D 등에게 다시 발견되어, D 등의 안내에 따라 인도로 이동한 후 배우자의 연락처를 알려주었다. 피고인은 위 D 등의 연락으로 배우자와 역 앞에서 만나기로 하고 순찰차 뒷좌석에 탑승하여 함께 이동하던 중, 갑자기 "너희들 가짜 경찰관이다"라고 하며 발로 순찰차의 유리창을 수 회 걷어차는 등 행패를 부리기 시작하였고, 역 앞에 도착하여 피고인의 배우자를 만난 D 등이 피고인을 순찰차에서 내리게 하고 배우자에게 상황을 설명하는 동안에도 계속하여 "가짜 경찰관들이 나를 감금했으니 빨리 112에 신고해라"라며 소란을 피웠다. 이에 피고인의 배우자가 순찰차의 번호판과 내부 등을 휴대전화로 촬영하고 피고인의 요구대로 112에 전화를 하려는 상황에서, 2020. 10. 13. 00:37경 피고인은 갑자기 순찰차로 다가와 순찰차 문을 바깥쪽으로 세게 잡아당겨 열어, 순찰차 문 앞을 지키고 서 있던 위 D의 우측 팔 부위에 부딪치게 하였다. 계속해서 피고인은 "쟤네들 경찰 아니다, 신고해"라고 소리치고, 손을 때릴 듯이 들어 올리는 등 휘두르다가 D 등에게 제지당하자 갑자기 손으로 D의 멱살을 잡아 바닥에 넘어뜨리는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 국민의 생명ㆍ신체 등의 보호 및 교통 위해 등의 방지 등에 관한 정당한 직무 집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On October 12, 2020, at approximately 11:48 p.m., the Defendant, intoxicated on alcohol and disoriented near B Apartment Complex, repeatedly reported himself to the 112 Emergency Control Center. Upon receiving the report, Officer D, a Senior Police Officer (Gyeongwon) attached to C Police Box of the police precinct and his fellow officers on patrol detected the Defendant. As they approached, the Defendant suddenly stepped on and climbed onto a parked vehicle, jumped over a metal fence, and leaped down to the opposite side below. The Defendant then fled the scene without responding to Officer D and his colleagues' inquiry as to whether he was alright. Subsequently, at approximately 11:55 p.m. on the same day, the Defendant was again discovered by Officer D and his colleagues, who continued to patrol out of concern for the Defendant's safety while wandering on the roadway. Following their guidance, the Defendant moved to the sidewalk and provided his spouse's contact information. Officer D and his colleagues arranged for the Defendant to meet with his spouse in front of the station through contact. The Defendant boarded the rear seat of the patrol vehicle and was being transported together with the officers. Suddenly, the Defendant began to behave disruptively, shouting "You are fake police officers" and kicking the patrol vehicle's window glass multiple times with his feet. Upon arrival in front of the station, Officer D and his colleagues had the Defendant exit the patrol vehicle and were explaining the situation to the Defendant's spouse. During this time, the Defendant continued to cause a disturbance, shouting "These fake police officers unlawfully confined me—quickly report to 112." The Defendant's spouse photographed the patrol vehicle's license plate and interior using a mobile phone and attempted to call 112 at the Defendant's behest. At approximately 12:37 a.m. on October 13, 2020, the Defendant suddenly approached the patrol vehicle, forcefully pulled open the patrol vehicle door outward, and struck Officer D, who was standing in front of the door, on his right arm. The Defendant continued to shout "They are not police officers—report them" and raised his hand in a striking manner, brandishing it. When restrained by Officer D and his colleagues, the Defendant suddenly grabbed Officer D by the collar and threw him to the ground, thereby assaulting him.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate official duties of police officers in the protection of the people's lives and bodies and the prevention of traffic hazards and other such matters.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 11. 3. 05:15경 B에서, 112신고를 받고 출동 중인 경찰서 C파출소 소속 경사 D, 경장 E이 탑승한 순41호 순찰차를 몸으로 막아서 위 순찰차를 정차하게 한 다음 "못 비킨다. 너 어디 경찰서냐."라고 말하고, 이에 위 D으로부터 "신고출동 중이니 비켜 달라."는 말을 수 회 들었음에도 "못 비킨다. 내가 법을 잘 아는데 죄가 안 된다."라고 말하면서 약 10분 이상 순찰차를 몸으로 막다가, 피고인을 설득하던 위 D의 바로 앞까지 다가간 후, 위 D이 피고인을 막기 위하여 팔을 들자 손으로 D의 팔을 1회 쳐내고, 피고인을 설득하는 것에 실패한 경찰관들이 순찰차에 타서 후진을 하려고 하자, 피고인은 위 순찰차 바로 앞으로 다가와 피고인의 휴대전화를 순찰차 보닛 위로 던지고, 발을 보닛 위에 올린 상태로 반복적으로 욕설을 하는 방법으로 경찰관의 신체에 대하여 유형력을 행사하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 범죄의 예방·진압 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
**The Defendant's Actions and Obstruction of Police Duty:**

On November 3, 2019, at approximately 05:15, at location B, the Defendant blocked with his body a patrol car (Unit 41) carrying Sergeant D and Police Officer E of Police Box C, who were en route in response to a 112 emergency call, thereby causing the patrol car to come to a stop. The Defendant then stated, "I can't move out of the way. What police station are you from?" Despite hearing multiple requests from said Sergeant D stating, "We are responding to an emergency dispatch. Please move aside," the Defendant continued to say, "I can't move out of the way. I know the law well, and this is not a crime," and obstructed the patrol car with his body for more than approximately ten minutes. Thereafter, the Defendant approached immediately in front of Sergeant D, who was attempting to persuade him. When Sergeant D raised his arm to block the Defendant, the Defendant struck D's arm once with his hand. When the police officers, having failed to persuade the Defendant, boarded the patrol car and attempted to reverse, the Defendant approached directly in front of the patrol car, threw his mobile telephone onto the patrol car's bonnet, placed his foot on the bonnet, and repeatedly engaged in profane language—thereby exercising physical force against the police officer's body.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of duty by police officers concerning the prevention, suppression, and investigation of crime.

facts_kr:
1. 2021. 10. 20. 14:38경 범행
피고인은 2021. 10. 20. 14:38경 B에 있는 C시청 사회복지과 사무실에서, 피고인 자신이 제기한 민원의 진행상황을 원하는 대로 알려주지 않은 것에 화가 나 C시 소속 공무원인 D의 멱살을 왼손으로 잡고 수차례 흔들고, 이를 제지하는 C시 소속 청원경찰 E의 멱살을 왼손으로 잡고 위 E의 얼굴을 머리로 들이 받았으며, 같은 청원경찰 F의 낭심을 오른 무릎으로 1회 때리는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 민원 처리에 관한 공무원들의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 2021. 10. 20. 15:23경 범행
피고인은 2021. 10. 20. 15:23경 제1항 장소에서, ‘민원인이 행패를 부리고 있다'는 112신고를 받고 출동한 G지구대 소속 경찰관들인 경위 H, 경위 I, 경위 J, 순경 K 등이 피고인에게 귀가를 권유하였음에도 이에 응하지 아니하면서 위 H의 팔을 입으로 1회 깨물고, 제1항 장소에 있는 의자를 들어 위 경찰관들을 향하여 던지려고 하는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 112신고 처리에 관한 경찰관들의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Offense Committed on October 20, 2021, at Approximately 14:38
On October 20, 2021, at approximately 14:38, in the Social Welfare Division office of the C City Hall located at B, the defendant, angry that municipal officials were not providing information regarding the progress of a civil petition filed by the defendant in the manner the defendant desired, committed assault by seizing civil servant D, an employee of C City, by the collar with his left hand and shaking him repeatedly, and seizing petition police officer E, also an employee of C City, by the collar with his left hand and headbutting E's face. The defendant further assaulted petition police officer F by striking F's rib cage once with his right knee.
By this conduct, the defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties by civil servants in the processing of civil petitions.

## 2. Offense Committed on October 20, 2021, at Approximately 15:23
On October 20, 2021, at approximately 15:23, at the aforementioned location in Section 1, police officers from the G District Police Box—specifically Senior Police Officer H, Senior Police Officer I, Senior Police Officer J, and Police Officer K—responded to a 112 emergency call reporting that "the complainant is engaging in rowdy behavior." When these police officers advised the defendant to leave the premises, the defendant refused to comply and committed assault by biting Senior Police Officer H's arm once with his teeth and by lifting a chair present at the aforementioned location and attempting to throw it at the police officers.
By this conduct, the defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties by police officers in the processing of 112 emergency calls.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 6. 7. 13:00경 가정법원 앞 노상에서 B가 운행하는 택시의 뒷좌석에 술에 취한 상태로 승차하여 C시장까지 운행하게 한 후, 다시 B에게 가자고 하면서 앞좌석으로 옮겨탄 후 B에게 욕설을 하고 얼굴을 들이미는 행동을 하여, 위 B가 D에 있는 경찰서 E지구대로 택시를 운전하여 피고인과 함께 지구대를 방문하여 피해 받은 사실을 신고하여, 위 지구대 소속 경찰 공무원인 순경 F가 피고인에게 집을 묻자 피고인은 "너는 댁이 어디야, 개새끼야"라고 욕설을 하고, 위 지구대 소속 경찰공무원인 경장 G이 "어떻게 도와 드릴까요"라고 묻자, 피고인은 "개새끼야, 니가 H보다 위야"라고 하며 순경 F와 경장 G의 몸을 어깨로 수회 밀치고, 머리로 경장 G의 왼쪽 광대뼈 부위를 1회 들이받아 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원들의 범죄예방, 진압 및 수사 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant, on June 7, 2021, at approximately 13:00, boarded the rear seat of a taxi operated by Person B in an intoxicated state in front of the Family Court and had Person B drive to C City. Thereafter, the defendant told Person B to "let's go" and moved to the front seat, whereupon the defendant hurled profanities at Person B and thrust his face toward Person B's face.

Person B subsequently drove the taxi to the police substation E in District D and visited the substation together with the defendant to report the injury inflicted. When Police Officer F, a patrolman assigned to the substation, asked the defendant for his address, the defendant verbally abused Officer F, saying "Where the fuck is your house, you son of a bitch?" When Police Officer G, a sergeant assigned to the substation, asked "How may I assist you?", the defendant responded, "You son of a bitch, are you superior to H?", and thereupon shoved the bodies of Patrolman F and Sergeant G multiple times with his shoulders and headbutted Sergeant G's left zygomatic bone area once, thereby committing assault.

By this conduct, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by police officers concerning crime prevention, suppression, and investigation.

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2017. 7. 17. 지방법원에서 업무방해죄로 징역 6월을 선고받고, 2018. 5. 24. 같은 법원에서 폭행죄로 징역 3월을 선고받아 2018. 10. 2. 교도소에서 그 형의 집행을 종료하였다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 2018. 12. 21. 23:10경 B에 있는 ‘C' 앞 노상에서, 위 식당에서 폭행 사건이 발생했다는 취지의 112신고를 받고 출동하여 신고 사건을 처리한 후 위 사건 처리 결과에 대한 서류를 작성하기 위해 복귀하려고 하는 순11호 순찰차의 앞을 가로막고, 보닛에 손을 얹은 채 경찰관들에게 ‘씹할놈들아' 등의 욕을 하면서 행패를 부려 위 순찰차의 진행을 방해하던 중, 순12호 순찰차를 타고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경장 E로부터 제지당하자 화가 나서, ‘왜 통행을 하지 못하게 차를 대놨냐'고 말하면서 시비를 걸고, 손으로 옷을 잡으면서 주먹을 들어올리는 등 위협하였으며, 왼쪽 종아리 부위를 발로 1회 걷어찼다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고 사건 처리, 국민의 생명ㆍ신체 및 재산의 보호, 범죄의 예방ㆍ진압 및 수사 등에 대한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The defendant was sentenced to six months' imprisonment for obstruction of official duties by the District Court on July 17, 2017, and was sentenced to three months' imprisonment for assault by the same court on May 24, 2018. The defendant completed the execution of this sentence at a correctional institution on October 2, 2018.

## [Criminal Acts]

On December 21, 2018, at approximately 23:10, on a street in front of 'C' restaurant located in B, the defendant, after responding to and processing a report filed with the police emergency hotline (112) regarding an assault incident occurring at the aforementioned restaurant, blocked the path of Patrol Car No. 11 that was returning to prepare documentation regarding the incident processing results. While placing his hand on the hood of the patrol car, the defendant engaged in disorderly conduct and hurled profanities such as "You fucking bastards" at police officers, thereby obstructing the progression of the patrol car. When the defendant was stopped by Sergeant E of D Police Station District Unit, who arrived in Patrol Car No. 12, the defendant became enraged and initiated a quarrel by saying, "Why did you park the car there preventing passage?" The defendant then grabbed the officer's clothing with his hand, raised his fist in a threatening manner, and kicked the officer once on the left calf with his foot.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the police officer's lawful performance of duties, including: the processing of reports filed with the emergency hotline (112); the protection of the lives, bodies, and property of the public; the prevention and suppression of crime; and criminal investigation.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 8. 31. 12:05경 지방검찰청 민원실에서 별건 벌금 미납으로 계좌가 압류된 것에 항의하면서 지방검찰청 소속 검찰서기 B에게 소리를 지르며 행패를 부리고, 그곳으로 가져간 서류)를 바닥에 집어던졌다. 피고인은 그곳에 있던 불상자의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 C지구대 소속 경사 D이 피고인에게 진정하라고 권유하였음에도, "죽이라고. 왜 내가 그만해. 들으라고 하는 거야. 국민이 만드는 검찰이라며. 왜 전화를 안 받아. 찾아온 내가 잘못이냐고. 소리치는 내가 잘못이냐고."라고 하면서 계속 큰 소리를 지르며 행패를 부리다가 갑자기 주먹으로 주변에 있던 위 B의 가슴을 1회 때리고, 다시 위 D이 피고인에게 진정하라고 하였음에도, 계속하여 고함을 질렀다. 이에 위 D이 피고인에게 미란다 원칙을 고지하며 공무집행방해 혐의로 현행범인으로 체포할 수 있음을 경고하자, 피고인은 갑자기 발로 위 D의 허벅지를 1회 걷어차고, 양손으로 위 D의 가슴을 1회 밀쳐 폭행하여 공무집행방해 혐의로 현행범인으로 체포되었다. 피고인은 같은 날 12:15경 E에 있는 경찰서 C지구대에 이르러, 위 D이 흥분한 피고인이 벗어둔 신발을 집어 들어 피고인에게 건네주자, 갑자기 발로 위 D의 손을 걷어차 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 검찰 수사관의 검찰행정에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하고, 경찰관의 112신고사건처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On August 31, 2021, at approximately 12:05 p.m., Defendant appeared at the Civil Petition Division (민원실) of the District Prosecutors' Office. Protesting that his account had been frozen due to unpaid fines in a separate case, Defendant shouted at and engaged in disorderly conduct toward Prosecutor's Clerk B, a subordinate of the District Prosecutors' Office, and threw documents he had brought to that location onto the floor.

Upon receiving a report to the emergency hotline (112) from an unidentified person (불상자) present at the scene, Police Officer D, assigned to Police Station C's Police Box, arrived at the location. Despite Officer D's repeated recommendations that Defendant calm down, Defendant continued to shout loudly and engage in disorderly conduct, stating: "Tell me to die. Why should I stop? Listen to what I'm saying. The prosecutors' office is created by the people. Why aren't you answering the phone? Is it my fault for coming here? Is it my fault for shouting? Is it my fault for raising my voice?" Suddenly, Defendant struck Prosecutor's Clerk B's chest once with his fist. When Officer D again advised Defendant to calm down, Defendant continued to shout. At that point, Officer D advised Defendant of Miranda rights and warned that he could be arrested as a suspect committing an offense in flagrante delicto (현행범) for obstructing the performance of official duties (공무집행방해). Defendant then suddenly kicked Officer D's thigh once with his foot and, using both hands, pushed Officer D's chest once, thereby committing assault while obstructing the performance of official duties. Defendant was arrested as a suspect in flagrante delicto for obstruction of the performance of official duties.

On the same day, at approximately 12:15 p.m., Defendant arrived at Police Station C's Police Box located at E. When Officer D picked up shoes that Defendant had removed due to his agitation and offered them to Defendant, Defendant suddenly kicked Officer D's hand with his foot, thereby committing assault.

By these actions, Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by a Prosecutors' Office investigator regarding prosecutorial administration and obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by a police officer regarding the handling of an emergency hotline (112) report.

facts_kr:
『2021고단319』
피고인은 2021. 2. 21. 19:17 B에 있는 경찰서 C지구대에 술에 취한 상태로 방문하여 아무런 이유 없이 ‘택시비를 달라.'라고 요구하고 위 지구대 팀장 D에게 욕설을 하며 다가가, 그 곳에서 근무 중이던 위 지구대 소속 순경 E로부터 제지를 당하고 귀가를 권유받자 위 E에게 욕설을 하며 오른쪽 주먹으로 피해자의 낭심 부위를 1회 때리고, 계속하여 위 지구대 소속 경사 F이 피고인을 진정시키려 하자 양손으로 위 F의 멱살을 잡아 약 3회 흔들고 주먹으로 F의 배를 1회 때리고, 발로 피해자의 양쪽 정강이를 약 3회 때렸다.
이로써 피고인은 민원인 응대 업무를 수행중인 경찰관들의 공무집행을 방해하였다.
『2021고단344』
피고인은 2021. 4. 20. 18:25 G에 있는 ‘H편의점' 앞에서 ‘술 취한 사람이 차를 못 가게 막고 있다.'라는 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 C지구대 소속 경사 I와 순경 J가 귀가를 권유하였다는 이유로, I에게 "씨발. 사진 찍어라. 씨발새끼들 아. 죽여버린다."라고 욕설을 하면서 오른발로 I의 왼쪽 팔을 1회 차고, 수 회 주먹질을 하는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112신고사건 처리에 대한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
『2021고단431』
피고인은 2021. 5. 14. 16:35 B에 있는 경찰서 C지구대 주차장에서 피고인이 술에 취해 택시에서 행패를 부린다는 112 신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 위 지구대 소속 경위 K이 자신에게 귀가를 권유하였다는 이유로, "야이 씨발. 조용해라. 니 좆대로 하라."라고 욕설을 하면서 오른손 주먹으로 위 K의 낭심 부위를 1회 때려 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 112신고 사건처리에 대한 경찰공무원의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## Case No. 2021고단319
The Defendant visited the Police Box C Unit, District Police Station B in an intoxicated state on February 21, 2021, at 19:17. Without any justifiable reason, the Defendant demanded "Give me taxi fare," and uttered profanities toward Team Leader D of the Police Box. When Patrolman E, who was on duty at the Police Box, intervened and suggested the Defendant go home, the Defendant uttered profanities toward Patrolman E and struck the victim's groin area once with a right fist punch. Subsequently, when Senior Patrolman F of the Police Box attempted to calm the Defendant, the Defendant grabbed Senior Patrolman F's collar with both hands and shook it approximately three times, punched the victim's abdomen once with a fist, and kicked the victim's shins on both sides approximately three times with his feet.
By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties of police officers engaged in civil complaint handling.

## Case No. 2021고단344
The Defendant, on April 20, 2021, at 18:25, in front of 'H Convenience Store' located in G, was the subject of a 112 emergency report stating "An intoxicated person is blocking a car." Senior Patrolman I and Patrolman J of Police Box C Unit, District Police Station, dispatched to the scene and suggested the Defendant go home. For this reason, the Defendant uttered profanities toward Senior Patrolman I, stating: "Fuck. Take a photo. You fucking bastards. I'll kill you." The Defendant kicked Senior Patrolman I's left arm once with his right foot and committed assault by punching multiple times.
By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties of police officers in processing a 112 emergency report case.

## Case No. 2021고단431
The Defendant, on May 14, 2021, at 16:35, in the parking lot of Police Box C Unit, District Police Station B, was the subject of a 112 emergency report stating that the Defendant, while intoxicated, was engaging in disorderly conduct in a taxi. Police Captain K of the Police Box Unit, dispatched to the scene, suggested the Defendant go home. For this reason, the Defendant uttered profanities, stating: "Hey, fuck. Shut up. Do whatever the fuck you want." The Defendant then assaulted Police Captain K by striking his groin area once with a right fist punch.
By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties of police officers in processing a 112 emergency report case.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 8. 23. 02:30경 B아파트 인근 편의점에서 아내인 C와 맥주를 마시며 대화하다가 다투게 되었고, 같은 날 05:40경 술에 취한 상태에서 주거지인 위 B아파트 D호로 돌아와 C가 아들인 E의 방 옆 베란다에 숨어 있다고 생각한 후 위 베란다 창문을 맨손으로 깨뜨려 손을 다쳐 피를 흘리고, 이를 말리려는 E의 뺨을 때리는 등 난동을 부렸으며, C는 E으로부터 전화연락을 받고 E이 위험하다고 판단하여 집으로 돌아와 현관문을 열려고 하였으나 현관문이 잠겨 들어갈 수 없게 되자 119에 신고하여 현관문을 강제개방해 줄 것을 요청하였고, 위 신고를 받은 소방관이 경찰관과 함께 위 주거지에 출동하여 현관문을 강제로 개방한 후 주거지 안으로 진입하였다.
피고인은 위와 같이 집 안으로 들어온 중부경찰서 F파출소 소속 경찰관 G으로부터 베란다 창문 손괴와 E에 대한 폭행과 관련한 질문을 받자 "개새끼야, 어디서 거짓말이야, 씨발."이라고 욕설을 하며, 왼손으로 위 G의 오른쪽 어깨 부분을 1회 강하게 밀쳐 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 범죄의 예방ㆍ진압 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On August 23, 2020, at approximately 02:30, the defendant engaged in a drinking conversation with his wife, C, at a convenience store near B Apartment, during which a quarrel ensued. On the same day, at approximately 05:40, in an intoxicated state, the defendant returned to his residence at Unit D of B Apartment, and believing that C was hiding on the veranda adjacent to the room of his son, E, the defendant broke the veranda window with his bare hands, sustaining injuries to his hand and bleeding. The defendant then engaged in a violent disturbance, including striking E's cheek in an attempt to stop the bleeding. C received a telephone call from E, determined that E was in danger, and returned home. Upon attempting to open the entrance door, C found it locked and unable to open; C then called 119 (emergency services) and requested the forcible opening of the entrance door. Upon receiving the report, firefighters arrived at the residence accompanied by police officers, forcibly opened the entrance door, and entered the residence.

When the defendant was questioned by Police Officer G, affiliated with the F Police Box of the Jung-gu Police Station, regarding the breaking of the veranda window and the assault upon E, the defendant uttered profanities, stating: "You fucking bastard, where is this bullshit coming from, fuck." The defendant then forcefully pushed Police Officer G's right shoulder area with his left hand on one occasion, thereby committing an assault.

In doing so, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by a police officer concerning the prevention and suppression of crime and the investigation thereof.

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2017. 12. 22. 지방법원 마약류관리에관한법률위반(향정)죄로 징역 1년 6월을 선고받고 2019. 6. 21. 교도소에서 그 형의 집행을 마쳤다.
피고인은 2021. 1. 21. 지방법원 마약류관리에관한법률위반(향정)죄로 징역 1년 6월을 선고받고 2021. 5. 28. 그 판결이 확정되었다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 2020. 10. 15. 10:02경 구치소 B동 앞 운동장에서 운동을 하던 중, 해당 동 수용관리 업무를 맡고 있는 교도관 C로부터 계호 문제로 인해 수용실 복귀를 제지당하였다는 이유로 "씨발, 아파서 들어가겠다고 비키라고, 씨발, 건들지 마"라고 소리치며 피고인의 행동을 제지하는 위 C의 손을 거칠게 뿌리치고, 계속하여 위 C가 피고인에게 운동장으로 돌아갈 것을 지시하며 손을 피고인의 등에 대자 일부러 바닥에 넘어진 후 위 C에게 "야, 니가 나 쳤냐? 직원이 사람치네, 씨발, 내가 너 고소할거야"라고 소리치는 방법으로 수용실로 가는 길을 막는 경우 위 C에게 어떠한 해악을 가할 것처럼 위협하였다.
이로써 피고인은 협박으로 교정시설 및 수용관리에 관한 위 C의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced to one year and six months' imprisonment by the District Court on December 22, 2017, for a violation of the Narcotics Control Act (psychotropic substances), and completed the execution of said sentence at a correctional institution on June 21, 2019.

The Defendant was sentenced to one year and six months' imprisonment by the District Court on January 21, 2021, for a violation of the Narcotics Control Act (psychotropic substances), and said judgment became final and conclusive on May 28, 2021.

## [Criminal Acts]

On October 15, 2020, at approximately 10:02 a.m., while exercising in the sports yard in front of Building B of the detention facility, the Defendant, upon being prevented from returning to the detention unit by Correctional Officer C, who was responsible for detention management duties at said building, due to an issue with custody procedures, shouted "Fuck, I'm going in because I'm hurt—get out of the way, fuck, don't touch me," and roughly brushed away the hand of said Officer C, who was attempting to restrain the Defendant's actions. Subsequently, when Officer C instructed the Defendant to return to the sports yard and placed his hand on the Defendant's back, the Defendant deliberately fell to the ground, then shouted at Officer C, "Hey, did you hit me? A staff member hitting someone—fuck, I'm going to sue you," thereby obstructing the path to the detention unit and threatening Officer C as if to inflict some form of harm upon him.

In this manner, the Defendant, by means of intimidation (threat), obstructed Officer C's lawful execution of duties relating to the operation and management of the correctional facility.

facts_kr:
1. 112신고사건처리 및 보호조치 공무집행방해
피고인은 2020. 8.1. 01:50경 'B모텔' 앞 도로에서, 피고인이 엎드린 채 자고 있다는 112신고를 받고 출동한 C파출소 소속 경찰공무원인 경장 D으로부터 귀가를 요구받자 이를 거부하면서 "니들이 뭔데, 내가 잘못한 것이 뭔데, 이 개새끼들아."라고 소리지르며 도로로 뛰어들고, 이를 제지하는 경장 D의 가슴을 주먹으로 1회 때리고, 순경 E의 가슴 부위를 손으로 1회 밀친 다음 주먹으로 2회 때렸다. 이로써 피고인은 112신고사건처리 및 주취자 보호조치에 관한 경찰공무원의 직무집행을 각각 방해하였다.
2. 현행범행체포 공무집행방해
피고인은 위 일시, 장소에서 제1항 범행으로 인해 현행범인으로 체포되어 위 순경 E에 의해 순찰차에 탑승하게 되자 발로 순경 E의 얼굴 부위를 1회 걷어찼다.
이로써 피고인은 현행범인 체포에 관한 경찰공무원의 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. OBSTRUCTION OF POLICE OFFICIAL DUTIES IN RESPONSE TO 112 EMERGENCY CALL AND PROTECTIVE CUSTODY MEASURES

On August 1, 2020, at approximately 01:50, in front of the road near "B Motel," the Defendant, having received a 112 emergency call reporting that the Defendant was lying face-down asleep, was approached by Police Sergeant D, a police official attached to C Police Box, who requested that the Defendant return home. Upon refusal, the Defendant shouted, "What the fuck are you? What the fuck did I do wrong, you goddamn bastards?" (니들이 뭔데, 내가 잘못한 것이 뭔데, 이 개새끼들아), then ran into the roadway. The Defendant thereafter struck Police Sergeant D's chest with his fist on one occasion while Police Sergeant D attempted to restrain him, and then pushed Police Officer E's chest area with his hand on one occasion followed by striking Police Officer E with his fist on two occasions. By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the official duties of police officials in processing the 112 emergency call and implementing protective custody measures for intoxicated persons, respectively.

## 2. OBSTRUCTION OF POLICE OFFICIAL DUTIES IN CONNECTION WITH ARREST OF SUSPECT IN FLAGRANTE DELICTO

At the aforementioned time and location, the Defendant, having been arrested as a suspect in flagrante delicto for the criminal conduct described in Count 1 above, was directed to board a patrol vehicle by Police Officer E. While being placed in the patrol vehicle, the Defendant kicked Police Officer E's face area with his foot on one occasion. By this action, the Defendant obstructed the official duties of the police official in effecting the arrest of a suspect in flagrante delicto.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 11. 8. 01:55경 B에 있는 ‘C편의점'에서 술에 취해 그곳 진열대를 발로 차는 등 행패를 부려 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 순경 E으로부터 사건 경위에 대한 질문을 받게 되자 "기분이 나빠서 그랬다. F병원에 보내달라."라고 말을 한 후 그곳 종업원에게 "F병원에 전화해봐."라고 소리를 질러 이에 겁을 먹은 종업원이 자리를 피하였다.
이에 피고인은 순경 E으로부터 밖으로 나가 진술할 것을 요청받으며 제지를 받게 되자 화가 나 순경 E에게 "니가 뭔데 씨발, 나를 제지하냐"라고 욕설을 하며 손으로 순경 E의 몸을 1회 밀고 가슴부위를 1회 때려 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 피고인의 법정진술
1. E에 대한 경찰 진술조서
1. 112 신고 사건 처리표, 근무일지, 수사보고서(CCTV 영상 판독)

facts_en:
On November 8, 2021, at approximately 01:55, the Defendant, while intoxicated, engaged in disorderly conduct at 'C Convenience Store' located in B by kicking the display shelf with his foot. Upon the arrival of police officers dispatched in response to a 112 emergency call, Police Officer E, belonging to D Police Box of the District Police Station, questioned the Defendant regarding the circumstances of the incident. The Defendant responded, "I did it because I was in a bad mood. Send me to F Hospital," and thereafter shouted to a convenience store employee, "Call F Hospital," causing the employee, who became frightened, to leave the area.

Subsequently, when Police Officer E requested the Defendant to step outside and provide a statement and restrained him, the Defendant, angered, directed profanity at Police Officer E, stating "Who the fuck do you think you are, you bastard? Why are you restraining me?" and assaulted the officer by pushing his body with his hand once and striking his chest area once.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful official duties of a police officer in processing an emergency 112 call.

**Summary of Evidence:**
1. In-court testimony of the Defendant
2. Police statement record of Officer E
3. 112 Emergency Call Processing Record, Duty Log, and Investigation Report (CCTV video interpretation)

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 2. 4. 고등법원에서 현주건조물방화예비죄 등으로 징역 1년을 선고받고 2021. 4. 13. 그 판결이 확정되었다.
피고인은 위 범죄전력 기재와 같이 징역 1년을 선고받고 2021. 6. 4. 형기종료로 출소할 때까지 교도소에서 수형 중이던 사람이다.
피고인은 2021. 4. 2. 10:20경 수용거실인 교도소 B실에서, 기초질서위반행위를 단속 중이던 C 소속 교사 D 등이 피고인의 수용중인 방을 지적한다는 이유로 위 교사 D과 시비되어 말다툼을 하던 중, 양손으로 위 교사 D의 가슴 부위를 밀쳐 폭행하여, 교정공무원의 교도소 내 질서유지 및 수용관리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 피고인의 법정진술
1. 피고인에 대한 경찰 피의자신문조서
1. E, F, G, H, D, I, J에 대한 각 경찰 진술조서(사본 포함)
1. 각 근무보고서, 각 수사보고
1. 판시 전과 : 범죄경력등조회결과서, 처분미상전과확인결과보고, 판결문 등

facts_en:
The defendant was sentenced to imprisonment for one year by the High Court on February 4, 2021, for the crime of preparation for arson of an occupied structure, and the judgment became final on April 13, 2021.
The defendant, as set forth in the above recitation of prior convictions, was sentenced to imprisonment for one year and was serving time in a correctional facility until his release on June 4, 2021, upon expiration of his sentence.
On April 2, 2021, at approximately 10:20 a.m., in Housing Unit B of the correctional facility where the defendant was confined, while the defendant was engaged in a verbal altercation and quarrel with Teacher D of Division C, who was engaged in the enforcement of basic order violations and had pointed to the defendant's confined cell as justification therefor, the defendant, using both hands, pushed and shoved the chest area of Teacher D, thereby committing assault and obstructing the lawful execution of duties of a correctional official relating to the maintenance of order and inmate management within the correctional facility.

## Summary of Evidence
1. In-court statement of the defendant
2. Police interrogation record of the defendant as a suspect
3. Police interrogation statements (including copies) of Persons E, F, G, H, D, I, and J
4. Each duty report and each investigation report
5. Prior criminal record as stated in the judgment: criminal history inquiry report, report on disposition of unascertained prior record, judgment document, etc.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2014. 4. 30. 지방법원에서 공무집행방해죄 등으로 징역 8월을 선고받고 2014. 7. 16. 그 형의 집행을 종료하였다.
1. 112신고 사건 처리업무에 대한 공무집행방해
피고인은 2014. 8. 19. 17:45경 'D' 앞길에서 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 E지구대 경사 F를 우연히 보게 되었다.
이에 피고인은 112신고 사건 처리를 하던 F에게 다가가 같은 날 피고인에게 음주소란 행위로 통고처분한 것에 대해 따지며 "이 새끼야 내가 뭘 잘 못했어"라고 하며 오른손 손가락으로 F의 가슴을 3~4회 찌르고, 그 모습을 촬영하던 휴대폰을 내리쳐 땅바닥에 떨어뜨리게 하였다.
이로써 피고인은 위와 같은 방법으로 112신고 사건 처리업무에 관한 F의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 112순찰업무에 대한 공무집행방해
피고인은 2014. 8. 19. 18:05경 제1항 기재와 같은 장소에서, 위 F에게 "배 째라고, 아니 데려다달라고, 경찰서"라고 말하며 통고처분에 대한 이의를 제기하여, F와 함께 112순찰차에 탑승하여 경찰서로 가던 중 F에게 "이 개새끼야 너 아까 거기서 내 다리 갔지? 내 무릎 이렇게 다쳤네. 너 고소할 거야"라고 말하고, 계속하여 같은 날 18:20경 경찰서 정문 앞에 도착하여 내린 후 112순찰을 위해 지구대로 복귀하는 위 112순찰차의 앞을 갑자기 가로막고 보닛 위로 올라가 F에게 "내 가방 가져와 씨발놈아. 이 개새끼야. 니들이 경찰이야. 고소할거야"라고 말하며 F가 피고인을 때린 사실이 없음에도 F가 폭행하였으니 고소하겠다고 F를 협박하였다.
이로써 피고인은 위와 같은 방법으로 112순찰업무에 관한 F의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant was sentenced to eight months' imprisonment for Obstruction of Justice in the Execution of Official Duties, et al., by the District Court on April 30, 2014, and completed the execution of that sentence on July 16, 2014.

**1. Obstruction of the Execution of Official Duties Related to Emergency Call (112) Report Processing Operations**

On August 19, 2014, at approximately 17:45, the Defendant happened to encounter Sergeant F of the E Police Station Branch, who had responded to the scene upon receiving an emergency call (112 report) in front of road "D."

The Defendant approached Sergeant F, who was processing the emergency call report, and proceeded to dispute a citation issued to the Defendant on the same date for disorderly conduct while intoxicated. The Defendant stated, "What the fuck did I do wrong, you asshole," and jabbed Sergeant F's chest three to four times with his right index finger. The Defendant then struck downward at a mobile phone that was recording these events, causing it to fall to the ground.

By engaging in the foregoing conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by Sergeant F with respect to the processing of emergency call (112) reports.

**2. Obstruction of the Execution of Official Duties Related to Emergency Call (112) Patrol Operations**

On August 19, 2014, at approximately 18:05, at the same location as described in Section 1 above, the Defendant spoke to Sergeant F, stating, "Split your belly, or rather, take me to the police station," and lodged an objection to the citation. The Defendant then boarded the 112 patrol vehicle together with Sergeant F and proceeded toward the police station. While en route, the Defendant told Sergeant F, "You son of a bitch, didn't you grab my leg back there? Look how badly you injured my knee. I'm going to sue you."

Subsequently, at approximately 18:20 on the same date, upon arriving at and exiting the police station's main entrance, the Defendant suddenly obstructed the front of the 112 patrol vehicle as it was returning to the police station branch for patrol operations. The Defendant climbed onto the hood of the vehicle and stated to Sergeant F, "Bring me my bag, you fucking bastard. You son of a bitch. You call yourselves police. I'm going to sue you." Despite the fact that Sergeant F had not committed any act of assault against the Defendant, the Defendant threatened Sergeant F by stating that he would file a complaint alleging that Sergeant F had assaulted him.

By engaging in the foregoing conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by Sergeant F with respect to emergency call (112) patrol operations.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 1. 25. 23:20경 B 앞길에서, '피고인의 자녀가 계단에서 떨어지는 사고가 났다'는 119구급대의 소방공동대응요청 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 C지구대 소속 경장 D에게 피고인의 자녀가 후송된 병원으로 태워달라고 요청하여 순찰차로 이동하던 중, 위 D이 경찰서 종합상황실에 '아이는 괜찮다'는 취지로 상황보고하자, 피고인 자녀의 상태를 제대로 확인하지 아니하고 그와 같이 보고한 것에 화가 나 "개새끼야, 똑바로 말 못하나"라는 등 욕설을 하였고, 이에 위 D으로부터 순찰차에서 하차할 것을 요구받아 순찰차에서 내렸다.
이어 피고인은 위 D에게 이름 및 직위 등을 확인하자며 위 D의 경찰조끼를 세게 잡아당기고 이를 제지하는 위 D의 몸을 밀치는 등 폭행하고, 계속하여 위 D 등이 순찰 등 기본업무로 전환하기 위하여 순찰차에 탑승하려고 하자 순찰차 바로 옆에 버티고 서서 "왜 확인도 안하고 그렇게 보고하는 것이냐"는 취지로 계속 항의하면서 순찰차의 출발을 막고, 이에 위 D 등이 순찰차 운행을 방해하지 말 것을 수차례 경고하였음에도 순찰차에 탑승 및 하차를 반복하고, 순찰차에 기대어 서서 담배를 피며 버티고 서 있는 등의 행위를 하여 약 10분 간 순찰차의 진행을 방해하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰 공무원의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On January 25, 2020, at approximately 23:20 hours, in front of Road B, the accused, upon learning that Officer D, a police sergeant assigned to Police Station C's District Unit, had been dispatched to the scene in response to a 112 emergency call reporting a request for joint fire and emergency response from the 119 Emergency Medical Services, which had reported that "the accused's child had suffered an accident by falling from stairs," requested that Officer D provide transportation in the patrol vehicle to the hospital to which the accused's child had been transported.

While the patrol vehicle was in transit, when Officer D reported to the Police Station's Integrated Situation Room to the effect that "the child is fine," the accused, without properly ascertaining the condition of his or her own child and angered at Officer D's reporting in that manner, uttered profanity, stating "You fucking bastard, can't you speak straight?" and similar insults. In response, Officer D demanded that the accused exit the patrol vehicle, which the accused complied with.

Subsequently, the accused, requesting that Officer D verify his or her name and official position, forcefully seized and pulled at Officer D's police vest and, in further conduct, pushed Officer D's body as Officer D attempted to restrain the accused's actions, thereby committing assault.

Thereafter, when Officer D and others attempted to transfer to basic patrol duties and board the patrol vehicle, the accused positioned himself directly beside the patrol vehicle and continuously protested to the effect of "Why are you reporting without even confirming the facts?" thereby blocking the patrol vehicle's departure. Despite Officer D and others repeatedly warning the accused on multiple occasions not to obstruct the operation of the patrol vehicle, the accused repeatedly boarded and exited the patrol vehicle, stood leaning against the patrol vehicle while smoking a cigarette, and engaged in similar conduct, thereby obstructing the progress of the patrol vehicle for approximately ten minutes.

By such conduct, the accused obstructed the legitimate official duties of police civil servants in the processing of emergency calls under Article 112 of the Criminal Act.

facts_kr:
피고인은 코로나19 위기 극복을 위한 긴급재난지원금을 신청하기 위하여 2020. 5. 6. 11:15경 C 행정복지센터 2층 대회의실을 방문하여 그곳에 마련된 3번 창구에서 긴급재난지원금을 신청하였다. 그러나, 위 행정복지센터에서 근무하는 D이 "오늘은 지방 긴급재난지원금 신청을 받고 있다. 정부형 긴급재난지원금은 5. 18.부터 신청을 받고 있는데, 지자체 사정상 5. 25.부터 동사무소에 오시면 받을 수 있다. 아니면 5. 11.부터 온라인 신청을 하면 된다"라는 취지로 설명하자, 피고인은 위 D에게 "지방 긴급재난지원금은 이미 받아서 다 썼다. 난 오늘 정부형 긴급재난지원금을 신청하러 왔고, 오늘 안주면 안가겠다"고 말하며 3번 창구 의자에 버티고 앉았다.
피고인은 같은 날 11:50경 위 행정복지센터 2층 대회의실에서 행정복지센터 비상벨 신고를 받고 출동한 중부경찰서 E지구대 소속 경장 F 등으로부터 위 행정복지센터에서 나가줄 것을 거듭 요청받자 3번 창구 의자에서 일어난 다음 바닥에 주저앉았다. 이에 순경 G과 순경 H이 피고인을 부축하여 일으켜 세우자, 피고인은 위 순경 G의 멱살을 잡고, 경찰관들에게 "씨발새끼들"이라고 욕설을 하며 경장 F의 배를 1회 걷어찼다.
계속하여 피고인은 경찰관들에 의해 1층으로 이동 조치되자 순경 H의 머리채를 움켜쥐고 놓아주지 않았다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 신고처리 및 질서유지에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant visited the second floor conference room of the C Administrative Welfare Center on May 6, 2020, at approximately 11:15 a.m. to apply for emergency disaster relief funds in response to the COVID-19 crisis, and submitted an application for emergency disaster relief funds at Window No. 3 located therein. However, when D, an employee at the Administrative Welfare Center, explained that "we are currently accepting applications for local emergency disaster relief funds. Applications for government-administered emergency disaster relief funds will be accepted from May 18th onward, but due to local government circumstances, you may apply from May 25th onward at the dong office, or alternatively, you may submit an online application beginning May 11th," the Defendant told D, "I have already received the local emergency disaster relief funds and spent them all. I came here today to apply for government-administered emergency disaster relief funds, and I will not leave unless I receive them today," and then braced himself firmly in the chair at Window No. 3.

At approximately 11:50 a.m. on the same day, when Sergeant F and other personnel from the Jung-bu Police Station E District Unit, who had been dispatched in response to an emergency alarm call made from the Administrative Welfare Center, repeatedly requested that the Defendant leave the Administrative Welfare Center, the Defendant stood up from the chair at Window No. 3 and then sat down on the floor. When Patrol Officer G and Patrol Officer H assisted the Defendant and lifted him to his feet, the Defendant grabbed Patrol Officer G's collar, directed profanity at the police officers saying "fucking bastards," and kicked Sergeant F's abdomen once.

Subsequently, when the Defendant was moved to the first floor by the police officers, he grasped Patrol Officer H's hair and did not release it.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by the police officers concerning the handling of the report and the maintenance of public order.

facts_kr:
1. 출동 경찰관들에 대한 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 4. 18. 18:07경 ‘OOOO 식육식당'에서 주문한 포장 소고기를 바닥에 집어던지고 소란을 피웠다. 이에 신고를 받고 출동한 중부경찰서 C지구대 소속 경찰관 D가 피고인에게 "무슨 일 있습니까?"라고 사건 경위를 질문하자, 화가 난 피고인은 위 D에게 "짭새, 너거는 가라, 이 새끼들아"라고 소리치면서 배로 D의 몸을 밀고, 피고인의 팔을 잡으면서 제지하는 경찰관 E의 팔을 손으로 2회 내려친 후, 손으로 E의 목을 잡아 밀었다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관들의 신고사무처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 현행범인체포 경찰관에 대한 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 4. 18. 18:20경 제1항 기재 공무집행방해죄로 현행범인으로 체포되어, 순찰차로의창구 F에 있는 C지구대 앞으로 호송된 후, 경찰관 G이 피고인을 순찰차에서 하차시켜 지구대로 호송하려고 하자 발로 위 G의 배 부분을 1회 걷어찼다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 현행범인체포에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Obstruction of Justice Against Responding Police Officers

On April 18, 2021, at approximately 18:07, the Defendant threw a packaged beef order purchased from 'OOOO Meat Restaurant' onto the floor and created a disturbance. In response to a report of the incident, Police Officer D, assigned to the C Police Substation of the Jung District Police Station, arrived at the scene and asked the Defendant, "What is the matter?" in order to ascertain the circumstances of the incident. The Defendant, angered, shouted at the aforementioned Officer D, "You fucking cop, get the fuck out of here, you assholes," while pushing Officer D's body with his belly. Subsequently, as Police Officer E attempted to restrain the Defendant by grabbing his arm, the Defendant struck Officer E's arm downward with his hand twice, and thereafter grabbed Officer E by the neck and pushed him.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of duties by police officers in connection with the processing of a report and criminal investigation.

## 2. Obstruction of Justice Against a Police Officer Executing an Arrest in Flagrante Delicto

On April 18, 2021, at approximately 18:20, the Defendant, having been arrested in flagrante delicto for the obstruction of justice offense described in Section 1 above, was transported by patrol vehicle window F to the front of the C Police Substation. As Police Officer G attempted to have the Defendant alight from the patrol vehicle and transport him to the police substation, the Defendant kicked Officer G once in the abdominal area with his foot.

By this action, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of duties by the police officer in connection with the arrest in flagrante delicto.

facts_en:
# CRIMINAL RECORD

The Defendant was sentenced on June 12, 2018, by the District Court to ten months imprisonment with a suspended sentence of two years for violation of the Special Act on Handling of Traffic Accidents (inflicting injury), among other charges. The judgment became final and binding on June 20, 2018, and the Defendant is currently in the execution period of the suspended sentence.

# CRIMINAL ACTS

On September 6, 2019, at approximately 01:20 hours, the Defendant was at a drinking establishment (pub) operated by Person C. Upon receiving a 112 emergency report that the Defendant had assaulted Person C without paying for his alcoholic beverages, officers from the Western Police Station E Police Box—specifically Senior Police Officer F and Police Officer G—were dispatched to the scene. When the Defendant was restrained from hurling profanities and engaging in verbal altercation with Person C, the Defendant shouted, "You bastards, get the fuck out of here," and struck Police Officer F on the right shoulder with his fist once, and struck Police Officer G on the head with his fist once, thereby committing assault.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of duty of police officers in handling the 112 emergency report case.

# SUMMARY OF EVIDENCE

1. In-court testimony of the Defendant
2. Police interrogation record of the Defendant as a suspect
3. Respective police witness statements of Persons G and F
4. Prior conviction as adjudicated: Criminal record inquiry response certificate; investigation report (documentation of the suspended sentence judgment rendered against the suspect)

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 8. 14. 14:00경 B아파트 관리사무소에서, 위 아파트 관리사무소장이 교육확인증이 없이 교육을 갔고, 아파트 관리비가 많이 나온다는 이유로 "니미, 시발 다 엎어버려."라고 말하면서 시비하던 중, 그곳에 있던 자치회장 C, 주민 D이 피고인을 제지하자, 관리사무소 내에 비치된 소화기를 손으로 들어 사무실 입구 쪽에서 안쪽을 향해 호스를 겨누면서 "니미 씨발, 확뿌려버린다."라고 위협하였다.
피고인은 위와 같은 소란으로 112신고를 받고 출동한 E파출소 소속 경위 F, 경사 G으로부터 제지를 당하자, "개새끼들, 뇌물 처먹었냐."라고 말하면서 관리소장을 당장 조사하여 달라고 하고, 계속하여 크게 소리를 지르면서 화를 내던 중 갑자기 관리사무소 밖으로 나가고, 피고인을 따라 나온 위 F에게 '이 개새끼들아'라고 욕설을 하면서, 피고인의 손에 들고 있던 휴대전화를 위 F의 발 부위를 향하여 집어 던져 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리 업무에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On August 14, 2019, at approximately 14:00 hours, at the management office of Apartment Complex B, the Defendant engaged in a verbal altercation with the management office director, disputing over the fact that the director had attended training without an education confirmation certificate and that apartment management fees had increased substantially. During this dispute, the Defendant uttered: "You fucking bitch, I'll flip this whole shit upside down." When the Defendant's conduct was interrupted by Resident C, who serves as the neighborhood council chair, and Resident D, the Defendant retrieved a fire extinguisher kept in the management office, aimed its hose from the entrance of the office toward the interior, and threatened: "You fucking bitch, I'll spray this shit all over you."

Subsequently, upon the arrival of Police Officer F and Police Sergeant G, dispatched from E Police Box in response to a 112 emergency report concerning the aforementioned disturbance, and upon being stopped by these officers, the Defendant stated: "You dog bastards, did you eat bribes?" The Defendant then demanded that the management office director be questioned immediately and continued to raise his voice in anger. Abruptly, the Defendant exited the management office. Following the Defendant outside, Police Officer F attempted further intervention, whereupon the Defendant directed profanities at Officer F, saying: "You dog bastards," and hurled a mobile telephone he was holding toward Officer F's foot area, thereby committing an assault.

By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties of a police officer in processing an emergency report under Article 112 of the Criminal Act.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 3. 20. 00:02경 B 앞길에서 ‘피고인이 술에 취하여 쓰러져 있다'는 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 C지구대 소속 경사 D로부터, 피고인이 술에 취하였으나 자신 또는 다른 사람의 생명·신체·재산에 위해를 끼칠 우려가 있는 상태에 있지는 아니함을 확인받고 스스로 귀가하라는 안내를 받았다.
곧이어 피고인은 별건 112 신고를 받고 출동하려고 하는 D 운전의 (차량번호 1 생략) LF소나타 순찰차의 운전석 문짝을 열고, "어린놈의 새끼가 싸가지가 없네"라고 욕설하면서 E아파트에 피고인의 주거지까지 자신을 태워 달라고 요구하여, D로부터 위 행위가 공무집행방해에 해당함을 고지받았다.
그럼에도 불구하고 피고인은 재차 D 운전의 위 순찰차에 다가와 운전석 문짝을 두드리고, D이 운전석 문을 열려고 하자 이를 밀어 닫으며 "E아파트 F동"이라고 큰소리치는 등 D의 순찰차 운전을 방해하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112 신고 사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
**The Accused**, at approximately 00:02 on March 20, 2021, in front of B Road, was encountered by Police Sergeant D of the C Police Station District Unit, who had been dispatched in response to a 112 emergency report stating that "the Accused is lying collapsed due to intoxication." Sergeant D confirmed that although the Accused was intoxicated, the Accused was not in a state posing a risk of harm to the life, body, or property of himself or others. The Accused was subsequently provided guidance to return home voluntarily.

Immediately thereafter, the Accused, while Sergeant D was preparing to respond to a separate 112 emergency report, opened the driver's side door of an LF Sonata patrol vehicle (Vehicle Registration Number 1 omitted) operated by D, and uttered profanities stating, "You fucking punk has no fucking manners," while demanding that D transport him to his residential address at E Apartment. Sergeant D then informed the Accused that such conduct constituted obstruction of official duties.

Notwithstanding this notification, the Accused again approached Sergeant D's patrol vehicle, knocked on the driver's side door, and when D attempted to open the driver's door, the Accused forcibly pushed it closed and loudly shouted "E Apartment Building F" and otherwise obstructed Sergeant D's operation of the patrol vehicle.

By such conduct, the Accused obstructed a police official's lawful performance of official duties in relation to the processing of an emergency report (112 call).

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 9. 29. 02:14경 공원 사거리 앞 도로에서, ‘도로에 남자가 누워있다'는 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 B지구대 소속 경위 C과 경장 D으로부터 "도로상에 누워있으면 위험하니 다른 곳으로 이동해 달라."고 수회 권유를 받았음에도 D에게 수회 욕설을 하며 자신이 착용하고 있던 모자로 D의 얼굴을 2회 때렸고, 이후 D이 피고인을 일으켜 세우자 머리로 D의 얼굴을 들이 받았다.
계속하여 피고인은 위와 같은 사실로 공무집행방해 현행범인으로 체포되어 순찰차 뒷좌석에 탑승한 후 2020. 9. 29. 02:20경 E에 있는 ‘B지구대' 앞으로 이동하던 중, 순찰차 내부에 있는 운전석 아크릴판 가림막을 발로 수회 걷어 차는 등 난동을 부렸고, 이에 D이 그러한 피고인의 행동을 제지하려고 하자 치아로 D의 팔과 허벅지를 물었고, 그로 인하여 D이 이를 피하려다 다리를 순찰차 문에 부딪치게 하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리 및 현행범인 인치에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
**Defendant's Actions and Obstruction of Justice**

On September 29, 2020, at approximately 02:14, on the road in front of the Park intersection, the defendant received multiple verbal requests from Sergeant C and Police Officer D of the B District Police Box, who had been dispatched to the scene in response to a 112 emergency call reporting "a male lying on the road," to relocate to a safer location as remaining on the roadway posed a danger. Despite these repeated requests, the defendant directed profanity at Police Officer D on multiple occasions, struck Police Officer D's face twice with a hat that the defendant was wearing, and subsequently headbutted Police Officer D's face after D attempted to help the defendant to his feet.

Thereafter, the defendant was arrested as a current offender for obstruction of justice in official duties based on the aforementioned conduct. While the defendant was seated in the rear of the patrol vehicle and being transported to the B District Police Box located in E at approximately 02:20 on September 29, 2020, the defendant engaged in disorderly conduct by repeatedly kicking the acrylic protective barrier panel of the driver's seat inside the patrol vehicle with his foot. When Police Officer D attempted to restrain the defendant's conduct, the defendant bit Police Officer D's arm and thigh with his teeth. In an effort to evade these bites, Police Officer D struck his leg against the patrol vehicle's door.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by a police officer, specifically the processing of the 112 emergency call incident and the arrest and delivery of a current offender into custody.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 11. 27.경 B 관리의 공영주차장 주차요원으로 근무하던 중 해고된 사림이고, B 소속 공무원으로서, 정책보좌관 C은 구청장 정책 보좌 업무를, 비서실장 D은 비서실 총괄 업무를, 의전비서 E은 구청장 특명사항 처리 업무를, 수행비서 F는 구청장 일정 수행 업무를, 비서관 G는 구청장실 운영관리 업무를, 총무팀장 H은 총무팀 총괄 업무를, 주무관 I는 근로자관리 업무를, 주무관 J는 보안 및 청사방호 업무를, 청원경찰 K은 청사방호 업무를, 청원경찰 L은 청사방호 업무를 각각 수행한 사림들이다.
피고인은 2021. 3. 30. 13:30경 M에 있는 B 3층에 있는 구청장실 앞에서, 피고인이 위와 같이 B 관리의 공영주차장 주차요원에서 해고되고 재차 채용되지 못한 사실 등에 대하여 항의하기 위해 구청장실로 들어가려 하였으나 위 B 소속 공무원들이 피고인을 제지한다는 이유로 화가 나, 손으로 G의 멱살을 잡고 흔들고, 발로 D의 낭심 부위를 걷어차고, 발과 주먹으로 C의 머리와 다리를 수회 때리고, 손으로 E의 얼굴을 밀치고, 발과 주먹으로 J의 팔과 다리를 수회 때리고, 발로 H의 허벅지와 정강이를 1회 차고, 발로 I의 무릎을 수회 걷어차고, 발로 F의 몸을 수회 걷어차고, 발로 K의 정강이를 2회 걷어차고, 발로 L의 다리를 3회 걷어차는 등의 방법으로 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 B 소속 공무원 10명의 구청장 보좌, 청사 방호 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 각각 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant is an individual who was dismissed from his position as a parking attendant at the public parking lot managed by B around November 27, 2020. At the time of the incident, the following individuals were civil servants belonging to B: Policy Advisor C, who performed duties assisting the District Head's policies; Secretary-General D, who oversaw general secretarial operations; Protocol Secretary E, who handled special assignments from the District Head; Executive Secretary F, who managed the District Head's schedule; Secretary G, who managed the operations of the District Head's office; General Affairs Team Leader H, who oversaw the General Affairs Team; Administrative Officer I, who managed labor relations; Administrative Officer J, who handled security and building protection; Special Police Officer K, who performed building protection duties; and Special Police Officer L, who performed building protection duties.

On March 30, 2021, at approximately 13:30, in front of the District Head's office located on the 3rd floor of B at location M, the defendant attempted to enter the District Head's office in order to lodge a protest regarding his dismissal from the position of parking attendant at the public parking lot managed by B and his subsequent failure to be rehired. Upon being obstructed by the aforementioned civil servants belonging to B, the defendant became enraged and committed assault as follows: he grabbed and shook G by the collar with his hands; he kicked D in the lower abdomen with his foot; he struck C's head and legs multiple times with his feet and fists; he pushed E's face with his hands; he struck J's arms and legs multiple times with his feet and fists; he kicked H's thighs and shins once with his foot; he kicked I's knees multiple times with his foot; he kicked F's body multiple times with his foot; he kicked K's shins twice with his foot; and he kicked L's legs three times with his foot.

By engaging in such conduct, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by ten civil servants belonging to B, specifically their duties pertaining to assisting the District Head and protecting the municipal building.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 7. 13. 19:06경 술에 취한 상태에서 ‘B' 택시 호출을 하였음에도 택시가 오지 않는다는 이유로 화가 나 이를 항의하기 위해 ‘시설관리공단'에 찾아가 "담당 직원을 불러라. 책임자 오라 그래, 나오라 그래!"라고 고함을 치는 등 소란을 피우게 되었다.
피고인은 2021. 7. 13. 19:13경 위 시설관리공단에서 ‘민원인이 소란을 피우는데 좀 도와달라'는 112 신고를 접수하고 현장에 출동한 남부경찰서 C파출소 소속 경위 D으로부터 제지를 당하자 위 D에게 "씨발 새끼야, 너거들 뭐 하러 왔어 빨리 가!"라고 욕설을 하고, 계속해서 위 D으로부터 "선생님 욕을 하시면 안 됩니다"라는 말을 듣자 화가 나 양 주먹으로 위 D의 턱 부위를 1회 때려 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 피고인의 법정진술
1. D에 대한 경찰 진술조서

facts_en:
The Defendant, while intoxicated, made a call requesting a 'B' taxi on July 13, 2021, at approximately 19:06. Upon learning that the taxi was not arriving, the Defendant became angry and, in order to lodge a protest, visited the 'Facilities Management Corporation' where he shouted and caused a disturbance, saying "Call the responsible staff member. Tell the person in charge to come out. Come on out!" and similar utterances.

At approximately 19:13 on July 13, 2021, the Facilities Management Corporation received a 112 emergency call report stating "A civil complainant is causing a disturbance; please help," and officers from the C Police Box of the Nambu Police Station dispatched to the scene. When the Defendant was restrained by Gyeongwi (Patrol Officer) D, a member of the aforementioned C Police Box, the Defendant hurled profanity at D, saying "Fuck you, you bastard, what the hell are you doing here? Get the fuck out!" Subsequently, upon hearing D say "Sir, you must not use profane language," the Defendant became enraged and struck D once on the jaw with both fists, thereby committing assault.

In this manner, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by Gyeongwi D of the police in processing a 112 emergency call incident.

## Summary of Evidence
1. In-court testimony of the Defendant
2. Police statement record of D

facts_kr:
피고인은 B소속 군인이다.
피고인은 2019. 11. 23. 01:30경 'D' 앞길에서 고성을 지르는 등 행패를 부리던 중 '외국인이 난동을 부리고 있다'는 112신고를 받고 출동한 중부경찰서 E파출소 소속 경찰관 F으로부터 제지당하자 "Fuck you, 짭새 좆까"라고 욕설을 하며 손으로 경찰관 F의 뺨을 1회 때려 폭행하였다.
계속하여 피고인은 같은 날 01:48경 위 파출소 소속 경찰관 G으로부터 현행범인으로 체포되어 H에 있는 E파출소로 인치된 후 그곳 바닥과 집기 등에 침을 뱉는 등 소란을 피우던 중, 그곳에서 근무 중이던 위 파출소 소속 경찰관 I이 이를 제지한다는 이유로 화가 나 발로 I의 낭심을 1회 걷어 차고 경찰관 제복 상의에 침을 1회 뱉어 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 2회에 걸쳐 경찰관 F, 경찰관 J을 각 폭행하여 경찰관들의 범죄의 진압 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 각각 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant is a military serviceman assigned to Unit B.

On November 23, 2019, at approximately 01:30, while the Defendant was creating a disturbance and shouting loudly in front of location 'D', Police Officer F from the E Police Substation affiliated with the Jung-gu Police Station, who had responded to a 112 emergency report stating that "a foreigner is causing a riot," attempted to restrain the Defendant. Upon being restrained by Police Officer F, the Defendant uttered profane language, saying "Fuck you, you fucking cop" ("Fuck you, 짭새 좆까"), and struck Police Officer F on the cheek once with his hand, thereby committing assault.

Subsequently, on the same day at approximately 01:48, the Defendant was arrested as a flagrante delicto offender by Police Officer G from the aforementioned Police Substation and was transferred to the E Police Substation located at H. While there, the Defendant was spitting on the floor, furniture, and other objects and creating a disturbance. When Police Officer I, who was on duty at that location, attempted to restrain the Defendant for these reasons, the Defendant became angered. The Defendant then kicked Police Officer I's groin once and spat on the chest of the police officer's uniform once, thereby committing assault.

Through these incidents occurring on two separate occasions, the Defendant assaulted Police Officer F and Police Officer I respectively, thereby obstructing and interfering with the lawful performance of their official duties relating to the suppression of crime and criminal investigation.

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2020. 6. 9. 지방법원 도로교통법위반(음주운전)죄로 징역 1년에 집행유예 2년을 선고받고 2020. 6. 12. 그 판결이 확정되었다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 2020. 5. 21. 23:30경 B빌딩 앞길에서, 주취자(피고인)로부터 죽을 것이라는 119신고가 접수되었다는 소방 공동대응 요청 112신고를 받고 출동한 중부경찰서 C지구대 소속 경장 D, 순경 E를 상대로 휴대폰을 바닥에 집어던지는 등 행패를 부리다가 갑자기 차도로 뛰어드는 행동을 하였고, 이에 위 경찰관들이 피고인을 제지하자 발로 순경 E의 왼쪽 무릎을 걷어차고, 팔로 경장 D을 밀치고, 팔꿈치로 경장 D의 가슴 부분을 때리고, 발로 경장 D의 종아리 부분을 걷어차고, 위 경찰관들이 피고인을 공무집행방해 현행범인으로 체포하는 과정에서 발로 경장 D의 오른쪽 귀 부분을 걷어차는 등 위 경찰관들을 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 위 경찰관들의 112신고 사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 각각 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

On June 9, 2020, the Defendant was sentenced by the District Court to one (1) year of imprisonment with a suspended sentence of two (2) years for a violation of the Road Traffic Act (driving under the influence of alcohol). The judgment became final and conclusive on June 12, 2020.

## [Criminal Acts]

On May 21, 2020, at approximately 11:30 p.m., in front of B Building, in response to a 112 emergency report requesting joint fire department response (arising from a 119 emergency call received regarding a statement by an intoxicated person—the Defendant—that he would die), Sergeant D and Officer E of the Central Police Station C District Unit, who responded to the dispatch, encountered the Defendant. The Defendant engaged in disorderly conduct, including hurling his mobile phone to the ground, and suddenly dashed into the roadway. When the above police officers attempted to restrain the Defendant, he kicked Officer E's left knee with his foot, pushed Sergeant D with his arm, struck Sergeant D's chest area with his elbow, kicked Sergeant D's calf area with his foot, and, in the course of the above police officers' arrest of the Defendant as a perpetrator caught in the act of obstructing official duties, kicked Sergeant D's right ear area with his foot, thereby assaulting the above police officers.

In so doing, the Defendant obstructed the lawful discharge of official duties of the above police officers in processing the 112 emergency call incident.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 7.1.19:00경 B에 있는 C 유치원 앞 하천가에서 술이 취한 채로 누워있던 중, '사람이 누워있다'는 내용의 119신고를 받고 동부소방서 119구급대 소속 D이 출동하자, 아무런 이유 없이 '너, 이리와, 죽인다'는 등 욕설을 하며 달려들어 멱살을 잡아 흔들고, 약 4분 동안 때릴 듯이 쫓아다니면서 D의 얼굴을 향해 손을 올리는 등 폭행하였다.
피고인은 계속하여 같은 날 19:10경 위 장소에서, 소방공동대응 112신고를 받고 동부경찰서 E지구대 소속 경위 F이 출동하여 신고경위에 대해 확인하려고 하자, '야이, 개새끼야, 너는 뭐냐, 이 씨팔놈아, 개새끼야'는 등 욕설을 하고, 양손으로 F의 왼쪽 팔목을 잡고 비트는 폭행을 하였다.
이로써 피고인은 정당한 사유없이 소방관의 구조·구급에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하고, 경찰관의 범죄의 예방·진압 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant, while lying intoxicated around 19:00 on July 1, 2020, near a stream in front of C Kindergarten located in B, upon receiving a 119 emergency report regarding a person lying down, assaulted firefighter D, belonging to the Dongbu Fire Station 119 Emergency Medical Services unit who responded to the call, without any justifiable reason. Specifically, the defendant uttered profanity including "You, come here, I'll kill you" and rushed at D, grabbed him by the collar and shook him, chased him while appearing to strike him for approximately 4 minutes, and raised his hand toward D's face, thereby committing assault.

Subsequently, at the same location around 19:10 on the same day, the defendant, upon police officer F, a Korean National Police University graduate rank officer belonging to the E Police Box of the Dongbu Police Station, responding to a 119 joint emergency dispatch call and attempting to confirm the circumstances of the report, uttered profanity including "Hey, you fucking bastard, who the fuck are you, you son of a bitch, fucking bastard," and with both hands grabbed and twisted police officer F's left wrist, thereby committing assault.

By these actions, the defendant, without any justifiable reason, obstructed the legitimate discharge of official duties by the firefighter relating to rescue and emergency medical services, and obstructed the legitimate discharge of official duties by the police officer relating to crime prevention, suppression, and criminal investigation.

facts_kr:
전제사실
피고인은 어머니인 B을 폭행하였다가 그녀의 처벌불원의사 표시로 인해 2014. 11.경부터 2017. 9.경까지 총 4회에 걸쳐 공소권없음 처분을 받은 사실이 있다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 2018. 11. 16. 늦은 밤 C아파트 D호에 있는 주거지에서 어머니인 B과 다투고 집을 나간 후 반복해서 아파트 현관문을 발로 걷어차며 출입문을 강제로 열려고 하였고, 이에 B은 112신고를 하였으며, 위 신고를 받고 경찰서 E지구대 소속 경위 F 등이 출동하였으나, 피고인은 출동한 경찰들을 피해 옥상으로 도망을 갔고 피고인을 찾지 못한 경찰들이 돌아가면 다시 위와 같은 행동을 반복하였고 그러한 과정이 수회 반복되었다.
이후 피고인은 같은 날 23:00경 위 D호 앞에서 다시 현관문을 걷 차다가 다시 출동한 위 경위 F 등에게 발각되어 옥상으로 도주하였고, 피고인을 쫓아 온 F로부터 어머니를 때리려고 하는 경위, 문을 걷어 찬 경위, 도망간 경위등에 대한 질문을 받고도 아무런 대답을 하지 않은 채 팔로 F 등을 때릴 듯이 행동하며 다시 도망가려고 하였고, 이에 F 등으로부터 보호조치를 당하며 수갑이 채워져 아파트 1층으로 내려오게 되었다.
이후 피고인은 그 무렵 위 아파트 1층에서, 갑자기 옆에 주차된 불상의 차량을 발로 찼고, 채워진 수갑을 푼 후 주먹으로 위 F의 얼굴과 머리를 수회 가격하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112신고 사건 처리 및 보호조치 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
# PRELIMINARY FACTS

The Defendant previously assaulted her mother, B. Due to B's expression of unwillingness to pursue prosecution, the Defendant received a disposition of "No Authority to Prosecute" on four separate occasions spanning from November 2014 to September 2017.

# CRIMINAL ACTS

On November 16, 2018, late in the evening, the Defendant engaged in a quarrel with her mother, B, at their residence located in Unit D of Apartment C. After leaving the residence, the Defendant repeatedly kicked the apartment entrance door with her foot, attempting to forcibly open the door. In response, B called the police (112 emergency line). Upon receiving the report, Police Officer F and other officers from Police Box E attached to the Police Station responded to the scene. However, the Defendant evaded the responding police officers and fled to the rooftop. When the police officers, having failed to locate the Defendant, departed the scene, the Defendant repeated the aforementioned conduct, and this cycle repeated multiple times.

Subsequently, at approximately 23:00 on the same day, as the Defendant was again kicking the entrance door in front of Unit D, she was discovered by Police Officer F and other officers who had responded once more. The Defendant then fled to the rooftop. As Officer F pursued the Defendant to the rooftop, Officer F questioned the Defendant regarding the circumstances of her attempting to strike her mother, kicking the door, and her flight. The Defendant failed to provide any response and instead gestured as though to strike Officer F and the other officers with her arms while attempting to flee once again. Consequently, Officer F and the other officers took protective measures, placed handcuffs on the Defendant, and brought her down to the first floor of the apartment.

Thereafter, at approximately that time on the first floor of the apartment, the Defendant suddenly kicked a vehicle of unknown ownership parked nearby. After removing the handcuffs that had been placed on her, the Defendant struck Police Officer F's face and head multiple times with her fists.

By these acts, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate execution of official duties by a police officer, specifically the handling of the 112 emergency call and protective measures.

facts_kr:
1. 피고인은 2020. 7. 29. 22:30경 'C' 앞 노상에서 자신의 여자친구인 D에게 플라스틱 의자를 집어 들어 던지려고 하였다. 이에 동부경찰서 E지구대 소속 경위 F이 '술 취한 커플이 싸운다, 남자가 여자를 벽에 세워놓고 벽을 때리고, 라바콘을 던지고 본인 머리도 때리고 있다'라는 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동하여 피고인을 제지하였다. 그러자 피고인은 F에게 "야이 씨발놈아, 경찰 새끼야 꺼지라, 너희들이 무엇을 도와줄 건데 개새끼야"라고 욕설을 하며 왼손으로 F의 가슴 부위를 밀치고 주먹을 들어 F에게 폭행하려 하고, 재차 양손으로 F의 가슴을 밀치고 주먹을 들어 폭행하려 하고, 계속하여 왼손으로 F의 가슴을 밀쳐 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 2. 피고인은 2020. 7. 29. 22:50경 제1항과 같은 범행으로 현행범인으로 체포되어 G에 있는 경찰서 E지구대로 인치되어 앉아 있던 중, 술에 취하여 E지구대 소속 경위 F, 경사 H 등 경찰관들에게 "마, 개새끼야, 너희는 애미 애비 있나"라고 욕설을 하며 신고 있던 신발을 F 쪽으로 날렸다. 계속하여 피고인은 F 등 경찰관들에게 삿대질을 하고 욕설을 하며 주머니에 있던 지갑을 꺼내 F에게 던지고, F을 향하여 침을 뱉는 등으로 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 현행범인 체포, 범죄의 예방·진압 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
3. 피고인은 2020. 7. 30. 00:05경 제2항 기재 E지구대에서 동부경찰서 1층에 있는 형사당직실로 인계되어 앉아 있던 중, 동부경찰서 소속 경위 I이 자신에게 조사를 받을 수 있는지 물어보자, I에게 "애비랑 같이 조사를 받겠다, 니는 애미 애비가 없는 것을 아냐, 개새끼야"라고 욕설을 하며 손에 들고 있던 지갑을 I에게 던졌다. 계속하여 피고인은 I에게 "개새끼야, 빡빡이 새끼, 니는 애미 애비 있나"라고 욕설을 하며 바닥에 떨어진 지갑을 주워 I에게 던지고, 신고 있던 신발을 I에게 날려 폭행하였다.
이어서 피고인은 같은 날 01:23경 위 경찰서 1층 형사과 입구에서 I에게 "씨발 새끼야 니는 끄지라, 한 판 붙든가, 개새끼야"라고 욕설을 하며 팔을 들어 폭행하려고 하고, 오른발로 I의 왼쪽 허벅지 부분을 걷어차 폭행하였다. 이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 범죄의 예방·진압 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
