facts_en:
## Count 1
On July 29, 2020, at approximately 22:30, the Defendant attempted to pick up and throw a plastic chair at D, his girlfriend, on a street in front of 'C'. Upon receiving an emergency call (112) reporting that "a drunken couple is fighting, the man is pinning the woman against a wall and striking the wall, throwing traffic cones, and hitting his own head," Auxiliary Police Officer F of the E Police Substation, Dongbu Police Station, responded to the scene and restrained the Defendant. Thereupon, the Defendant directed profanities at F, stating: "Hey you fucking bastard, you fucking cop, get the fuck out of here, what the hell are you going to help with, you son of a bitch," and pushed F's chest with his left hand, raised his fist to assault F, subsequently pushed F's chest with both hands while raising his fist to assault F, and continued to push F's chest with his left hand, thereby committing assault.
By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by a police officer in handling a 112 emergency report case.

## Count 2
On July 29, 2020, at approximately 22:50, the Defendant was apprehended as a person caught in flagrante delicto for the criminal conduct described in Count 1 and was taken into custody at the E Police Substation located at G, where he was seated. While intoxicated, the Defendant directed profanities at Auxiliary Police Officer F, Police Sergeant H, and other police officers assigned to the E Police Substation, stating: "Hey, you son of a bitch, do you even have a mother and father," and threw the shoes he was wearing in the direction of F. Subsequently, the Defendant made obscene gestures toward F and other police officers while directing profanities at them, removed a wallet from his pocket and threw it at F, and spat at F, thereby committing assault.
By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by a police officer in apprehending a person caught in flagrante delicto, preventing and suppressing crime, and conducting investigations.

## Count 3
On July 30, 2020, at approximately 00:05, the Defendant was transferred from the E Police Substation described in Count 2 to the Criminal Investigation Office on the first floor of Dongbu Police Station, where he was seated. When Auxiliary Police Officer I of Dongbu Police Station asked the Defendant whether he could be interviewed, the Defendant directed profanities at I, stating: "I will be interviewed together with my father, don't you know you have no mother and father, you son of a bitch," and threw the wallet he was holding at I. Subsequently, the Defendant directed profanities at I, stating: "You son of a bitch, you chrome-domed bastard, do you even have a mother and father," picked up the wallet that had fallen to the floor and threw it at I, and threw the shoes he was wearing at I, thereby committing assault.
Thereafter, on the same day at approximately 01:23, at the entrance to the Criminal Investigation Division on the first floor of the aforementioned police station, the Defendant directed profanities at I, stating: "You fucking bastard, you shut the fuck up, let's have a go at it, you son of a bitch," raised his arm to assault I, and kicked I's left thigh with his right foot, thereby committing assault.
By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by a police officer in preventing and suppressing crime and conducting investigations.

facts_kr:
1. 피고인은 2020. 7. 29. 22:30경 B에 있는 'C' 앞 노상에서 자신의 여자친구인 D에게 플라스틱 의자를 집어 들어 던지려고 하였다. 이에 동부경찰서 E지구대 소속 경위 F이 '술 취한 커플이 싸운다, 남자가 여자를 벽에 세워놓고 벽을 때리고, 라바콘을 던지고 본인 머리도 때리고 있다'라는 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동하여 피고인을 제지하였다. 그러자 피고인은 F에게 "야이 씨발놈아, 경찰 새끼야 꺼지라, 너희들이 무엇을 도와줄 건데 개새끼야"라고 욕설을 하며 왼손으로 F의 가슴 부위를 밀치고 주먹을 들어 F에게 폭행하려 하고, 재차 양손으로 F의 가슴을 밀치고 주먹을 들어 폭행하려 하고, 계속하여 왼손으로 F의 가슴을 밀쳐 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 2. 피고인은 2020. 7. 29. 22:50경 제1항과 같은 범행으로 현행범인으로 체포되어 G에 있는 동부경찰서 E지구대로 인치되어 앉아 있던 중, 술에 취하여 E지구대 소속 경위 F, 경사 H 등 경찰관들에게 "마, 개새끼야, 너희는 애미 애비 있나"라고 욕설을 하며 신고 있던 신발을 F 쪽으로 날렸다. 계속하여 피고인은 F 등 경찰관들에게 삿대질을 하고 욕설을 하며 주머니에 있던 지갑을 꺼내 F에게 던지고, F을 향하여 침을 뱉는 등으로 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 현행범인 체포, 범죄의 예방·진압 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
3. 피고인은 2020. 7. 30. 00:05경 E지구대에서 동부경찰서 1층에 있는 형사당직실로 인계되어 앉아 있던 중, 동부경찰서 소속 경위 I이 자신에게 조사를 받을 수 있는지 물어보자, I에게 "애비랑 같이 조사를 받겠다, 니는 애미 애비가 없는 것을 아냐, 개새끼야"라고 욕설을 하며 손에 들고 있던 지갑을 I에게 던졌다. 계속하여 피고인은 I에게 "개새끼야, 빡빡이 새끼, 니는 애미 애비 있나"라고 욕설을 하며 바닥에 떨어진 지갑을 주워 I에게 던지고, 신고 있던 신발을 I에게 날려 폭행하였다.
이어서 피고인은 같은 날 01:23경 위 경찰서 1층 형사과 입구에서 I에게 "씨발 새끼야 니는 끄지라, 한 판 붙든가, 개새끼야"라고 욕설을 하며 팔을 들어 폭행하려고 하고, 오른발로 I의 왼쪽 허벅지 부분을 걷어차 폭행하였다. 이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 범죄의 예방·진압 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## Count 1
On July 29, 2020, at approximately 22:30, in front of establishment 'C' located on a street in B, the Defendant attempted to pick up and throw a plastic chair at D, his girlfriend. Upon receiving a 112 emergency report stating "a drunk couple is fighting; the male is pinning the female against a wall and striking the wall, throwing traffic cones, and hitting his own head," Police Constable F, assigned to Precinct E of the Eastern Police Station, responded to the scene and restrained the Defendant. Whereupon, the Defendant hurled profanities at Officer F, stating "Hey, you fucking bastard, you goddamn pig of a cop, get the fuck out of here, what the hell are you assholes going to help with," pushed Officer F's chest area with his left hand, raised his fist to assault Officer F, subsequently pushed Officer F's chest with both hands while raising his fist to assault him again, and continued to push Officer F's chest with his left hand, thereby committing assault.
In this manner, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties of a police officer concerning the handling of a 112 emergency report case.

## Count 2
On July 29, 2020, at approximately 22:50, the Defendant was arrested as a current offender in connection with the criminal conduct described in Count 1 above and was being held in a seated position at Precinct E of the Eastern Police Station located at G. While intoxicated, the Defendant directed profanities at Police Constables F and H and other police officers, stating "Hey, you fucking bastards, do you even have parents?" and threw the shoes he was wearing toward Officer F. Subsequently, the Defendant made threatening gestures with his fingers at Officer F and other police officers while hurling profanities, removed a wallet from his pocket and threw it at Officer F, and spat at Officer F, thereby committing assault.
In this manner, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties of a police officer concerning the arrest of a current offender, the prevention and suppression of crime, and the investigation of criminal matters.

## Count 3
On July 30, 2020, at approximately 00:05, the Defendant was transferred from Precinct E to the Criminal Duty Office on the first floor of the Eastern Police Station and was being held in a seated position. When Police Constable I, assigned to the Eastern Police Station, asked the Defendant whether he could be subjected to questioning, the Defendant directed profanities at Officer I, stating "I'll undergo questioning with my father, don't you know you have no parents, you fucking bastard," and threw a wallet he was holding at Officer I. Subsequently, the Defendant directed further profanities at Officer I, stating "You fucking bastard, you bald-headed asshole, do you even have parents?" picked up the wallet that had fallen on the floor, threw it at Officer I, and threw the shoes he was wearing at Officer I, thereby committing assault.
Thereafter, on the same day at approximately 01:23, at the entrance to the Criminal Investigation Division on the first floor of the police station, the Defendant directed profanities at Officer I, stating "You fucking asshole, you get the fuck out of here, or do you want to fight one on one, you fucking bastard," raised his arm to assault Officer I, and struck Officer I's left thigh with his right foot, thereby committing assault.
In this manner, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties of a police officer concerning the prevention and suppression of crime and the investigation of criminal matters.

facts_kr:
1. 경찰관 B에 대한 공무집행방해
피고인은 2019. 12. 1. 00:10경 C 앞길에서, '지나가던 사람이 아무런 이유 없이 엉덩이를 잡았다.'라는 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D파출소 소속 경찰관 B이 폭행 혐의 사실에 대한 조사 중 현장을 떠나려고 하는 피고인을 제지하자 이에 화가 나 손으로 B의 가슴부위를 밀치는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고 처리 업무에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 경찰관 E에 대한 공무집행방해
피고인은 2019. 12. 1. 01:30경 경찰서 사무실에서, 소내 근무 중인 경찰서 소속 경찰관 E이 제1항과 같은 이유로 현행범인 체포되어 조사를 받는 피고인으로부터 "내가 엄마 얘기하는데 씹할 니가 비웃어."라는 등 욕설을 들어 이를 제지하자 이에 화가 나 손으로 E의 목 부위를 밀치고 발로 E의 정강이 부위를 1회 걷어차는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고 처리 업무 및 소내 근무에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Obstruction of Justice Against Police Officer B

On December 1, 2019, at approximately 00:10, in front of C [location], a 112 emergency call was received reporting that "a passing person had grabbed the buttocks of [the caller] without any reason." In response to this call, Police Officer B, assigned to D Police Box of the Police Station, attended the scene and was conducting an investigation into the allegations of assault. When Police Officer B attempted to prevent the defendant from leaving the scene, the defendant became angry and committed assault by pushing Police Officer B's chest area with his hand.

By this conduct, the defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties by a police officer regarding the processing of the 112 emergency call.

## 2. Obstruction of Justice Against Police Officer E

On December 1, 2019, at approximately 01:30, in the Police Station office, Police Officer E, assigned to the Police Station and on duty in the station, was conducting an investigation of the defendant, who had been arrested as a flagrant offender for the reasons stated in Section 1 above. The defendant directed profanity at Officer E, stating "I'm talking about my mom, you piece of shit, are you mocking me?" Police Officer E attempted to restrain the defendant's use of profanity, whereupon the defendant became angry and committed assault by pushing Police Officer E's neck area with his hand and kicking Police Officer E's shin area once with his foot.

By this conduct, the defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties by a police officer regarding the processing of the 112 emergency call and the performance of duties within the station.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 8. 28. 21:35경 ‘C'이라는 상호의 식당 앞길에서, 술에 취하여 쓰러져 있던 중, ‘길에 남자가 쓰려져 있다'는 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D파출소 소속 경찰관인 경위 E로부터 인적사항과 주거지 등에 대한 질문을 받고는 제대로 답변을 하지 않은 채 인도에 누워 자려고 하다가, 피고인의 옆에 놓여 있던 피고인의 휴대폰을 들고 피고인의 지인들에게 전화를 거는 E에게 "야, 네가 뭔데 남의 전화기를 도청하느냐, 개새끼야"라고 소리를 지르고, E한테서 휴대폰을 빼앗은 다음 E을 밀치면서 시비를 걸다가 같은 소속 경찰관인 순경 F에 의해 제지를 받자, F에게 "너는 뭐야"라고 말하면서 들고 있던 휴대폰으로 F의 머리를 1회 내리치고, 계속하여 E에게 욕설을 하면서 E의 얼굴을 향해 위 휴대폰을 집어던져 이를 막는 E의 오른손 검지손가락을 맞추는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원인 E, F의 112신고사건처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On August 28, 2021, at approximately 21:35, in front of a restaurant operating under the business name 'C', the Defendant, who was lying on the ground in an intoxicated state, was approached by Police Officer E (rank: gyeongwi), a member of D Police Box attached to the local police station, who responded to an emergency call (Report No. 112) stating "there is a man lying on the street." When questioned by Officer E regarding personal identification information and residential address, the Defendant failed to provide adequate responses and attempted to lie down on the sidewalk to sleep.

The Defendant then picked up his own cellular phone, which had been placed beside him, observing that Officer E was using it to make calls to the Defendant's acquaintances. The Defendant shouted at Officer E, "Hey, what the fuck are you? You're eavesdropping on someone else's phone, you son of a bitch," and subsequently seized the phone from Officer E. The Defendant then pushed Officer E while initiating a quarrel.

When Police Officer F (rank: sunggyeong), a colleague from the same station, intervened to restrain the Defendant, the Defendant said to Officer F, "What the hell are you?" and struck Officer F's head once with the cellular phone he was holding.

The Defendant subsequently continued to direct profanity toward Officer E while throwing the aforementioned cellular phone toward Officer E's face, striking Officer E's right index finger, which Officer E raised in an attempt to block the phone, thereby committing assault.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by police officers E and F in the handling of the emergency call (Report No. 112) matter.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 8. 30. 22:55경 B에 있는 C지구대 입구에서, 조금 전 피고인이 같은 택시 운전사인 D이 운전하는 영업용 택시에 탑승하여 가던 중에 에어컨을 틀어달라고 하다가 택시운전사와 시비가 되어 동부경찰서 C지구대를 방문하게 되었다.
당시 상황근무 중이던 C지구대 경위 E가 코로나19 관련지침에 따라 출입문 밖으로 나가 손소독 및 체온측정을 하며 피고인에게 C지구대에 방문한 이유를 묻자 피고인이 함께 방문한 택시운전사 D에게 욕설을 하면서 신체접촉을 하려고 하여 이때 피해경찰관인 경위 E가 이를 제지한다는 이유로, 경위 E에게 "야 이 씹새끼야 민주경찰이 이렇냐"고 욕설을 하면서 피고인이 왼쪽 어깨 부위로 피해자인 경위 E의 앞 가슴부위를 5~6회 가량 밀치며 폭행하고, C지구대 출입문에 몸을 부딪히는 등의 공격적인 행동을 하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 방문신고 사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On August 30, 2020, at approximately 22:55, in front of the entrance to Police Box C, located in District B, the Defendant had boarded a commercial taxi operated by D, a fellow taxi driver, and during the ride, requested that the air conditioning be turned on. A dispute ensued between the Defendant and the taxi driver, prompting the Defendant to visit Police Box C of the Eastern Police Station.

At that time, Police Officer E, a Gyeongwi (senior patrol officer) on duty at Police Box C, stepped outside the entrance in accordance with COVID-19 related guidelines to conduct hand sanitization and temperature measurement. When Officer E inquired of the Defendant regarding the purpose of his visit to Police Box C, the Defendant directed profane language toward taxi driver D, who had accompanied him, and attempted physical contact with D. Upon Officer E's intervention to prevent such conduct, the Defendant directed profane language at Officer E, stating, "Hey, you fucking bastard, is this what democratic policing looks like?" (야 이 씹새끼야 민주경찰이 이렇냐), and thereafter assaulted Officer E by pushing the officer's front chest area approximately 5 to 6 times using his left shoulder, and further engaged in aggressive conduct by colliding his body against the entrance door of Police Box C.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties of a police officer in processing a visit report and incident.

facts_kr:

피고인은 2020. 4. 8. 14:40경 D에 있는 'E' 주점 앞에서 112 신고를 받고 출동하는 순찰차에 위 C 등이 탑승한 것을 보자 화를 내며, "순찰차를 발로 차버려"라고 말하면서 순찰차 왼쪽 뒷바퀴 부분에 자신의 발을 집어넣어 차량 바퀴에 역과 되도록 한 후 "순찰차가 사람을 박네"라고 외치며 쓰러졌다. 이에 위 C 등이 하차하여 119 구급대에 구호를 요청하자, 피고인은 위 C에게 "도박을 하지 않았는데 단속을 했지, 내가 벌금이 나오면 니 죽여버린다"라고 말하는 등 근무 중인 경찰관의 생명, 신체에 위해를 가할 것처럼 협박하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112 신고 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 피고인은 위와 같은 날 16:25 경찰서 B파출소에서 상황근무자인 위 C 등을 향해 진료영수증을 집어 던지면서 "사람이 다쳤는데 왜 병원에 찾아오지 않으냐, 다 죽었어, 죽여버릴꺼야, 새끼들아"라고 욕설하고, 그 자리에서 전남지방경찰청 청문감사관실에 전화하여 위 C 등이 교통사고를 야기하였음에도 제대로 구호조치를 취하지 않았다는 취지로 언급한 다음, "내가 죽여버린다. 난 혼자고 가족도 없다, 니들은 가족이 있지"라고 소리치는 등 근무 중인 경찰관의 생명, 신체에 위해를 가할 것처럼 협박하였다.

facts_en:
**1. Obstruction of Official Duty – Emergency Response Interference and Threats Against Police Officers**

On or about March 30, 2020, the defendant was arrested on suspicion of gambling by Officer C and others attached to Police Box B of the Police Station. The defendant harbored dissatisfaction with the police investigation, stating, "The police officer arrested me without any grounds whatsoever, and I will not leave this matter alone."

On April 8, 2020, at approximately 14:40, in front of the 'E' tavern located in D, upon observing Officers C and others boarding a patrol vehicle that had been dispatched in response to an emergency call to 112, the defendant became angry and said, "Kick the patrol car with your foot." The defendant then inserted his own foot into the left rear wheel section of the patrol vehicle, positioning his foot in the path of the vehicle's wheel, and subsequently fell to the ground while shouting, "The patrol car is running over a person." When Officers C and others exited the patrol vehicle and requested assistance from the 119 emergency medical services, the defendant threatened Officers C, stating, "I did not gamble, yet you conducted enforcement operations; if a fine is imposed on me, I will kill you," thereby threatening to cause harm to the life and bodily integrity of the police officer on duty.

By this conduct, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duty by the police officer in handling the emergency 112 telephone report.

**2. Obstruction of Official Duty – Threats Against Police Officers During Station Interrogation**

On the same day, at approximately 16:25 at Police Box B of the Police Station, the defendant threw a medical receipt at Officer C and others, who were on duty as situation monitors, while verbally abusing them by saying, "A person has been injured; why are you not coming to the hospital? Everyone is dead; I will kill you, you bastards." The defendant then telephoned the Audit and Inspection Division of the Jeonnam Regional Police Agency from that location and alleged that Officers C and others had caused a traffic accident but failed to provide proper rescue measures. The defendant subsequently shouted, "I will kill you. I am alone and have no family, but you all have families," thereby threatening to cause harm to the life and bodily integrity of the police officers on duty.

By this conduct, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duty by the police officers in crime prevention and criminal investigation.

facts_en:
## 1. First Incident – Obstruction of Police Duty (Maintenance of Public Order)

On January 30, 2021, at approximately 19:51, the defendant, having received a report via the 112 emergency hotline at a location in front of 'C' in B concerning the defendant's disorderly conduct, was advised by Sergeant E and Police Officer F of the D Police Substation, who had responded to the scene, to return home. Upon receiving this advice, the defendant shouted profanities at Sergeant E, saying, "Hey, you bastard. I'm gonna go to your fucking house," and rushed at Sergeant E. Despite Sergeant E's attempt to restrain the defendant's actions, the defendant once again shouted profanities, saying, "Hey, you fucking asshole," while kicking Sergeant E in the groin area and swinging his fists.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duty by a police officer relating to the maintenance of public order.

## 2. Second Incident – Obstruction of Police Duty (Criminal Investigation)

The defendant, having been arrested as a flagrant offender as a result of the conduct described in paragraph 1 above, was brought into custody at the D Police Substation located in G at approximately 20:00 on the same date. At approximately 20:50 on the same date, while Sergeant E was explaining procedures including the signing of a rights notification confirmation form with the defendant's handcuffs removed, the defendant suddenly rushed at E, swung his fists, and kicked E in the groin area.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duty by a police officer relating to criminal investigation.

facts_en:
**1. Obstruction of Lawful Duty Performance through Assault on Police Officer D**

On March 30, 2019, at approximately 13:00, in the parking lot in front of B, upon receipt of a 112 emergency report alleging "a dispute concerning a parking matter," Sergeant D, assigned to C Police Box of Ojeong Police Station, responded to the scene. While Sergeant D was listening to the contents of the report and counseling the parties involved, the reporting party and his associates acknowledged that their unauthorized parking on the defendant's private property was improper. However, when Sergeant D pointed out that the defendant was also at fault for having hurled a profanity—"you have no manners"—at the counterparty, the defendant made a jabbing gesture with his finger toward Sergeant D and said, "listen carefully, you bastard," while pushing Sergeant D's shoulder area with his hand twice.

By these actions, the defendant assaulted police officer D and thereby obstructed the lawful performance of official duty concerning the processing of 112 emergency reports.

**2. Obstruction of Lawful Duty Performance through Assault on Police Officer E**

On the same day, at approximately 13:10, the defendant was apprehended as a person caught in the act of obstructing the execution of public duty and was brought into C Police Box. At approximately 13:25, while the defendant was attempting to exit the police box, Sergeant D and Police Officer E attempted to place handcuffs on the defendant in order to prevent escape. The defendant then bit the right arm of Officer E with his mouth.

By this action, the defendant assaulted police officer E and thereby obstructed the lawful performance of official duty concerning the management of the custody and personal security of an arrested person.

facts_en:
The Defendant, on May 15, 2020, between approximately 01:05 and 01:15, at the road in front of Exit 2, discovered a patrol vehicle being operated by Police Officer C, a member of the B District Unit of the Police Station who was conducting patrol in the area. The Defendant flagged down the patrol vehicle with hand gestures, stopped it, handed his mobile phone to the Police Officer, and requested, "Please explain my current location to my friend." However, the Police Officer rejected the request, stating, "Unless this is urgent, we are currently responding to a dispatch. You can provide your location by reading the address posted on the wall." 

Angered by this rejection, the Defendant:

1. Blocked the front of the passenger door of the patrol vehicle to prevent the Police Officer from boarding the passenger seat;

2. When the Police Officer extended his hand to open the passenger door of the patrol vehicle, struck the Police Officer's hand with his hand a second time, preventing the door from being opened;

3. Struck the Police Officer's head area once with the hand holding the mobile phone; and

4. Assaulted the Police Officer by pushing his body against the Police Officer's body.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by the Police Officer in handling a report made to the emergency police hotline (112).


**SUMMARY OF EVIDENCE**

1. In-court testimony of the Defendant

2. Police statement record concerning Officer C

3. Copy of public official identification, copy of duty log, investigative report (with attached video footage)

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 2. 19. 23:30경 B 건물에서 ‘주취자가 들어와 나가지 않는다'는 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 C파출소 소속 경장 D으로부터 귀가를 종용받자 "야 너 관등성명이 뭐야", "야 이 씨발놈아"라고 욕설을 하며 주먹으로 피해자의 오른쪽 얼굴을 1회 때려 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 피고인의 일부 법정진술
1. 증인 D, E의 각 법정진술
1. D에 대한 경찰 진술조서
1. CD 재생 결과
피고인과 그 변호인은 경찰관인 D의 공무집행이 적법하지 아니하였으므로 공무집행방해죄가 성립하지 않는다고 주장한다.
살피건대, 형법 제136조가 규정하는 공무집행방해죄는 공무원의 직무집행이 적법한 경우에 한하여 성립한다. 이때 적법한 공무집행은 그 행위가 공무원의 추상적 권한에 속할 뿐 아니라 구체적 직무집행에 관한 법률상 요건과 방식을 갖춘 경우를 가리킨다.
위 법리에 비추어 이 사건에 관하여 보건대, 이 법원이 적법하게 채택하여 조사한 위 증거들에 의하면, 피고인이 출동한 경찰관인 D에게 건물 안에서 가방을 잃어버렸다면서 가방에 휴대폰과 현금 70만 원이 들어 있었다고 설명하는데 D이 피고인에게 "어디? 여기 안에"라고 반말을 하였고, 이에 피고인이 욕을 하고 화를 내면서 D에게 다가 가려 하자 다른 경찰관이 말렸고 D이 피고인에게 "왜 욕하고 지랄이야 병신아, 나이 값 좀 해라"라고 말하자 피고인이 주먹으로 D의 오른쪽 얼굴을 1회 때린 사실을 인정할 수 있는바, 비록 D이 나이가 많고 술을 마셔 취하였으며 물건을 잃어버린 것을 호소하는 피고인에게 반말로 응대를 하는 것이 부적절하다고는 할 수 있으나 그것만으로 D의 공무집행이 부적법하다고는 할 수 없으므로, 위 주장은 받아들이지 아니한다.

facts_en:
On February 19, 2021, at approximately 23:30, the defendant, after being urged by Police Officer D, a sergeant assigned to Police Box C of the District Police Station who arrived at the scene in response to a 112 emergency report stating "an intoxicated person has entered and will not leave" at Building B, shouted profanities—"Hey, what's your fucking name and badge number?" and "Hey you fucking bastard"—and struck the victim's right face once with his fist, thereby committing assault.

By doing so, the defendant obstructed lawful official duty of the police officer in processing an emergency call report under Article 112 of the Criminal Act.

**Summary of Evidence**
1. The defendant's partial testimony in court
2. Court testimony of witnesses D and E
3. Police statement record regarding D
4. Results of CD playback

The defendant and his counsel argue that the official duty performed by police officer D was not lawful, and therefore the crime of obstruction of official duty does not constitute an offense.
Examined in detail, the crime of obstruction of official duty as prescribed in Article 136 of the Criminal Act is established only when the official duty of a public official is lawful. Lawful official duty refers to cases where not only the act falls within the abstract authority of a public official, but also satisfies the legal requirements and procedures concerning the concrete performance of official duties.

In light of the above legal principles and as applied to this case, upon the evidence properly admitted and examined by this Court, the facts establish that the defendant explained to the responding police officer D that he had lost his bag inside the building, which contained a mobile phone and 700,000 won in cash; that Officer D responded to the defendant in casual speech, saying "Where? In here?"; that upon this the defendant began to curse and became angry while attempting to approach Officer D, whereupon another police officer intervened; that Officer D then said to the defendant, "Why are you cursing and acting crazy, you fucking retard, act your age"; and that the defendant then struck Officer D's right face once with his fist. While it may be said that it was inappropriate for Officer D to respond in casual speech to an elderly, intoxicated defendant who was reporting a lost item, such conduct alone does not render Officer D's official duty unlawful. Therefore, the above argument is rejected.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 7. 5. 21:04경 B아파트 C호에 있는 피고인의 주거지에서, 술에 취해 사실혼 배우자와 돈 문제로 말다툼을 하던 중 화가 나 ‘내가 지금 집구석을 다 부수고 있으니, 내 잡아가라 씹새끼들아, 와서 내 잡아가라. 내 잡으러 오는 새끼들, 내가 칼로 배때기 따고 총으로 대가리 딴다, 빨리와라.'라는 내용으로 112신고를 하였다.
이에 위 신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D파출소 소속 피해자 경사 E로부터 신고 경위에 대한 질문을 받자, "씨발놈아, 그거는 와 물어보노, 잡아가면 될 거 아니가"라고 말하며 아무런 이유 없이 약 10분에 걸쳐 반말과 욕설을 하고, 얼굴과 몸으로 수차례 위 경위 E의 가슴 부분을 향해 들이밀며 부딪치는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112 신고처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 피고인의 법정진술
1. E, F에 대한 각 경찰 진술조서
1. 각 수사보고서, 112신고사건처리내역서
1. 현장 사진 등

facts_en:
On July 5, 2021, at approximately 21:04, the Defendant, while intoxicated at his residence located in Unit C of Apartment Building B, engaged in a verbal dispute with his common-law spouse regarding monetary matters. In a fit of anger, the Defendant made a report to the police emergency hotline (112) with the following statement: "I am now destroying everything in this fucking house, so come arrest me, you fucking bastards, come and arrest me. You fucking bastards coming to arrest me, I will cut your bellies open with a knife and blow your heads off with a gun, come quickly."

Upon receiving the above report, police officers dispatched from Police Box D of the District Police Station arrived at the scene. When Victim Police Sergeant E questioned the Defendant regarding the circumstances of the report, the Defendant responded by saying, "Fuck you, asshole, why are you asking that—just arrest me," and without any justifiable reason, engaged in disrespectful speech and profanity using informal speech patterns (반말) over the course of approximately ten minutes. The Defendant further committed assault by repeatedly pushing and striking against the chest area of Sergeant E with both his face and body on multiple occasions.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of duties by a police official in processing an emergency report to the 112 hotline.

**Summary of Evidence**

1. In-court testimony of the Defendant
2. Police statement records (조서) respectively obtained from E and F
3. Each investigative report and 112 emergency report processing records
4. Photographs from the scene, et cetera

facts_kr:
피고인은 처 B와 함께 지인들과 술자리를 하는 자리에서 B가 자신의 부모에 대하여 험담을 했다는 이유로 다퉈 B의 뺨을 때려 폭행하였고, 이에 B가 근처 편의점으로 도망 가 자신을 숨겨달라고 부탁하게 되어 편의점 종업원의 ‘여자 손님이 숨겨달라고 하면서 직원휴게실에 들어가서 문을 잠그고 나오지 않고 있다.'는 112 신고로 거제경찰서 C지구대 소속 순경 D 외 1명이 출동하게 되었다.
피고인은 2019. 10. 29. 03:30 E아파트 F편의점 앞 노상에서 B가 경찰관의 도움을 받아 친정으로 가기 위해 순찰차 뒷좌석에 타는 것을 보고 순찰차의 뒷문을 열어 순찰차가 출발하지 못하게 하였으며 이에 순경 D이 피고인을 제지한다는 이유로 피고인의 머리로 D의 턱 부위를 밀치고, 몸으로 D의 어깨 부위를 밀쳐 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112 신고처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지

facts_en:
The Defendant, together with his wife B, was in a drinking gathering with acquaintances. A dispute arose because B made disparaging remarks about his own parents. The Defendant assaulted B by striking her cheek. As a result, B fled to a nearby convenience store and asked the store employee to help her hide. The convenience store employee reported to the police (112 dispatch) that "a female customer is asking to be hidden and has entered the staff break room, locked the door, and refuses to come out." Consequently, Patrol Officer D and one other officer from the C Police Unit of Geoje Police Station responded to the scene.

On October 29, 2019, at 03:30, in front of the F Convenience Store at E Apartment, on the roadside, the Defendant observed B being assisted by a police officer to board the rear seat of a patrol vehicle en route to her parental home. The Defendant opened the rear door of the patrol vehicle to prevent the patrol vehicle from departing. In response, Patrol Officer D attempted to restrain the Defendant. The Defendant then assaulted Officer D by pushing Officer D's chin area with his head and pushing Officer D's shoulder area with his body.

Through this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by a police civil servant in connection with the processing of a 112 emergency dispatch report.



**Evidence Summary:**

1. The Defendant's testimony in court proceedings
2. The respective testimonies in court proceedings of Witness D and Witness G

facts_kr:
B은 2020. 2. 10. 23:00경 D 앞 도로에 이르러, 그 곳을 지나가던 서부경찰서 E지구대 소속 (차량번호 1 생략) 순찰차량을 불러 세웠고, 이에 위 순찰차량 조수석에 탑승해 있던 위 지구대 소속 경찰관인 경사 F가 창문을 내리자 아무런 이유 없이 차 안으로 손을 집어넣어 차량 전면 유리창 우측 상단에 달려 있는 시가 불상의 선바이저를 손으로 쳐 깨뜨리고, 손으로 위 F의 머리와 얼굴을 때렸다.
피고인은 위 일시, 장소에서, 위 경사 F 및 F로부터 무선 지원 요청을 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰관들이 피고인의 친구인 B을 위 범행으로 현행범인 체포하자, 이에 불만을 품고 피고인의 배로 위 F의 허리 부분을 수회 밀치는 등 폭행하였고, 위 F 및 위 지원요청을 받고 현장에 출동한 서부경찰서 E지구대 소속 경찰관인 경위 G, 순경 H에게 욕설을 하며 마치 때릴 것처럼 주먹을 들어 수회 주먹질을 하였고, 인근에 주차된 (차량번호 2 생략) 순찰차에 다가가 피고인의 머리로 위 순찰차 보닛을 3회 들이받아 협박하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰 공무원들의 범죄예방 순찰에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
**Person B**, at approximately 23:00 on February 10, 2020, arrived at a road in front of D, and flagged down a patrol vehicle (license plate number 1 omitted) belonging to the E District Unit of the Western Police Station that was passing through that location. When **Police Sergeant F**, a police officer attached to the aforementioned district unit and seated in the front passenger seat of the patrol vehicle, rolled down the window, **Person B**, without any reason whatsoever, thrust his hand into the vehicle and struck with his hand a sun visor of uncertain value attached to the upper right portion of the vehicle's front windshield, breaking it, and struck **Police Sergeant F** on the head and face with his hand.

**The Defendant**, at the aforementioned time and place, when police officers, having received a wireless dispatch request from **Police Sergeant F** and arriving at the scene, arrested **Person B**—the defendant's friend—as the person committing the aforementioned offense in flagrante delicto, became discontented with this outcome. The defendant then assaulted **Police Sergeant F** on multiple occasions by repeatedly pushing the lumbar region of **Police Sergeant F** with the defendant's abdomen. Furthermore, the defendant hurled profanities at **Police Sergeant F** and at **Police Inspector G** and **Police Constable H**, police officers attached to the Western Police Station's E District Unit who responded to the dispatch request, and made punching motions as if to strike them, throwing multiple punches. Additionally, the defendant approached a patrol vehicle (license plate number 2 omitted) parked nearby and struck the hood of the patrol vehicle three times with his head, thereby intimidating the officers.

In this manner, the defendant obstructed the legitimate official duty of police public servants relating to crime prevention patrol.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 5. 23. 13:05경 달성군 B에 있는 C중학교 정문에서 '정신이 이상한 사람이 있다'는 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D파출소 소속 경찰관 E과 함께 술에 취한 피고인의 보호자 인계를 위해 D파출소로 동행하였다.
피고인은 같은 날 13:12경 D파출소에 도착한 후 경찰관 E으로부터 인적사항을 질문받자 경찰관 E에게 "개새끼야, 수갑 채워라, 내가 뭘 잘못 했노"라고 욕설을 하면서 바닥에 수회 침을 뱉었다. 계속하여 피고인은 경찰관 E이 전산조회하여 배우자에게 연락한 후 기다리는 동안에도 경찰관 E에게 "씹할 놈 개새끼, 죽여뿐다"면서 손과 팔꿈치로 경찰관 E의 얼굴을 때리려 하고, 같은 날 13:52경 파출소를 방문한 피고인의 배우자에게 전후 사정을 설명해 주는 와중에도 경찰관 E에게 "개새끼"라고 욕설을 하면서 우측 손으로 경찰관 E의 가슴을 세게 두 번 때렸다. 또한 피고인은 같은 날 13:56경 주취 상태를 감안하여 귀가시키고자 피고인의 배우자 차량에 타는 것을 도와주던 경찰관 E의 머리채를 세게 잡아 당겨 공무집행방해 현행범인으로 체포된 후에도 계속하여 경찰관 E에게 "개새끼야 수갑 풀어라, 풀면 너거 다 죽여뿐다"면서 협박을 하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리 및 주취자 보호, 현행범 체포 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On May 23, 2019, at approximately 13:05, the Defendant was transported to D Police Box along with Police Officer E from D Police Station, who had responded to a 112 emergency report alleging "there is a person acting abnormally" at the main gate of C Middle School located in B, Daeseong County. The purpose of the transport was to effect the transfer of the Defendant's inebriated guardian to police custody.

Upon arriving at D Police Box at approximately 13:12 on the same day, when Police Officer E inquired of the Defendant regarding personal identification information, the Defendant directed profane language at Police Officer E, stating "you fucking bastard, put handcuffs on me, what the hell did I do wrong [게새끼야, 수갑 채워라, 내가 뭘 잘못 했노]," while spitting on the floor multiple times. Subsequently, while Police Officer E was conducting a computerized records search and awaiting the Defendant's spouse after contacting them, the Defendant continued to direct profane language at Police Officer E, stating "you fucking asshole bastard, I'll kill you [씹할 놈 개새끼, 죽여뿐다]," and attempted to strike Police Officer E's face with his hands and elbows. Furthermore, at approximately 13:52 on the same day, while the Defendant's spouse visited the police box and Police Officer E was explaining the circumstances of the matter to the spouse, the Defendant directed profane language at Police Officer E, stating "you fucking bastard [개새끼]," and struck Police Officer E's chest forcefully twice with his right hand. Additionally, at approximately 13:56 on the same day, taking into account the Defendant's state of intoxication, Police Officer E was assisting the Defendant into the spouse's vehicle with the intent to allow the Defendant to return home. During this assistance, the Defendant forcefully seized Police Officer E by the hair and pulled, resulting in the Defendant's arrest as an offender caught in the act of obstructing the performance of official duties. Even after the arrest, the Defendant continued to direct threats at Police Officer E, stating "you fucking bastard, take off the handcuffs, if you do I'll kill all of you [개새끼야 수갑 풀어라, 풀면 너거 다 죽여뿐다]."

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties by a police officer, namely the processing of a 112 emergency report, the protection of an intoxicated person, the arrest of an offender caught in the act, and the ensuing investigation.

facts_kr:
1. B, C 폭행 관련 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 11. 23. 00:36경 D에 있는 E 앞 노상에서 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 F지구대 소속 112순찰차를 오른발로 1회 걷어차고 이를 제지하는 경찰서 F지구대 소속 순경 B의 광대 부분을 주먹으로 1회 때리고, 같은 소속 경사 C의 얼굴을 손바닥으로 1회 때려 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 2. G 폭행 관련 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 11. 23. 02:40경 경찰서 유치장에 있는 신체검사실에서, 유치장 입감을 위해 끈이 없는 옷으로 갈아입을 것을 지시하는 유치장 근무 경찰관에게 ‘유치장에 들어가면 죽어버릴 꺼다'라고 입감을 거부하며 손을 휘젓는 등 난동을 부려 위험방지를 위해 대기 중이던 경찰서 H 소속 경장 G가 이를 제지하려 다가가자 갑자기 오른발로 위 G의 배를 1회 걷어차 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 유치장 내 위험방지 업무 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Obstruction of Official Duties Related to Assault of B and C

On November 23, 2021, at approximately 00:36, the defendant, at a roadside in front of E located in D, kicked a police patrol vehicle of the F Police Station's District Unit with his right foot once after responding to an emergency call (112) report. When Police Constable B of the F Police Station's District Unit attempted to restrain the defendant, the defendant struck B's cheekbone area with a closed fist once. The defendant then struck Police Sergeant C of the same unit in the face with an open palm once, thereby committing assault.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the lawful official duties of police officers in processing the emergency (112) call case.

## 2. Obstruction of Official Duties Related to Assault of G

On November 23, 2021, at approximately 02:40, the defendant, in a physical examination room of the police station's detention facility, was instructed by a police officer assigned to detention duties to change into clothing without drawstrings for admission into the detention facility. The defendant refused admission, stating "I will die if I go into the detention facility," and engaged in disruptive conduct by flailing his arms. Police Sergeant G of the H Police Station, who was standing by for purposes of preventing danger, approached to restrain the defendant. At that moment, the defendant suddenly kicked Police Sergeant G in the abdomen once with his right foot, thereby committing assault.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the lawful official duties of a police officer in processing risk prevention duties within the detention facility.

facts_kr:
1. 2021. 9. 11. 05:10경 범행
피고인은 2021. 9. 11. 05:10경 금정구 B에 있는 'C' 앞 도로에서, 피고인의 도와달라는 취지의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경위 E가 피고인을 귀가시키기 위해 몸을 제대로 가누지 못하는 피고인을 부축하려 하자 욕설을 하면서 E의 낭심과 다리를 발로 걷어차고 얼굴을 주먹으로 때리는 등 E를 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112신고 사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 2021. 9. 11. 05:30경 범행
피고인은 2021. 9. 11. 05:30경 F에 있는 경찰서 D지구대에서, 제1항과 같은 행위로 인하여 현행범인체포되어 인치되어 있던 중 제1항 기재 E에게 피고인이 소지하고 있던 휴대전화를 던지고, 위 지구대 소속 순경 G이 이를 제지하자 G의 머리채를 손으로 잡아 당겼으며, 이를 말리는 E의 낭심을 걷어차는 등 E와 G을 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Offense Committed Approximately 05:10 on September 11, 2021

On approximately September 11, 2021, at 05:10, on the road in front of 'C' located in B, Geumjeong-gu, the defendant, upon receiving a 112 emergency call reporting the defendant's request for assistance, was approached by Police Officer E, a gyeongwi (patrol officer) assigned to District Unit D of the Police Station, who responded to the call. As Officer E attempted to assist the defendant—who was unable to maintain proper bodily balance—by supporting him in order to escort him home, the defendant engaged in profanity and assaulted Officer E by kicking Officer E's chest and leg with his foot and striking Officer E's face with his fist.

By committing this act, the defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties of the police officer regarding the handling of a 112 emergency call incident.

## 2. Offense Committed Approximately 05:30 on September 11, 2021

On approximately September 11, 2021, at 05:30, at District Unit D of the Police Station located in F, while the defendant was being held in custody having been arrested as a person caught in the act of committing a crime as a result of the conduct described in Section 1 above, the defendant threw his mobile phone at Officer E (the officer referenced in Section 1) and, when Police Officer G, assigned to the said District Unit, attempted to restrain the defendant from doing so, the defendant grabbed Officer G's hair with his hand and pulled it, and kicked Officer E's chest as Officer E attempted to stop this conduct. Thus, the defendant assaulted both Officer E and Officer G.

By committing this act, the defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties of the police officers regarding the arrest of a person caught in the act of committing a crime.

## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced on June 4, 2019, by the District Court to ten (10) months' imprisonment with a two (2)-year suspended sentence for obstruction of a public official's duty, among other charges. The judgment became final on September 27, 2019. The Defendant was also sentenced on September 24, 2019, by the same District Court to one (1) year's imprisonment with a two (2)-year suspended sentence for special assault, among other charges. The judgment became final on October 2, 2019. The Defendant is currently subject to a suspended sentence period.

## [Criminal Acts]

On February 22, 2020, at approximately 05:19, the Defendant, while intoxicated at Police Station C District Unit located in B, made a report to emergency services (112) to the effect that the Defendant wished to voluntarily confess to a theft offense. The Defendant was brought in on a voluntary basis to provide a statement. While Police Officer D was taking the Defendant's statement, the Defendant, dissatisfied with Officer D's demeanor, engaged in the following conduct: the Defendant loudly hurled profanity and insults at Officer D; pushed Officer D's abdomen and chest areas multiple times with both hands; struck Officer D's jaw, abdomen, and chest areas multiple times with the right elbow; and struck Officer D's shoulder area once with the right hand. Through this conduct, the Defendant perpetrated an assault (暴行) against Officer D.

By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duty by a police official in relation to the handling of an emergency services (112) report.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced on November 9, 2018, by the District Court to imprisonment for ten months with a suspended sentence of two years for Obstruction of Official Duty and other offenses. During the suspension period, on November 14, 2019, the High Court sentenced the Defendant to imprisonment for six months for violation of the Act on Special Cases concerning the Punishment of Specific Crimes (Retaliatory Assault, etc.). The judgment became final on February 27, 2020, rendering the aforementioned suspended sentence void, whereupon the Defendant commenced serving the sentence in prison. The Defendant was granted parole on December 24, 2020, and the parole period elapsed on January 15, 2021.

## [Criminal Acts]

On July 26, 2021, at approximately 15:30, the Defendant appeared before C. A 112 emergency call had been received reporting that "a C employee appears to have been assaulted by a resident," and Police Patrol Officer E, belonging to District D Unit of the local police precinct, responded to dispatch and attempted to persuade the intoxicated Defendant to go home. The Defendant then directed profanity at Officer E, stating: "Hey you fucker, you're not the one who pays my salary. Who the hell are you to tell me what to do, you fucker," while pushing Officer E's chest with his hands, grabbing and shaking Officer E's abdomen area by the clothing, and striking Officer E's left jaw area once with his fist.

In doing so, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate official duty of a police officer pertaining to the handling of emergency 112 calls.

## [Evidence—Summary]

1. The Defendant's testimony at trial
2. Police witness statement from Officer E
3. Investigation report (statement from C employee who was assaulted)
4. Investigation report (statement from Cooperative Chairman F who witnessed the scene)
5. Photographic evidence materials
6. Prior judicial record: copies of judgments (four copies), individual custody status records

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 11. 18. 22:30경 관악구 B건물 1층에 있는 C주점에서 술값 문제로 주점 주인과 시비하던 중, 주점 주인의 112 신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경찰관인 E으로부터 소란을 중지하고 귀가할 것을 요구받자 그를 향해 "야 이 새끼들아, 니네들이 경찰이야? 이런 씨발 끝까지 가보자."라는 등으로 욕설을 하면서 손으로 E의 멱살을 잡아 수회 흔들고 경찰복 견장을 잡아 뜯는 등으로 폭행하여 경찰공무원인 E의 공공안녕 및 질서유지에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
증거의 요지 1. E, F에 대한 각 경찰 진술조서
1. G의 진술서
1. 현장 사진 및 피해 사진
1. 112 신고사건 처리표
피고인은 E이 자신을 체포하려고 하여 이에 저항한 것일 뿐 고의로 공소사실 기재와 같은 행위를 한 것이 아니라는 취지로 주장하나, 이 법원이 채택하여 조사한 증거들에 의하면, 피고인이 경찰관 E으로부터 주점에서의 소란을 중지하고 귀가할 것을 요구받자 욕설을 하면서 손으로 E의 멱살을 잡아 흔들고 경찰복 견장을 잡아 뜯은 사실을 인정할 수 있고, 그와 같은 피고인의 행위의 경위와 내용, 당시의 정황 등에 비추어 피고인의 공무집행방해의 고의도 인정할 수 있으므로, 피고인의 위 주장은 받아들이기 어렵다.

facts_en:
On November 18, 2020, at approximately 22:30, the Defendant was engaged in a verbal altercation with the proprietor of Establishment C, a drinking establishment located on the first floor of Building B in Gwanak-gu, regarding an unpaid bill. Upon receiving a report to the emergency hotline (112) from the establishment's proprietor, Officer E, a police officer assigned to D Police Precinct, arrived at the scene and requested that the Defendant cease the disturbance and return home. In response, the Defendant directed the following profane remarks toward Officer E: "Hey you fucking bastards, are you cops? Let's fucking see this through to the end." The Defendant then committed assault by grabbing Officer E by the collar with his hand and shaking him multiple times, and further by grasping and tearing off the rank insignia from Officer E's police uniform. By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of duty by Officer E, a public official, in maintaining public order and peace.

**Evidence Summary:**

1. Police statements from Officers E and F
2. Written statement from witness G
3. Photographs of the scene and photographic evidence of injuries
4. Emergency hotline (112) incident processing record

**Court's Analysis and Reasoning:**

The Defendant contends that Officer E attempted to arrest him, and that his actions constituted mere resistance thereto; further, that he did not intentionally commit the acts as alleged in the charges. However, based on the evidence examined and adopted by this Court, the factual record clearly establishes that, upon being requested by Officer E to cease the disturbance at the establishment and return home, the Defendant engaged in profane speech while grabbing Officer E by the collar and shaking him multiple times, and further grasped and tore off the insignia from the officer's uniform. Considering the circumstances, manner, and content of the Defendant's conduct, as well as the contextual facts surrounding the incident, the Defendant's intent to obstruct the lawful execution of official duty may be inferred and established. Accordingly, the Defendant's aforementioned assertion is deemed unpersuasive and is rejected by this Court.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020.3.1.03:33경 B 부근 길에서 '승객이 요금을 내지 않고 신고자를 때리려고 쫓아다닌다'는 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 C지구대 소속 경위 D, 경사 E으로부터 택시비를 지불하고 귀가하라는 말을 듣자, 술에 취한 상태로 "아나, 씨발" 등의 욕설을 하면서 손에 들고 있던 가방을 E의 앞 바닥에 집어던지고, 경찰관들에게 집에 태워달라고 말하며 시비를 걸다가 경찰차에 올라탄 후 내리지 않으려 하였다.
계속하여 피고인은 경찰관들로부터 귀가하라는 말을 듣고 경찰차에서 내린 후 경찰관들에게 "씨발, 내가 탔잖아. 야, 야, 태워. 씨발놈이. 야, 야, 태우시든가."라고 욕설을 하면서 시비를 걸고, 손으로 D의 어깨에 장착되어 있던 무전기를 낚아챘다. 옆에 있던 경찰관이 피고인으로부터 무전기를 회수하자, 피고인은 D에게 삿대질을 하고 무전기를 다시 내놓으라고 말하면서 손으로 D의 몸을 수회 밀쳐 112신고 처리 업무에 관한 경찰관의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant, on March 1, 2020, at approximately 03:33, in the vicinity of [Location] B, responded to a 112 emergency report alleging that a passenger had not paid taxi fare and was chasing the reporter with intent to strike. Upon arrival at the scene, Police Sergeant D and Police Inspector E from [Police Station] C District Unit instructed the defendant to pay the taxi fare and return home. While intoxicated, the defendant uttered profanities including "goddamn it, fuck," threw a bag he was holding onto the ground in front of E, and engaged in altercation with the police officers by demanding they give him a ride home. Subsequently, the defendant boarded the police vehicle but refused to exit.

Thereafter, upon being instructed by the police officers to leave, the defendant exited the police vehicle and engaged in further altercation while directing profanities at the officers, including "fuck, I got in. Hey, hey, give me a ride. You fucking bastards. Hey, hey, just drive me." The defendant then forcibly snatched a two-way radio mounted on the shoulder of Sergeant D. When a nearby police officer recovered the radio from the defendant, the defendant pointed and gestured derisively toward D, demanded the return of the radio, and repeatedly pushed D's body with his hands, thereby obstructing the lawful performance of duties by the police officer in handling 112 emergency report processing.

facts_kr:
1. 피고인의 1차 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 8. 14. 01:00경 3층 복도에서, ‘빨리 와주세요'라는 내용의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 C지구대 소속 경찰관 경사 D, 순경 E 등이 현장에 있던 피고인과 112신고자로부터 진술을 청취하려고하자 위 경찰관들을 향해 "씨발 놈들아, 맞짱뜨자"라고 욕설을 하고 발길질을 하는 등 행패를 부리던 중 경사 D에게 "씨발놈아 죽여버린다"라고 욕설을 하며 손으로 위 D의 가슴을 2회 밀치고 목을 1회 밀쳐 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 피고인의 2차 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 8. 14. 01:57경 F에 있는 경찰서 C지구대에서, 제1항 기재와 같은 사실로 인하여 현행범인체포되어 위 지구대에 인치되어 있던 중 계속해서 소란을 피우며 위 지구대 바닥에 구토를 하고 침을 뱉어 이를 치우던 순경 E에게 욕설을 하며 위 E을 향해 침을 1회 뱉어 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 관공서 질서유지 및 현행범인체포자 관리 업무에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Defendant's First Obstruction of Justice

On August 14, 2021, at approximately 01:00 in the third-floor corridor, Police Sergeant D and Police Constable E, belonging to Police Station C District Unit, responded to a 112 emergency call with the content "Please come quickly." When the aforementioned police officers attempted to take statements from the defendant present at the scene and the person who made the 112 call, the defendant directed profanities toward the police officers, stating "Fuck you bastards, let's fight one-on-one," and engaged in disorderly conduct including kicking. During this conduct, the defendant directed profanities at Sergeant D, stating "You fucking bastard, I'll kill you," and committed assault by pushing D's chest twice with his hands and pushing D's neck once.

By doing so, the defendant obstructed the legitimate official duties of the police officer concerning the processing of the 112 emergency call case.

## 2. Defendant's Second Obstruction of Justice

On August 14, 2021, at approximately 01:57 at Police Station C District Unit located at F, the defendant, having been arrested as a flagrant offender due to the facts stated in Paragraph 1 above and being detained at the aforementioned district unit, continued to create a disturbance, vomited on the floor of the district unit, and spat. The defendant directed profanities at Police Constable E, who was cleaning up the vomit and spit, and committed assault by spitting at E once.

By doing so, the defendant obstructed the legitimate official duties of the police officer concerning the maintenance of order at a government office and the management of flagrant offenders in custody.

facts_kr:
1. 피고인은 2021. 3. 16. 17:05경 C 앞 노상에서, ‘아저씨 한 명이 행패를 부리고 있다'는 112 신고를 받고 출동한 D파출소 소속 순경 E, 순경 F가 피고인을 말리자 "야 이 개자식아 짜바리 새끼야 니가 뭔데 좆같은 자식아"라고 욕설을 하면서, 손으로 순경 E의 얼굴을 1회 때리는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112 신고 처리에 관한 정당한 공무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 피고인은 2021. 3. 16. 17:53경 G에 있는 ‘H'식당 앞 노상에서, 피고인이 도로에 누워 있다는 112 신고를 받고 출동한 순경 E가 "여기서 왜 이렇게 누워 있습니까, 이러시면 안됩니다"라고 만류하자 이에 화가 나 "야 이 개 자식아 짜비리 너거들이 뭔데 나를 가라 마라 하노 좆같은 새끼야"등 욕설을 하면서 순경 E의 다리 부위를 5-6회 걷어 차고 순찰차에 태우려고 하는 E의 얼굴에 침을 뱉는 등 폭행하고, 이를 말리는 순경 I의 정강이를 발로 걷어차는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관들의 주취자 보호 및 112 신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 공무집행을 각 방해하였다.
3. 피고인은 2021. 3. 16. 18:45경 D파출소에서, 지적장애 3급인 피고인을 제2항과 같은 행위로 인하여 장애인 인권센터로 신병을 인계하기 위해 D 파출소로 연행하여 대기하던 중, 피고인이 파출소 밖으로 나가 그 곳에 서 있던 피해자 순경 F와 순경 I에게 화단에 있던 흙을 던지며 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 주취자 보호에 관한 정당한 공무 집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## Charge 1: Assault and Obstruction of Official Duty (First Incident)

On March 16, 2021, at approximately 17:05, on a public road in front of Location C, police officers from D Police Box—namely, Patrol Officer E and Patrol Officer F—responded to an emergency call (Report No. 112) reporting that "a man is committing assault and disturbance." When Officers E and F attempted to restrain the Defendant, the Defendant uttered profanities, saying "Hey, you son of a bitch, you fucking bastard conscript, who the hell are you, you fucking asshole," and assaulted Officer E by striking him once in the face with his hand, among other acts of violence.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful official duties of police officers in processing an emergency call report (Report No. 112).

## Charge 2: Assault and Obstruction of Official Duty (Second Incident)

On March 16, 2021, at approximately 17:53, on a public road in front of Restaurant H located at Location G, Patrol Officer E responded to an emergency call (Report No. 112) reporting that "the Defendant is lying on the road." When Officer E attempted to dissuade the Defendant by stating "Why are you lying here like this? You cannot do this," the Defendant became enraged and uttered profanities, saying "Hey, you son of a bitch, you fucking bastards, who the hell are you to tell me what to do, you fucking asshole," and engaged in the following violent acts: kicking Officer E's leg area 5 to 6 times, spitting on Officer E's face as E attempted to place him in the patrol vehicle, and kicking Officer I's shin who was attempting to restrain him, among other acts of violence.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful official duties of police officers in, respectively, the protection of an intoxicated person and the processing of an emergency call report (Report No. 112).

## Charge 3: Assault and Obstruction of Official Duty (Third Incident)

On March 16, 2021, at approximately 18:45, at D Police Box, while the Defendant—a person with intellectual disability, Grade 3—was being transported to D Police Box for the purpose of transferring his custody to the Disability Human Rights Center due to the conduct described in Charge 2, the Defendant exited the police box and, while standing outside, threw soil from a flowerbed at victim Patrol Officers F and I, thereby assaulting them.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful official duties of a police officer in the protection of an intoxicated person.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 4. 27. 지방법원 도로교통법위반(음주운전)죄 등으로 징역 1년 2월, 집행유예 3년을 선고받았고, 위 판결은 검사의 항소가 기각되어 2021. 10. 28. 확정되었다.
피고인은 2021. 5. 19. 23:40경 B에 있는 C 앞길에서, ‘술에 취한 사람이 주점에서 행패를 부린다.'는 112신고 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경위 E 등이 피고인에게 귀가할 것을 권유한 후 다른 112신고를 받고 출동하려고 하자 순찰차 보닛에 올라타서 순찰차의 운행을 방해하고, 계속하여 조수석에 탑승한 위 E에게 다가와 시비를 걸어 E이 이를 제지하자 "이런 씨발새끼들을 봤나. 병신 같은 새끼."라는 등의 욕설을 하면서 손바닥으로 E의 가슴을 1회 밀치고, 양손으로 E의 얼굴 및 오른쪽 허리 부위를 툭툭 쳤다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지

1. E에 대한 경찰 진술조서
1. 판시전과 : 범죄경력조회 회보서, 판결문 등

facts_en:
On April 27, 2020, the District Court sentenced the Defendant to imprisonment for one year and two months with a suspension of execution for three years for violation of the Road Traffic Act (driving under the influence of alcohol) and related offenses. The judgment became final on October 28, 2021, when the Prosecutor's appeal was dismissed.

On May 19, 2021, at approximately 23:40, in front of location C on road B, police officers including Patrol Officer E from Police Box D (District Unit) of the Police Station responded to a 112 emergency report alleging that "an intoxicated person is causing a disturbance at a tavern." After recommending that the Defendant return home, the officers were preparing to respond to another 112 emergency report when the Defendant climbed onto the hood of the patrol vehicle, thereby obstructing the operation of the patrol vehicle. Subsequently, the Defendant approached Officer E, who was seated in the front passenger seat, and provoked him. When Officer E attempted to restrain him, the Defendant uttered profanities, stating, "What fucking bastards I've seen. You're a fucking retard," among other insults, and struck Officer E's chest once with the palm of his hand. The Defendant then struck Officer E's face and right waist area multiple times with both hands.

By engaging in these acts, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by the police officer in handling an emergency response (112 report) matter.

**Evidence Summary:**

1. Defendant's testimony at trial
2. Police statement record of Officer E
3. Prior conviction records: Criminal history inquiry report, court judgment documents, etc.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 12. 30. 02:22경 술을 마신 상태로 B건물 C역 지하 주차장에서 "직원이 회식 끝나고 집에 들어갔는지 확인이 안 된다."라는 취지로 112신고 전화를 걸어 남부경찰서 D지구대 소속 경사 E, 순경 F가 위 장소에 출동하게 되었다.
이후 피고인은 출동한 경찰관들에게 "직장 동료가 연락이 안 되고 있으니 직장 동료가 사는 집에 가서 확인을 해 달라."는 취지로 말하였으나, 경사 E이 "실종자의 주거지를 관할하는 경찰서인 서부경찰서 G지구대에 공조요청을 하였다."라고 설명하자, 같은 날 03:37경 "씨발 경찰들은 아무 것도 안 해. 뭐 하는 경찰이야?", "경찰 못 믿는다. 경찰 씨발놈들아"라고 욕설을 하면서 갑자기 양손으로 경사 E의 가슴을 밀치고 멱살을 잡는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지

1. E에 대한 경찰 진술조서
1. 바디캠 영상 CD 1장

facts_en:
On December 30, 2021, at approximately 02:22, while under the influence of alcohol, the Defendant called the emergency police line (112) from the underground parking lot of C Station beneath B Building, reporting to the effect that "it cannot be confirmed whether an employee has returned home after the company dinner." As a result, Police Sergeant E and Police Constable F, attached to the D Police Substation of the Southern Police Station, were dispatched to the scene.

Subsequently, the Defendant told the responding police officers to the effect that "a workplace colleague cannot be reached, so please go to the house where the colleague lives and confirm their whereabouts." However, when Police Sergeant E explained that "a request for cooperation was made to the G Police Substation of the Western Police Station, which has jurisdiction over the missing person's residence," the Defendant, on the same day at approximately 03:37, engaged in vulgar profanity stating "Fucking cops do nothing. What kind of police are you doing?", "I don't trust the police. You fucking bastard cops," and suddenly shoved Police Sergeant E's chest with both hands and grabbed him by the collar, thereby committing assault.

By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by police officers, specifically regarding the processing of the 112 emergency report case.

## SUMMARY OF EVIDENCE

1. The Defendant's testimony in court
2. Police statement record of E
3. One (1) CD containing body camera footage

facts_kr:
피고인은 2014. 1. 22.경 지방법원에서 상해죄로 벌금 300만 원의 약식명령을, 2014. 3. 25.경 같은 법원에서 공용물건손상죄로 벌금 200만 원의 약식명령을 각 고지받았으나 위 각 벌금을 납부하지 못한 것으로 인하여 수배되어 있던 중, 2014. 9. 24.경 XXX에 있는 피고인의 주거지에서 지방검찰청으로부터 벌금을 납부하라는 내용의 문자메시지를 받았다.
피고인은 2014. 9. 25. 오전 무렵 자신의 주거지에서 술을 마시던 중 미납한 벌금을 해결하기 위하여 지방검찰청으로 가기로 마음먹고, 같은 날 15:30경 지방검찰청 민원실에서 지방검찰청 소속 방호주사보 안○○에게 "내가 벌금 수배자다."라고 말을 하고, 위 안○○로부터 "담당자가 올 때까지 기다려달라."는 말을 듣고 위 민원실 내 소파에서 기다리던 중 잠이 들었다.
피고인은 같은 날 15:40경 지방검찰청 소속 검찰서기 홍○○가 피고인을 깨우며 "신분증을 보여달라."고 말하는 것을 듣자, 순간적으로 화가 나, "말투가 마음에 안 든다, 개새끼야, 말 똑바로 해라."라고 소리치며 주머니 안에 있던 담뱃갑 등을 집어던지고, 자신의 머리로 위 홍○○의 머리 부위를 들이받은 다음 양손으로 위 홍○○의 멱살을 잡고 흔들었다.
피고인은 자신의 행위를 제지하는 지방검찰청 소속 집행사무관 소○○, 같은 검찰서기 박○○, 같은 검찰서기 최○○에게 "이 새끼야, 씹할 놈아, 죽여 버린다, 너희들 얼굴 기억하고 있다."라고 소리치며 손과 발을 마구 휘둘렀고, 위 소○○로부터 "공무집행방해로 입건될 수 있다."는 말을 들었음에도 계속하여 욕을 하면서 손바닥으로 위 박○○의 좌측 뺨을 1회 때렸다.
이후 피고인은 위 소○○가 "112신고를 하여 경찰관이 오고 있고, 공무집행방해로 현행범인 체포될 것이다."고 말하면서 위 박○○, 위 최○○와 같이 피고인의 팔에 수갑을 채운 다음 소파에 앉혔음에도, 계속하여 손과 발을 마구 휘둘러 그 과정에서 발로 위 안○○의 허벅지를 1회 차고, 발로 위 소○○의 좌측 옆구리, 얼굴 등을 4회 찼다.
이로써 피고인은 검찰공무원들의 정당한 공무집행인 민원실 내 민원처리업무를 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant received an order for summary punishment of a fine of 3 million won for the offense of assault (傷害罪) at the District Court around January 22, 2014, and an order for summary punishment of a fine of 2 million won for the offense of damage to public property (公用物件損傷罪) at the same court around March 25, 2014. However, due to the Defendant's failure to pay the aforementioned fines, the Defendant was subject to a fugitive warrant. On September 24, 2014, at the Defendant's residence located at XXX, the Defendant received a text message from the District Prosecutors' Office directing payment of the outstanding fines.

On September 25, 2014, in the morning hours, while drinking alcohol at the Defendant's residence, the Defendant decided to proceed to the District Prosecutors' Office in order to resolve the unpaid fines. Around 15:30 on the same day, at the civil complaints reception office (民願室) of the District Prosecutors' Office, the Defendant told An○○, a prosecution guard (防護主事補) employed by the District Prosecutors' Office, "I am a fugitive debtor subject to fine execution." The Defendant then heard from An○○ the words, "Please wait until the case handler arrives," and fell asleep on a sofa located within the civil complaints reception office while waiting.

Around 15:40 on the same day, when the Defendant heard prosecution clerk (檢察書記) Hong○○, employed by the District Prosecutors' Office, awaken the Defendant and say, "Please show your identification," the Defendant became suddenly enraged and shouted, "I don't like your tone of voice, you fucking bastard, speak properly," and threw a cigarette pack and other items from the Defendant's pocket, then struck prosecution clerk Hong○○'s head with the Defendant's own head, and thereafter grabbed and shook Hong○○'s collar area with both hands.

The Defendant shouted at execution officer (執行事務官) So○○, prosecution clerk (檢察書記) Park○○, and prosecution clerk (檢察書記) Choi○○, all employed by the District Prosecutors' Office, who were attempting to restrain the Defendant's conduct: "You fucking bastard, you worthless piece of shit, I will kill you, I am memorizing your faces," while wildly swinging both hands and feet. Despite hearing from So○○ the words, "You may be charged with obstruction of the execution of official duties (公務執行妨害罪)," the Defendant continued to curse while striking prosecution clerk Park○○'s left cheek with the palm of the hand on one occasion.

Subsequently, when So○○ stated, "A 112 emergency call has been made and a police officer is en route, and you will be arrested in flagrante delicto for obstruction of the execution of official duties," the Defendant, after Park○○ and Choi○○ placed handcuffs on the Defendant's arms and seated the Defendant on a sofa, continued to swing both hands and feet indiscriminately. In the course of this continued conduct, the Defendant kicked prosecution guard An○○'s thigh on one occasion with the Defendant's foot, and kicked execution officer So○○'s left flank and face on four occasions with the Defendant's foot.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties performed by the prosecution officials, specifically the civil complaints processing work conducted within the civil complaints reception office.

피고인은 2019. 10. 24. 지방법원 도로교통법위반(무면허운전)죄로 징역 6월에 집행유예 2년을 선고받고, 2019. 11. 1. 위 판결이 확정되었다.

이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고처리 업무에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]
On October 24, 2019, the Defendant was sentenced by the District Court to six months' imprisonment with a suspended sentence of two years for violation of the Road Traffic Act (unlicensed driving). The judgment became final and binding on November 1, 2019.


## [Criminal Acts]
On October 18, 2019, at approximately 02:10, in front of [Location] B, two police sergeants, Sergeant C and Sergeant D, belonging to the police station, responded to and received a report filed via the emergency telephone number 112. Upon finding the Defendant intoxicated and sleeping on the street, they awoke him and suggested that he return home. Dissatisfied with this intervention, the Defendant directed the following profane insults at the victims: "Fucking cops, you bastard cops, come here you fucking bastards, which police station are you from?" The Defendant then pushed Sergeants C and D with his body, swung his fists multiple times in the direction of their faces, and kicked Sergeant C's shin once, thereby committing assault.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by the police officers in processing the emergency report (112 call) service.

## Evidence Summary
1. The Defendant's courtroom testimony
2. Police statement record of Sergeant D
3. On-scene video evidence (CD)
4. Prior conviction record: Criminal history inquiry report, disposition status confirmation and report, court judgment, investigative report (retroactive concurrent offense)

facts_kr:
1. 피해자 B에 대한 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 6. 14. 14:01경 고등법원 2층 민원실에서 피고인이 처벌받은 판결문의 열람을 요구하였으나 지방법원 열람하여야 한다는 안내를 받자 갑자기 "왜 판결문을 볼 수 없게 하느냐, C 대법관이 시켰느냐"고 소리를 지르는 등 소란을 피웠고, 이를 제지하는 고등법원 소속 보안주사보인 피해자 B의 옆구리와 가슴을 들고 있던 볼펜으로 강하게 찌르고, 오른손으로 피해자의 뺨을 때려 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 법원공무원의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 피해자 D에 대한 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 6. 14. 15:50경 경찰서 형사과 사무실에서 인치된 피고인의 소지품 중 위험한 물건이 있는지 여부 등을 확인하려는 위 경찰서 소속 경찰관인 피해자 D의 뺨을 손바닥으로 가격하여 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Obstruction of Justice Against Victim B

On June 14, 2021, at approximately 14:01, the defendant, while in the civil petition office on the second floor of the High Court, demanded access to review a judgment document concerning his own conviction. Upon receiving guidance that he would need to access the document through the District Court, the defendant suddenly created a disturbance by shouting, "Why are you preventing me from viewing the judgment document? Did Justice C of the Supreme Court order this?" and the like. While attempting to restrain the defendant, the defendant forcefully stabbed Victim B—a security officer attached to the High Court—in the side and chest area with a ballpoint pen that he was holding, and struck Victim B's cheek with his right hand, thereby committing assault.

By such conduct, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by a court officer.

## 2. Obstruction of Justice Against Victim D

On June 14, 2021, at approximately 15:50, the defendant, in the Criminal Investigation Division office of the police station, struck the cheek of Victim D—a police officer attached to said police station—with the palm of his hand, thereby committing assault. Victim D was attempting to verify whether any dangerous items existed among the defendant's confiscated personal belongings.

By such conduct, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by a police officer.

facts_kr:
1. 2021. 11. 9. 03:42경 택시 안 범행
피고인은 2021. 11. 9. 03:42경 택시를 타고 목적지인 B에 이르러, ‘손님이 술에 취해 일어나지 않는다'라는 취지의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 C지구대 소속 경찰관 경장 D으로부터 귀가 요청을 받게 되자 갑자기 오른 주먹으로 그의 얼굴을 1회 때리고, 발로 그의 배를 수회 찼다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112신고사건 처리 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 2021. 11. 9. 04:00경 C지구대 안 범행
피고인은 2021. 11. 9. 04:00경 C지구대에서, 위 1항의 범행으로 인하여 현행범인 체포되어 C지구대에 인치되어 있던 중 수갑을 찬 손목 부위에 통증을 호소하여 C지구대 소속 경장 F이 수갑을 느슨하게 조절하려고 피고인에게 다가가자 발로 그의 몸을 수회 걷어찼다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 현행범인 체포 후 사건 처리 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Criminal Act in Taxi on November 9, 2021, at Approximately 03:42

The Defendant, having arrived at destination B by taxi at approximately 03:42 on November 9, 2021, received a request to return home from Police Sergeant D, a police officer belonging to C Police Substation who had responded to a 112 emergency call reporting that "the passenger is intoxicated and will not wake up." Upon receiving this request, the Defendant suddenly struck the officer's face once with his right fist and kicked his abdomen multiple times.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties of a police officer relating to the processing of a 112 emergency call report.

## 2. Criminal Act at C Police Substation on November 9, 2021, at Approximately 04:00

The Defendant, at C Police Substation at approximately 04:00 on November 9, 2021, while being arrested as a flagrant offender due to the criminal act described in paragraph 1 above and being held at C Police Substation, complained of pain in the wrist area where handcuffs had been applied. When Police Sergeant F, belonging to C Police Substation, approached the Defendant in order to loosen the handcuffs, the Defendant kicked his body multiple times with his feet.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties of a police officer relating to the arrest of a flagrant offender and the processing of the case.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 11. 6. 12:48경 B에 있는 'C' 음식점 앞에서 피고인의 일행이 입간판을 손괴한 사건과 관련된 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경사 E, 순경 F이 관련자들의 진술을 청취하는 등 사건을 처리하는 것을 보고 있다가 이에 참견하면서 경찰관들에게 "What?, 뭐?, 씹할 놈아"라고 욕설을 하고 손으로 때릴 듯이 행동하였다.
피고인은 경찰관들의 제지에도 불구하고 "니네가 나를 이길 수 있어? 덤벼봐, 씹할 놈들아!"라고 욕설을 하면서 손으로 위 E의 목을 잡고 밀치고, 옆에서 말리던 위 F의 목을 손으로 잡고 밀쳤다.
피고인은 계속해서 자신을 공무집행방해 혐의로 현행범인 체포하려는 경찰관들의 목을 한 팔에 한 명씩 양팔로 걸어 조르고, 체포되어 순찰차에 태워져 지구대에 도착한 후 순찰차에서 내릴 것을 요구하는 경장 G, 순경 H의 머리를 이로 깨물고 침을 뱉었다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관들을 폭행하여 112신고 접수처리 및 치안유지에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On November 6, 2019, at approximately 12:48 p.m., in front of the 'C' Restaurant located in B, the defendant observed police officers—Sergeant E and Police Constable F, both assigned to the D District Police Box of the local Police Station—responding to a 112 emergency report concerning an incident in which the defendant's associates had damaged a sandwich board sign. While the officers were processing the case by taking statements from the relevant parties, the defendant interfered with their duties and directed the following profane language and threatening gestures toward the officers: "What? What the fuck, you motherfucking bastards," and made motions as though to strike them with his hands.

Despite the police officers' attempts to restrain him, the defendant continued to shout profanities, saying: "Can you beat me? Come on, you motherfucking bastards!" Thereupon, he grabbed and pushed Sergeant E by the neck with his hands, and similarly grabbed and pushed Police Constable F by the neck with his hands as F attempted to intervene nearby.

Continuing his assault, the defendant wrapped both arms around the necks of the police officers—one officer in each arm—in a choking hold as they attempted to arrest him as a suspect for obstruction of official duties. After being arrested and placed in a patrol vehicle and transported to the District Police Box, when Police Captain G and Police Constable H demanded that the defendant exit the patrol vehicle, the defendant bit them on the head and spat upon them.

By this conduct, the defendant assaulted the police officers and thereby obstructed their lawful performance of official duties relating to the reception and processing of 112 emergency reports and the maintenance of public order.

facts_kr:
1. 제1차 범행
피고인은 2021. 1. 31. 12:21경 B에 있는 C 앞 노상에서, 위 주점에서 술에 취해 소란을 피우다가 112신고를 받고 출동한 북부경찰서 D파출소 소속 경감 E, 경장 F, 순경 G으로부터 즉결심판청구를 당하게 되었고 이후 경감 E 등이(차량번호 1 생략) 경찰차에 탑승하여 현장을 떠나려고 하자 후진하려는 위 경찰차의 뒤편에 다가가 가로막고 오른발로 뒤 범퍼를 1회 걷어찼다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰의 신고사건처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 제2차 범행
피고인은 2021. 1. 31. 12:32경 위 C 앞 노상에서 위와 같이 경찰차를 발로 차는 등으로 소란을 피우다가 경감 E 등에 의해 현행범인 체포된 후 H에 있는 D파출소로 인치되었다.
그런데 피고인은 같은 날 12:55경 위 D파출소에서 잠시 수갑을 풀고 화장실을 다녀오고 이후 경장 F에 의해 재차 수갑을 차게 되자 몸부림을 치며 오른손바닥으로 경장 F의 정수리를 1회 가격하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰의 체포된 피의자의 신병 관리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## First Offense

On January 31, 2021, at approximately 12:21 p.m., the Defendant, having caused a disturbance while intoxicated at a tavern located on B, was subject to an immediate trial petition filed by Sergeant E, Lance Sergeant F, and Patrolman G of the D Police Box, North Police Station, who responded to a report made to the emergency hotline (112). Thereafter, when Sergeant E and others were preparing to leave the scene in a police vehicle (vehicle registration number 1 omitted), the Defendant approached the rear of the police vehicle as it was reversing, obstructed its passage, and kicked the rear bumper once with his right foot.

By this act, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by police in the processing of a reported case.

## Second Offense

On January 31, 2021, at approximately 12:32 p.m., the Defendant caused a disturbance on the road in front of C by kicking the police vehicle and other conduct as described above. He was thereafter arrested as a person caught in flagrante delicto by Sergeant E and others and was taken into custody at the D Police Box located in H.

However, at approximately 12:55 p.m. on the same day, while at the D Police Box, the Defendant briefly had his handcuffs removed and went to use the restroom. Thereafter, when Lance Sergeant F re-applied the handcuffs, the Defendant struggled and struck Lance Sergeant F on the crown of the head once with the palm of his right hand.

By this act, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by police in the management of the custodial status of an arrested suspect.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 3. 9. 12:20경 C구청 1층 민원실 무인발급기 앞에서 코로나19 감염증 전파 방지를 위하여 시정되어 있던 위 C구청 민원실 유리 현관문을 수회에 걸쳐 주먹으로 두드리면서 위 유리 현관문 안쪽에 위치한 사무실에서 근무하고 있던 직원들을 향해 "야, 씨발 직원 빨리 나와라."라고 하는 등 욕설을 하고 행패를 부렸다. 피고인은 위 C구청 총무과 소속 청원경찰인 D가 피고인을 제지하자 위 D에게 "씨발년놈들, 개새끼"라는 등의 욕설을 하면서 위 유리 현관문을 주먹으로 수회 두드리고, 위 D 및 지원 출동한 같은 과 소속 정원경찰인 E 등을 향하여 "씨발, 너희들 임마 감사원에서 나와서 다 죽었어, 일처리 똑바로 안하고, 내가 구청직원들 다 죽일 거다."라는 등의 욕설을 하며 자신이 쓰고 있던 마스크를 손으로 찢어 바닥에 던지고, 허리띠를 풀어 바닥에 수회 때리는 등의 방법으로 위 청원경찰들을 위협하였다.
피고인은 계속하여, 위 C구청 중앙 현관 앞 계단 난간에 앉아 욕설을 하는 등의 소란을 피워 위 D, E 등에 의해 제지받자, 자신의 지갑 안에 들어 있던 카드, 현금 등을 바닥으로 집어 던지면서 "한 번 해보자, 내가 여기 불 싸지르러 왔는데 참는 거야, 씨발 같이 죽으면 되잖아."라고 말하여 위 청원경찰들을 협박하였다.
이로써 피고인은 C구청 소속 청원경찰들을 위와 같이 협박함으로써 청원경찰들의 질서유지 및 민원처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On March 9, 2020, at approximately 12:20 p.m., in front of the unmanned document issuance machine in the Civil Affairs Office on the first floor of the C District Office, the Defendant repeatedly struck with his fist the glass entrance door of the said Civil Affairs Office, which had been positioned to prevent the spread of COVID-19 infection. While doing so, he directed abusive language and disorderly conduct toward employees working in the office located inside the glass entrance door, saying, "Hey, you fucking staff members, come out quickly," and similar profanities.

When D, a special constable belonging to the General Affairs Division of the C District Office, attempted to stop the Defendant, the Defendant directed abusive language at D, including "you fucking bitches, you fucking bastards," and repeatedly struck the glass entrance door with his fist. He further directed toward D and E, a special constable of the same division who was dispatched in response, and others abusive language stating, "Fuck, you assholes, you came out of the Audit and Inspection Service and everyone is dead, you're not handling things properly, I'm going to kill all the District Office employees," among other profanities. The Defendant then tore with his hands the mask he was wearing, threw it on the ground, and threatened the said special constables by methods including unbuckling his belt and repeatedly striking it against the ground.

The Defendant subsequently sat on the railing of the stairs in front of the central entrance of the C District Office and caused a disturbance by using abusive language and similar conduct. When he was stopped by D, E, and others, he threw cards, cash, and other items contained in his wallet onto the ground and threatened the said special constables by stating, "Let's do this. I came here to start a fire, but I'm restraining myself. Fuck, we can all die together."

By threatening the said special constables of the C District Office in the aforementioned manner, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of their official duties related to the maintenance of order and the processing of civil complaints.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 1. 22. 22:17경 B에 있는 ‘C' 앞 도로에서 술에 취하여 쓰러져 있던 중 목격자의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경장 E 등으로부터 귀가할 것을 요청받자, 경찰관들에게 "씨발 니들이 뭔데, 니들 이름 뭐야?", "씨발, 그냥 꺼져라", "나랑 한 번 싸워볼래, 맞장 한 번 뜨자" 등 욕설을 한 후 경찰관들에게 혼자 귀가하겠다고 하였다.
계속하여 피고인은 2021. 1. 23. 00:10경 주민센터 사거리 앞 도로에서 술에 취하여 쓰러져 있던 중 같은 취지의 목격자의 112신고를 받고 재차 출동한 E으로부터 귀가할 것을 요청받자, E에게 "이 새끼야, 짭새야", "이거(견장) 떼고 다이다이 한 판 붙자, 짭새야"라고 욕설을 하며 오른손 주먹으로 E의 가슴 부분을 1회 때리는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant, on January 22, 2021, at approximately 22:17, was lying intoxicated on the road in front of 'C' located in B. Upon receiving a report from a witness calling 112, Sergeant E and other officers from D Police Box of the District Police Station arrived at the scene and requested that the Defendant return home. In response, the Defendant uttered profanities to the police officers, including "Fuck, who the hell are you? What are your names?", "Fuck, just get the fuck out of here," and "Do you want to fucking fight me? Let's go one-on-one," after which he stated to the officers that he would return home alone.

Subsequently, on January 23, 2021, at approximately 00:10, the Defendant was lying intoxicated on the road in front of the intersection near the Community Center. Following a report from a witness calling 112 for similar reasons, E arrived at the scene again and requested that the Defendant return home. The Defendant then directed profanities at E, stating "You son of a bitch, you fucking cop," and "Take off that insignia and let's fight, you fucking cop," after which the Defendant struck E's chest area once with his right fist, thereby committing battery.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of a police officer's official duties pertaining to the processing of a 112 emergency call report.

[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2017. 2. 9. 지방법원 폭행죄 등으로 징역 6월을 선고받고, 2019. 2. 13. 지방법원 폭행죄 등으로 징역 8월을 선고받고 2019. 10. 10. 교도소에서 그 형의 집행을 종료하였고, 2020. 6. 19. 지방법원 폭행죄로 징역 6월을 선고받아 위 판결은 2020. 12. 12. 확정되었다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 2020. 6. 26. 01:35경 C 앞길에서 ‘취객이 쓰러져 머리에서 피가 난다'는 취지의 112 신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 D지구대 소속 경장 E 등으로부터 치료나 귀가를 권유받자 이를 거부하며 욕설을 하고, 이에 위 E 등 경찰관들이 피고인에게 재차 자진 귀가를 권유한 후 순찰차에 승차하여 현장을 떠나려 하자, 갑자기 도로로 뛰어들어 순찰차 앞을 가로막고, 이에 위 E이 피고인에게 경고 조치를 하자, 갑자기 오른손 주먹으로 E의 왼쪽 얼굴 부분을 1회 강하게 때려 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112 신고 사건 처리 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
