facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant received a sentence of six months' imprisonment for assault, etc. at the District Court on February 9, 2017; received a sentence of eight months' imprisonment for assault, etc. at the District Court on February 13, 2019; completed execution of the aforementioned sentence at a penitentiary on October 10, 2019; and received a sentence of six months' imprisonment for assault at the District Court on June 19, 2020, which judgment became final and conclusive on December 12, 2020.

## [Criminal Acts]

On June 26, 2020, at approximately 01:35, the Defendant arrived at a location in front of [Location] C where a 112 emergency report had been received indicating that "an intoxicated person had collapsed with blood coming from his head." Upon being advised by Police Sergeant E and others of [District] Police Substation D to accept treatment or return home, the Defendant refused and uttered profanities. Subsequently, when the aforementioned Police Officers E and others repeatedly advised the Defendant to voluntarily return home, the patrol vehicle proceeded to depart the scene. At that moment, the Defendant suddenly ran into the road, blocked the front of the patrol vehicle, and when the aforementioned Officer E took warning measures against the Defendant, the Defendant suddenly struck Officer E's left facial area with his right-hand fist once with great force, thereby committing assault.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties of a police public official, specifically the processing of matters pertaining to 112 emergency calls.

facts_kr:

피고인은 2020. 10. 4. 23:00경 경찰서에서 자신의 폭행 사건이 접수되었다는 이유로 "경찰관들을 고발하러 왔다", "술 한 잔 먹었다고 사람을 우습게 본다", "씹할 새끼"라고 욕설을 하여 귀가할 것을 요구받았으나, 같은 날 23:22경 재차 위 경찰서를 방문하여 위 경찰서 방범순찰대 소속 의무경찰 상경 B로부터 제지를 받게 되자 주먹으로 위 B의 오른쪽 옆구리를 1회 때려서 폭행하여 공무원의 민원인 응대 및 질서 유지에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2021고단3292
피고인은 2021. 5. 24 22:50경 C 앞 노상에서 D을 폭행한 사건으로 112 신고를 받고 같은 날 22:56경 현장에 출동한 경찰서 E파출소 소속 경찰관들의 임의동행요구에 동의하여 같은 날 23:40경 G지구대에 도착한 후 탁자에 발을 올리고 소파에 앉아 근무 중인 경찰관들에게 욕설을 하고 추후 경찰서에서 조사를 받으라는 안내와 함께 귀가를 요구받고도 귀가하지 아니하고, 2021. 5. 25. 00:10경 위 지구대 밖으로 나와 출입문을 손으로 잡고 흔들고 발로 걷어차며 욕설을 하다가 위 지구대 소내 상황근무 중인 경위 H으로부터 이를 제지당하자 손으로 H의 왼쪽 어깨를 3~4회 밀치고, 손바닥으로 그의 낭심을 아래에서 위로 움켜쥐듯 올려쳤다.
이로써 피고인은 위 H을 폭행하여 경찰공무원의 지구대 상황근무 및 주취자 보호에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## Case No. 2020고단7086

The defendant, on October 4, 2020, at approximately 23:00, visited a police station alleging that a report of his assault case had been filed. Upon being requested to return home, he uttered profanities, stating: "I came here to lodge a complaint against the police officers," "You all look down on people just because they had a drink," and "You fucking bastards." Subsequently, on the same date at approximately 23:22, the defendant revisited the same police station. When he was stopped by Military Police Officer B, a member of the Crime Prevention and Patrol Unit of the said police station, the defendant struck B's right flank once with his fist, thereby committing assault. By this act, the defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties by a public official, namely, the handling of civil complaints and the maintenance of order.

## Case No. 2021고단3292

The defendant, on May 24, 2021, at approximately 22:50, committed assault against D on a street in front of C. A 112 emergency call was received, and police officers from E Police Box arrived at the scene at approximately 22:56 on the same date. The defendant consented to a request for voluntary accompaniment and arrived at G Police Substation at approximately 23:40 on the same date. While sitting on a sofa with his feet placed on a table, the defendant uttered profanities toward on-duty police officers. Despite being guided to return home and instructed to undergo questioning at the police station at a later date, the defendant did not leave. At approximately 00:10 on May 25, 2021, the defendant exited the police substation, grabbed and shook the entrance door with his hands, kicked it with his feet, and uttered profanities. When Police Sergeant H, who was performing situation watch duty inside the substation, attempted to restrain him, the defendant pushed H's left shoulder three to four times with his hands and, in a grasping motion from below upward, struck H's groin area with the palm of his hand.

By these acts, the defendant committed assault against H, thereby obstructing the legitimate performance of official duties by a police public servant, namely, the maintenance of situation watch at the police substation and the protection of intoxicated persons.

범죄 사실
피고인은 2021. 4. 22. 23:55경 B에 있는 C 주점에서 함께 술을 마시던 지인 D를 폭행하여 싸우고 있다는 112신고를 받고 출동한 E파출소 소속 경찰공무원 F으로부터 술값을 지불하고 귀가하라는 말을 듣게 되자 "씨발새끼가, 어디서 까불어"라고 욕설을 하며 손으로 위 F의 가슴을 1회 때리고, 공무집행방해 등의 현행범인으로 체포된 후, 2021. 4. 23. 00:01경 E파출소에서 정차한 순찰차에서 내리며 발로 위 F의 정강이를 1회 걷어찼다.

facts_en:
# CRIMINAL HISTORY

The Defendant was sentenced to imprisonment for ten months with a suspended sentence of two years by the District Court on June 9, 2016, for obstruction of the performance of official duties, among other offenses. During the suspension period, on March 30, 2017, the Defendant was sentenced to imprisonment for four months by the District Court for obstruction of business. The judgment was finalized on August 18, 2017, rendering the aforementioned suspended sentence null and void. The Defendant completed the execution of both sentences at Cheonan Correctional Institution on May 21, 2018.

# FACTS OF THE CRIME

On April 22, 2021, at approximately 23:55, the Defendant engaged in a physical assault against Person D, an acquaintance with whom the Defendant was drinking together at Tavern C located in District B. Upon receiving a report of the Defendant and Person D fighting via emergency telephone number 112, police officer F, assigned to Police Substation E, arrived at the scene. When Officer F instructed the Defendant to pay for the beverages consumed and return home, the Defendant responded with profanity, stating "Fucking bastard, who the fuck do you think you are?" (씨발새끼가, 어디서 까불어), and struck Officer F's chest once with his hand. The Defendant was subsequently arrested as a suspect caught in the act of obstructing the performance of official duties, among other charges. At approximately 00:01 on April 23, 2021, while exiting the patrol vehicle stopped at Police Substation E, the Defendant kicked Officer F's shin once.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by a police officer in responding to and handling an emergency report submitted via the 112 emergency system.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced by the District Court on December 13, 2017, to eight months imprisonment with a suspended sentence of two years for the crime of Special Intimidation. On December 7, 2018, the same court sentenced the Defendant to eight months imprisonment for Obstruction of the Performance of Official Duties and other charges. The judgment became final on February 8, 2019, rendering the aforementioned suspended sentence void. The Defendant completed the execution of the sentence at Bukbu Penitentiary No. 2 on February 6, 2020. The Defendant was subsequently sentenced by the same court on November 7, 2020, to one year imprisonment for Obstruction of the Performance of Official Duties and other charges, and this judgment became final on May 18, 2021.

## [Criminal Acts]

Due to schizophrenia and other mental conditions, the Defendant was in a state of diminished capacity to distinguish matters or make decisions. On October 24, 2020, at approximately 09:20, while at C Detention Center, the Defendant, following fellow detainee D to the exercise yard for the purpose of exercise, became angered by the fact that Victim E, a staff member of the detention center, had spoken to the Defendant in informal/disrespectful speech. The Defendant then assaulted the Victim by striking the Victim's chest three to four times with his fist, thereby obstructing the correctional officer's lawful duties in guarding detainees.

facts_kr:

계속하려 피고인은 같은 날 00:33경 현행범인으로 체포되어 같은 시 F 경찰서 D지구대에 도착하자 순찰차에서 하차하면서 재차 위 E에게 욕설을 하고 발로 E의 왼쪽 정강이 부위를 1회 걷어찼다.

facts_en:
On September 28, 2021, at approximately 00:30, in a street across from the main gate of C High School, the Defendant, upon being requested to return home by Police Officer E, a member of the D District Unit of F Police Station who had responded to a 112 emergency report of the Defendant engaging in disorderly conduct, shouted profanities stating "Nice cops, you fucking bastards, the people are walking sticks, you fucking bastards, you shitty fuckers, are you even real cops?" and struck Police Officer E's chest area twice with his fists. He then placed one foot on the hood of the patrol vehicle and struck the front windshield four times.

Subsequently, on the same day at approximately 00:33, the Defendant was arrested as a flagrant offender. Upon arriving at the D District Unit of F Police Station and alighting from the patrol vehicle, he again shouted profanities at Police Officer E and kicked Officer E's left shin area once.

By these acts, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties of a police officer in processing the 112 emergency report matter.

**Summary of Evidence:**

1. The Defendant's courtroom testimony
2. Police statement reports respectively obtained from Police Officer E and Police Officer G
3. Internal investigation report (with attached scene photographs, etc.), duty log (1 page), investigative report (with video footage taken by eyewitness H attached), and nine video capture photographs\

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 7. 13. 00:06경부터 같은 날 00:28경까지 B 앞 도로에서, ‘모르는 사람이 시비...싸운다'라는 내용의 112신고를 받고 출동한 서부경찰서 C지구대 소속 경위 D, 경사 E 등 경찰 공무원들이 신고자를 상대로 신고내용을 확인한 후 피고인에게 소란을 피우지 말고 귀가할 것을 요청하자, 위 E에게 다가가 피고인의 얼굴을 들이밀며 "이런 호로새끼, 씨발 개새끼야, 니가 경찰이야, 개병신들, 그러니까 경찰관이 좆밥이라는 소리를 듣는 거다"라고 욕설을 하면서 위협하고, 이에 위 D이 피고인을 제지하기 위해 팔을 잡았음에도 이를 뿌리치고 계속 욕설을 하면서 위 D에게 삿대질을 하는 등 시비를 걸다 위 경찰 공무원들이 다른 신고사건으로 순찰차에 탑승하자 순찰차 앞에 서서 진행을 막다가, 운전석에 승차하고 있던 위 E이 비켜줄 것을 요구하자 운전석으로 다가가 손잡이를 잡아당겨 문을 열려고 시도하고, 이에 위 경찰 공무원들이 순찰차에서 내려 피고인을 제지하자 욕설을 하면서 배 부위로 위 경찰 공무원들을 밀치고 계속하여 순찰차 조수석 뒷좌석 문을 열고 승차하려고 시도하는 등 약 22분 동안 경찰 공무원들을 폭행하고 위협하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰 공무원들의 112신고 사건 처리 및 범죄의 예방 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant, from approximately 00:06 to 00:28 on July 13, 2021, on the road in front of location B, engaged in the following conduct: Police officers—specifically, Police Sergeant D and Police Corporal E, both assigned to the C District Unit of the Western Police Station—responded to a 112 emergency report with content describing "an unknown person quarreling and fighting." After confirming the reported details with the complainant, these police officers requested that the defendant cease causing a disturbance and return home. The defendant then approached Corporal E, thrust his face close to E's face, and uttered the following profanity while threatening: "You fucking whore bastard, you shit fucking dog bastard, are you a police officer? You incompetent assholes—that's why police officers are called dickheads." Despite Police Sergeant D attempting to restrain the defendant by grabbing his arm, the defendant shook free and continued hurling profanities while pointing his finger menacingly at D and provoking a quarrel.

After the police officers proceeded to board their patrol vehicle to respond to a separate reported incident, the defendant stood in front of the patrol vehicle, blocking its passage. When Corporal E, who was seated in the driver's seat, requested that the defendant move aside, the defendant approached the driver's-side door, grabbed the door handle, and attempted to force the door open. In response, the police officers exited the patrol vehicle and moved to restrain the defendant. The defendant then continued uttering profanities while pushing the police officers with force directed at their abdominal regions. The defendant subsequently attempted to open the rear passenger-side door of the patrol vehicle and board it.

Throughout this approximately 22-minute period, the defendant assaulted and threatened the police officers.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by the police officers, specifically their duties relating to the processing of the 112 emergency report and the prevention of crime.

facts_kr:
『2021고단2649』
피고인은 2021. 7. 14. 02:10경 B에 있는 건물 주차장에서, ‘술에 취해 난동을 피우는 사람이 있다'는 취지의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 C파출소 소속 경장 D, 순경 E으로부터 진정하고 난동을 피우지 말라는 계속된 제지에도 불구하고 소리를 지르는 등 불응하면서, 현장 상황을 정리하려는 위 경찰관들에게 "씨발, 가세요"라고 욕설을 하며 손으로 순경 E의 몸을 1회 밀치고, 경장 D로부터 ‘경찰관 몸에 손대지 마세요'라는 말을 들었음에도 불구하고 왼손으로 경장 D의 얼굴 부위를 1회 때려 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관들의 112신고 사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 『2021고단2897』
피고인은 2021. 8. 22. 23:47경 F 앞 길에서, 당일 피고인과 함께 술을 마신 G가 술에 취해 편의점 앞에서 자고 있다는 112신고와 피고인이 다른 사람들을 폭행했다는 112신고를 접수하고 위 각 사건을 처리하기 위하여 현장에 출동한 경찰서 H지구대 소속 경위 I이 보호조치 대상자인 위 G의 휴대폰으로 위 G의 지인과 통화를 하는 것을 보고, 갑자기 "내꺼야"라고 소리치면서 위 I에게 다가왔다. 이에 위 I이 피고인에게 "공무집행 중입니다."라고 말하였음에도 피고인은 휴대폰을 빼앗으려고 하면서 손으로 전화통화를 하고 있는 위 I의 손 부위를 가격하여 휴대폰이 바닥에 떨어지고 위 I이 착용하고 있는 안경과 마스크가 벗겨지게 하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 보호조치 및 112신고 사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
**Case No. 2021고단2649**

On July 14, 2021, at approximately 02:10, in a building parking lot located at B, the defendant, upon receiving a 112 emergency report indicating that "there is a person causing a disturbance while intoxicated," responded to the scene along with Sergeant D and Police Officer E, both assigned to Police Substation C of the police station. Despite repeated warnings from said police officers to calm down and cease the disturbance, the defendant refused to comply by shouting and making noise. While the aforementioned police officers were attempting to stabilize the on-scene situation, the defendant hurled profanities at them, stating "Fucking bastards, get the fuck out of here," pushed Police Officer E's body with his hand on one occasion, and struck Sergeant D's facial area once with his left hand, thereby committing assault. Despite having heard Sergeant D say "Do not put your hands on a police officer's body," the defendant proceeded with the assault.

By such conduct, the defendant obstructed the police officers' lawful performance of their official duties in processing the 112 emergency call incident.



**Case No. 2021고단2897**

On August 22, 2021, at approximately 23:47, on a street in front of F, the defendant, having observed that G—a person with whom the defendant had been drinking alcohol on that same day—was asleep in front of a convenience store while intoxicated (as reported via 112 emergency call), and that the defendant had allegedly assaulted other persons (as reported via a separate 112 emergency call), saw Police Captain I, assigned to Police District H of the police station and dispatched to the scene to handle said incidents, conducting a telephone conversation with an acquaintance of G—a person designated as requiring protective measures—using G's cellular telephone. The defendant suddenly approached Police Captain I while shouting "It's mine!" and attempted to seize the cellular telephone. Even though Police Captain I stated to the defendant "I am performing official duties," the defendant persisted in attempting to seize the phone by striking the hand of Police Captain I, who was conducting the telephone conversation, thereby causing the cellular telephone to fall to the ground and dislodging the eyeglasses and face mask that Police Captain I was wearing.

By such conduct, the defendant obstructed the police officer's lawful performance of his official duties concerning protective measures and processing of the 112 emergency call incident.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 2. 6. 18:04경 B에 있는 C병원 응급실에서 치료를 하기 위해서는 먼저 접수를 하라는 안내를 받고 화가 나, 바닥에 드러눕고 피고인을 병원에 태워 온 119구급대원들에게 욕설을 하며 때릴 듯이 위협하는 등 소란을 피우던 중 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경장 E에게 "넌 뭐하는 십새끼냐! 날 가만히 둬라!", "너 좀 맞자!"라는 등의 욕설을 수차례 반복하며 양손주먹을 휘둘러 위 경찰관의 양쪽 얼굴을 각 1회씩 때리고, 왼쪽 무릎으로 경찰관의 오른쪽 허벅지를 1회 때렸다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112 신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 증인 E의 법정진술
1. 피고인에 대한 검찰 피의자신문조서
1. E에 대한 경찰 진술조서
1. 112 신고사건처리표
1. 수사보고서(발생현장 CCTV 녹화영상 관련), CCTV 영상 캡처사진, CCTV 영상 CD의 영상
1. 수사보고서(소방관이 촬영한 영상), 영상 캡처사진, 영상 CD 1장의 영상
피고인과 변호인의 주장에 대한 판단
피고인과 변호인은, 피고인이 경찰관 E에게 욕설을 한 사실은 있으나, 위 경찰관의 얼굴과 허벅지를 고의로 때린 사실은 없다고 주장한다.
살피건대, 이 법원이 적법하게 채택하여 조사한 위 증거들에 의하면, 피고인이 C병원 바닥에 드러눕고 피고인을 병원에 태워 온 119구급대원에게 욕설을 하며 때릴 듯이 위협하는 등 소란을 피웠던 사실, 이에 119구급대원은 경찰에 112신고를 하였고, 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 소속 경찰관들은 119구급대원들과 함께 피고인을 병원에 있던 휠체어에 앉게 하고 아프시면 접수를 하고 진료를 받으라고 설명하였던 사실, 그러나 피고인은 휠체어에 앉아 위 경찰관들과 119구급대원들에게 욕설을 하면서 발로 찰 듯이 위협하였던 사실, 이에 D지구대 소속 경장 E은 피고인에게 여기 다도움 주러 오신 분이니 욕하지 말라고 하였던 사실, 그러자 피고인은 "E아", "E아", "너도 좀 맞자"라고 말 한 후 휠체어에서 일어나 피해자를 손과 무릎으로 폭행한 사실(증거목록 순번 10 영상 CD의 영상 3분 15초 ~ 50초 부분)을 인정할 수 있다.
위 인정사실을 종합하여 보면, 피고인이 판시 범죄사실과 같이 경찰관 E을 고의로 때렸음을 넉넉하게 인정할 수 있으므로, 피고인과 변호인의 위 주장은 받아들이지 아니한다.

facts_en:
On February 6, 2021, at approximately 18:04, at the Emergency Room of C Hospital located in B, the Defendant, after receiving guidance that he must first check in before receiving treatment, became angry, lay down on the floor, and created a disturbance by hurling profanities at the 119 paramedics who had transported him to the hospital and making threatening gestures as if to strike them. When police officers from D Police Substation belonging to the Police Department arrived in response to a 112 emergency call, the Defendant repeatedly shouted profanities at Police Sergeant E, such as "What the fuck are you doing, you son of a bitch?! Leave me alone!", "Let's fight you!", and similar insults multiple times, while wielding both fists and striking the police officer on both sides of his face once each with his fists, and striking the police officer's right thigh with his left knee once.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the police officer's legitimate performance of official duties in handling the 112 emergency call case.



**SUMMARY OF EVIDENCE**

1. In-court testimony of Witness E
2. Prosecutor's interrogation record of the Defendant as a suspect
3. Police statement record of E
4. 112 Emergency Call Case Processing Report
5. Investigation report (relating to CCTV video footage at the scene of occurrence), CCTV video capture photographs, and CCTV video recording on CD
6. Investigation report (video recorded by firefighter), video capture photographs, and video recording on CD

The Defendant and his defense counsel contend that while the Defendant did direct profanities at police officer E, the Defendant did not intentionally strike the officer's face and thigh.

Upon examination, based on the evidence properly adopted and examined by this Court, the following facts are established: (1) the Defendant lay down on the floor at C Hospital and created a disturbance by hurling profanities at the 119 paramedics who had transported him and making threatening gestures as if to strike them; (2) in response, the 119 paramedics made a 112 emergency call to the police, and police officers from the police department who responded to the 112 call, together with the 119 paramedics, seated the Defendant in a wheelchair that was at the hospital and explained that if he was in pain, he should check in and receive medical treatment; (3) however, the Defendant, while seated in the wheelchair, directed profanities at the police officers and 119 paramedics while making threatening gestures as if to kick them; (4) in response, Police Sergeant E from D Substation told the Defendant, "These people are here to help you; do not curse at them"; (5) thereupon, the Defendant said, "E, E, let's fight you," rose from the wheelchair, and assaulted the victim with his hands and knee (as shown in video evidence at Evidence List Item No. 10, CD video, time stamp 3 minutes 15 seconds to 50 seconds).

Upon comprehensive review of the aforementioned established facts, this Court can readily find that the Defendant intentionally struck police officer E as stated in the charged criminal facts. Therefore, the arguments advanced by the Defendant and his defense counsel are rejected.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 3. 1. 21:58경 사거리 횡단보도 앞 노상에서 ‘원종사거리 공사장 앞 인도 위 덤프트럭이 불법주차되어 있다'는 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 B지구대 소속 경찰공무원 순경 C이 피고인에게 범칙금납부 통고서를 발부하고 "차량을 이동하라."라고 말하자, 피고인은 "술을 먹어서 차량을 이동할 수 없다, 지금 스티커를 끊었으니까 내일 저녁까지 여기에 주차해도 되지."라고 말하며 손으로 순경 C과 함께 출동한 같은 지구대 소속 경찰공무원 경위 D의 등을 툭툭쳤고, 경위 D이 "치지 말고 말하세요, 그리고 내일까지 계속 주차하면 스티커를 더 발부할 수도 있습니다."라고 말하자, 피고인은 "그럼 끊어 개새끼야, 너희들 마음대로 해, 너희 어디서 왔어 새끼들아, 너희들 B지구대에서 나왔지."라고 말하며 손으로 경위 D의 손목을 잡고 끌고 가려고 하였고, 경위 D이 "안놔."라고 말하자, 갑자기 주먹으로 경위 D을 때릴 듯이 행동하였고, 이를 제지하기 위해 경위 D이 피고인의 한쪽 손을 붙잡고, 경위 C이 피고인의 다른 쪽 손을 붙잡자, 양손을 붙잡힌 상태에서 머리로 경위 D의 얼굴 인중 부위를 들이받아 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112신고사건 처리 및 불법 주정차 단속에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On March 1, 2021, at approximately 21:58, in front of a pedestrian crosswalk at a four-way intersection on a public roadway, Police Officer C, a patrol officer of the B District Police Box, responded to a 112 emergency report stating that "a dump truck is illegally parked on the sidewalk in front of the Wonjong Four-Way Intersection construction site." Officer C issued a notice of a violation fine to the Defendant and instructed, "Move your vehicle."

The Defendant responded, "I cannot move the vehicle because I have consumed alcohol. Since I have already received a citation sticker, I can keep it parked here until tomorrow evening." The Defendant then tapped Police Captain D, a police officer of the same district box who had responded with Officer C, on the back with his hand repeatedly.

When Police Captain D stated, "Do not touch me; please speak instead. If you continue to keep the vehicle parked until tomorrow, we may issue you additional citation stickers," the Defendant said, "Then issue it, you fucking bastards, do whatever you want, where the fuck are you guys from, you bastards? You came from the B District Police Box, didn't you?" Thereupon, the Defendant grabbed Police Captain D's wrist with his hand and attempted to drag him away.

When Police Captain D said, "Let go," the Defendant suddenly made a movement as if to strike Police Captain D with a closed fist. To prevent this, Police Captain D seized one of the Defendant's arms, and Officer C seized the Defendant's other arm. While both his arms were being restrained, the Defendant headbutted Police Captain D in the philtrum area of the face, thereby committing assault.

By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties by police officers in processing the 112 emergency report and in conducting enforcement action against illegal parking and waiting.

facts_kr:
1. ‘B' 음식점 앞 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 4. 29. 21:16경 C에 있는 ‘B' 음식점 앞에서 "남성 주취자, 행패소란"이라는 취지의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경위 E과 경장 F이 술에 취해 흥분한 피고인을 제지한다는 이유로, 위 식당 앞에 있던 목재 테이블을 엎어 경위 E의 발이 찍히게 하고, 경장 F의 멱살을 밀치고 경위 E의 멱살을 잡아 밀쳐 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원들의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 각각 방해하였다.
2. 경찰서 D지구대 내 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 4. 29. 21:30경 G에 있는 D지구대 내에서 위 1항 기재와 같은 이유로 공무집행방해죄로 현행범인 체포되어 인치된 후, 경찰서 D지구대 소속 순경 H이 수갑을 차고 있는 피고인에게 코로나19 예방을 위한 일회용 마스크를 씌워주려고 다가가자 화가 난다는 이유로 오른쪽 발을 들어 순경 H의 가슴팍을 차서 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 범죄수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Obstruction of Justice in Front of 'B' Restaurant

On April 29, 2021, at approximately 21:16, the defendant, in front of the 'B' restaurant located in [Location] C, obstructed police officers—Patrol Officer E and Police Sergeant F, both assigned to District [Police] Substation D of the Police Station—who had responded to a 112 emergency call reporting "[intoxicated male, disorderly conduct and disturbance]" and who were attempting to restrain the defendant, who was intoxicated and in an excited state. Specifically, the defendant overturned a wooden table that was positioned in front of the restaurant, causing Patrol Officer E's foot to be struck; pushed Police Sergeant F by the collar; and assaulted Patrol Officer E by grabbing his collar and forcibly pushing him.

By committing these acts, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by the police officers in handling the matter arising from the 112 emergency call.



## 2. Obstruction of Justice Within District Substation D

On April 29, 2021, at approximately 21:30, the defendant, while inside District Substation D located in [Location] G, was arrested as a person caught in the act of committing obstruction of justice—for the same reasons set forth in Section 1 above—and was brought into custody. Subsequently, after becoming angered when Patrol Officer H, assigned to District Substation D, approached the defendant (who was restrained in handcuffs) to place a single-use disposable mask on him for the purpose of COVID-19 prevention, the defendant raised his right foot and kicked Patrol Officer H in the chest, thereby committing assault.

By committing these acts, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by the police officer in the investigation of crime.

facts_kr:
1. 피고인은 2019. 9. 22. 18:40경 B에 있는 주택 앞 길에서, 가정폭력 112 신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 C파출소 소속 경장 D이 피고인이 동네 주민들에게 시비를 거는 등 소란피우는 것을 말리고 112신고 된 내용을 확인하기 위해 주거지 안으로 들어간 피고인을 만나기 위해 현관문을 열려고 하자, 현관문 밖으로 나오며 위 D의 왼 팔을 붙잡고 현관문 안으로 밀어 넣으려고 하고, 이에 D이 붙잡은 손을 떼어놓으며 "붙잡지 말라"고 말하자, 갑자기 손으로 D의 왼 팔을 1회 때려 경찰공무원의 112 신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. 피고인은 제1항과 같은 일시, 장소에서 위 D으로부터 공무집행방해죄로 현행범인 체포될 수 있음을 고지받자 "그래 가서 보자"라고 말하며 순41호 순찰차에 갑자기 탑승하고, 2019. 9. 22. 18:45경부터 18:55경까지 사이에 위 장소에서 C파출소로 이동중인 순찰차 안에서 그곳에 탑승하고 있던 위 D에게 "너 개새끼야, 내가 얼굴 기억하고 있다. 두고 보자, 너 와이프 가족 한 명 한 명 죽여 버린다, 시발 새끼야", "밤 길 조심해라", "집에 찾아가서 가족들 가만두지 않고 갈아버린다.", "E 사냐? 친구들 시켜서 죽여 버린다."라고 수회 말하고, 주먹으로 위 순찰차의 뒷좌석과 앞좌석 사이에 설치된 칸막이와 창문, 조수석 의자 부분을 수회 쳐 경찰공무원의 112 신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## Charge 1: Obstruction of Official Duties (Initial Incident)

On September 22, 2019, at approximately 18:40, in front of a residential house located at B, the defendant, upon being encountered by Police Officer D (a sergeant stationed at Police Box C of the district police station) who had responded to a domestic violence report (112 emergency call) and was attempting to speak with the defendant to address the defendant's disorderly conduct (including quarreling with neighborhood residents) and to verify the contents of the reported matter—as Officer D attempted to open the front door to meet the defendant who had entered the residence—came out through the front entrance, grabbed Officer D's left arm, and attempted to push it inward into the residence. When Officer D pulled his arm free and stated, "Do not grab me," the defendant suddenly struck Officer D's left arm once with his hand, thereby obstructing the lawful performance of official duties by the police officer in processing the domestic violence 112 emergency call.

## Charge 2: Obstruction of Official Duties and Threatening Language (During Transport)

At the same time and location as Charge 1, upon being notified by Officer D that the defendant could be arrested as a current offender for the crime of obstructing the execution of public duty, the defendant stated, "Go ahead, let's see," and suddenly boarded patrol car unit 41. Between approximately 18:45 and 18:55 on September 22, 2019, while being transported from that location to Police Box C in the patrol car, the defendant, toward Officer D who was present in the vehicle, repeatedly made the following statements: "You son of a bitch, I have memorized your face. Just wait and see, I will kill your wife, kill every single member of your family, you fucking bastard," "Be careful on the road at night," "I will go to your house and will not spare your family members; I will destroy them," and "Is [your name] E? I will have my friends kill you." Additionally, the defendant repeatedly struck the partition wall installed between the rear and front seats of the patrol car, the window, and the armrest area of the passenger seat with his fists, thereby obstructing the lawful performance of official duties by the police officer in processing the domestic violence 112 emergency call.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 8. 9. 02:33경 B건물 C호에 있는 피고인의 집에서 술에 취하여 소리를 지르고 물건을 집어던지는 등 행패를 부렸다. 이에 이름을 알 수 없는 주민이 "어떤 아저씨가 B에서 계속 소리를 지르고 물건을 부수고 누구를 패는 것 같다."고 112 신고를 하였다. 이에 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경사 E, 순경 F 등 경찰관들이 위 빌라에 출동하여 열려 있는 피고인의 집 현관문을 통해 그 안으로 들어갔다.
피고인은 같은 날 02:45경 위 경찰관들을 보고 이들에게 큰소리로 "왜 경찰이 여기에 왔어. 누가 신고를 했어. 나가 씨발. 너희들이 왜 왔어.", "누가 신고를 했어, 여기에 왜 왔니. 어서 나가라." 등의 말을 하면서 화를 내다가 양손으로 E의 가슴을 1회 밀쳐 폭행하고, 이를 제지하는 F을 향해 손을 휘두르다가 F의 머리를 1회 때려 F을 폭행하였다. 이로써 피고인은 경찰관들의 112 신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On August 9, 2020, at approximately 02:33, the Defendant, while intoxicated, engaged in disorderly conduct at his residence located in Unit C of Building B, shouting loudly and throwing objects. In response, an unidentified resident reported to the police emergency hotline (112): "A man at Building B is constantly shouting, breaking things, and appears to be assaulting someone." Accordingly, police officers—including Sergeant E and Constable F from the D Police Substation—dispatched to the villa and entered the Defendant's residence through the open front door.

At approximately 02:45 on the same day, upon seeing the police officers, the Defendant spoke to them in a loud voice, saying: "Why are the police here? Who reported this? Get the fuck out of here. Why did you come here?", "Who reported this? Why are you here? Get out now," and other statements expressing anger. Thereafter, the Defendant committed assault by pushing Sergeant E's chest with both hands on one occasion. Subsequently, the Defendant swung his hand toward Constable F, who was attempting to restrain him, and struck F's head once, thereby assaulting Constable F. By these acts, the Defendant obstructed the police officers' legitimate performance of duty in handling the 112 emergency report.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2011. 9. 27. 고등법원에서 강간상해죄로 징역 2년 6월을 선고받고, 2011. 10. 5. 그 판결이 확정되어 신상정보 등록대상자가 된 자이다.
피고인은 경찰서 B 소속 경위 C이 2021. 1.경 중에 신상정보 등록대상자 관리를 위해 자신의 집에 방문하지 않았다는 이유로 이에 불만을 품고 술에 만취한 채로 2021. 2. 19. 15:30경 경찰서에 방문하게 되었다.
피고인은 위 일시경 경찰서 정문 앞에서 경위 C과 신상정보 등록대상자 점검 업무를 보조하는 경장 D에게 "시발, 니가 올해 1월에 온다고 했냐? 안 했냐?"라고 욕설을 하면서 소란을 피웠고, 이어서 부안경찰서 2층까지 올라가 계속하여 욕설을 하고 고성을 지르는 등 약 1시간 20분 동안 행패를 부렸다.
피고인은 같은 날 16:52경 위 경찰서 소속 경찰관들에 의하여 정문으로 이동한 후, 경위 C에게 오른손 주먹을 때릴 듯이 들어올리면서 "넌 내가 죽여버린다. 넌 봐봐 내가 죽여버릴거다. 너네 가족도 어떻게 하나 봐봐."라고 위협하고, 계속하여 경장 D에게 오른손 주먹을 때릴 듯이 들어올리면서 "너도 똑같이 죽여버린다."라고 위협하여 협박하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 질서유지, 범죄예방 및 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant was sentenced by the High Court on September 27, 2011, to two years and six months' imprisonment for the offense of rape with injury (강간상해죄), and the judgment became final on October 5, 2011, rendering the defendant a registrant subject to notification of personal information pursuant to the Act on Special Cases Concerning the Punishment of Sexual Crimes (성폄범죄의 처벌 등에 관한 특례법).

The defendant, dissatisfied with the fact that Lieutenant C, assigned to Police Station B, did not visit his residence during January 2021 for the purpose of managing registrants subject to notification of personal information, visited the police station on February 19, 2021, at approximately 15:30 in a state of intoxication.

At approximately the aforementioned date and time, in front of the main entrance of the police station, the defendant engaged in disorderly conduct by directing profanity at Lieutenant C and Police Sergeant D, who assisted with the duty of inspecting registrants subject to notification of personal information, saying, "Fuck, did you or did you not say you'd come in January of this year?" Thereafter, the defendant proceeded to the second floor of the Buan Police Station, where he continued to utter profanities and shout at loud volume, engaging in violent and abusive conduct for approximately one hour and twenty minutes.

At approximately 16:52 on the same day, after being moved to the main entrance of the aforementioned police station by police officers assigned to that station, the defendant raised his right fist in a striking motion toward Lieutenant C and threatened him, stating, "I will kill you. You watch—I am going to kill you. I will see what happens to your family too," and subsequently raised his right fist in a striking motion toward Police Sergeant D and threatened him, stating, "I will kill you in exactly the same way," thereby committing coercion and intimidation.

By this conduct, the defendant obstructed the legitimate exercise of official duties of police officers pertaining to the maintenance of order, crime prevention, and criminal investigation.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 1. 9. 10:45경 B 앞 골목길에서, 전일 술에 취해 C파출소에 찾아가 소란을 피우다가 경찰 조사를 받은 것에 불만을 품고, 길 가운데에 누워 차량 통행을 방해하면서 행인에게 경찰에 신고를 해 달라고 요청하여 위 행인의 112 신고를 받고 출동한 해운대경찰서 C파출소 소속 경위 D으로부터 귀가할 것을 요구받게 되었다.
그러자 피고인은 위 D에게 "나를 파출소로 데리고 가라, 어제 내가 죄도 없는데 경찰서에 가서 조사받게 만들었다, 너그들 일 똑바로 해라, 새끼들아"라고 소리치면서 약 20분 가량 경찰관의 요구에 응하지 않다가, 위 D이 피고인을 일으켜 세워 옆으로 이동시키면서 사건에 대한 불만은 경찰서에 가서 상담하라고 알려준 다음 순찰차를 운전하여 파출소로 돌아가려고 하자, 갑자기 순찰차의 앞을 막아서면서 순찰차 보닛 위에 올라타 앉아 "씨발놈들아, 니들 일 똑바로 해라, 쪼다 새끼들아, 아무도 여기 못 지나간다"라고 욕설하며 손바닥으로 순찰차 보닛을 세게 내리치고, 순찰차를 운행할 수 있도록 비켜달라고 요구하는 위 D을 향해 때릴 듯이 행동하는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112 신고사건 처리 및 범죄 예방에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant, on January 9, 2020, at approximately 10:45 a.m., in an alley in front of B, harbored resentment over having undergone police investigation after arriving at C Police Substation the previous day while intoxicated and causing a disturbance. The Defendant then lay down in the middle of the street, obstructing vehicular traffic, and requested a passerby to report the matter to police. Upon receiving a 112 emergency report from the passerby and responding to the scene, Senior Patrol Officer D, attached to C Police Substation of Haeundae Police Station, requested that the Defendant return home.

Thereupon, the Defendant shouted at D, "Take me to the police substation, I did nothing wrong yesterday but you made me go to the police station for investigation, do your job properly, you bastards," and for approximately 20 minutes failed to comply with the police officer's request. After D raised the Defendant to his feet and moved him to the side, informing him to discuss his grievances regarding the matter at the police station, D proceeded to drive the patrol car back to the substation. At that moment, the Defendant suddenly blocked the front of the patrol car, climbed onto the hood of the patrol car, and sat upon it while hurling profanities, stating, "Fucking bastards, do your job properly, you shitty assholes, no one can pass through here." The Defendant then struck the hood of the patrol car forcefully with the palm of his hand and, toward D, who requested that the Defendant move aside so the patrol car could operate, engaged in threatening striking motions and committed assault.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by the police officer in processing the 112 emergency report matter and in crime prevention.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 12. 23. 23:37경 2층에서 "남편이 폭행한다"라는 내용의 112신고를 접수하고 현장출동한 경찰서 C파출소 소속 경찰관 경위 D에게 분리조치를 당하게 되었다.
피고인은 이에 화가 나 "주거 침입죄 아니냐. 영장 줘봐. 네가 나 때렸지. 야 씨발, 영장 가져오라고. 여기가 공산주의 사회야. 네가 못 들어가게 했잖아."라고 욕설을 하면서 오른손으로 위 D의 가슴을 4회 밀치고 몸으로 3회 밀치는 등 폭행하고, 계속하여 같은 날 23:44경 위와 같이 현장에 출동한 경찰서 C파출소 소속 경찰관 순경 E에게 "야 들어와. 느그들이 나 못 들어오게 막았잖아. 야 느그들 상관들 불러와. 왜 못 들어오게 막아. 느그들이 민주경찰이야."라고 하면서 오른손으로 위 E의 가슴을 1회 밀치는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 112신고 사건 처리에 관한 경찰관의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 피고인의 법정진술
1. D, E에 대한 각 경찰 진술조서

facts_en:
On December 23, 2019, at approximately 23:37, the Defendant, in response to a report made to the emergency police line (112) containing the statement "my husband is assaulting me," received a separation measure from Police Officer D (rank: Police Sergeant), belonging to C Police Box of the District Police Station, who was dispatched to the scene.

Enraged by this action, the Defendant engaged in profanity, stating: "Isn't this unlawful intrusion into a dwelling? Give me a warrant. You hit me. Fuck, bring the warrant. Is this a communist society? You prevented me from entering." While uttering these insults, the Defendant assaulted Police Officer D by pushing his chest four times with her right hand and pushing his body three times with her body.

Subsequently, at approximately 23:44 on the same day, the Defendant assaulted Police Officer E (rank: Police Constable), also belonging to C Police Box of the District Police Station and dispatched to the scene, by stating: "You, come in. You guys prevented me from entering. You guys, call your superiors. Why did you prevent me from entering? Are you guys democratic police?" While uttering these statements, the Defendant assaulted Police Officer E by pushing his chest once with her right hand.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by the police officers in the handling of the 112 emergency report matter.



**Summary of Evidence:**

1. The Defendant's testimony given in court
2. Police written statements respectively obtained from Police Officers D and E

facts_kr:
『2020고단2504』
피고인은 2020. 7. 30. 14:50경 C파출소 앞 도로에서 차도 1·2차선의 가운데에 선 채로 차량의 통행을 방해하여, ‘사람이 길을 막고 차량 통행을 방해한다‘는 목격자의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 C파출소 소속 경찰관들로부터 제지당하며 차도 옆 인도로 이동하게 되자, 인도 상에서 C파출소 순찰3팀 팀장 경찰관 D의 멱살을 잡고 "야 이 개새끼야! 누가 이기나 한번 보자!"라고 욕설하며 오른쪽 팔목을 비틀고, 이를 다른 경찰관들이 제지하자 재차 위 D의 멱살을 잡고 흔듦으로써 경찰공무원의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
『2020고단3515』
피고인은 2020. 7. 24. 13:45경 C파출소 앞 노상에서 술에 취한 채 같은 달 22.경 폭행 혐의로 현행범인 체포되었던 것에 불만을 품고 경찰서 C파출소 소속 경위 E에게 다가가 ‘개새끼, 너를 죽이겠다. 나는 너를 죽이고 오늘 하루만 살아도 된다'는 등의 욕설을 하고, 계속하여 차도로 뛰어들어 주행 중인 차량을 가로막는 등의 행위를 하여 위 E 등 경찰관으로부터 제지를 받자 이에 화가 나 ‘개새끼, 너를 죽인다니까'라고 재차 욕설을 하며 피고인의 무릎으로 위 E의 오른쪽 사타구니 부위를 찼다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 범죄 예방ㆍ진압 및 수사 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
**Case No. 2020고단2504**

On July 30, 2020, at approximately 14:50, the Defendant stood in the middle of lanes 1 and 2 of the roadway in front of Police Box C, obstructing the passage of vehicles. Following a report to the emergency line (112) by a witness stating that "a person is blocking the road and obstructing vehicle traffic," police officers from Police Box C responded and attempted to restrain the Defendant, whereupon the Defendant moved to the sidewalk adjacent to the roadway. Once on the sidewalk, the Defendant grabbed the collar of D, the team leader of Patrol Team 3 at Police Box C, and uttered profanities stating, "Hey, you fucking bastard! Let's see who wins!" while twisting the Defendant's right wrist. When other police officers intervened to stop this conduct, the Defendant again grabbed and shook D's collar, thereby obstructing the lawful performance of official duties by police officers in processing the emergency line (112) report.



**Case No. 2020고단3515**

On July 24, 2020, at approximately 13:45, the Defendant, while intoxicated, appeared in front of Police Box C on a public street and, harboring discontent over having been arrested as a perpetrator *in flagrante delicto* on the same month's 22nd day on suspicion of assault, approached E, an assistant police inspector (*gyeongwi*) assigned to Police Box C. The Defendant directed the following profanities toward E: "You fucking bastard, I will kill you. Even if I die today, it would be worth living just for this one day," and similar expressions. Subsequently, the Defendant ran into the roadway and obstructed moving vehicles by blocking their path. When E and other police officers intervened to restrain the Defendant, the Defendant, angered by this intervention, again uttered profanities stating "You fucking bastard, I'm telling you I'll kill you," and kicked E's right groin area with the Defendant's knee.

By these acts, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by police officers relating to crime prevention, suppression of criminal activity, and investigation.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 6. 14. 05:00경 B아파트 앞 대로 변에 술에 취하여 누워 있던 중 112신고를 받고 출동한 남부경찰서 C파출소 소속 경찰관인 경장 D과 순경 E으로부터 귀가권유를 받자 D과 E에게 "짭새 새끼야 죽고싶나 씨발 짭새들"이라고 욕설을 하면서 손으로 D을 밀치고 때릴 듯한 태도를 보였다.
이후 피고인은 위 경찰관들과 함께 순찰차에 탑승하여 피고인의 집 근처인 F 앞 길에 이르러 피고인을 하차시킨 후 떠나려고 하는 위 경찰관들에게 소지하고 있던 클러치백을 가리키면서 "이거 장식용인줄 아나 문 열어봐라"라고 말하며 순찰차 운전석 뒷문 손잡이를 잡은 채 놓지않고, D이 순찰차에서 손을 떼라고 경고함에도 불구하고 순찰차 창문으로 손을 넣어 "내 말 안들리나, 씨발새끼야, 죽고싶나"라고 말하며 순찰차가 출동하지 못하도록 막는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
**The defendant, at approximately 05:00 on June 14, 2020, while lying intoxicated on the roadside in front of B Apartment, upon receiving police officers belonging to the C Police Box of the Southern Police Station—specifically Sergeant D and Constable E, who had been dispatched in response to a 112 emergency report—and being advised to return home, directed profane language at D and E, stating "You fucking cops, do you want to die? Fuck you fucking cops," while pushing D with his hand and displaying an attitude as though to strike him.**

**Thereafter, the defendant boarded a patrol vehicle with the aforementioned police officers and, upon arriving at a street in front of F, which was near the defendant's residence, after being dropped off by the defendant, directed his attention to the clutch bag he was carrying as the police officers prepared to depart, and stated, "Do you think this is just for decoration? Open the door," while grasping and refusing to release the rear door handle of the driver's seat of the patrol vehicle. Despite D's warning to release his hand from the patrol vehicle, the defendant inserted his hand through the patrol vehicle window, stating, "Don't you hear what I'm saying? You fucking bastard, do you want to die?" and obstructed the patrol vehicle from departing by engaging in assaultive conduct.**

**By such conduct, the defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties of the police officers in relation to processing the 112 emergency report.**

facts_kr:
『2020고단1828』
피고인은 2020. 5. 23. 00:30경 C편의점 앞에서, 술에 취하여 불특정 다수인들에게 시비를 걸던 중 취객들이 싸우는 것 같다는 내용의 112 신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경찰관인 순경 E로부터 귀가할 것을 요구받자, 위 E에게 욕설을 하면서 주먹과 양손으로 위 E의 가슴 부위를 2회 밀치고, 오른손 검지손가락으로 위 E의 가슴 부위를 1회 찌르는 등 폭행하였다. 이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112신고 처리업무에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

『2020고단2568』
피고인은 2020. 8. 29 03:40경 I 아파트 정문 경비실 앞에서, 북경찰서 J지구대 소속 순경 K이 '술에 취한 여성이 소리를 지르고 있다'는 112 신고를 받고 출동하여 술에 취해 소리를 지르던 피고인을 진정시킨 후 피고인의 주거지로 귀가조치하자 종이컵에 물을 담아 위 K의 얼굴을 향해 물을 뿌렸다. 이로써 피고인은 경찰관을 폭행하여 경찰관의 112신고처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## Case No. 2020고단1828

The defendant, on May 23, 2020, at approximately 00:30 in front of Convenience Store C, while intoxicated and engaged in altercations with unspecified multiple persons, upon receiving a police dispatch (Report No. 112) regarding intoxicated individuals engaged in a fight and upon being summoned to the scene by Patrol Officer E, a police officer attached to Police Station District Unit D, was ordered to return home. The defendant then directed profane language at Officer E and assaulted him by pushing Officer E's chest area twice with his fists and both hands, and further assaulted him by poking Officer E's chest area once with his right index finger. By such conduct, the defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties of a police officer regarding the processing of the 112 emergency report.

## Case No. 2020고단1972

The defendant, on July 9, 2020, at approximately 20:43 in the corridor of Shopping Complex F, after a 112 emergency report was received indicating that "a female person is severely intoxicated, screaming loudly, and causing a disturbance," Patrol Officer H, attached to Police Station District Unit G and dispatched to the scene, requested the defendant's personal information. The defendant then struck Officer H's face area once with his fist, thereby committing assault. By such conduct, the defendant obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties of a police officer regarding the processing of a 112 emergency report matter.

## Case No. 2020고단2568

The defendant, on August 29, 2020, at approximately 03:40 in front of the security office at the main entrance of Apartment Complex I, when Patrol Officer K, attached to District Unit J of the Northern Police Station, received a 112 emergency report stating "an intoxicated female person is screaming loudly" and was dispatched to the scene, after Officer K had calmed the intoxicated defendant and arranged for the defendant to return to his/her place of residence, the defendant filled a paper cup with water and sprayed the water toward Officer K's face. By such conduct, the defendant committed assault against the police officer and obstructed the legitimate performance of official duties of a police officer regarding the processing of a 112 emergency report.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 4. 13. 22:46경 2층 ‘C'에서, A경찰서 소속 경찰관 D로부터 성매매 등 불법 영업 단속 중이니 귀가해줄 것을 요청받고 나가던 중 위 ‘C' 신발장 앞에서 종업원과 이야기하고 있던 B경찰서 소속 경찰관 E를 바라보며 나가지 않고 있어 E로부터 귀가해달라는 말을 듣자 "니 까짓게 뭔데 나한테 명령이야"라고 말하면서 E에게 가까이 다가갔다. 이에 D가 피고인에게 ‘현장 점검에 협조해주세요. 죄송하지만 선생님 귀가 부탁드립니다'라고 말하자, 피고인은 "니가 뭔데 나한테 가라 마라 하냐"라고 하면서 D에게 다가가 D의 웃옷 뒷덜미를 잡아당기고, 이에 D가 피고인의 팔을 뿌리치자 피고인의 휴대전화를 바닥에 떨어뜨린 후 휴대전화를 주워 스스로 112에 경찰관에게 폭행을 당하였다는 취지로 신고하였다. 계속하여 피고인은 왼손으로 D의 멱살을 잡고, 주먹으로 D의 얼굴을 수회 때렸다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 질서 유지 등에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On April 13, 2020, at approximately 22:46, on the second floor of establishment 'C', the Defendant was requested by Police Officer D, belonging to Police Station A, to leave the premises as a crackdown on illegal businesses, including prostitution, was being conducted. While exiting, the Defendant, standing in front of the shoe rack at establishment 'C', observed Police Officer E from Police Station B conversing with an employee. Upon hearing E's request to leave, the Defendant, without departing, stated to E: "Who the hell do you think you are to give me orders?" and approached E closely.

Thereupon, Police Officer D said to the Defendant, "Please cooperate with the on-site inspection. I apologize, but we ask that you leave, sir." The Defendant responded, "Who are you to tell me what to do or not to do?" and approached D. The Defendant then grabbed and pulled D's upper garment at the nape of the neck. When D subsequently brushed away the Defendant's arm, the Defendant dropped his mobile phone to the floor. After retrieving the mobile phone, the Defendant independently called 112 and filed a report to the effect that he had been assaulted by a police officer.

Continuing thereafter, the Defendant grabbed D's collar with his left hand and struck D's face multiple times with his fist.

**By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by police officers in maintaining public order.**

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 4. 23. 21:53경 거주지인 B아파트 C동에 있는 피고인의 주거지에서, ‘막 여자 비명 소리랑 남자 고함 소리 나는데 조치 좀 부탁드려요'라는 내용의 112 신고를 접수받고 위 주거지로 찾아온 서부경찰서 D 지구대 소속 경위 E, 순경 F, 순경 G가 피고인에게 "경찰관입니다. 무슨 일이 있습니까."라고 물어보았다는 이유로 화가 나, ‘어떤 놈들이냐, 왜 왔냐"고 말하며 손바닥으로 경위 E의 얼굴을 1회 때리고, 이에 경위 E와 순경 F이 피고인을 공무집행방해 혐의로 현행범 체포하였다는 이유로 위 아파트 엘리베이터 내에서 발로 순경 G의 얼굴 부위를 4회 걷어 차고, 계속하여 같은 날 22:20경 서부경찰서 정문 앞에서, 이마로 경위 E의 얼굴을 들이받고, 발로 경위 E의 정강이 부위를 2회 찼다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112 신고업무 처리 및 현행범 체포에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On April 23, 2021, at approximately 21:53, police officers from the Western Police Station's D Police Box—specifically Police Sergeant E, Police Constable F, and Police Constable G—responded to a 112 emergency call received at the defendant's residence located in Building C of B Apartment Complex, where the defendant resided. The emergency call had reported: "A woman's scream and a man's loud shout are coming from this location. Please take action." Upon arrival at the residence, the officers inquired of the defendant, "We are police officers. What is the matter?" Angered by this inquiry, the defendant responded with hostility, saying, "Who the hell are you? Why are you here?" and struck Police Sergeant E's face once with his open palm.

Subsequently, Police Sergeant E and Police Constable F arrested the defendant at the scene for obstruction of official duties. In response to this arrest, the defendant, while inside the apartment building's elevator, kicked Police Constable G's face area four times with his foot.

Continuing his violent conduct, on the same day at approximately 22:20 in front of the main entrance of the Western Police Station, the defendant headbutted Police Sergeant E's face and kicked Police Sergeant E's shin area twice with his foot.

By these acts, the defendant obstructed the lawful official duties of police officers, specifically: (1) the handling of the 112 emergency call report, and (2) the apprehension of the defendant as a person caught in the act of committing a crime.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 12. 22. 00:25경 술에 만취한 상태로 도로에서 무단횡단을 하는 등 배회하다가, ‘술 취한 사람이 차도에서 무단횡단 하고 있어 위험하다'라는 내용의 112 신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 B지구대 소속 경찰관 경위 C 및 경사 D으로부터 귀가 요청을 받고 순찰차에 탑승해 귀가를 하게 되었다.
피고인은 2020. 12. 22. 00:49경 위 순찰차가 경찰서 서문 앞 노상에 이르자 순찰차에서 하차해 소변을 본 후 갑자기 경찰서 후문 방면으로 뛰어가다가, 술에 취한 피고인의 사고 위험을 막기 위해 피고인을 따라가 순찰차 탑승을 권유하던 D의 얼굴을 주먹으로 1회 때린 후 이에 저항하는 D의 얼굴을 다시 주먹으로 1회 때리고, 피고인을 제지하는 C의 얼굴을 주먹으로 1회 때리고 발로 C의 허벅지를 1회 걷어 차 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 위 경찰관들의 주취자 보호 및 112 신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 각각 방해하였다.

ruling: {'text': '피고인을 벌금 300만 원에 처한다.\n피고인이 위 벌금을 납입하지 아니하는 경우 10만 원을 1일로 환산한 기간 피고인을 노역장에 유치한다.\n피고인에게 위 벌금에 상당한 금액의 가납을 명한다.', 'parse': {'fine': {'type': 'fine', 'unit': 'won', 'value': 3000000}, 'imprisonment': {'type': '', 'unit': '', 'value': -1}}}
facts_en:
The defendant, in a state of intoxication from alcohol at approximately 00:25 on December 22, 2020, loitered on a roadway while jaywalking. Following a 112 emergency report containing information that "an intoxicated person is jaywalking in the traffic lane, which is dangerous," Police Officer C (Police Sergeant, assigned to B District Unit of the Police Station) and Police Officer D (Police Constable) responded to the scene. The defendant received a request to return home from these officers and boarded the patrol vehicle for that purpose.

At approximately 00:49 on December 22, 2020, when the patrol vehicle reached the roadside in front of the western gate of the police station, the defendant alighted from the vehicle, urinated, and then suddenly ran toward the rear gate of the police station. Officer D, who was attempting to prevent the defendant from danger due to his intoxicated state and was following the defendant to encourage re-boarding of the patrol vehicle, approached the defendant. The defendant then struck Officer D's face once with his fist. When Officer D resisted, the defendant struck Officer D's face again with his fist one additional time. The defendant subsequently struck Officer C's face once with his fist and kicked Officer C's thigh once with his foot, thereby committing assault.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the aforementioned police officers in their lawful execution of duty pertaining respectively to the protection of an intoxicated person and the handling of the 112 emergency report matter.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 10. 9. 12:20경 시외버스터미널에서, '취객이 편의점 안에서 욕하고 때리고 행패를 부린다.'는 112 신고를 받고 출동한 동부경찰서 B지구대 소속 경위 C과 순경 D이 터미널 승차장에 있던 피고인을 상대로 신고 내용을 확인하려 하자 "야이 씹할놈아 내가 뭘 잘못했노 개새끼들아"라고 욕설을 하면서 손으로 경위 C의 멱살을 잡아 밀친 후 허리를 잡은 채 팔 부위를 밀치고, 옆에 있던 순경 D의 왼쪽 팔 부위를 손으로 할퀴었다.
이어서 피고인은 위 경찰관들과 편의점으로 이동하던 중 갑자기 순경 D의 목 뒷덜미를 잡아당기고, 허리와 팔을 잡아 흔들고 바지를 잡은 상태에서 총기피탈방지끈을 잡아당겼다.
계속하여 피고인은 편의점 내부에 이르러, 경사 C과 순경 D이 편의점 업주를 상대로 신고 내용 및 cctv 영상을 확인하려 하자 "너거들은 다 죽었어 씹할 새끼들아 내가 해병대 수색대대 출신이다. 씹할 새끼들아"라고 욕설을 하며 양손으로 경위 C의 팔 부위를 내리치는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112 신고 업무 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On October 9, 2019, at approximately 12:20 p.m., at an intercity bus terminal, Officers C (Senior Constable) and D (Constable) of the B District Unit of the East Police Station responded to a 112 emergency report alleging that "an intoxicated person is cursing, striking others, and engaging in violent conduct inside a convenience store." When the officers approached the Defendant at the terminal boarding area to confirm the reported complaint, the Defendant uttered profanities stating, "Hey, you motherfucking asshole, what the hell did I do wrong, you fucking bastards," then grabbed Officer C's collar with his hand and pushed him backward. Subsequently, while holding Officer C's waist, he pushed the officer's arm area, and scratched Constable D's left arm area with his hand.

Thereafter, while the Defendant was moving with the aforesaid police officers toward the convenience store, he suddenly grabbed the back of Constable D's neck and pulled, shook the officer's waist and arm, and while holding his trousers, pulled the gun retention lanyard.

Upon entering the interior of the convenience store, when Officers C and D were attempting to confirm the reported complaint and CCTV footage with the convenience store proprietor, the Defendant uttered profanities stating, "You all are dead, you fucking bastards. I am a former member of the Marine Corps reconnaissance battalion. You fucking bastards," and assaulted Officer C by striking his arm area repeatedly with both hands.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the police officers' lawful performance of their official duty in processing the 112 emergency report.

facts_kr:
피고인은 C이라는 상호로 장갑 제조업에 종사하는 자이다.
피고인은 2010. 9. 7. 16:56경 D에 있는 피고인이 운영하는 C 본사에서 일을 하던 중, C 제2공장 직원들로부터 법무부 소속 출입국관리사무소 E 등이 외국 국적의 불법체류자 F를 비롯하여 불법체류자 7명에 대하여 불법체류를 이유로 동행하여 간다는 연락을 받게 되자 제2공장 직원들에게 불법체류자를 동행하지 못하도록 정문을 닫고 막아서라고 지시하였다.
피고인은 같은 날 17:15경 G에 있는 C 제2공장에 도착하여 직원들로 하여금 불법체류자를 탑승시킨 단속차량 앞범퍼를 잡고 격렬하게 차량의 출발을 방해하였고, 정문에 설치된 철제문을 열려고 하는 공무원인 단속반원들의 몸을 밀치고 욕설을 하면서 직원들에게 차량의 출발을 저지하도록 지시를 하였으며, 단속차량 앞바퀴 부근 바닥에 누워 사망사고를 운운하면서 위 차량의 진행을 방해하는 등 약 1시간 30분 동안 출입국관리사무소 직원 E을 비롯한 출입국사범 합동단속반 공무원들의 불법체류자단속에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant is a person engaged in the business of glove manufacturing under the trade name C.

On September 7, 2010, at approximately 16:56, while working at the C headquarters located in D, which the defendant operated, the defendant received a report from employees of the C Second Factory that officials from the Immigration Office E, belonging to the Ministry of Justice, were accompanying seven illegal residents, including illegal resident F of foreign nationality, for deportation due to illegal residence. Upon receiving this report, the defendant instructed the Second Factory employees to close and block the main gate so as to prevent the illegal residents from being taken away.

On the same day at approximately 17:15, the defendant arrived at the C Second Factory located in G and had employees seize the front bumper of the enforcement vehicle carrying the illegal residents and violently obstruct the vehicle's departure. The defendant pushed the bodies of enforcement officers attempting to open the steel gate installed at the main gate, cursed at them, instructed employees to prevent the enforcement vehicle from departing, and lay on the ground near the front wheels of the enforcement vehicle, mentioning a fatal accident, thereby obstructing the vehicle's progress. For approximately one hour and thirty minutes, the defendant unlawfully obstructed the legitimate official duties of public officials, including Immigration Office employee E and members of the joint immigration law enforcement unit, in conducting enforcement operations against illegal residents.

facts_kr:
피고인은 목욕탕업에 종사하는 사람이고, 경위 B, 경장 C, 경장 D, 순경 E은 F파출소 소속 경찰공무원들이다.
피고인은 2020. 1. 24. 00:10경 F약국 앞 노상에서, '피고인이 술에 취해 길바닥에 앉아있다'라는 내용의 112 신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경위 B, 경장 C 등으로부터 "날이 춥고 늦은 시간인데, 길바닥에 앉아 계시면 위험하니 주소지까지 모셔다 드리겠습니다."라는 내용의 귀가 권유를 받고, 이에 화가 나, 위 경위 B 등에게 "야 이 씨발놈들아. 이 좆같은 새끼들아. 너네들은 할 일이 없으니까 괜히 여기에 와서 개지랄들이냐. 이 씨발 개새끼들아"라고 욕설을 하며 주먹으로 경위 B의 복부를 약 2회 때리고, 손바닥으로 경장 C의 팔과 손을 약 3회 내리쳤다.
이로써 피고인은 폭행으로 112 신고 사건 처리 등에 관한 경찰공무원들의 정당한 공무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant is a person engaged in the bathhouse business. Senior Patrol Officer B, Patrol Officer C, Patrol Officer D, and Patrolman E are police officers assigned to F Police Box.

On January 24, 2020, at approximately 00:10, at a location on the street in front of F Pharmacy, Senior Patrol Officer B, Patrol Officer C, and others responded to a 112 emergency call reporting that "the defendant is sitting on the street in an intoxicated state." Upon arrival at the scene, they advised the defendant to return home, stating, "The weather is cold and it is a late hour. It would be dangerous for you to sit on the street, so we will escort you to your residence."

Angered by this advice, the defendant directed the following profane insults at Senior Patrol Officer B and others: "Hey, you fucking bastards. You goddamn motherfuckers. You have nothing to do, so why the hell are you coming here and stirring up shit? You fucking son-of-a-bitch cops." While uttering these insults, the defendant struck Senior Patrol Officer B's abdomen with his fists approximately two times and struck Patrol Officer C's arms and hands approximately three times with his palm, approximately three times in total.

By committing assault, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by police officers in processing the 112 emergency call incident and related matters.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 5. 9. 22:55경부터 같은 날 23:35경 사이에 ‘B여인숙'에서 술에 취하여 "사람을 칼로 찔러 자수를 하려고 한다."라며 경찰서 상황실에 전화를 걸어 신고를 하였다. 그 신고를 받고 C파출소 소속 경위 D, 순경 E, F 소속 경위 G, 경장 H 등이 현장에 출동하였다.
피고인은 술에 만취하여 인적사항 밝히기를 거부하던 중 순경 E가 피고인의 휴대전화 케이스에 있는 신분증을 확인하려고 하자, "경찰이면 휴대전화를 봐도 되냐"며 순경 E에게 시비를 걸고, 이를 말리는 경장 H에게 "야 이새끼야. 젊은 놈 데려와."라고 말하며 경장 H의 어깨를 밀치고 주먹을 쥐고 경장 H의 얼굴을 때릴 것처럼 행동하고, 계속하여 순경 E에게 "씨발놈아"라고 욕설을 하며 순경 E의 멱살을 잡고, 목 부위를 수회 밀거나 가격하고, 주먹을 쥐고 때릴 것처럼 행동하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112 신고 처리 업무에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant, while intoxicated, called the Police Station Situation Room between approximately 22:55 and 23:35 on May 9, 2021, at 'B Guest House' and reported: "I intend to stab a person with a knife and surrender to police." In response to this report, Police Sergeant D and Police Constable E from C Police Box, Police Sergeant G and Police Sergeant H from F Police Box, and others dispatched to the scene.

The Defendant, being severely intoxicated and refusing to provide personal identification information, when Police Constable E attempted to verify the Defendant's identification card contained in the Defendant's mobile phone case, the Defendant quarreled with Police Constable E, saying "Can the police look at mobile phones?" and, attempting to dissuade the Defendant, Police Sergeant H stated: "Hey, you fucking bastard. Bring a younger cop." The Defendant then pushed Police Sergeant H's shoulder, clenched his fist, and made a motion as if to strike Police Sergeant H in the face. The Defendant subsequently directed profanity toward Police Constable E, stating "Fucking bastard," seized Police Constable E by the collar, pushed and struck the neck area on multiple occasions, clenched his fist, and made a motion as if to strike.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by police officers in processing an emergency call pursuant to Emergency Number 112.

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2018. 9. 20. 지방법원에서 재물손괴죄로 징역 4월에 집행유예 2년을 선고받고, 2019. 7. 9. 같은 법원에서 공무집행방해죄 등으로 징역 4월을 선고받고, 같은 해 12. 10. 같은 법원에서 폭행죄로 징역 2월을 선고받고 2020. 5. 6. 교도소에서 그 형의 집행을 종료하였다.
피고인은 2019. 7. 9. 지방법원에서 강제추행죄로 징역 4월에 집행유예 2년을 선고받고 같은 해 10. 28. 그 판결이 확정되어 현재 집행유예 기간 중이다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 2021. 5. 3. 22:54경 B에 있는 'C' 주점 앞 도로에서, 피고인이 술에 취해 소란을 피운다는 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경사 E 등이 피고인에게 귀가할 것을 요청하자 이에 반발하여 '개새끼'라고 욕을 하면서 오른 주먹으로 경사 E의 왼쪽 턱을 1회 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고 사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced on September 20, 2018, at the District Court to four (4) months' imprisonment with a suspension of execution for two (2) years for the offense of Destruction of Property. On July 9, 2019, at the same court, the Defendant was sentenced to four (4) months' imprisonment for the offense of Obstruction of Official Duties, among other charges. On December 10 of the same year, at the same court, the Defendant was sentenced to two (2) months' imprisonment for the offense of Battery. The Defendant completed the execution of this sentence on May 6, 2020, at a correctional institution.

The Defendant was sentenced on July 9, 2019, at the District Court to four (4) months' imprisonment with a suspension of execution for two (2) years for the offense of Forced Indecent Act. The judgment became final on October 28 of the same year, and the Defendant is currently serving the suspended sentence.

## [Criminal Acts]

On May 3, 2021, at approximately 22:54, on a roadway in front of the 'C' tavern located in B, the Defendant, who had engaged in disorderly conduct while intoxicated, was confronted by Officer (Gyeongsa) E and other officers from the D Police District Unit of the local Police Station, who had responded to a 112 emergency report. When these officers requested that the Defendant return home, the Defendant resisted and, while hurling the profanity "fucking bastard" ("개새끼"), struck Officer E's left jaw once with the Defendant's right fist, thereby committing Battery.

By this conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful official duties of a police officer in processing a 112 emergency report matter.

facts_kr:
1. B에서의 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 10. 16. 19:43경 B에서 피고인이 다른 손님들에게 시비를 건다는 내용의 112신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경찰관 경사 E이 피고인에게 식당 밖으로 나갈 것을 요청하자 화가 나, 피고인의 오른손 주먹으로 E의 왼쪽 옆구리를 1회 때리고, 계속하여 위 E이 피고인을 공무집행방해의 현행범으로 체포한 후 순찰차에 태우려고 하자 피고인의 발로 피해자의 오른 쪽 눈을 걷어 찼다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고업무 처리 및 현행범 체포에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
2. D지구대에서의 공무집행방해
피고인은 2021. 10. 16. 19:51경 D지구대에서 경찰관인 위 E이 피고인에게 지구대 안으로 들어갈 것을 요구하자 화가 나 피고인의 오른 발로 E의 왼쪽 정강이를 걷어찼다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고업무 처리 및 범죄의 수사에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Obstruction of Justice at Location B

On October 16, 2021, at approximately 19:43, the Defendant, having been the subject of a 112 emergency report (filed by other patrons at Location B alleging that the Defendant was picking quarrels with other customers), was confronted by Police Sergeant E, a member of the D Police Substation, who responded to the dispatch and requested that the Defendant exit the restaurant. Angered by this request, the Defendant struck Police Sergeant E's left flank once with a closed right-hand fist. Subsequently, when Police Sergeant E arrested the Defendant as a caught-in-the-act offender for obstruction of justice and attempted to place the Defendant into the patrol vehicle, the Defendant kicked Police Sergeant E's right eye with the Defendant's foot, thereby forcefully striking the officer's right eye.

By these actions, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by the police officer, specifically the processing of the 112 emergency report and the arrest of a caught-in-the-act offender.

## 2. Obstruction of Justice at the D Police Substation

On October 16, 2021, at approximately 19:51, at the D Police Substation, Police Sergeant E requested that the Defendant enter the interior of the substation. Angered by this request, the Defendant kicked Police Sergeant E's left shin with the Defendant's right foot.

By this action, the Defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties by the police officer, specifically the processing of the 112 emergency report and the investigation of the crime.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2017. 10. 19. 지방법원에서 일반건조물방화미수죄 등으로 징역 1년 및 치료감호를 선고받고 2018. 7. 23. 위 형의 집행을 종료하였다.
피고인은 2020. 12. 7. 치료감호를 가종료하여 그때부터 보호관찰대상자로서 정신과 약 복용 관련하여 B센터로부터 매일 2차례 전화나 방문확인 등의 관찰을 받고 있다.
피고인은 약 복용 정신이 몽롱하고 구토 증세의 부작용이 있음에도 계속하여 복용해야만 하는지 등에 대해 문의하기 위하여 2021. 6. 12. 17:00경부터 B센터에 여러 차례 전화하여 자신의 보호관찰 담당자를 알려 달라고 요구하였으나 개인정보라는 이유로 알려주지 않자 2021. 6. 13. 06:48경 재차 전화하여 "개새끼, 씨발놈, 다 죽여버리겠다."라고 욕설하였다.
계속하여 피고인은 2021. 6. 13. 08:50경 C에 있는 B센터에 찾아가 자신의 보호관찰 담당자를 알려주지 않는다는 이유로 길에서 주운 나무막대기(길이 56cm)를 들고 "문 열어"라고 고함을 지르면서 출입문과 그곳에 설치된 출입용 지문인식기를 여러 차례 내리쳤고, 이에 청사 관리, 민원인 응대 등의 당직 근무를 하고 있던 B센터 소속 공무원인 D가 이를 보고 제지하자 위 D를 향해 달려들어 나무막대기를 때릴 듯이 휘두르면서 "죽여버린다. 개새끼야. 씨발놈아."라고 고함을 지르며 위협을 가하는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 B센터 소속 공무원의 청사 방호에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant was sentenced to imprisonment for one year and protective custody on October 19, 2017, at the District Court for attempted arson of a general building and other offenses. The execution of the sentence was completed on July 23, 2018.

On December 7, 2020, the defendant's protective custody was provisionally terminated, and from that time forward, as a subject of probation supervision, the defendant has been under observation by B Center twice daily through telephone contact or home visits regarding psychiatric medication compliance.

The defendant made multiple telephone calls to B Center beginning at approximately 17:00 on June 12, 2021, in order to inquire whether he must continue taking psychiatric medication despite experiencing mental fogginess from the drugs and experiencing adverse effects including nausea and vomiting, and requested to be informed of the identity of his probation supervisor. After B Center refused to disclose this information citing personal privacy protection, the defendant made a subsequent telephone call at approximately 06:48 on June 13, 2021, and uttered profanities, stating: "You son of a bitch, you fucking bastard, I will kill you all."

Subsequently, at approximately 08:50 on June 13, 2021, the defendant appeared in person at B Center located in C and, on the grounds that his probation supervisor would not be identified, took up a wooden stick (length 56 centimeters) that he had found on the street. While shouting "Open the door," he repeatedly struck the entrance door and the fingerprint recognition device installed at the entrance multiple times. When D, a public official employed by B Center who was on duty performing building management and public service counter duties, observed this and attempted to stop him, the defendant rushed toward D, wielded the wooden stick as if to strike him, and while shouting "I will kill you. You son of a bitch. You fucking bastard," engaged in assault and made threats.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the lawful performance of official duties of a public official employed by B Center concerning the security and protection of the premises.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 11. 6. 01:50경 C중학교 앞 노상에서, 피고인으로부터 폭행을 당한 D의 112신고 접수를 받고 현장에 출동한 E파출소 소속 경위 G으로부터 진정하라는 말을 들었음에도 불구하고 "씨발." 등 욕설을 하면서 G에게 달려들려고 하였고, 같은 파출소 소속 경위 H이 피고인을 제지하기 위해 뒤쪽에서 피고인의 허리를 잡자 "놔."라고 하면서 위협적으로 몸과 팔을 휘두르다가 중심을 잃고 바닥에 넘어진 후, 바닥에 넘어진 상태에서 "씨발."이라고 욕설을 하면서 H의 멱살을 잡고 바닥에 넘어뜨려 폭행하였다.
계속하여 피고인은 위 D을 폭행한 혐의로 현행범인 체포되어 순찰차로 연행되면서 H, G에게 "내가 누군지 알아 니들 모가지 다 잘라버린다."라고 말하고, F에 있는 E파출소에 도착한 후 H로부터 순찰차에서 내리라는 말을 들었음에도 불구하고 순찰차에서 하차를 거부하면서 자신의 발로 H의 복부를 1회 걷어차 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰공무원의 112신고 사건 처리 및 현행범인 체포에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On November 6, 2020, at approximately 01:50, in front of C Middle School on a public road, the Defendant, despite having received an instruction to calm down from G, a police officer (gyeongwi) attached to E Police Box, who had responded to the scene upon receiving a 112 emergency report filed by D regarding an assault committed by the Defendant, uttered profanities including "Fuck." (씨발) and attempted to rush at G. When H, another police officer (gyeongwi) attached to the same police box, attempted to restrain the Defendant by grabbing the Defendant's waist from behind, the Defendant said "Let go." while threateningly swinging his body and arms, lost his balance, fell to the ground, and thereafter, while lying on the ground, uttered the profanity "Fuck." (씨발), grabbed H by the collar, knocked H to the ground, and assaulted H.

Subsequently, the Defendant, having been arrested as a suspect in flagrante delicto for the assault on D aforementioned and being transported in a patrol vehicle, said to H and G, "Do you know who I am? I will slit all of your throats." While being transported to E Police Box located in F, the Defendant, despite receiving an instruction from H to exit the patrol vehicle, refused to disembark from the patrol vehicle and assaulted H by kicking H's abdomen once with the Defendant's foot.

By these acts, the Defendant obstructed the lawful official duties of the police officers in processing the 112 emergency report and in effecting the arrest of a suspect in flagrante delicto.

facts_kr:
피고인은 지인인 B가 운전하는 (차량번호 1 생략) SM7 승용차에 동승한 사람으로, B는 2021. 2. 9. 18:20경 C 앞 도로에서 술에 취한 상태로 운전하던 중 신호대기 중인 승용차를 들이받았다.
피고인은 같은 날 18:50경 D에 있는 ‘E' 앞 도로에서 위와 같은 이유로 출동한 경찰서 F지구대 소속 경사 G 등이 B를 상대로 음주측정을 하려고 하자 경찰관들에게 "이 새끼들 다 한패들이다. 야 이 사기꾼들아, 개새끼들"이라고 욕설을 하고, 위 G의 얼굴에 대고 손가락질을 하고, 이를 제지하는 G의 얼굴 부분을 손으로 2회 때려 G이 착용하고 있던 안경이 바닥에 떨어져 렌즈에 금이 가도록 하였다.
계속하여 피고인은 위와 같은 이유로 공무집행방해의 현행범으로 체포되어 H에 있는 F지구대로 연행되자 위 지구대 출입문 앞에서, 대기 중인 경위 I가 B의 촬영을 제지하였다는 이유로 발로 I의 성기 부분을 1회 걷어차는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관들의 112 신고 및 음주운전 사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant was a passenger in an SM7 sedan (Vehicle Registration No. 1 [omitted]) operated by his acquaintance, Person B. On February 9, 2021, at approximately 18:20, while Person B was operating the vehicle in an intoxicated state on the road in front of Person C, he collided with a sedan that was stationary at a traffic signal.

At approximately 18:50 on the same date, on the road in front of 'E' located in Person D, when police officers including Sergeant G, assigned to the F Police Substation District Unit (dispatched for the aforementioned reason), attempted to conduct a breath alcohol test on Person B, the defendant directed the following vulgar insults at the police officers: "You bastards are all in on this together. Hey, you con artist motherfuckers, you fucking dogs." The defendant then pointed his finger directly at the face of Sergeant G, and struck G's face twice with his hand in an attempt to obstruct G's intervention. As a result, the eyeglasses worn by G fell to the ground, and the lenses sustained cracks.

Subsequently, the defendant was arrested as a current offender of obstruction of official duties for the aforementioned reason and was transported to the F Police Substation District Unit located in Person H. At the entrance of the substation, the defendant assaulted Senior Patrolman I, who was on duty, by kicking him once in the genital area on the grounds that Patrolman I had prevented the filming of Person B.

By these acts, the defendant obstructed the legitimate official duties of police officers in receiving emergency telephone reports (112 calls) and processing the drunk driving incident.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 2. 10. 22:50경 B 아파트 C동 앞에서 피고인이 음주운전하는 것이 의심된다는 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 D 소속 경사 E, 경장 F로부터 음주측정을 요구받자 이에 응하지 않았다.
피고인은 경사 E, 경장 F가 피고인에게 ‘경찰관의 정당한 음주측정 요구에도 불구하고 피고인이 이유 없이 시간을 끌어 1차 음주측정거부를 하였고 또다시 거부하면 2차 음주측정거부에 해당한다'는 취지로 말하자 화가 나, 경사 E, 경장 F에게 "씨팔새끼들아"라고 욕설을 하면서 현장을 이탈하려고 하였고 이에 경사 E가 피고인을 제지하자, 손으로 경사 E의 가슴 부위를 3회 밀치고 발로 경사 E의 다리를 걷어차고 이빨로 경사 E의 오른손을 깨물고, 피고인에게 다가오는 경장 F의 몸을 손으로 밀치고, 체포된 피고인의 요청에 따라 수갑을 느슨하게 풀어주려고 고개를 숙인 경장 F의 후두부를 발로 걷어차는 등 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관들의 112신고 사건 처리 및 음주운전 단속 업무에 관한 정당한 직무 집행을 방해하였다.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 10. 10. 21:19경 B에 있는 ○○식당 앞에서, ‘가게 앞에 주취 손님이 못 일어난다.'는 내용의 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 C지구대 소속 경찰관 D을 향해, ‘가게 안에 친구가 술에 많이 취해 앉아 있는데 순찰차로 태워 달라.'고 이야기하였다. 이에 위 D이 ‘친구 사이면 좀 도와주세요.'라고 말하자, 피고인은 ‘이 씨발 개새끼야, 짭새 새끼야, 좆같은데, 너희가 태워주라면 태워줘야지 말이 많아 십 새끼 너 계급 소속이 뭐야, 이 시발 경사 새끼가.'라며 욕설을 하였다. D이 욕설을 하지 말고 귀가할 것을 수차례 권유하였음에도, 피고인은 ‘욕하든 말든 내 마음이다. 경사 주제에 씨발놈이.'라고 말하면서 손으로 D의 명치 부위를 1회 밀쳐 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고사건 처리에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 피고인의 법정진술
1. D에 대한 경찰 진술조서
1. 112 사건신고 관련 부서통보, C지구대 근무일지

facts_en:
On October 10, 2020, at approximately 21:19, in front of the ○○ Restaurant located at B, the defendant, upon learning that police officers from the C Police Substation—specifically Police Officer D—had been dispatched to the scene in response to a 112 emergency call reporting that "an intoxicated customer in front of the restaurant was unable to get up," spoke to Police Officer D as follows: "My friend is very drunk and sitting inside the restaurant. Please give him a ride in the patrol car."

When Police Officer D responded by saying, "Since you are friends, please help him," the defendant directed vulgar insults at D, stating: "You fucking asshole, you shitty cop, this is fucking bullshit. If you guys are told to give someone a ride, you have to do it—stop talking so much, you damn bastard. What is your rank and assignment? You fucking police sergeant."

Although Police Officer D advised the defendant on multiple occasions to refrain from using profanity and to return home, the defendant continued by saying, "Whether I curse or not is my business. You're a sergeant? Fuck off, you piece of shit." Thereafter, the defendant pushed Police Officer D in the chest area once with his hand, thereby committing an assault.

In so doing, the defendant obstructed the lawful execution of duty by Police Officer D in processing the 112 emergency call case.

## EVIDENCE SUMMARY

1. Defendant's courtroom testimony
2. Police statement transcript regarding Police Officer D
3. 112 emergency call report notification documentation and C Police Substation duty log

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 1. 16. 23:30경 B 아파트 C동 옆 노상에서, 피고인이 지인과 싸우고 있는 것을 목격한 행인의 112신고를 받고 현장에 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 순경 E, 순경 F으로부터 신분증을 제시할 것을 요구받자, 순경 E를 향해 가슴을 들이밀면서 E의 몸을 손으로 수회 밀치고 주먹으로 가슴부위를 1회 때리고, 지나가는 행인에게 "아가리 찢어버리기 전에 들어가 이 새끼야!"라고 욕설을 하는 등 소란을 피운 일로 경찰서 D지구대로 보호조치 되었다.
피고인은 같은 날 23:55경 G에 있는경찰서 D지구대 주차장에서 재차 소란을 피웠고, 순경 F으로부터 "계속 소란을 피우면 처벌될 수 있으니 특별한 일이 없으면 귀가하라"는 권유를 받자, "내가 무슨 공무집행을 방해했느냐"고 크게 소리를 지르면서 순경 F의 가슴부위를 손으로 수회 밀쳤다.
이로써 피고인은 112신고에 관한 경찰공무원의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On January 16, 2020, at approximately 23:30, on a street adjacent to Building C of Apartment Complex B, the Defendant, upon being requested by Police Officers E and F, belonging to the D Police Substation of [City/District] Police Department, who responded to a 112 emergency call report filed by a passerby who witnessed the Defendant engaged in a physical altercation with an acquaintance, to produce identification, pushed Officer E's body with his hands on multiple occasions while thrusting his chest forward toward Officer E, struck Officer E's chest area once with his fist, and engaged in disorderly conduct by shouting profanities at a passing pedestrian, stating, "Get inside before I tear your fucking mouth off, you bastard!" As a result, the Defendant was taken into protective custody at the D Police Substation.

On the same day, at approximately 23:55, the Defendant again engaged in disorderly conduct in the parking lot of the D Police Substation located at G. Upon receiving advice from Police Officer F stating, "If you continue to engage in disorderly conduct, you may face criminal prosecution; you should go home if there is no particular matter," the Defendant loudly exclaimed, "What official duty did I obstruct?", and pushed Police Officer F's chest area with his hands on multiple occasions.

By such conduct, the Defendant obstructed the lawful execution of official duties by police officers in response to a 112 emergency call report.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 3. 12. 07:25경 자살의심이 된다는 피고인 지인의 112신고를 접수받고 피고인의 주거지인 B건물 C호에 출동한 북부경찰서 D지구대 경찰관 경위 E과 경장 F로부터 피고인의 주거지 출입문 비밀번호를 알고 위 주거지 안으로 들어온 이유에 대하여 듣게 되었다.
피고인은 2021. 3. 12. 07:29경 위 장소에서 경찰관으로부터 들은 사실의 확인을 위하여 피고인의 남편과의 전화통화 중, 갑자기 "야~~~"라며 괴성을 지른 후 손에 들고 있던 휴대폰을 방바닥에 집어 던진 후 현관 입구에 있던 위 E에게 달려들어 양손으로 가슴을 3~4회 밀치며 "나가, 나가 개새끼들아, 너네가 왜 남의 집에 들어와, 나가 개새끼들아."라고 한 후 오른쪽 주먹으로 위 E의 왼쪽 빰을 4~5회 때리고 현관 바닥에 있던 흰색 운동화를 집어들어 위 E의 왼쪽 빰을 1회 강하게 때렸다.
이로써 피고인은 경찰관의 112신고 처리 업무에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

facts_en:
On March 12, 2021, at approximately 07:25, the defendant received a report from a person acquainted with the defendant who suspected the defendant of suicidal ideation. Officers from the Northern Police Station's D District Unit—Senior Sergeant E and Sergeant F—were dispatched to Unit C of Building B, the defendant's residence. The defendant learned from these police officers the reason they had obtained the access code to the defendant's residence entrance and entered the premises.

At approximately 07:29 on March 12, 2021, at the aforementioned location, while the defendant was engaged in a telephone conversation with her husband to verify facts communicated by the police officers, the defendant suddenly shrieked, crying out "Ya~~~" (a harsh exclamation), and hurled the mobile phone she was holding onto the floor. The defendant then charged toward Officer E, who was standing at the entrance vestibule, and shoved his chest with both hands three to four times while shouting, "Get out, get out, you fucking bastards, why the fuck are you entering someone else's home, get out you fucking bastards." The defendant then struck Officer E's left cheek four to five times with her right fist and, having picked up a white athletic shoe from the vestibule floor, struck Officer E's left cheek forcefully one additional time.

By these actions, the defendant obstructed the lawful execution of duty by a police officer in the processing of an emergency call report (112) investigation.

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2021. 8. 19. 지방법원에서 공무집행방해죄 등으로 징역 8월에 집행유예 2년을 선고받고 같은 달 27일 그 판결이 확정되었다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 2020. 7. 24. 04:00경 ‘C'유흥주점에서 대금 지급 문제로 업주와 시비하던 중 신고를 받고 출동한 경찰서 D지구대 소속 경사 E이 피고인의 이야기를 들어주지 않는다는 이유로 화가 나 "씨발 새끼야, 짭새 새끼야, 너네는 사장한테 돈 받아주기 위해 일하냐, 좆같은 새끼, 너 같은 새끼가 경찰이냐"라고 큰 소리로 욕설하며 E의 가슴부위를 양손으로 1회 밀치고 발로 왼쪽다리를 2회 걷어차 폭행하고, 계속하여 같은 날 06:05 위와 같은 혐의로 현행범인 체포되어 인치된 경찰서 형사과 사무실에서 피고인을 대기석에 앉힌 뒤 수갑을 풀어주려는 E에게 "경찰관이 유흥업소 돈을 왜 받아 주냐 씨발 새끼야"라고 욕설하며 발로 E의 다리를 1회 걷어 차 폭행하여 112신고사건 처리 및 피의자 호송에 관한 경찰공무원의 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.

## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced by the District Court on August 19, 2021, to imprisonment for eight months with a suspended sentence of two years for obstruction of official duty and other offenses. The judgment became final on August 27 of the same month.

## [Criminal Acts]

On July 24, 2020, at approximately 04:00, at the entertainment establishment 'C,' while the Defendant was engaged in a dispute with the proprietor over payment of charges, Police Sergeant E from D Police Substation, who responded to a report and arrived at the scene, refused to listen to the Defendant's account. Enraged by this, the Defendant shouted profanities in a loud voice, stating: "Fucking bastard, you shitty cop, do you work for the boss to collect money from him? You fucking asshole, how the hell are you a police officer?" While uttering these insults, the Defendant pushed Sergeant E's chest area with both hands on one occasion and kicked E's left leg twice with his foot, thereby assaulting him. Subsequently, on the same day at 06:05, while being arrested as a flagrant offender under the same charges and brought to the Criminal Investigation Division office of the police station, after the Defendant was seated in the waiting area and Sergeant E attempted to remove the handcuffs, the Defendant uttered profanities to E, stating: "Why do police officers take money from entertainment establishments? Fucking bastard," and kicked E's leg once with his foot, thereby assaulting him. Through these acts, the Defendant obstructed the legitimate official duty of the police officer pertaining to the handling of the 112 emergency report case and the transport of the suspect.

facts_kr:
1. 피고인은 2021. 2. 8. 14:32경 B에서 운영하는 ‘C' 앞 노상에서, 시청 D 소속 공무원인 E이 불법주정차 차량을 단속하는 것에 불만을 품고 E이 운전하는 F 주차단속차량의 본네트 부분에 몸을 기댔다. 그리고 지인들과 휴대전화 영상통화를 하는 등으로 단속차량이 이동하지 못하게 막고, 단속차량 조수석 유리창을 주먹으로 내리치면서 "씨발년들"이라고 욕설하는 등 마치 E에게 위해를 가할 것처럼 행동하여 협박하였다. 이로써 시청 공무원의 불법주정차 단속업무에 관한 정당한 직무집행을 방해하였다.
