facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced on October 8, 2019, by the District Court to imprisonment for one year and six months for fraud (사기죄). The judgment became final and conclusive on May 22, 2020. The Defendant was subsequently sentenced on November 30, 2020, by the District Court to imprisonment for two months with a suspended sentence of two years for fraud. The judgment became final and conclusive on December 8, 2020.

## [Criminal Acts]

The Defendant and Person B devised a scheme whereby they would approach individuals seeking business financing, deceive them by representing that substantial loans would be available, and receive money from them under the pretext of loan guarantee deposits (보증금), which they agreed to divide between themselves. Person B would introduce the Defendant to loan-seeking individuals as the fund provider, and request guarantee deposit money from them. The Defendant, upon being introduced by Person B, would represent himself to those individuals as a financial intermediary capable of easily providing large sums of capital from wealthy investors possessing hundreds of billions of won, and would receive money from them under the pretext of guarantee deposits. The Defendant and Person B thus conspired to assume these respective roles.

### 1. Joint Criminal Conduct with Person B

On November 3, 2017, Person B visited the office of Company E (㈜E), operated by Victim C, and told the victim: "If you deposit 100 million won as a deposit, I can invest 10 billion won within forty-five days."

However, the truth was that even if the Defendant and Person B received the deposit from the victim, they intended to use it for personal purposes and possessed neither the intent nor the ability to invest 10 billion won in the victim's business.

Notwithstanding the above, Person B made the aforementioned false statement. The victim, deceived thereby, remitted 100 million won on November 7, 2017, to a deposit account in the names of the Defendant and Person B.

By means of the foregoing, the Defendant conspired with Person B to defraud the victim and, through such fraud, obtained and embezzled 100 million won from the victim.

### 2. Sole Criminal Conduct of the Defendant

#### a. On or about March 27, 2018

On or about March 27, 2018, at an unspecified location, the Defendant called the victim by telephone and made the following false statement: "In order to withdraw the promised foreign exchange funds, a stamped paper fee (증지대 비용) of 3,768,000 won is necessary. If you remit the stamped paper fee, I will immediately arrange to provide 10 billion won."

The victim, deceived by this false representation, remitted 3,768,000 won on the same date to a Shinhan Bank deposit account in the Defendant's name. The Defendant received this remittance and embezzled it.

#### b. On or about July 12, 2018

On or about July 12, 2018, at the aforementioned office of Company E, the Defendant made the following false statement to the victim: "If you donate 29 percent of the equity interests in F Corporation, which you own, to Person G, and 20 percent to Person H, I will pay you the promised 10 billion won investment funds."

The victim, deceived by this false representation, caused himself to donate equity interests in F Corporation constituting 49 percent (equivalent to 78,400,000 won) to Persons G and H respectively on the same date. The Defendant thereby obtained property interests equivalent to the aforementioned amount.

facts_kr:
전화금융사기 조직은 외국 또는 기타 국내 수사기관의 추적이 어려운 지역에서 인터넷 전화 등을 이용하여 국내에 있은 불특정 다수의 피해자들을 상대로 수사기관이나 금융감독원 사칭, 대출 빙자, 가족 납치, 개인정보 유출 등의 내용으로 피해자들을 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자들로 하여금 자신들이 관리하는 계좌로 금원을 이체 또는 무통장 입금하도록 하거나 피해자들로부터 금원을 교부받아 이를 편취하는 속칭 ‘보이스피싱' 수법으로 범행을 하는 조직으로서, 범행 전체를 총괄하며 내부 각 점조직 간의 유기적인 연락을 담당하는 ‘총책', 총책의 지시를 받아 내부 조직원들을 관리하며 그들에게 기망수법과 현금수거 방법 등을 교육·지시하는 ‘관리책', 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 전화를 걸어 정부기관 등을 사칭한 거짓말을 하여 피해자들을 기망하는 ‘유인책·콜센터', 계좌에 입금된 피해금을 인출하여 전달하거나 피해자들을 직접 만나 돈을 받아오는 ‘현금인출책·현금수거책', 범행에 사용할 대포통장이나 조직원 등을 모집하는 ‘모집책' 등으로 각각 분담된 역할을 수행하면서 검거에 대비하여 고도의 점조직 형태로 운영되고 있고, 피고인은 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원의 제안을 받고 피해자로부터 현금을 수거하여 전달하는 현금수거책 역할을 담당하기로 하는 등 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원들과 전화금융사기 범행을 하기로 순차 공모하였다.
성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원들은 2021. 2. 18. 15:07경 불상의 장소에서 피해자 B에게 전화하여 "C D 팀장이다. 기존에 ㈜E에서 대출받았던 1,600만 원을 변제하면 우리 회사에서 저금리로 2,400만 원까지 대출하여 주겠다."고 하였고, 같은 해 3. 4. 10:00경 다시 피해자에게 전화하여 "기존 대출업체인 ㈜E F 팀장이다. 2,400만 원 신규 대출에 대하여 승인은 났는데 금융법위반으로 송금이 안 되고 있다. 기존 대출금 1,600만 원을 지금 현금으로 변제하면 대출금 2,400만 원을 송금해 주겠다. 우리 회사 영업사원을 보내줄 테니 만나서 직접 현금 1,600만 원을 건네주면 된다."고 거짓말하였다. 그러나 사실 성명불상자들은 금융기관 직원들도 아니었고 피해자에게 저금리 대출을 해 줄 의사나 능력도 없었다.
성명불상자들은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하고, 피고인은 2021. 3. 4. 16:00경 G에 있는 H 1번 출구에 위치한 I 앞 도로에서 사실은 금융기관 직원이 아님에도 성명불상자의 지시에 따라 채권번호(코드번호)를 피해자에게 불러주어 금융기관 영업 직원인 것처럼 피해자를 재차 기망한 다음 이에 속은 피해자로부터 대출 상환금 명목으로 자기앞수표 1,500만 원, 현금 100만 원, 합계 1,600만 원을 교부받았다. 이로써 피고인은 성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원들과 공모하여 피해자를 기망하여 1,600만 원을 편취하였다.

facts_en:
**Voice Phishing Fraud Organization Structure and Conspiracy**

A telephone financial fraud organization operates from locations outside the country or within domestic regions where investigation by foreign or other domestic investigative agencies is difficult, utilizing internet telephone services and similar means to target an unspecified number of victims within the Republic of Korea. The organization perpetrates fraud by impersonating investigative agencies or the Financial Supervisory Service, using pretexts of loan offers, family abduction threats, or personal information leaks, thereby deceiving victims into transferring funds to accounts controlled by the organization members or making deposits without passbooks, or obtaining money directly from victims through the so-called "voice phishing" scheme.

The organization is structured with the following hierarchical divisions of labor:

- **"Mastermind" (총책)**: Oversees all criminal operations and maintains organic coordination between internal sub-cells;
- **"Manager" (관리책)**: Receives instructions from the mastermind, manages internal organization members, and provides education and instruction regarding deception methods and cash collection procedures;
- **"Luring Officer/Call Center" (유인책·콜센터)**: Contacts an unspecified number of victims by telephone, makes false statements impersonating government agencies and similar entities to deceive victims;
- **"Cash Withdrawal Officer/Cash Collection Officer" (현금인출책·현금수거책)**: Withdraws fraud proceeds deposited in accounts and transmits them, or directly meets victims to collect money;
- **"Recruitment Officer" (모집책)**: Recruits "mule accounts" (shell accounts for receiving stolen funds) and organization members.

Each member performs assigned roles while the organization operates in a highly sophisticated cellular structure prepared against detection and apprehension.

**The Defendant's Role and Conspiracy**

The defendant, upon receiving a proposal from an unknown voice phishing organization member, agreed to assume the role of cash collection officer responsible for collecting money from victims and delivering it to the organization. The defendant successively conspired with unknown voice phishing organization members to commit telephone financial fraud.

**Specific Criminal Conduct**

On February 18, 2021, at approximately 15:07, unknown voice phishing organization members telephoned Victim B from an unknown location and stated: "This is Team Leader C D. Regarding the 16,000,000 won loan you previously obtained from Company E, if you repay that amount, our company will provide a new loan of up to 24,000,000 won at a lower interest rate."

On March 4, 2021, at approximately 10:00, the same perpetrators again telephoned the victim and made the following false statement: "This is Team Leader F from the existing lender, Company E. Approval has been granted for the new 24,000,000 won loan, but remittance is currently blocked due to violation of financial regulations. If you repay the existing loan of 16,000,000 won in cash immediately, we will remit the 24,000,000 won loan. We will send a company sales representative, so you can meet with him and hand over the cash payment of 16,000,000 won directly."

In fact, the unknown perpetrators were not financial institution employees, nor did they have any intention or capacity to provide the victim with any low-interest loan.

**The Defendant's Direct Participation**

By employing the above deception against the victim, and on March 4, 2021, at approximately 16:00, at a location on the roadway in front of I at Exit Number 1 of H Station located in G, the defendant—despite not being a financial institution employee—followed instructions from an unknown perpetrator by reciting an account reference number (code number) to the victim, thereby further deceiving the victim into believing he was a financial institution sales representative. The victim, having been deceived, delivered a cashier's check in the amount of 15,000,000 won and cash in the amount of 1,000,000 won, totaling 16,000,000 won, to the defendant under the pretext of loan repayment.

Through these actions, the defendant conspired with unknown voice phishing organization members to defraud Victim B, thereby unlawfully obtaining and acquiring 16,000,000 won.

facts_kr:
피고인이 가담한 전화금융사기(일명 ‘보이스피싱') 조직은 불특정 다수인들 상대로 무작위로 전화를 걸어, 금융감독원, 은행 직원 등을 사칭하면서 개인정보 유출, 대출현혹 등의 방법으로 피해자를 기망한 후 이에 속은 피해자로부터 금원을 편취하는 조직으로서, 전화금융 사기조직의 역할은 하부 조직원들과 유기적인 연락을 담당하는 ‘총책', 총책의 지시를 받아 내부 조직원들을 관리하며 그들에게 기망 수법과 현금수거 방법 등을 교육·지시하는 ‘관리책', 피해자에게 전화로 수사기관 또는 금융기관을 사칭하여 돈을 송금 내지 인출하여야 한다고 거짓말하는 역할을 담당하는 ‘기망책', 국내에서 피해자로부터 피해금액을 수거하는 ‘현금수거책', 현금수거책이 수거한 현금을 회수하여 외국 등으로 송금하는 ‘송금책' 등으로 그 역할이 분담되어 있고, 수사기관의 검거에 대비하여 추적이 곤란한 속칭 ‘대포 폰' 등을 이용하거나 ‘텔레그램' 등의 휴대전화 메신저 어플리케이션을 이용하는 점조직 형태로 운영되고 있다.
피고인은 2020. 12.경 구인광고를 보고 연락하게 된 성명불상의 위 관리책으로부터 ‘현금수거책' 역할을 제안 받고 이를 수락하여 ‘기망책'이 피해자에게 전화를 걸어 대출실행 등을 빌미로 피해자를 기망한 후 피해자에게 현금을 인출하여 피고인에게 전달하라고 거짓말하면 피고인은 위 전화금융사기 조직의 성명불상 관리책으로부터 텔레그램 메시지 등을 통해 지시를 받아 피해자에게 접근해 피해자로부터 피해금원을 교부받고 그 금액 중 일부를 수당 명목으로 취득하고 그 나머지 금원을 위 관리책이 지시하는 계좌로 송금하는 역할을 담당하기로 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원들과 순차 공모하였다.
성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직의 기망책은 2020. 12. 22.경 불상지에서 B은행 직원을 사칭하며 피해자 C에게 대출이 가능하다는 취지의 문자메시지를 발송한 후, 이를 보고 연락한 피해자에게 ‘기존에 받은 대출금을 먼저 상환해야 저금리 대출이 가능하다.'는 취지로 거짓말하였다.
그러나 사실 위 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원은 금융기관 직원이 아니었고, 소위 ‘보이스피싱' 수법으로 금원을 편취할 생각이었을 뿐 피해자로부터 금원을 교부받더라도 피해자의 기존 대출금이 상환되도록 조치할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
성명불상의 위 기망책은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하고 피고인은 2020. 12. 22. 15:55경 시 D에 있는 피해자의 주거지 인근에서 사실은 ‘E카드'의 직원이 아님에도 마치 자신이 위 ‘E카드'의 직원인 것처럼 행세하면서 피해자로부터 현금 1,250만 원을 교부받았다.
이로써 피고인은 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원들과 공모하여 피해자로부터 대출금 상환 명목으로 피해자로부터 금원을 편취하였다.

facts_en:
The criminal organization engaged in by the Defendant, known as "voice phishing" (telephone financial fraud), operated by randomly calling unspecified members of the public, impersonating employees of the Financial Supervisory Service, banks, and similar entities, defrauding victims through methods such as personal information disclosure and loan solicitation, and then misappropriating funds from the deceived victims. The roles within the telephone financial fraud organization are divided as follows: a "mastermind" responsible for maintaining organic communication with lower-level organization members; a "manager" who, under the mastermind's direction, supervises internal organization members and provides them with instruction and guidance on deception methods and cash collection procedures; a "deceiver" who telephonically impersonates investigative or financial institutions to victims and lies about the necessity to transfer or withdraw funds; a "cash collector" who collects the damage amount from victims domestically; and a "money remitter" who retrieves cash collected by the cash collector and remits it abroad or elsewhere. The organization operated in a point-cell structure, utilizing so-called "burner phones" (disposable mobile devices difficult to trace) in preparation for law enforcement apprehension, and employing mobile messenger applications such as "Telegram."

Around December 2020, the Defendant, upon viewing a recruitment advertisement and making contact, was approached by a manager of unknown name and offered the role of "cash collector." The Defendant accepted this role. Under this arrangement, when the "deceiver" would call a victim and defraud the victim on the pretext of executing a loan or similar transaction, falsely instructing the victim to withdraw cash and deliver it to the Defendant, the Defendant would receive instructions from the manager of unknown name through Telegram messages and similar means, approach the victim, receive the damage funds from the victim, appropriate a portion of the funds as a commission, and remit the remaining funds to an account designated by the manager. Accordingly, the Defendant successively conspired with organization members of unknown name within the telephone financial fraud organization to execute these roles.

On or about December 22, 2020, at an unspecified location, the "deceiver" of the telephone financial fraud organization of unknown name impersonated an employee of B Bank and transmitted a text message to Victim C indicating that a loan was available. Upon receiving this message and making contact, the Defendant falsely told the victim that "previous loan repayment must be made first before a lower-interest-rate loan can be made."

However, in truth, the organization member was not a financial institution employee, and the organization intended only to misappropriate funds through the so-called "voice phishing" method. Even if funds were received from the victim, the organization member had neither the intent nor the ability to ensure that the victim's existing loan would be repaid.

As described above, the "deceiver" of unknown name defrauded the victim in this manner. On December 22, 2020, at approximately 15:55, the Defendant, in the vicinity of the victim's residence located in D City, falsely represented himself as an employee of "E Card," despite not being an employee of "E Card," and received cash in the amount of 12,500,000 won (KRW 12.5 million) from the victim.

By these actions, the Defendant conspired with organization members of unknown name within the telephone financial fraud organization and misappropriated funds from the victim under the pretense of loan repayment.

facts_kr:
1. 피해자 B에 대한 범행
피고인은 2018. 5. 23.경 불상지에서 인터넷 C 카페에 피해자 B이 교구 수선을 의뢰하는 글을 게시한 것을 보고 피해자에게 연락하여 "내가 봉제공장을 운영하고 있으니 수선비를 지급하면 수선을 해 주겠다."는 취지로 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 그 무렵 건물 보증금을 내지 못하여 봉제공장을 제대로 운영하지 못하던 상태였고, D에 571,000원, E에 2,480,000원, F에 1,656,000원의 채무를 부담하는 외에 사채업자로부터 돈을 빌려 변제 독촉을 받고 있었으며, 그 외 별다른 재산이 없어 피해자로부터 돈을 입금받더라도 이를 생활비에 사용할 생각이었기 때문에 봉제공장을 정상 가동하여 피해자가 요청하는 수선을 완료해 줄 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 수선비 명목으로 2018. 5. 23.경 514,000원, 2018. 5. 24.경 285,800원을 피고인 명의 G조합 계좌로 입금받았다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 기망하여 합계 799,800원을 교부받았다.
2. 피해자 H에 대한 범행
피고인은 2018. 4. 중순경 불상지에서 피해자 H으로부터 유아용 세안수건과 우비를 제작하여 달라는 의뢰 전화를 받고 피해자에게 "원단과 부자재를 먼저 보내주고 공임비 165만 원을 입금해 주면 2018. 5. 23.까지 물건을 제작하여 보내주겠다."라는 취지로 거짓말하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 그 무렵 건물 보증금을 내지 못하여 봉제공장을 제대로 운영하지 못하던 상태였고, D에 571,000원, E에 2,480,000원, F에 1,656,000원의 채무를 부담하는 외에 사채업자로부터 돈을 빌려 변제 독촉을 받고 있었으며, 그 외 별다른 재산이 없어 피해자로부터 돈을 입금받더라도 이를 생활비에 사용할 생각이었기 때문에 봉제공장을 정상 가동하여 피해자가 요청한 물품을 제작하고 납품할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2018. 4. 24.경 원단 140만 원, 부자재 라벨 10만 원 상당을 제공받고, 공임비 명목으로 같은 달 25.경 70만 원을 피고인 명의 I은행 계좌로 입금받고, 2018. 5. 9.경 484,000원, 같은 달 10.경 105,000원, 같은 달 24.경 356,000원을 피고인 명의 G조합 계좌로 입금받아 총 4회에 걸쳐 피해자로부터 합계 1,645,000원을 교부받았다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 기망하여 합계 3,145,000원 상당의 재물을 교부받았다.

facts_en:
## 1. Criminal Conduct Against Victim B

Around May 23, 2018, at an unspecified location, the Defendant, upon discovering that Victim B had posted a notice on Internet Café C requesting ecclesiastical vestment repair services, contacted the Victim and made false representations to the effect that: "I operate a sewing factory, and if you pay the repair fee, I will provide the repair services."

However, in fact, at that time the Defendant was unable to properly operate the sewing factory due to his inability to pay the building deposit. Moreover, the Defendant was burdened with debts of 571,000 won to D, 2,480,000 won to E, and 1,656,000 won to F, and was borrowing money from an unlicensed money lender while being subjected to repeated demands for repayment. Absent any other substantial assets, the Defendant intended to use any money received from the Victim for living expenses. Consequently, the Defendant lacked both the intent and the ability to operate the sewing factory in normal operation so as to complete the repair work requested by the Victim.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Defendant, through the aforementioned deception, caused the deceived Victim to transfer repair fees in the amount of 514,000 won on or about May 23, 2018, and 285,800 won on or about May 24, 2018, to a G Cooperative account in the Defendant's name.

By this conduct, the Defendant, through deception of the Victim, obtained a total of 799,800 won.

## 2. Criminal Conduct Against Victim H

Around mid-April 2018, at an unspecified location, the Defendant received a telephone request from Victim H to manufacture children's facial wash towels and rain cloaks. The Defendant made false representations to the Victim to the effect that: "If you send the fabric and auxiliary materials first and transfer the labor fee of 1,650,000 won, I will manufacture and send the products to you by May 23, 2018."

However, in fact, at that time the Defendant was unable to properly operate the sewing factory due to his inability to pay the building deposit. Moreover, the Defendant was burdened with debts of 571,000 won to D, 2,480,000 won to E, and 1,656,000 won to F, and was borrowing money from an unlicensed money lender while being subjected to repeated demands for repayment. Absent any other substantial assets, the Defendant intended to use any money received from the Victim for living expenses. Consequently, the Defendant lacked both the intent and the ability to properly operate the sewing factory so as to manufacture and deliver the goods requested by the Victim.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Defendant, through the aforementioned deception, caused the deceived Victim to provide fabric valued at 1,400,000 won and auxiliary materials (labels) valued at 100,000 won on or about April 24, 2018, to transfer labor fees in the amount of 700,000 won to an I Bank account in the Defendant's name on or about April 25, 2018, and to transfer 484,000 won on or about May 9, 2018, 105,000 won on or about May 10, 2018, and 356,000 won on or about May 24, 2018, to a G Cooperative account in the Defendant's name. In four separate transactions, the Victim transferred a total of 1,645,000 won to the Defendant.

By this conduct, the Defendant, through deception of the Victim, obtained property valued at a total of 3,145,000 won.

facts_kr:
피고인은 B에 있는 주식회사 C을 실질적으로 운영하였던 자이다.
1. 피해자 D에 대한 사기
피고인은 2018. 11. 22.경 위 주식회사 C의 사무실에서 피해자 D에게 "3,500만원을 송금해 주면 시 E 토지(약 80평, 이하 `이 사건 토지`라 함) 중 10평 부분에 대한 소유권을 이전해주겠다."고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인이 운영하던 주식회사 C은 오랜 기간 적자가 누적되어 소속 직원들에게 월급을 제대로 주기 어려울 정도로 경영이 악화된 상황이었고, 피고인에게는 5,000만원 상당의 금융기관에 대한 채무가 있는 이외에 별다른 재산이나 소득이 없었으므로, 피해자로부터 위와 같이 금원을 교부받더라도 이 사건 토지를 그 소유자인 F으로부터 매수한 후 피해자에게 그 토지 중 10평 부분에 대한 소유권을 이전해 줄 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2018. 11. 22.경부터 2018. 12. 6.경까지 매매대금 명목으로 피고인이 관리하는 주식회사 C 명의의 계좌(G)로 합계 3,500만원을 입금받았다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 기망하여 피해자로부터 금원을 교부받았다.
2. 피해자 H에 대한 사기
피고인은 2018. 11. 28.경 위 1항 기재 장소에서 피해자 H에게 "3,087만원을 송금해 주면 이 사건 토지 중 9평 부분에 대한 소유권을 이전해주겠다."고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 위 1항 기재와 같이 피해자로부터 위와 같이 금원을 교부받더라도 이 사건 토지를 그 소유자인 F으로부터 매수한 후 피해자에게 그 토지 중 9평 부분에 대한 소유권을 이전해 줄 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2018. 11. 28.경 및 2018. 11. 29.경 매매대금 명목으로 위 주식회사 C 명의의 계좌로 합계 3,087만원을 입금받았다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 기망하여 피해자로부터 금원을 교부받았다.
3. 피해자 I에 대한 사기
피고인은 2019. 1. 18.경 위 1항 기재 장소에서 피해자 I에게 "3,465만원을 송금해 주면 이 사건 토지 중 10평 부분에 대한 소유권을 이전해주겠다."고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 위 1항 기재와 같이 피해자로부터 위와 같이 금원을 교부받더라도 이 사건 토지를 그 소유자인 F으로부터 매수한 후 피해자에게 그 토지 중 10평 부분에 대한 소유권을 이전해 줄 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2019. 1. 18.경부터 같은 달 24.경까지 매매대금 명목으로 위 주식회사 C 명의의 계좌로 합계 3,465만원을 입금받았다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 기망하여 피해자로부터 금원을 교부받았다.

facts_en:
The Defendant was the individual who substantively operated Stock Company C located in B.

### 1. Fraud Against Victim D

On or about November 22, 2018, the Defendant made a false statement to Victim D at the office of Stock Company C, saying: "If you remit 35,000,000 won, I will transfer ownership to you of a 10-pyeong portion of the land in City E (approximately 80 pyeong in total; hereinafter referred to as 'the Land in this case')."

However, in truth, Stock Company C, which the Defendant operated, had accumulated deficits over a prolonged period such that its financial condition had deteriorated to the point where it was difficult to pay monthly salaries to its employees in full. Beyond financial institution debts amounting to approximately 50,000,000 won owed by the Defendant, he possessed no other material property or income. Accordingly, even if the Defendant were to receive the aforementioned funds from the Victim, he neither possessed the intent nor the ability to purchase the Land in this case from F, its owner, and thereafter transfer ownership of the 10-pyeong portion thereof to the Victim.

By deceiving the Victim in the manner described above, the Defendant obtained, from the Victim who was deceived, a total of 35,000,000 won remitted to the account (G) in the name of Stock Company C, which the Defendant managed, under the pretext of purchase price between on or about November 22, 2018 and on or about December 6, 2018.

In this manner, the Defendant defrauded the Victim and obtained funds from the Victim.

### 2. Fraud Against Victim H

On or about November 28, 2018, the Defendant made a false statement to Victim H at the location specified in paragraph 1 above, saying: "If you remit 30,870,000 won, I will transfer ownership to you of a 9-pyeong portion of the Land in this case."

However, in truth, the Defendant, as described in paragraph 1 above, neither possessed the intent nor the ability to purchase the Land in this case from F, its owner, and thereafter transfer ownership of the 9-pyeong portion thereof to the Victim, even if he were to receive the aforementioned funds from the Victim.

By deceiving the Victim in the manner described above, the Defendant obtained, from the Victim who was deceived, a total of 30,870,000 won remitted to the account in the name of Stock Company C under the pretext of purchase price on or about November 28, 2018 and on or about November 29, 2018.

In this manner, the Defendant defrauded the Victim and obtained funds from the Victim.

### 3. Fraud Against Victim I

On or about January 18, 2019, the Defendant made a false statement to Victim I at the location specified in paragraph 1 above, saying: "If you remit 34,650,000 won, I will transfer ownership to you of a 10-pyeong portion of the Land in this case."

However, in truth, the Defendant, as described in paragraph 1 above, neither possessed the intent nor the ability to purchase the Land in this case from F, its owner, and thereafter transfer ownership of the 10-pyeong portion thereof to the Victim, even if he were to receive the aforementioned funds from the Victim.

By deceiving the Victim in the manner described above, the Defendant obtained, from the Victim who was deceived, a total of 34,650,000 won remitted to the account in the name of Stock Company C under the pretext of purchase price between on or about January 18, 2019 and on or about January 24, 2019.

In this manner, the Defendant defrauded the Victim and obtained funds from the Victim.

전제사실
피고인은 B아파트 C호(이하 '이 사건 아파트'라 한다)의 소유자로 등기되어 있었고, 한편 D는 이 사건 아파트가 원래 자신의 모친인 E의 소유였는데, 모친이 사망하자 피고인이 자신을 소유자로 등기한 것이므로 이는 원인무효의 등기라고 주장하면서 2015. 10. 29. 지방법원 피고인을 상대로, 『이 사건 아파트에 대하여 1998. 10. 13.자로 피고인 앞으로 경료된 소유권이전등기에 대하여 말소등기절차를 이행하라.』 라는 취지의 소송(2015가단129756)을 제기하였고, 피고인은 2015. 11. 18. 이에 대한 소장부본 등을 송달받았고, 위 소송은 2018. 6. 15. 피고인의 패소로 확정되자 이 사건 아파트에 관하여 2019. 9. 25. 상속을 등기원인으로 하여 D 앞으로 소유권이전등기가 경료되었다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 2015. 11. 19. 'G'이라는 상호의 공인중개사 사무실에서 피해자 ㈜H으로부터 3억 6,000만 원의 가계대출을 받기 위하여 성명불상의 대출중개업자가 가져온 피해자 은행의 대출거래약정서, 'I'이라는 가계대출 상품설명서 등의 문서를 작성하고, 특히 이 사건 아파트에 대한 근저당권설정계약서에 권리자를 피해자 은행, 채권최고액을 4억 3,200만 원으로 기재한 후 근저당권설정에 필요한 서류 등과 함께 이를 위 성명불상의 대출중개업자에게 건네주고, 그 대출중개업자는 그때쯤 이를 피해자 은행 지점의 담당자인 K에게 제출하였다.
그러나, 사실 피고인은 이 사건 아파트에 대하여 위와 같이 소유권이전등기의 말소등기절차를 이행하라는 취지의 소장부본을 그 전날 송달받아 그 내용을 알고 있었을 뿐만 아니라 이와 같은 사정은 이 사건 아파트를 담보로 대출을 해주는 피해자 은행에게는 저당권의 침해를 당할 우려가 있는 중요한 것이므로 신의성실의 원칙상 늦어도 위 담보대출이 실행되기 전날인 같은 달 23.까지 피해자 은행에 위 소송이 계속 중인 사실을 고지하여 대출심사에 참작할 수 있도록 할 법률상의 의무가 있다.
이로써 피고인은 위와 같은 방법으로 이 사건 아파트에 대하여 아무런 법적인 문제가 없는 것 같은 태도를 취하여 피해자 은행을 기망하여 같은 달 24. 이에 속은 피해자 은행으로부터 피고인 명의의 L계좌(계좌번호: M)로 대출금 명목으로 359,774,890원을 입금받았다.

facts_en:
## PRELIMINARY FACTS

The defendant was registered as the owner of Unit C, Building B Apartment (hereinafter referred to as "the Apartment in this case"). Meanwhile, D asserted that the Apartment in this case was originally owned by E, the defendant's mother, and that upon the mother's death, the defendant registered himself as the owner; accordingly, D claimed this registration was void ab initio. On October 29, 2015, D filed a lawsuit (Case No. 2015가단129756) before the District Court against the defendant, seeking to "[require] the defendant to perform the cancellation registration procedure for the ownership transfer registration completed on October 13, 1998 in the name of the defendant with respect to the Apartment in this case." The defendant received service of the summons and complaint on November 18, 2015. When the lawsuit was finalized as a judgment against the defendant on June 15, 2018, an ownership transfer registration in the name of D was completed on September 25, 2019 with inheritance as the cause of registration with respect to the Apartment in this case.

## CRIMINAL ACTS

On November 19, 2015, at the real estate brokerage office bearing the trade name "G," the defendant obtained a household loan in the amount of 360 million won from the victim ㈜H (victim company H). The defendant drafted various documents, including a secured loan agreement contract brought by a loan intermediary of unknown identity affiliated with the victim bank, and a product description document for a household loan product called "I." Specifically, the defendant completed the mortgage (near mortgage) agreement with respect to the Apartment in this case, filling in the victim bank as the rights holder and 432 million won as the maximum secured obligation amount. The defendant then delivered this document along with other documents necessary for the mortgage registration to the aforementioned loan intermediary of unknown identity, and the loan intermediary subsequently submitted these documents to K, the designated officer at a branch of the victim bank.

However, in fact, the defendant had received service of the summons and complaint on the previous day (November 18, 2015) seeking the performance of the cancellation registration procedure for the ownership transfer registration with respect to the Apartment in this case, and was aware of its contents. Moreover, this circumstance constituted a matter of critical importance to the victim bank—which was providing the secured loan using the Apartment in this case as collateral—in that there existed a risk of infringement upon the bank's mortgage rights. Therefore, according to the principle of good faith, the defendant had a legal duty to notify the victim bank, by no later than November 23, 2015 (the day before the execution of the secured loan), that the aforementioned lawsuit was pending, in order to enable the victim bank to consider this fact in its loan assessment.

By such means, the defendant adopted a demeanor suggesting that there were no legal problems whatsoever with respect to the Apartment in this case, thereby deceiving the victim bank. On November 24, 2015, the defendant obtained 359,774,890 won from the victim bank, which had been deceived, credited to Account L in the defendant's name (Account Number: M), purportedly as loan proceeds.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2021. 5. 14. 지방법원에서 사기죄 등으로 징역 4년을 선고받고 위 판결이 2021. 5. 22. 확정되었다.
1. 공모관계
전화금융사기 조직은 일반적으로 외국에서 국내에 있는 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 무작위로 전화를 걸어 정부기관이나 금융기관 등을 사칭하는 등의 방법으로 피해자들을 기망하고 이에 속은 피해자들로 하여금 자신들이 관리하는 계좌로 금원을 이체 또는 무통장 입금하도록 하거나 피해자들로부터 금원을 교부받아 이를 편취하는 속칭 ‘보이스피싱' 수법으로 범행을 하는 조직으로서, 범행 전체를 총괄하며 내부 각 점조직 간의 유기적인 연락을 담당하는 ‘총책', 총책의 지시를 받아 내부 조직원들을 관리하며 그들에게 기망 수법과 현금수거 방법 등을 교육·지시하는 ‘관리책', 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 전화를 걸어 정부기관 등을 사칭한 거짓말을 하여 피해자들을 기망하는 ‘콜센터', 계좌에 입금된 피해금을 인출하여 전달하거나 피해자들을 직접 만나 돈을 받아오는 ‘현금 인출책 · 현금 수거책' 등으로 각각 역할을 분담하는 등 철저하게 점조직 형태로 운영되고 있다.
피고인은 2020. 4. 20.경 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원의 제안을 받고 피해자로부터 현금을 수거하여 전달하는 현금 수거책 역할을 담당하기로 하는 등 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원들과 전화금융사기 범행을 하기로 순차 공모하였다.
2. 사기
성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원은 2020. 5. 21.경 장소를 알 수 없는 곳에서 피해자 B에게 전화하여 중앙지검 검사를 사칭하면서 ‘B씨 명의로 대포통장이 개설되어 범죄에 이용되었다. C이라는 사람 앞으로 72건의 고소사건이 접수되어 수사 중인데 B씨도 조사를 받아야 한다. 우리가 시키는 대로 본인 계좌에 있는 돈을 모두 현금으로 출금해서 우리가 보내는 직원에게 전달하면 우리가 정상적인 돈인지 확인 후 돌려주고 약식조사를 받을 수 있게 해 주겠다'는 취지로 거짓말 하였다. 그러나 사실성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원은 검사가 아니었고 피해자로부터 돈을 교부받더라도 확인 후 돌려줄 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원의 지시에 따라 2020. 5. 21. 13:30경 D에 있는 ‘E병원' 정문 앞 노상에서, 피해자에게 F 대리라고 사칭하면서 금융위원회위원장 직인이 날인된 서류를 건네주는 등 금융위원회 직원인 것처럼 행세하여 피해자를 재차 기망하고, 피해자로부터 현금 5,000만원을 교부받았다.
이로써 피고인은 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원과 공모하여 피해자로부터 5,000만 원을 편취하였다.

facts_en:
**Prior Conviction:**
The Defendant was sentenced to four years' imprisonment for fraud and other offenses by the District Court on May 14, 2021, and the aforementioned judgment became final on May 22, 2021.

## 1. CONSPIRACY

Telephone financial fraud organizations typically operate by making random calls from abroad to unspecified numerous victims within the country, deceiving victims by impersonating government agencies or financial institutions, and causing victimized persons to transfer or deposit funds into accounts managed by the organization members or obtaining funds directly from victims—a method colloquially referred to as "voice phishing"—and are organized as a comprehensive cell-based structure. The organization divides roles as follows: a "mastermind" who oversees the entire criminal enterprise and coordinates organic communication between internal cell organizations; a "manager" who, under the mastermind's direction, supervises internal members and provides them with education and instructions on deception methods and cash collection procedures; a "call center" operation that makes calls to unspecified numerous victims and deceives them by making false statements impersonating government agencies; and "cash withdrawal officers" and "cash collectors" who withdraw funds deposited into accounts and deliver them or meet directly with victims to collect money. The organization operates with meticulous cell-based structure through such role division.

The Defendant, around April 20, 2020, received a proposal from an unknown member of a telephone financial fraud organization and agreed to assume the role of "cash collector," responsible for collecting and delivering cash from victims. The Defendant successively conspired with unknown members of the telephone financial fraud organization to commit telephone financial fraud.

## 2. FRAUD

An unknown member of a telephone financial fraud organization called Victim B at an unknown location around May 21, 2020, impersonating a prosecutor of the Central District Prosecutors' Office, and made false statements to the following effect: "A shell account has been opened in your name, and it was used for criminal purposes. Seventy-two criminal complaints have been filed against a person named C, and an investigation is underway. You must also be investigated. If you withdraw all the money from your account in cash as we instruct and hand it to the employee we send, we will verify that the money is legitimate and return it to you, and we will allow you to undergo summary investigation."

In fact, the unknown member of the telephone financial fraud organization was not a prosecutor, and even if money was obtained from the victim, the member had neither the intent nor the ability to verify and return it.

Following the instructions of the unknown member of the telephone financial fraud organization, the Defendant, around 1:30 p.m. on May 21, 2020, at a public road in front of the main entrance of "E Hospital" located in D, impersonated a person named F and represented himself as an employee of the Financial Services Commission by presenting a document bearing the official seal of the Financial Services Commission Chairperson. Through such conduct, the Defendant further deceived the Victim and obtained from the Victim cash in the amount of 50,000,000 won (KRW 50 million).

By such conduct, the Defendant, in conspiracy with an unknown member of a telephone financial fraud organization, embezzled 50,000,000 won (KRW 50 million) from the Victim.

facts_kr:
범죄 전력
피고인은 2020. 12. 24. 지방법원에서 사기․사기미수죄로 징역 2년을 선고받아(*) 2021. 1. 1. 그 판결이 확정되었다.
범죄 사실
전기통신금융사기(일명 ‘보이스피싱') 조직은 총책, 유인책, 현금수거책 등 역할을 체계적으로 분담하여 대출이 필요한 사람들을 상대로 기존대출을 상환하면 저금리로 대출을 받을 수 있는 것처럼 기망하고, 이에 속은 사람들로부터 기존대출 상환 명목으로 현금을 교부받음으로써 다수의 피해자들을 양산하는 범죄집단이다.(*) 피고인이 이 사건의 보이스피싱 조직원들과 공모하여 2020. 4. 22.경부터 2020. 4. 29.경까지 사이에 9명의 피해자들로부터 합계 1억 5,102만원을 편취하고, 1명의 피해자로부터 1,100만원을 편취하려고 하다가 미수에 그친 범행이다.

피고인은 2020. 4. 1.경 성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원(일명 ‘B 팀장')으로부터 "은행 대부, 대출금 회수, 월수입 300만원, 교통비 차비 포함 월 500만원 지급"이라는 내용의 문자를 받고 "구체적으로 어떤 일을 하는 것인지, 진짜 믿어도 되는 일인지"라는 내용으로 문자를 보내자, B 팀장으로부터 메신저로 "가명은 C으로 하고 지시에 따라 캐피탈 직원 등을 사칭하면서 고객으로부터 현금을 받은 후 알려주는 계좌번호로 무통장 입금을 하면 받은 현금의 1%를 수당으로 주고 경비는 별도로 지급하겠다."라는 취지의 제안을 받고 이를 승낙하여 보이스피싱 범행의 현금수거책 역할을 맡기로 순차 공모하였다.
성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원은 2020. 4. 14. 13:00경 불상지에서 D은행 직원을 사칭하여 발신번호 ‘E'의 전화번호로 피해자 F에게 전화하여 "대출심사를 통해 대출 여부를 확인할 수 있으니 대출이 필요하면 대출신청을 하라."고 거짓말하고, 피해자가 대출을 신청하자 2020. 4. 14. 15:00경 G회사 직원을 사칭하여 피해자에게 전화하여 "기존에 대출을 이용하고 있는데, 다른 곳에 대출 신청을 하여 금융법을 위반하였다. 당장 기존대출금 중 일부를 상환하라."고 거짓말하였다.
그러나 위 성명불상자들은 금융기관 직원도 아니었고, 피해자에게 대출을 해줄 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 피고인은 B 팀장의 지시에 따라 2020. 4. 14. 17:00경 H아파트 정문 옆에서 마치 금융기관 직원인 것처럼 행세하면서 이에 속은 피해자로부터 현금 613만원을 교부받았다.
이로써 피고인은 성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원들과 공모하여 피해자를 기망하여 재물을 교부받았다.

facts_en:
## Criminal Record

The Defendant was sentenced to imprisonment for two years on charges of fraud and attempted fraud by the District Court on December 24, 2020.(*) The judgment became final on January 1, 2021.

## Facts of the Crime

A telecommunications financial fraud organization (commonly known as "voice phishing") is a criminal group that systematically divides roles among members, including a mastermind, a recruiter, and a cash collector, and perpetrates fraud against persons in need of loans by deceiving them into believing that they can obtain low-interest loans if they repay existing loans. Subsequently, the organization obtains cash from the deceived persons under the pretext of repaying existing loans, thereby generating numerous victims.(*) The Defendant, in conspiracy with voice phishing organization members in this case, defrauded a total of 151,020,000 won from nine victims between approximately April 22, 2020 and approximately April 29, 2020, and attempted to defraud 11,000,000 won from one victim, which attempt failed.

On or about April 1, 2020, the Defendant received a text message from an unidentified voice phishing organization member (nicknamed "Team Leader B") stating: "Bank lending, loan collection, monthly income of 3,000,000 won, monthly payment of 5,000,000 won including transportation allowance." The Defendant then sent a text message asking, "What specifically is the job, and is it really trustworthy?" In response, Team Leader B proposed to the Defendant via messenger that the Defendant adopt the alias "C," impersonate capital company employees and other financial institution staff in accordance with instructions, receive cash from customers, and deposit the cash into designated accounts by bank transfer, in exchange for which the Defendant would receive one percent of the cash received as remuneration, with separate security expenses to be provided. The Defendant accepted this proposal and, through successive conspiracy, undertook the role of cash collector in the voice phishing scheme.

On April 14, 2020, at approximately 13:00, an unidentified voice phishing organization member, impersonating a D Bank employee, called Victim F from an unknown location using the telephone number "E" as the caller ID and falsely stated: "You can confirm whether a loan will be approved through a loan screening process; if you need a loan, please submit a loan application." After the Victim submitted a loan application, on April 14, 2020, at approximately 15:00, the same or another unidentified organization member, impersonating a G Company employee, called the Victim and falsely stated: "You are already utilizing an existing loan, but you have submitted a loan application elsewhere, which violates financial law. You must immediately repay a portion of your existing loan."

However, the aforementioned unidentified persons were not financial institution employees, and they had neither the intention nor the ability to provide loans to the Victim.

Notwithstanding this, the Defendant, following Team Leader B's instructions, on April 14, 2020, at approximately 17:00, positioned himself in front of H Apartment's main gate, presented himself as though he were a financial institution employee, and received cash in the amount of 6,130,000 won from the deceived Victim.

By these acts, the Defendant, in conspiracy with unidentified voice phishing organization members, deceived the Victim and obtained property through deception.

그러나 사실 피고인은 별다른 재산 없이 금융권 대출 채무, 개인 채무, 체납 세금 등 약 3억 원의 채무를 부담하고 있었고 위 C의 경영이 악화되어 결국 2020. 4. 1.경 폐업하는 등 경제적으로 어려운 상황이었으므로, 피해자가 가구를 배송하더라도 운송비를 지급할 의사나 능력이 없었다.

facts_en:
**Case No. 2020고단3349**

The defendant is a person who operated 'C,' a furniture delivery company, located in B. On or about January 7, 2020, at an unknown location, the defendant, through a mobile phone-based transportation service application called "National 24-Hour Call," made a request to the victim D to deliver furniture while pretending to be a person who would normally pay the transportation fee.

However, in reality, the defendant, possessing no significant assets, was burdened with approximately 300 million won in debts, including financial institution loans, personal debts, and unpaid taxes. Moreover, the operations of the aforementioned 'C' had deteriorated, ultimately resulting in the closure of the business on or about April 1, 2020, placing the defendant in severe economic distress. Consequently, the defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to pay the transportation fee even if the victim delivered the furniture.

The defendant thus defrauded the victim and caused the victim to deliver furniture from 'F,' a furniture store located in E, to 'C' on or about January 7, 2020, without paying the transportation fee of 220,000 won. Furthermore, from December 3, 2019, to March 27, 2020, on a total of fourteen occasions, as detailed in the attached table of crimes, the defendant caused multiple victims to deliver furniture while failing to pay a total transportation fee of 5,058,000 won.

By these acts, the defendant obtained property valued at 5,058,000 won through fraud against the victims.



**Case No. 2020고단5501**

The defendant is a person who operated 'C,' a furniture delivery company, located in B. On or about January 14, 2020, at an unknown location, the defendant, through a mobile phone-based transportation service application called "National 24-Hour Call," made a request to the victim G to deliver furniture while pretending to be a person who would normally pay the transportation fee.

However, in reality, the defendant, possessing no significant assets, was burdened with approximately 300 million won in debts, including financial institution loans, personal debts, and unpaid taxes. Moreover, the operations of the aforementioned 'C' had deteriorated, ultimately resulting in the closure of the business on or about April 1, 2020, placing the defendant in severe economic distress. Consequently, the defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to pay the transportation fee even if the victim delivered the furniture.

Ultimately, the defendant defrauded the victim and caused the victim to transport furniture and other goods on or about January 14, 2020, and thereafter failed to pay the transportation fee of 280,000 won to the victim, thereby obtaining property valued at that amount.



## Evidence Summary

**Case No. 2020고단3349**

1. In-court testimony of the defendant
2. Police statements of H, D, I, J, K, and L
3. Application dispatch records, tax invoices, text messages, and bank account transaction histories
4. Investigation reports

**Case No. 2020고단5501**

1. In-court testimony of the defendant
2. Police statement of G
3. Copies of tax invoices, message records, and dispatch records
4. Investigation report

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2006. 5. 10. 지방법원 특정경제범죄가중처벌등에관한법률위반(알선수재)죄 등으로 징역 2년, 2006. 11. 30. 같은 법원에서 같은 죄로 징역 6월을 각 선고받고 2009. 3. 29. 여자교도소에서 그 형의 집행을 종료하였고, 2016. 4. 22. 지방법원 자본시장과금융투자업에관한법률위반죄로 징역 6월에 집행유예 2년을 선고받아 2017. 1. 10. 그 판결이 확정된 사람이다.

[Criminal Acts]
1. 7,000만 원 편취 범행
가. 피고인은 2009. 10. 상호 불상의 카페에서 피해자 B에게 "내 사위가 될 사람인 C의 직원 D를 통하여 금융기관 내부의 인맥으로 진행하는 확실한 선물투자 건을 알고 있는데 일반사람들은 전혀 알지 못하는 고급정보이다. 우리에게 한 5,000만 원 정도 자금을 차용해 주면 수개월 내에 2배 이상의 수익을 낼 수 있다. 그렇게 발생한 수익 중 50%를 지급해 주겠다. 원금은 언제든 회수할 수 있다"고 거짓말하고, 2009. 10. 7.경 성남시 분당구 E에 있는 피해자가 운영하는 주식회사 F 사무실에서 위 D의 주민등록번호 및 직장명을 알려주고, 이행각서를 작성해 주면서 믿고 차용해 달라고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 위 D는 C의 직원이 아니었고, 피고인은 막연한 투자 계획만 갖고 있었을 뿐 금융기관 내부의 정보를 이용하여 높은 수익을 낼 수 있는 능력이 없었으므로 피해자에게 약속한 수익금을 지급할 의사나 능력이 없었으며, 당시 신용불량 상태에 있어 피해자에게 원금을 변제할 의사나 능력도 없었다.
그럼에도 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2009. 10. 7.경 위 D 명의 G은행 계좌(계좌번호 1 생략)로 5,000만 원을 이체받았다.
나. 계속하여 피고인은 2009. 11. 11.경 불상지에서 전화로 위 피해자에게 "사위와 잘 진행하고 있는데 자금이 조금만 더 있으면 더욱 확실한 수익을 낼 수 있을 것 같다. 2,000만 원을 같은 계좌로 더 입금해 주면 조만간 아주 좋은 일이 있을 것이다"라고 거짓말을 하였다. 그러나 사실 피고인은 피해자로부터 받은 5,000만 원을 선물투자에 사용하였으나 이미 투자금을 사실상 회수하기 어려운 상태였고, 피해자로부터 2,000만 원을 추가로 받더라도 피해자에게 수익금을 지급할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2009. 11. 11.경 위 G은행 계좌로 2,000만 원을 입금받았다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 기망하여 두 차례에 걸쳐 합계 7,000만 원을 교부받았다. 2. 100만 원 편취 범행
피고인은 2013. 11. 13.경 불상지에서 전화로 피해자에게 "확실한 부동산 투자건 완성을 위한 경비 100만 원을 오늘 빌려주면 내일 당장 갚을 것이고 곧이어 차용원금과 수익금도 지급할 것이나 빌려주지 않으면 차용원금의 자금도 어려워 질 수 있다"고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 피해자로부터 100만 원을 받더라도 이를 부동산 투자와 무관한 용도로 사용할 생각이었고, 위 돈을 받더라도 이미 피해자로부터 빌린 7,000만 원의 자금과는 무관하였으며, 당시 신용불량 상태에 있었으므로 위 돈을 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 같은 날 피고인 명의 H은행 계좌(계좌번호 2 생략)로 100만 원을 입금받았다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant received the following convictions:

- On May 10, 2006, at the District Court: imprisonment for 2 years for violation of the Act on Aggravated Punishment of Specific Economic Crimes (Bribery Solicitation) and related charges;

- On November 30, 2006, at the same District Court: imprisonment for 6 months for the same offense;

- The Defendant completed execution of the aforementioned sentences on March 29, 2009, at the Women's Correctional Institution;

- On April 22, 2016, at the District Court: imprisonment for 6 months with a suspended sentence of 2 years for violation of the Capital Markets and Financial Investment Business Act; this judgment became final on January 10, 2017.



## [Criminal Acts]

### 1. Fraud Resulting in Acquisition of 70 Million Won

#### A. Initial Fraudulent Scheme and First Embezzlement

The Defendant, in October 2009 at a café of unspecified name, represented falsely to Victim B as follows:

"I am acquainted through internal connections within a financial institution with a certain gift investment transaction that shall be facilitated through Employee D, employed by C, who is to become my son-in-law. This is premium information of which ordinary persons are entirely unaware. If you lend us approximately 50 million won in funds, we can generate profits exceeding double that amount within several months. I shall distribute to you 50 percent of the profits thereby generated. The principal can be recovered at any time."

On or about October 7, 2009, at the office of Company F (a corporation) operated by the Victim and located at E, Bundang-gu, Seongnam-si, the Defendant further represented falsely by: (1) disclosing the resident registration number and workplace name of the aforementioned Employee D; and (2) executing a deed of performance promising that the Victim should entrust and lend the funds in confidence.

**The truth, however, was as follows:**

Employee D was not in fact employed by C. The Defendant possessed only vague investment plans and lacked any capacity to generate high returns through utilization of confidential information within financial institutions. Consequently, the Defendant harbored neither the intent nor the ability to disburse to the Victim the profit payments promised. At that time, the Defendant was in a state of credit delinquency and thus harbored neither the intent nor the ability to repay the principal to the Victim.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Defendant deceived the Victim through the aforementioned false representations. The deceived Victim, on or about October 7, 2009, transferred 50 million won to a G Bank account (Account Number 1 – omitted) in the name of Employee D.

#### B. Subsequent Fraudulent Solicitation and Second Embezzlement

Subsequently, on or about November 11, 2009, the Defendant telephoned the aforesaid Victim at an unspecified location and represented falsely as follows:

"Matters are progressing well with my son-in-law, but if we had just a bit more capital, it appears we could generate even more certain profits. If you deposit an additional 20 million won to the same account, there shall very soon be excellent developments."

**The truth, however, was as follows:**

The Defendant had applied the 50 million won received from the Victim to gift investment, but the investment funds had already become substantially unrecoverable. Even had the Defendant received an additional 20 million won from the Victim, the Defendant harbored neither the intent nor the ability to disburse profit payments to the Victim.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Defendant deceived the Victim through the aforementioned false representations. The deceived Victim, on or about November 11, 2009, deposited 20 million won to the aforementioned G Bank account.

**Through the aforementioned fraudulent schemes executed on two occasions, the Defendant obtained receipt of a total of 70 million won from the Victim.**



### 2. Fraud Resulting in Acquisition of 1 Million Won

On or about November 13, 2013, the Defendant telephoned the Victim at an unspecified location and represented falsely as follows:

"If you lend me expenses of 1 million won today for the completion of a certain real property investment transaction, I shall repay it tomorrow immediately, and shall thereafter disburse both the borrowed principal and the profit payments; however, if you do not lend it, the capital for the borrowed principal may face difficulty."

**The truth, however, was as follows:**

Even had the Defendant received the 1 million won from the Victim, the Defendant intended to apply it to purposes wholly unrelated to real property investment. The receipt of such funds bore no relationship to the 70 million won previously borrowed from the Victim. At that time, the Defendant was in a state of credit delinquency and therefore harbored neither the intent nor the ability to repay such funds.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Defendant deceived the Victim through the aforementioned false representations. The deceived Victim, on that same date, deposited 1 million won to an H Bank account (Account Number 2 – omitted) in the Defendant's name.

facts_kr:
피고인은 B에서 ‘C'라는 상호의 회사를 운영하는 사람이다.
1. 피고인은 2018. 6. 23.경 D에 있는 피해자 E의 집에서, 피해자에게 "나는 건축과 인테리어 등 공사 관련 자격증도 있고, 공사 경험이 많은 사람이다. 내 손으로 직접 다 하기 때문에 누구보다 빠르고 저렴하게 공사할 수 있다. 공사대금 1억 7,000만 원을 주면 동구 F에 있는 피해자 소유의 ‘2층 주택'을 철거하고, 피해자의 아들의 대학교가 개강하기 전인 2018. 8.말경까지 3층 건물을 지어 주겠다. 우선 건물을 철거하고 설계하는데 필요한 비용 2,000만 원을 계약금 명목으로 달라."라고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 건축 관련하여 아무런 자격증이나 면허도 없었고, 피해자로부터 계약금을 받더라도, 피해자 소유의 주택을 3층 건물로 신축할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 같은 달 25.경 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2,000만 원을 계약금 명목으로 송금 받아 이를 편취하였다.
2. 피고인은 2018. 9. 초순경 피해자에게 "위 주택의 신축 허가가 나오지 않으니 리모델링 형식으로 건물을 짓는 게 좋겠다. 지금 사람을 불러서 공사를 이미 하고 있으니, 공사비용으로 3,000만 원을 달라."라고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 위 1항 기재와 같이 건축 관련 자격증과 면허도 없었고, 건축허가 관련하여 정식으로 건축설계사에게 의뢰한 바도 없었으며, 리모델링 공사를 진행하고 있지도 않았으므로, 피해자로부터 리모델링 명목으로 공사비용을 받더라도 건축허가를 받거나 리모델링 공사를 진행할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 같은 달 7.경 3,000만 원을 리모델링 비용 명목으로 송금 받아 이를 편취하였다.
3. 피고인은 2018. 11. 28.경 피해자에게 위 주택의 문짝을 떼고 미장을 한 사진을 보내주면서 "리모델링을 하더라도 집을 짱짱하게 복층으로 올리기 위해서는 철제 빔을 세워야 한다. 내일 빔이 들어오니 철제 빔 비용으로 5,000만 원을 주면 12월 25일까지 공사를 완료하겠다."라고 거짓말하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 위 1항 기재와 같이 건축 관련 면허나 자격증도 없었고, 피해자로부터 대금을 받더라도 약속대로 철제 빔 공사를 끝낼 의사 또는 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 같은 달 29. 5,000만 원을 철제빔 공사 비용 명목으로 송금 받아 이를 편취하였다.

facts_en:
**The Defendant operates a company called 'C' in B.**

**1. On or about June 23, 2018, at the residence of Victim E located in D, the Defendant made the following false statements to the Victim: "I am a person with qualifications and extensive experience in construction and interior design work. Because I personally handle everything with my own hands, I can complete construction work faster and more cheaply than anyone else. If you provide 170 million won in construction costs, I will demolish your two-story house located in F in the East District and construct a three-story building before the end of August 2018, before your son's university classes begin. First, please provide 20 million won as a contract deposit to cover the costs necessary for demolition and design."**

**However, in fact, the Defendant possessed no qualifications or licenses whatsoever related to construction. Even if the Defendant received the contract deposit from the Victim, the Defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to newly construct the Victim's house as a three-story building.**

**The Defendant deceived the Victim in the manner described above and, on or about the 25th of the same month, obtained a wire transfer of 20 million won from the Victim, who was deceived, under the pretext of a contract deposit, and thereby embezzled said funds.**

**2. On or about the beginning of September 2018, the Defendant made the following false statements to the Victim: "The new construction permit for the aforementioned house has not been issued, so it would be better to construct the building in the form of a remodeling project. Since I have already called workers and construction is already underway, please provide 30 million won as construction costs."**

**However, in fact, as described in paragraph 1 above, the Defendant possessed no qualifications or licenses related to construction. The Defendant had not formally retained an architectural designer regarding construction permits, and was not proceeding with any remodeling work. Therefore, even if the Defendant received remodeling costs from the Victim under the pretext of remodeling work, the Defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to obtain a construction permit or to proceed with remodeling construction.**

**The Defendant deceived the Victim in the manner described above and, on or about September 7, obtained a wire transfer of 30 million won from the Victim, who was deceived, under the pretext of remodeling costs, and thereby embezzled said funds.**

**3. On or about November 28, 2018, the Defendant sent the Victim photographs showing the door frame removed and plastering completed from the aforementioned house and made the following false statements: "To raise the house solidly as a multi-level structure even with remodeling, steel beams must be erected. Since the beams will arrive tomorrow, if you provide 50 million won as the cost for the steel beams, I will complete the construction by December 25."**

**However, in fact, as described in paragraph 1 above, the Defendant possessed neither licenses nor qualifications related to construction. Even if the Defendant received payment from the Victim, the Defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to complete the steel beam construction as promised.**

**The Defendant deceived the Victim in the manner described above and, on or about November 29, obtained a wire transfer of 50 million won from the Victim, who was deceived, under the pretext of steel beam construction costs, and thereby embezzled said funds.**

facts_kr:
전화금융사기 조직은 일반적으로 외국 등에서 국내에 있는 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 무작위로 전화를 걸어 정부기관이나 금융기관 등을 사칭하는 등의 방법으로 피해자들을 기망하고 이에 속은 피해자들로 하여금 자신들이 관리하는 계좌로 돈을 이체 또는 무통장 입금하도록 하거나 피해자들로부터 현금을 교부받아 이를 편취하는 속칭 ‘보이스피싱' 수법으로 범행을 하는 조직으로서, 범행 전체를 총괄하며 내부 각 점 조직 간의 유기적인 연락을 담당하는 ‘총책', 총책의 지시를 받아 내부 조직원들을 관리하며 그들에게 기망 수법과 현금수거 방법 등을 교육․지시하는 ‘관리책', 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 전화를 걸어 정부기관 등을 사칭한 거짓말을 하여 피해자들을 기망하는 ‘콜센터', 계좌에 입금된 피해금을 인출하여 전달하거나 피해자들을 직접 만나 돈을 받아오는 ‘현금인출책' 또는 ‘현금수거책' 등으로 각각 역할을 분담하는 등 철저하게 점조직 형태로 운영되고 있고, 피고인은 성명불상 전화금융사기 조직원의 제안을 받고 피해자를 직접 만나 피해금을 수금하여 송금하는 현금수거책 역할을 담당하기로 하는 등 성명불상 전화금융사기 조직원들과 전화금융사기 범행을 하기로 순차 공모하였다.
성명불상자는 2021. 3. 9. 09:30경 불상의 장소에서 B은행 직원을 사칭하면서 피해자 C에게 전화하여 ‘소상공인 특별대출금리 2.7%로 2,200만 원까지 대출이 가능하다.'는 취지로 말을 하여 피해자로 하여금 성명불상자가 보낸 대출신청서 양식을 작성하도록 하고, 피해자에게 ‘D과 E에 대출금이 묶여 있다. 현재 대출약관 위반으로 지급정지가 되었으니 D 대출금을 상환해야 한다.'는 취지의 말을 하여 피해자로부터 2차례에 걸쳐 돈을 교부받은 다음, 2021. 3. 16.경 피해자에게 다시 전화하여 ‘피해자의 신용도가 떨어져서 처음 약속한 2,200만 원과 추가로 상환한 1,200만 원 총 3,700만 원을 2.3%의 금리로 대출을 해주겠다. 대출을 진행하기 위해서는 보증보험에 가입하여야 하니 1,850만 원을 납부해 달라. 납부한 돈은 나중에 돌려주겠다.'는 취지로 거짓말을 하여 이에 속은 피해자로 하여금 현금 1,850만 원을 준비하게 하였다.
계속하여 피고인은 성명불상자의 지시에 따라 2020. 3. 16. 11:57경 F에 있는 ‘G' 앞길에서 피해자를 만나 마치 금융감독원 직원인 것처럼 행세하면서 피해자로부터 현금 1,850만 원을 교부받았다.
이로써 피고인은 성명불상자와 공모하여 피해자를 기망하여 1,850만 원을 교부받았다.

facts_en:
**I. Overview of Voice Phishing Organization Structure**

Voice phishing criminal organizations, commonly operating from abroad, generally perpetrate so-called "voice phishing" fraud by randomly calling an unspecified number of victims within South Korea, impersonating government agencies or financial institutions to deceive them, and then inducing the deceived victims to transfer or deposit money into accounts controlled by the organization members, or receiving cash directly from victims and unlawfully obtaining such funds. Such organizations are operated in a strictly hierarchical cell structure with clearly differentiated roles:

- The "**mastermind**" ("총책"), who oversees the entire criminal operation and manages organic communication and coordination between internal cell units;
- The "**manager**" ("관리책"), who receives instructions from the mastermind, manages internal organization members, and instructs and educates them on deception methods and cash collection procedures;
- The "**call center operation**" ("콜센터"), comprising individuals who make calls to an unspecified number of victims and perpetrate fraud through false impersonation of government agencies and similar entities;
- The "**cash withdrawal operator**" or "**cash collection operator**" ("현금인출책" or "현금수거책"), who withdraws victim funds deposited into accounts and transmits them, or directly meets with victims to collect money.

The Defendant, having received a proposal from an unknown member of a voice phishing criminal organization, agreed sequentially with said unidentified organization members to engage in voice phishing fraud, specifically undertaking the role of a cash collection operator responsible for directly meeting victims, collecting defrauded funds, and remitting them.



**II. Specific Acts of Fraud**

**A. Initial Contact and Fraudulent Loan Solicitation (March 9, 2021)**

On March 9, 2021, at approximately 09:30, at an unidentified location, Person Unknown, while impersonating an employee of B Bank, called Victim C and made the following fraudulent representations: "A special small business loan is available at an interest rate of 2.7%, with a maximum loan amount of 22,000,000 Korean won."

In furtherance of this deception, Person Unknown induced Victim C to complete a loan application form sent by the perpetrator. Subsequently, Person Unknown further deceived Victim C by stating: "Loans are currently bound to loans designated D and E. Due to a violation of the current loan terms, payment has been suspended. You must repay the D loan."

Based on these false representations, Victim C transferred money to the perpetrators on two separate occasions.

**B. Secondary Fraudulent Solicitation (March 16, 2021)**

On March 16, 2021, Person Unknown again called Victim C and made the following fraudulent statements: "Your credit score has declined. I will extend to you a total loan of 37,000,000 Korean won—comprising the originally promised 22,000,000 Korean won and the additionally repaid 12,000,000 Korean won—at an interest rate of 2.3%. To proceed with the loan, you must enroll in a guarantor insurance policy and pay 18,500,000 Korean won. The money you pay will be returned to you at a later date."

Based on these false representations, Victim C was deceived and prepared cash in the amount of 18,500,000 Korean won.

**C. Cash Collection by Defendant (March 16, 2021)** [*Note: Apparent discrepancy in the document date; the record states "2020. 3. 16." but context indicates 2021*]

Following the instructions of Person Unknown, the Defendant, on March 16, 2021 [*document notation: "2020. 3. 16."*], at approximately 11:57, at a street in front of location "G" at location F, met with Victim C in person. The Defendant, while posing as an employee of the Financial Supervisory Service (금융감독원), received cash in the amount of 18,500,000 Korean won from Victim C.

**D. Summary of Conspiracy and Fraud**

Through this scheme, the Defendant, in conspiracy with Person Unknown, defrauded Victim C and unlawfully obtained 18,500,000 Korean won.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2018. 7.경 지방에서 만나 알게 된 피해자 B이 자신에게 호감을 갖고 있는 것을 알게 된 후 이를 이용하여 마치 피해자와 결혼을 할 것처럼 행세하며 피해자의 금원 등을 편취하기로 마음먹었다.
1. 차용금 명목 사기
피고인은 2018. 7. 25.경 불상의 장소에서 피해자에게 전화로 "유흥업소에 빚이 10,000,000원이 있는데 돈을 빌려주면 일을 해서 꼭 갚겠고, 사창가에서 나와 피해자와 함께 살겠다."라고 거짓말 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 당시 특별한 재산이나 고정적인 수입이 없어 피해자로부터 위 금원을 빌리더라도 이를 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었고, 피해자로부터 받은 금원 중 상당 부분을 당시 피해자 몰래 교제하고 있던 남자 친구에게 사업비 명목으로 대여해 줄 생각이었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 그 무렵 차용금 명목으로 피고인이 실질적으로 사용하고 있던 C 명의의 계좌(번호 불상)로 10,000,000원을 송금받은 것을 비롯하여 그때부터 2018. 10. 12.까지 사이에 별지 1 범죄일람표 기재와 같이 총 5회에 걸쳐 합계 38,838,000원을 송금받아 이를 편취하였다.
2. 신용카드 이용대금 등 사기
피고인은 2018. 8.경 피해자로부터 생필품 구매 목적으로 피해자 명의의 신용카드를 교부받아 사용하던 중, 2018. 9.경 피해자에게 "내가 가지고 있는 피해자 명의의 신용카드로 대출을 받는 것을 허락해 달라. 대출금은 내가 변제하겠고 연체되지 않도록 하겠다."라고 거짓말하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 당시 특별한 재산이나 고정적인 수입이 없었으므로 피해자 명의의 신용카드로 대출받더라도 위 대출금을 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 2018. 8. 18.경 피해자 명의의 D를 이용하여 카드론 대출 2,500,000원을 받은 것을 비롯하여 그 무렵부터 2018. 10. 12. 경까지 사이에 별지 2 범죄일람표 기재와 같이 총 8회에 걸쳐 합계 10,950,000원 상당을 피해자로 하여금 대납하게 함으로써 같은 금액 상당의 재산상 이익을 편취하였다.
증거의 요지 1. 피고인의 법정진술
1. 피고인에 대한 검찰 피의자신문조서 중 B의 진술 기재 부분
1. B에 대한 검찰 진술조서
1. 고소장
1. E은행 내역, D 개인 총괄내역, 휴대폰 청구내역, 개인신용정보조회 수사협조요청에 의한 회신, 카드결제내역
1. 메신저 대화 캡처 자료

facts_en:
The defendant became acquainted with Victim B in a certain district around July 2018. Upon learning that Victim B harbored favorable feelings toward him, the defendant exploited this fact by pretending as if he would marry the victim, and resolved to defraud the victim of monetary funds and other property.

### 1. Fraud by Means of Loan Pretext

Around July 25, 2018, at an unspecified location, the defendant called the victim and falsely stated: "I have a debt of 10,000,000 won at an entertainment establishment. If you lend me the money, I will work and repay it for certain, and I will leave the sex trade and live together with you."

However, in truth, the defendant possessed no special property or stable income at that time, and harbored neither the intent nor the ability to repay the victim even if he borrowed the said amount from her. Moreover, the defendant intended to lend a substantial portion of the funds received from the victim to his male acquaintance—with whom he was conducting a romantic relationship unknown to the victim—under the pretext of business capital.

By deceiving the victim in the foregoing manner, the defendant induced the deceived victim to remit 10,000,000 won around that time to an account in the name of Person C (account number unknown)—which account the defendant was actually utilizing—under the pretext of a loan. Thereafter, between that point and October 12, 2018, the defendant received remittances on a total of five occasions totaling 38,838,000 won, as set forth in Attachment 1 (Schedule of Crimes), thereby embezzling said amount.

### 2. Fraud by Means of Credit Card Usage Charges and Related Schemes

Around August 2018, the defendant received and used a credit card in the name of Victim B for the purpose of purchasing daily necessities. Around September 2018, the defendant falsely told the victim: "Please permit me to obtain a loan using the victim's credit card that I am holding. I will repay the loan amount myself, and I will ensure that there are no delinquencies."

However, in truth, the defendant possessed no special property or stable income at that time, and therefore harbored neither the intent nor the ability to repay any loan obtained under the victim's name, even if such a loan were secured.

By deceiving the victim in the foregoing manner, the defendant—around August 18, 2018—obtained a card loan of 2,500,000 won by utilizing Card D in the victim's name. Thereafter, between around that time and October 12, 2018, on a total of eight occasions, as set forth in Attachment 2 (Schedule of Crimes), the defendant caused the victim to pay a total amount equivalent to 10,950,000 won, thereby embezzling property to the same amount.



## Summary of Evidence

1. The defendant's testimony given before the court
2. The prosecutor's record of questioning the defendant as a suspect—the portion containing the statement of Victim B
3. The prosecutor's statement record of Victim B
4. The written complaint
5. Transaction records from Bank E; comprehensive individual account statement of Card D; mobile phone billing records; response to a request for investigative cooperation regarding individual credit information inquiry; card settlement records
6. Captured messenger conversation materials

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2021. 1. 29. 지방법원에서 사기죄 등으로 징역 2년 6월을 선고받고 2021. 5. 21. 그 판결이 확정되었다.

[Criminal Acts]
전화금융사기 조직은 일반적으로 외국 등에서 국내에 있는 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 무작위로 전화를 걸어 정부기관이나 금융기관 등을 사칭하는 등의 방법으로 피해자들을 기망하고 이에 속은 피해자들로 하여금 자신들이 관리하는 계좌로 금원을 이체 또는 무통장 입금하도록 하거나 피해자들로부터 금원을 교부받아 이를 편취하는 속칭 ‘보이스피싱' 수법으로 범행을 하는 조직으로서, 범행 전체를 총괄하며 내부 각 점조직 간의 유기적인 연락을 담당하는 ‘총책', 총책의 지시를 받아 내부 조직원들을 관리하며 그들에게 기망 수법과 현금수거 방법 등을 교육·지시하는 ‘관리책', 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 전화를 걸어 정부기관 등을 사칭한 거짓말을 하여 피해자들을 기망하는 ‘콜센터', 계좌에 입금된 피해금을 인출하여 전달하거나 피해자들을 직접 만나 돈을 받아오는 ‘현금인출책·현금수거책' 등으로 각각 역할을 분담하는 등 철저하게 점조직 형태로 운영되고 있다.
피고인 A는 2020.10. 하순경 ‘B'을 통하여 알게 된 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원(일명 ‘C')으로부터 ‘빚을 진 사람들로부터 현금을 수거하는 일을 하면 건당 100,000원을 주겠다.'는 취지의 제안을 받고, 거액의 대출금을 회수하는 직원의 선발작업이 신원조회나 대면 접촉 없이 이루어지고, 근로 계약서도 작성하지 않았으며, 그 대가도 하는 일에 비해 지나치게 고액이었으므로 정상적인 대출금 회수작업이 아닌 보이스피싱 범죄라는 사실을 알게 되었음에도, 생활비 등을 벌기 위하여 그 제안을 승낙하여, 현금전달책 및 현금수거책 역할을 담당하기로 위 성명불상자들과 순차 공모하였다.
성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원은 2020. 11. 3.경 불상의 장소에서 D은행 E 직원을 사칭하며 피해자 F에게 전화하여 "저금리로 대출을 해줄 수 있는데, 앱을 설치 후 대출 신청을 해라."라고 거짓말하였고, 다른 성명불상의 전화금융사기 조직원은 2020. 11. 5. 불상의 장소에서 G회사 H 과장을 사칭하며 피해자에게 전화하여 "기존 대출이 있는 상태에서 새로운 대출을 받으면 금융법 위반이다. 직원을 보낼테니 기존 대출금 940만원을 전액현금으로 상환하면 금융위원회에 신고하지 않겠다."라고 거짓말하였다.
그러나 사실 성명불상자들은 금융기관 직원이 아니었고, 피해자로부터 대출 등의 명목으로 금원을 편취하려 했을 뿐 피해자에게 대출해 줄 의사나 능력이 전혀 없었다.
성명불상자들은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하고, 피고인은 성명불상자들의 지시에 따라 2020. 11. 5. 11:54경 I 앞길에서 성명불상자의 지시를 받고 피해자를 만나 금융기관 직원인 것처럼 재차 기망하여 피해자로부터 기존 대출금 상환 명목으로 현금 9,400,000원을 교부받았다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced to imprisonment for two years and six months on January 29, 2021, by the District Court for fraud and other offenses. The judgment became final on May 21, 2021.



## [Criminal Acts]

### Organization Structure and Modus Operandi

Telephone financial fraud organizations typically operate as follows: originating from abroad or other locations, they randomly place calls to unspecified victims within the Republic of Korea, impersonating government agencies or financial institutions, thereby deceiving victims. The deceived victims are induced to transfer funds to accounts controlled by the organization members or to make deposits via bank transfers without passbooks, or funds are directly obtained from victims. This scheme, commonly known as "voice phishing," is organized by an organizational cell structure with clearly delineated roles:

- **"Chief Mastermind" (총책):** Oversees the entire criminal enterprise and maintains organic coordination between internal cell organizations;
- **"Manager" (관리책):** Receives instructions from the Chief Mastermind, manages internal organization members, and provides education and instructions regarding deception methodology and cash collection methods;
- **"Call Center" (콜센터):** Places calls to unspecified victims, impersonates government agencies through false statements, and deceives victims;
- **"Cash Withdrawal Operator" and "Cash Collection Operator" (현금인출책·현금수거책):** Withdraw victim funds deposited in accounts and deliver them, or directly meet with victims to collect cash.

The organization operates with thorough compartmentalization and role specialization.

### Defendant A's Participation and Actions

Defendant A, in late October 2020, became acquainted through a person named "B" with an unnamed member of a telephone financial fraud organization (alias "C"). Defendant A received a proposal stating, in substance: "If you collect cash from people in debt, I will pay you 100,000 won per transaction."

Defendant A observed that: (1) the recruitment process for employees to collect large loan amounts was conducted without identity verification or in-person contact; (2) no employment contract was executed; and (3) the compensation was excessively high relative to the purported work. Despite acquiring knowledge that this was not legitimate debt collection work but rather a voice phishing crime, Defendant A accepted the proposal in order to earn living expenses. Defendant A then sequentially conspired with unnamed individuals to assume the roles of cash transfer operator and cash collection operator.

### Fraudulent Scheme Against Victims

An unnamed member of the telephone financial fraud organization, around November 3, 2020, at an unspecified location, impersonated an employee "E" of "D Bank" and telephoned Victim F, falsely stating: "We can provide you a low-interest loan. Install the app and apply for the loan."

Separately, another unnamed member of the telephone financial fraud organization, on November 5, 2020, at an unspecified location, impersonated Manager "H" of Company "G" and telephoned a victim, falsely stating: "If you obtain a new loan while having an existing loan, this violates financial law. I am sending a representative. If you repay the entire existing loan of 9,400,000 won in cash, we will not report you to the Financial Services Commission."

In reality, the unnamed individuals were not financial institution employees. They harbored no genuine intention or capacity to provide loans to the victims; rather, they sought only to misappropriate funds under the pretext of loans.

### Criminal Execution

Through the aforementioned deceptions, the unnamed organization members induced the victim to part with funds. Following the instructions of the unnamed organization members, Defendant A, around 11:54 on November 5, 2020, at a location in front of "I," met the victim and committed a further deception by impersonating a financial institution employee. Defendant A thereby obtained cash in the amount of 9,400,000 won from the victim under the pretense of repayment of an existing loan.

1. 흰다리새우 납품 사기
피고인은 2017. 10. 15. 14:00경 B에 있는 C사무실에서, 수산물 도매업자인 피해자 D에게 "흰다리새우 30kg을 외상으로 납품해주면 월말에 카드대금이 들어온 직후 물품 대금을 지급하겠다."는 취지로 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 당시 경제적 상황이 좋지 않아 기존에 납품받은 수산물의 대금과 차용금을 변제하지 못한 상태이어서 카드대금을 지급받게 되더라도 이를 기존 채무 변제에 사용할 생각이었고, 특별한 재산이나 일정한 수입이 없어 피해자로부터 흰다리새우를 납품받더라도 그 대금을 지불할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 불구하고 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 같은 날 시가 690,000원 상당의 흰다리새우 30kg을 납품받은 것을 비롯하여 그 무렵부터 같은 해 11. 5.경까지 별지 범죄일람표 기재와 같이 총 10회에 걸쳐 시가 6,245,000원 상당의 흰다리새우 325kg을 납품받아 편취하였다.
2. 차용금 명목 사기
가. 2017. 10. 15.자 범행
피고인은 위 1항 기재 일시, 장소에서, 위 피해자에게 "지인에게 빌린 100만 원을 변제해야하는데 이를 빌려주면 월말에 카드대금을 받아 바로 변제하겠다."는 취지로 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 당시 경제적 상황이 좋지 않아 기존에 납품받은 수산물 대금과 차용금을 변제하지 못한 상태이어서 피해자로부터 위 돈을 교부받은 다음 수산물 미수금 변제에 사용할 생각이었고, 카드대금을 지급받게 되더라도 이를 기존 채무 변제에 사용할 생각이었으며 특별한 재산이나 일정한 수입이 없어 피해자로부터 금원을 차용하더라도 이를 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 불구하고 피고인은 이에 속은 피해자로부터 같은 날 차용금 명목으로 E 명의의 F조합 계좌로 1,000,000원을 송금받아 편취하였다.
나. 2017. 10. 21.자 범행
피고인은 2017. 10. 21.경 위 1항 기재 장소에서, 피해자에게 "수산물 납품대금 350만 원을 지급해야 하는데 이를 빌려주면 월말에 카드대금 700만 원 상당을 입금받아 기존 차용금과 한꺼번에 변제하겠다."는 취지로 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 당시 경제적 상황이 좋지 않아 기존에 납품받은 수산물 대금과 차용금을 변제하지 못한 상태이어서 피해자로부터 위 돈을 교부받은 다음 수산물 미수금 변제에 사용할 생각이었고, 카드대금을 지급받게 되더라도 이를 기존 채무 변제에 사용할 생각이었으며 특별한 재산이나 일정한 수입이 없어 피해자로부터 금원을 차용하더라도 이를 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 불구하고 피고인은 이에 속은 피해자로부터 같은 날 차용금 명목으로 G 명의의 F조합 계좌로 3,500,000원을 송금받아 편취하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Fraud in the Supply of Whiteleg Shrimp

On October 15, 2017, at approximately 14:00, at Office C located in B, the Defendant made a false statement to Victim D, a wholesale seafood dealer, to the effect that: "If you supply 30 kilograms of whiteleg shrimp on credit, I will pay the goods price immediately after receiving my card payment at the end of the month."

However, in reality, the Defendant was in poor financial circumstances at that time and had failed to pay for previously supplied seafood and borrowed funds. Accordingly, even if the Defendant were to receive card payment, he intended to use it to repay existing debts. Furthermore, the Defendant possessed no special property or stable income, and therefore had neither the intention nor the ability to pay the price for whiteleg shrimp even if supplied by the Victim.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Defendant deceived the Victim in the manner described above. The deceived Victim supplied whiteleg shrimp on the same day, and the Defendant fraudulently obtained a total of 325 kilograms of whiteleg shrimp valued at 6,245,000 won through ten separate transactions from on or about that date until approximately November 5, 2017, including the initial supply of 30 kilograms valued at 690,000 won on the same day, as detailed in the attached Schedule of Crimes.

## 2. Fraud in the Form of Borrowed Funds

### A. Criminal Act on October 15, 2017

On the date and at the location specified in Section 1 above, the Defendant made a false statement to the Victim to the effect that: "I must repay 1,000,000 won that I borrowed from an acquaintance. If you lend me this amount, I will repay it immediately after receiving my card payment at the end of the month."

However, in reality, the Defendant was in poor financial circumstances at that time and had failed to pay for previously supplied seafood and borrowed funds. Accordingly, upon receipt of funds from the Victim, the Defendant intended to use them to repay outstanding seafood receivables. Additionally, even if the Defendant were to receive card payment, he intended to use it to repay existing debts. Furthermore, the Defendant possessed no special property or stable income, and therefore had neither the intention nor the ability to repay borrowed funds even if obtained from the Victim.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Defendant deceived the Victim and fraudulently obtained 1,000,000 won by receiving a wire transfer to an F Cooperative account in the name of E on the same day under the pretext of borrowing funds.

### B. Criminal Act on October 21, 2017

On or about October 21, 2017, at the location specified in Section 1 above, the Defendant made a false statement to the Victim to the effect that: "I must pay 3,500,000 won for seafood supply price. If you lend me this amount, I will receive approximately 7,000,000 won in card payment at the end of the month and will repay both the existing borrowed funds and this amount all at once."

However, in reality, the Defendant was in poor financial circumstances at that time and had failed to pay for previously supplied seafood and borrowed funds. Accordingly, upon receipt of funds from the Victim, the Defendant intended to use them to repay outstanding seafood receivables. Additionally, even if the Defendant were to receive card payment, he intended to use it to repay existing debts. Furthermore, the Defendant possessed no special property or stable income, and therefore had neither the intention nor the ability to repay borrowed funds even if obtained from the Victim.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Defendant deceived the Victim and fraudulently obtained 3,500,000 won by receiving a wire transfer to an F Cooperative account in the name of G on the same day under the pretext of borrowing funds.

[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2019. 5. 30. 지방법원에서 사기죄 등으로 징역 1년 6월을 선고받고, 2020. 9. 10. 북부제2교도소에서 그 형의 집행을 종료하였고, 2021. 9. 8. 지방법원에서 사기죄 등으로 징역 3년을 선고받고 2021. 9. 8. 그 판결이 확정되었다.

[Criminal Acts]
공모관계
전화금융사기 조직은 외국 또는 기타 국내 수사기관의 추적이 어려운 지역에서 인터넷 전화 등을 이용하여 대한민국에 있는 불특정 다수의 피해자들을 상대로 수사기관이나 금융감독원 사칭, 대출 빙자, 가족 납치, 개인정보 유출 등의 내용으로 피해자들을 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자들로 하여금 자신들이 관리하는 계좌로 금원을 이체 또는 무통장 입금하도록 하거나 피해자들로부터 금원을 교부받아 이를 편취하는 속칭 ‘보이스피싱' 수법으로 범행을 하는 조직으로서, 범행 전체를 총괄하며 내부 각 점조직 간의 유기적인 연락을 담당하는 ‘총책', 총책의 지시를 받아 내부 조직원들을 관리하며 그들에게 기망 수법과 현금수거 방법 등을 교육·지시하는 ‘관리책', 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 전화를 걸어 정부기관 등을 사칭한 거짓말을 하여 피해자들을 기망하는 ‘유인책·콜센터', 계좌에 입금된 피해금을 인출하여 전달하거나 피해자들을 직접 만나 돈을 받아오는 ‘현금인출책·현금수거책', 범행에 사용할 대포통장이나 조직원 등을 모집하는 ‘모집책' 등으로 각각 분담된 역할을 수행하면서 검거에 대비하여 철저한 점조직 형태로 운영되고 있다.
피고인은 2021. 1.경 성명불상자의 제안을 받고 피해자로부터 현금을 수거하여 회수금액의 1%를 받기로 하고, 성명불상자가 지정하는 계좌로 제3자의 명의를 이용해 무통장 입금하여 전달하는 현금수거책 역할을 담당하기로 하는 등 성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원들과 전화금융사기 범행을 하기로 순차 공모하였다.

[Criminal Acts]
성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원들은 2021. 3. 22.경 불상의 장소에서 전화로 피해자 B에게 C은행 직원을 사칭하면서 "기존 대출금 1,296만 원을 갚으면 저금리로 4,200만 원을 대출해주겠다"라는 취지로 거짓말을 하고, 다음 날 D 직원을 사칭하면서 "대출법을 위반하였다. 이 문제를 해결하려면 현금으로 기존 대출금액을 변제해야 한다."는 취지로 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 위 성명불상자는 C은행 등 금융기관의 직원이 아니었고 피해자에게 대출을 해줄 의사나 능력이 없었다.
성명불상자는 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하고, 피고인은 2021. 3. 23. 17:00경 E 앞에서, ‘○○은행 과장님 소개로 온 ○○○입니다.'라고 불상의 가명을 사용하여 피해자를 재차 기망하여 피해자로부터 현금 1,296만 원을 건네받고, 성명불상자가 지정하는 계좌로 100만 원씩 나누어 무통장입금하였다.
이로써 피고인은 성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원과 공모하여 피해자를 기망하고, 1,296만 원을 편취하였다.
