facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The defendant was sentenced by the District Court on 2016.4.8. to four months' imprisonment for fraud, three months' imprisonment, and three months' imprisonment respectively. The execution of the final sentence was completed at the correctional institution on 2016.5.13.

## [Criminal Acts]

### Case No. 2019고단6229

On 2018.3.29., at the office of 'C' located in B and operated by the defendant, the defendant made false statements to victim D to the effect that: "I have previously operated one of the five largest money-lending businesses in our country, and I am currently engaged in large-scale lending operations while working with major financial players. If you invest money with me, I will provide monthly interest at the rate of 3 bu per annum, and regarding the principal, if you give me notice approximately one month in advance when needed, I will repay it."

However, the truth was that the defendant had not registered as a money-lender, was not operating a lending business, possessed no substantial assets, was in a state of credit delinquency, and had already accumulated excessive debt. Accordingly, even if the defendant borrowed money from the victim, he had neither the intent nor the ability to use such funds as loan capital for lending operations, to provide the victim with high-rate interest as profit, or to immediately repay the funds upon the victim's demand.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the defendant deceived the victim in the manner described above, and, deceived thereby, received from the victim a total of 40,000,000 won in cash, including 20,000,000 won on 2018.3.30. and 20,000,000 won on 2018.6.21. Furthermore, from that time until 2018.10.11., the defendant deceived victims D, E, and F in the same manner as set forth in Schedule 1 (Crime List attached hereto) and received a total of 290,000,000 won.

### Case No. 2019고단6285

The defendant established an office under the trade name 'G' on the third floor of B, employed E, engaged in money-lending operations while conducting himself as if generating substantial profits, and thereby obtained E's trust by borrowing funds from E and providing high-rate interest payments. The defendant devised a scheme to obtain funds by deception by having E introduce him to E's acquaintances.

Around 2018.6.15., at the aforementioned office, the defendant made false statements to victim H, who had been introduced to him by E, to the effect that: "I am engaged in money-lending operations and am earning substantial sums of money. If you lend me 30,000,000 won, I will pay monthly interest at the rate of 3 bu per annum, and I will repay the principal after one year."

However, the truth was that the defendant had not registered as a money-lender, was not operating a lending business, possessed no substantial assets, and had no regular income. Accordingly, even if the defendant borrowed funds from the victim, he had neither the intent nor the ability to provide interest payments or to repay the principal as promised.

The defendant, deceived thereby, received 30,000,000 won in cash from the victim on the same day under the pretext of a loan, and, from approximately that time until around 2018.10.10., received a total of 90,800,000 won from the victim on four separate occasions, as set forth in Schedule 2 (Crime List attached hereto).

By these acts, the defendant deceived the victim and obtained property by deception.

facts_kr:
1. 2018. 6. 14.경 범행
피고인은 2018. 5. 초순경 커피숍에서 피해자 B에게 "내가 탈세혐의로 수사를 받고 있는데, 세금을 내지 않으면 구속될 수 있으니 3,500만 원을 빌려 달라. 매달 돈이 생기는 대로 월 100 ∼ 150만 원씩 원금과 이자 명목으로 변제해서 3년 안에 갚겠다."라고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실은 피고인은 탈세 혐의로 수사를 받은 적이 없었고 피해자로부터 받는 돈은 피고인의 신용카드대금 결제 등에 사용할 생각이었으며, 이미 카드대금 연체 등으로 1,600만 원 상당의 채무가 있는 등 피해자에게 약속한 대로 원금과 이자를 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2018. 6. 14. 인근 도로변에 있는 피해자의 차량 안에서 현금 3,500만 원을 교부받았다.
2. 2019. 1. 17.경 범행
피고인은 2019. 1.경 C에 있는 위 피해자의 주거지에서 피해자에게 "트럭운전을 하는데 기름 값이 없으니 500만 원을 빌려 달라."라고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실은 피고인은 위 1항 기재와 같이 카드대금 연체로 인한 채무가 있었을 뿐만 아니라 피해자로부터 받는 돈을 기름 값이 아닌 카드대금 결제 등으로 사용할 생각이었고, 피해자에게 차용금을 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2019. 1. 17. 피고인의 부 D 명의의 은행 계좌로 500만 원을 송금받았다.
3. 2019. 5. 23.경 범행
피고인은 2019. 5.경 C에 있는 위 피해자의 주거지에서 피해자에게 "화물업체에 보증금으로 3,000만 원을 내야 하는데, 2019. 12. 말경 돌려받을 수 있다. 3,000만 원을 빌려주면 2019. 12. 말경 전에 빌린 기름 값 500만 원을 더하여 3,500만 원을 한꺼번에 갚겠다."라고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실은 피고인은 위 1항 기재와 같이 카드대금 연체로 인한 채무가 있었을 뿐만 아니라 피해자로부터 받는 돈을 화물업체 보증금이 아닌 PC방 보증금, 카드대금 결제 등으로 사용할 생각이었고 피해자에게 차용금을 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2019. 5. 23. 피고인의 부 D 명의의 은행 계좌로 3,000만 원을 송금받았다.

facts_en:
### 1. Criminal Conduct Around June 14, 2018

The defendant made false statements to Victim B at a coffee shop around early May 2018, saying: "I am under investigation for tax evasion, and if I do not pay taxes, I could face detention. Please lend me 35 million won. As money comes in each month, I will repay the principal and interest at 1 to 1.5 million won per month and pay back the entire amount within three years."

However, in fact, the defendant had never been under investigation for tax evasion. The defendant intended to use the money received from the victim for payment of the defendant's credit card bills, and the defendant already had outstanding debts of approximately 16 million won due to credit card payment defaults and similar obligations. The defendant had neither the intention nor the ability to repay the principal and interest to the victim as promised.

By deceiving the victim in the manner described above, the defendant obtained 35 million won in cash from the victim on June 14, 2018, inside the victim's vehicle parked on a roadside in the vicinity.

### 2. Criminal Conduct Around January 17, 2019

The defendant made false statements to the victim at the victim's residence in location C around January 2019, saying: "I drive a truck, but I have no money for fuel. Please lend me 5 million won."

However, in fact, as described in paragraph 1 above, the defendant had outstanding debts due to credit card payment defaults. Moreover, the defendant intended to use the money received from the victim not for fuel expenses but for credit card bill payments and similar purposes. The defendant had neither the intention nor the ability to repay the borrowed funds to the victim.

By deceiving the victim in the manner described above, the defendant obtained 5 million won from the victim through a wire transfer to a bank account in the name of the defendant's father, Person D, on January 17, 2019.

### 3. Criminal Conduct Around May 23, 2019

The defendant made false statements to the victim at the victim's residence in location C around May 2019, saying: "I need to deposit 30 million won as a security deposit with a freight company, and I will be able to recover it around the end of December 2019. If you lend me 30 million won, I will repay the 5 million won I borrowed for fuel expenses by the end of December 2019 and pay the total of 35 million won in a lump sum."

However, in fact, as described in paragraph 1 above, the defendant had outstanding debts due to credit card payment defaults. Moreover, the defendant intended to use the money received from the victim not as a security deposit for a freight company but for a security deposit for a PC bangs (internet cafes), credit card bill payments, and similar purposes. The defendant had neither the intention nor the ability to repay the borrowed funds to the victim.

By deceiving the victim in the manner described above, the defendant obtained 30 million won from the victim through a wire transfer to a bank account in the name of the defendant's father, Person D, on May 23, 2019.

facts_kr:
피고인은 외국 국적의 외국인이다.
전기통신금융사기(속칭 ‘보이스피싱') 범죄조직은 총책, 유인책, 수거책 등 여러 단계의 점조직을 구성하여, 총책은 조직원들을 관리하고 피해자들로부터 편취한 금원을 배분하는 등 보이스피싱 조직을 총괄적으로 관리·운영하고, 유인책들은 국내의 불특정 다수의 사람들에게 무작위로 전화를 하여 피해자들의 가족을 사칭하여 납치되는 등 위기에 빠진 것처럼 피해자들을 기망한 다음 현금을 인출하여 일정 장소에 대기하게 하고, 피고인은 2021. 4. 1.경부터 성명불상 조직원의 지시에 따라 피해금을 인출하여 약속된 장소에 대기중인 피해자들로부터 피해금을 교부받아 다른 조직원에게 전달하는 ‘수거책'으로서 각자 역할을 분담하여 불특정 피해자들을 상대로 보이스피싱 범행을 하기로 순차적으로 공모하였다.
1. 사기
성명불상의 조직원은 2021. 4. 2. 21:00경 불상의 장소에서 전화로 피해자 B에게 피해자의 딸을 사칭하여 "엄마, 나 성폭행 당했어, 나 못 살거 같아, 나 죽어버릴 거야."라고 말을 한 후, 계속하여 다른 조직원이 피해자의 딸을 납치한 것처럼 "시키는 대로 하지 않으면 아이를 찔러 버린다. 아무에게도 연락하지 말고 전화도 끊지 말고 돈을 마련해서 보내주는 사람에게 건네주어라."라고 거짓말을 하여 이에 속은 피해자로 하여금 현금 500만 원을 가지고 역 5번 출구 앞길에서 대기하게 하고, 피고인은 성명불상 조직원의 지시에 따라 같은 날 22:00경 위 역 5번 출구 앞길에서 대기 중인 피해자로부터 500만 원을 교부받고, 계속하여 같은 날 22:30경 C에 있는 ‘D교회' 앞길에서 피해자로부터 580만 원을 교부받았다.
이로써 피고인은 성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원들과 공모하여, 피해자로부터 1,080만 원을 교부받아 편취하였다.
2. 사기미수
성명불상의 조직원은 2021. 4. 7. 17:36경 불상의 장소에서 전화로 피해자 E에게 피해자의 딸을 사칭하여 "엄마, 나 성폭행 당했어. 옆에 남자 바꿔줄게."라고 말을 한 후, 계속하여 다른 조직원이 피해자의 딸을 납치한 것처럼 "내가 너의 딸을 성폭행했다, 내가 딸을 그냥 보내주지 않을 것이다, 돈을 전달하지 않으면 딸이 크게 다칠 것이다, 얼마까지 준비할 수 있냐."라고 거짓말을 하고, 피해자가 600만 원을 준비할 수 있다고 하자, "그럼 즉시 600만 원을 가지고 역 2번 출구 와서 돈을 건네주면 5분 후에 딸을 차에서 내려주겠다."라고 거짓말을 하여 이에 속은 피해자로 하여금 현금 600만 원을 가지고 역 2번 출구에서 대기하게 하고, 피고인은 성명불상 조직원의 지시에 따라 같은 날 18:42경 위 2번 출구 앞에서 대기 중인 피해자로부터 600만 원을 교부받으려고 하였으나 경찰관에게 체포되는 바람에 그 뜻을 이루지 못하고 미수에 그쳤다.
이로써 피고인은 성명불상의 보이스피싱 조직원들과 공모하여, 피해자로부터 600만 원을 편취하려 하였으나 미수에 그쳤다.

facts_en:
The Defendant is a foreign national of non-Korean nationality.

Telecommunications and financial fraud criminal organizations (commonly known as "voice phishing") are structured in a multi-tiered point organization comprising a mastermind, recruiters, and money collectors, among other roles. The mastermind comprehensively manages and operates the voice phishing organization, including managing organization members and distributing funds misappropriated from victims. The recruiters randomly telephone unspecified numbers of persons within the Republic of Korea, impersonate the victims' family members, deceive the victims by making it appear they are in crisis situations such as kidnapping, cause them to withdraw cash and wait at designated locations. The Defendant, from approximately April 1, 2021, following instructions from organization members whose identities are unknown, assumed the role of "money collector" by withdrawing misappropriated funds, receiving such funds from victims waiting at promised locations, and transferring them to other organization members. The parties sequentially conspired to commit voice phishing crimes against unspecified victims, with each member assuming differentiated roles.



## 1. Fraud (completed)

An organization member of unknown identity, at an unspecified location on April 2, 2021, at approximately 21:00, made a telephone call to Victim B and, impersonating Victim B's daughter, stated: "Mom, I've been sexually assaulted. I don't think I can live. I'm going to kill myself." Subsequently, another organization member, falsely representing that Victim B's daughter had been kidnapped, said: "If you don't do as instructed, I will stab the child. Don't contact anyone, don't hang up the phone, and hand the money to the person who will provide it to you." Through these deceptions, Victim B, having been deceived, waited at the front of Exit 5 of [Train Station Name] with cash in the amount of 5,000,000 Korean won. Following instructions from an organization member of unknown identity, the Defendant, at approximately 22:00 on the same day, received 5,000,000 Korean won from Victim B waiting at the front of Exit 5 of the aforementioned station. Subsequently, at approximately 22:30 on the same day, the Defendant received 5,800,000 Korean won from Victim B at the front of "D Church" located in [Location C].

By these acts, the Defendant conspired with voice phishing organization members of unknown identity and misappropriated 10,800,000 Korean won by obtaining it from Victim B.



## 2. Attempted Fraud (incomplete)

An organization member of unknown identity, at an unspecified location on April 7, 2021, at approximately 17:36, made a telephone call to Victim E and, impersonating Victim E's daughter, stated: "Mom, I've been sexually assaulted. Let me put a man on the line instead." Subsequently, another organization member, falsely representing that Victim E's daughter had been kidnapped, said: "I have sexually assaulted your daughter. I will not simply release her. If you do not provide money, your daughter will be seriously injured. How much can you prepare?" When Victim E responded that 6,000,000 Korean won could be prepared, the organization member falsely stated: "Then immediately come to Exit 2 of [Train Station Name] with 6,000,000 Korean won, hand over the money, and I will release your daughter from the car within five minutes." Through these deceptions, Victim E, having been deceived, waited at Exit 2 of [Train Station Name] with cash in the amount of 6,000,000 Korean won. Following instructions from an organization member of unknown identity, the Defendant, at approximately 18:42 on the same day, attempted to receive 6,000,000 Korean won from Victim E waiting at the front of Exit 2 of the aforementioned station. However, the Defendant was arrested by police officers before accomplishing this objective, and the offense remained in the attempt stage.

By these acts, the Defendant conspired with voice phishing organization members of unknown identity and attempted to misappropriate 6,000,000 Korean won from Victim E, but the attempt was not completed.

2020고단514
피고인은 2019. 7. 10.경 B빌딩 3층 C에서 피해자 D에게 "사채 10,000,000원을 썼는데, 오늘 변제하지 못하면 구속될 것 같다. 10,000,000원을 빌려주면 2019. 9. 25.경 곗돈을 수령하여 변제하겠다."라고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실은 피고인은 2019. 9. 25.경까지 수령할 수 있는 곗돈이 없었고, 당시 지인인 E에게 약 2,000만 원의 채무를 지고 있었으며, 신용등급이 8등급일 정도로 경제적 사정이 좋지 아니하였기 때문에 피해자로부터 금원을 빌리더라도 이를 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 불구하고 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2019. 7. 10.경 피고인 명의 F은행 계좌로 10,000,000원을 송금 받은 것을 비롯하여 그 무렵부터 2019. 8. 26.경까지 별지 범죄일람표 기재와 같이 총 3회에 걸쳐 합계 36,000,000원을 교부받았다.
2020고단792
피고인은 2019. 7. 26.경 광장 근처에 있는 상호를 알 수 없는 카페에서 피해자 G에게 "몇 년 전에 가입한 번호계가 있는데, 계금을 수령한 후 나머지 회차 계금을 납입하지 않아 다른 계원들이 나를 사기로 고소했다. 이를 해결하기 위해서 돈이 필요한데, 800만원을 빌려주면 2019. 9.말경까지 500만원, 2019. 12.말경까지 나머지 300만원을 변제하겠다."라고 거짓말을 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 이미 채무 약 6,000만원을 변제하지 못하여 지인들로부터 돈을 빌려 소위 ‘돌려막기'로 채무를 변제하고 있었던 상황이었으므로 피해자로부터 돈을 빌리더라도 이를 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2019. 7. 26.경 피고인 명의 F은행 계좌(계좌번호 1 생략)로 700만원, 2019. 7. 27.경 같은 계좌로 100만원 합계 800만 원을 송금받았다. 증거의 요지

facts_en:
# CASE NO. 2020고단514

Around July 10, 2019, at location C on the third floor of B Building, the Defendant made false statements to Victim D, saying: "I have used 10,000,000 won in private loans, and if I cannot repay it today, it appears I will face detention. If you lend me 10,000,000 won, I will receive my rotating savings fund money around September 25, 2019, and repay you."

However, the facts were as follows: The Defendant did not possess any rotating savings fund money that could be received by September 25, 2019. At that time, the Defendant owed approximately 20,000,000 won in debt to an acquaintance, Person E, and had poor economic circumstances, with a credit rating of Grade 8. Therefore, even if the Defendant borrowed money from the Victim, the Defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to repay it.

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Defendant deceived the Victim as described above, and obtained money from the Victim, who was thereby defrauded. Beginning with receiving a wire transfer of 10,000,000 won to the Defendant's F Bank account on around July 10, 2019, the Defendant received a total of 36,000,000 won through three separate transfers until around August 26, 2019, as detailed in the Attached List of Crimes.



# CASE NO. 2020고단792

Around July 26, 2019, at a café of unknown name located near the plaza, the Defendant made false statements to Victim G, saying: "Several years ago, I enrolled in a rotating savings fund. After receiving my rotating savings fund money, I did not make payment for the remaining installments, and other members reported me as a fraud perpetrator. I need money to resolve this matter. If you lend me 8,000,000 won, I will repay 5,000,000 won by the end of September 2019 and the remaining 3,000,000 won by the end of December 2019."

However, the fact was that the Defendant was already unable to repay approximately 60,000,000 won in debt and was engaged in so-called "round-robin payment" (돌려막기), wherein the Defendant borrowed money from acquaintances to pay off existing debts. Therefore, even if the Defendant borrowed money from the Victim, the Defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to repay it.

The Defendant deceived the Victim as described above and received wire transfers totaling 8,000,000 won: 7,000,000 won transferred to the Defendant's F Bank account (account number omitted) on around July 26, 2019, and 1,000,000 won transferred to the same account on around July 27, 2019.



# EVIDENCE OUTLINE

**Case No. 2020고단514**

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2017. 4. 5. 지방법원 특정범죄가중처벌등에관한법률위반(절도)죄 등으로 징역 1년 6월, 벌금 30만 원을 선고받고 2018. 8. 25. 교도소에서 위 형의 집행을 종료한 사람이다.

[Criminal Acts]
전화금융사기 조직은 일반적으로 외국 등에서 국내에 있는 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 무작위로 전화를 걸어 정부기관이나 금융기관 등을 사칭하는 등의 방법으로 피해자들을 기망하고 이에 속은 피해자들로 하여금 자신들이 관리하는 계좌로 금원을 이체 또는 무통장 입금하도록 하거나 피해자들로부터 금원을 교부받아 이를 편취하는 속칭 ‘보이스피싱' 수법으로 범행을 하는 조직으로서, 범행 전체를 총괄하며 내부 각 점조직 간의 유기적인 연락을 담당하는 ‘총책', 총책의 지시를 받아 내부 조직원들을 관리하며 그들에게 기망 수법과 현금수거 방법 등을 교육·지시하는 ‘관리책', 불특정 다수의 피해자들에게 전화를 걸어 정부기관 등을 사칭한 거짓말을 하여 피해자들을 기망하는 ‘콜센터', 계좌에 입금된 피해금을 인출하여 전달하거나 피해자들을 직접 만나 돈을 받아오는 ‘현금인출·수거책' 등으로 각각 역할을 분담하는 등 철저하게 점조직 형태로 운영되고 있다.
피고인은 2021. 2. 말경 인터넷 구직사이트를 통해 일자리를 찾던 중 연락 온 성명불상자로부터 ‘우리는 금융채무 관련 일을 하는 곳이다. 고객을 상대로 원금과 이자를 회수해서 지정하는 계좌로 이체해 주면 일당 15만 원을 주고, 대기할 때에도 대기비용으로 6만 원을 지급하며, 교통비, 식비는 별도로 제공하겠다'라는 제안을 받았다.
피고인은 사용 중인 통신사에 스마트피싱보호 부가서비스를 신청하여 전화금융사기의 각종 수법과 특징에 대해 문자로 제공받는 등 위와 같은 내용이 전화금융사기의 주된 수법 중 하나임을 알고 있었음에도 위 제안을 수락하여 위 성명불상자와 전화금융사기 범행을 하기로 순차 공모하였다.
이에 따라 성명불상자는 2021. 2. 26.경 불상의 장소에서 피해자 B에게 전화연락하여 ‘C은행 D 대리'라고 사칭하면서 ‘정부에서 지원하는 저금리 대출로 대환대출이 총 4,000만 원까지 가능하며, 대출 신청 절차를 위해서 팀뷰어(어플을 지칭)를 설치하세요'라고 하여 피해자로 하여금 악성코드에 감염된 어플을 설치하도록 유도하고, 2021. 3. 2.경 재차 피해자에게 연락하여 ‘E회사 F과장'이라고 사칭하면서 ‘C은행에서 대출을 받기 위해서는 먼저 E회사에 있는 대출금을 상환해야 합니다'라고 거짓말을 하였다.
피고인은 위 성명불상자의 지시에 따라 2021. 3. 2. 16:29경 중구 G에 있는 H 맞은편 주차장에서 피해자를 만나 마치 E회사 직원인 것처럼 행세하면서 위와 같은 성명불상자의 거짓말에 속은 피해자로부터 대출금 상환 명목으로 600만 원을 건네받았다.
이로써 피고인은 성명불상자와 공모하여 피해자를 기망하고 이에 속은 피해자로부터 금원을 교부받았다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced to imprisonment for one year and six months and a fine of 300,000 won by the District Court on April 5, 2017, for violations of the Act on Special Cases Concerning the Punishment of Specific Crimes (Theft) and other offenses, and completed execution of the aforementioned sentence at a correctional institution on August 25, 2018.

## [Criminal Acts]

### Nature of Telephone Financial Fraud Organization

Telephone financial fraud organizations, commonly known as "voice phishing" schemes, generally operate as follows: operatives based in foreign countries or other locations make unsolicited calls to unspecified numbers of victims within the territory of the Republic of Korea. Through impersonation of government agencies or financial institutions and other deceptive methods, they deceive the victims and induce them to transfer funds to accounts controlled by the organization or to deposit funds via bank transfers without a passbook. Alternatively, they receive funds directly from victims and misappropriate such funds through voice phishing methodology. These organizations operate in a strictly compartmentalized cell structure with clearly delineated roles: (1) the "mastermind" who oversees the entire criminal enterprise and coordinates organic communication among internal cell organizations; (2) the "manager" who receives instructions from the mastermind, manages internal organization members, and provides education and instruction regarding deceptive methods and cash collection procedures; (3) the "call center" operators who make calls to unspecified numbers of victims, impersonate government agencies, and perpetrate fraud through false statements; and (4) the "cash withdrawal and collection specialists" who withdraw misappropriated funds deposited into accounts and deliver them, or who meet victims directly to collect funds. Each member performs his or her assigned role within this meticulously organized cell structure.

### Defendant's Recruitment and Conspiracy

In late February 2021, while seeking employment through an internet job search website, the Defendant was contacted by a person of unknown identity who made the following proposal: "We are in the business of financial debt collection. You will receive 150,000 won per day for collecting principal and interest from customers and transferring the funds to designated accounts. During standby periods, we will provide a standby allowance of 60,000 won, and we will separately provide transportation and meal expenses."

Despite the fact that the Defendant had subscribed to a "smart phishing protection" supplementary service through his telecommunications provider and had received text messages detailing various methodologies and characteristics of telephone financial fraud schemes—thereby possessing knowledge that the aforementioned proposal constituted one of the principal methods of telephone financial fraud—the Defendant accepted the proposal. Consequently, the Defendant successively conspired with the person of unknown identity to commit the crime of telephone financial fraud.

### Execution of the Fraud Scheme

Pursuant to this conspiracy, the person of unknown identity contacted Victim B by telephone on or about February 26, 2021, from an unidentified location. The person impersonated "D Representative of C Bank" and stated: "The government supports a low-interest rate refinancing loan arrangement of up to 40,000,000 won in total. For loan application procedures, please install TeamViewer [application]." Through this statement, the person induced Victim B to install an application infected with malicious code. On or about March 2, 2021, the same person contacted Victim B again and impersonated "F Section Chief of E Company," falsely stating: "In order to obtain a loan from C Bank, you must first repay the loan outstanding at E Company."

Following the instructions of the person of unknown identity, the Defendant, on March 2, 2021, at approximately 4:29 p.m., met Victim B in a parking lot opposite H located in Jung District, G. The Defendant then falsely presented himself as an employee of E Company and, exploiting Victim B's reliance upon the false statements made by the aforementioned person of unknown identity, received 6,000,000 won from Victim B under the pretext of loan repayment.

In this manner, the Defendant conspired with the person of unknown identity to perpetrate fraud against Victim B and, through such deception, received funds from Victim B.

facts_kr:
전제사실
피고인은 2017. 1. 12.경 B에 있는 공증인가 C사무소에서, 피해자 D와의 사이에 위 법률사무소 2017년 제84호로 피고인을 채권자로, 피해자를 채무자로 하는 금전소비대차계약 공정증서를 작성하였다.
위 공정증서의 내용은 2017. 1. 12. 피고인이 피해자에게 금 1억 원을 대여하였고 피해자는 위 채무를 2018. 1. ~ 2022. 12.까지 5년간 분할하여 상환하기로 하는 내용이었으나, 실제로는 위 공정증서 기재와 달리 피고인이 피해자에게 1억 원을 대여한 사실이 없었으므로 위 공정증서 기재 채권 1억 원은 존재하지 아니하였다.

[Criminal Acts]
그럼에도 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자와의 사이에 금전소비대차 공정증서가 작성되어 있음을 기화로, 위 공정증서를 이용하여 법원을 기망하여 피해자 소유 재산을 편취하고자 마음먹었다.
1. 지방법원2018타채4825호 관련 사기
그리하여 피고인은 2018. 3. 16. 경 지방법원 위 공정증서를 증거로 제출하면서 위 1억 원의 채권을 피청구채권으로 하여, 피해자 소유인 제3채무자 E 주식회사, F 주식회사, G 주식회사, H 주식회사, I 주식회사에 대한 매출채권을 압류 및 추심하도록 해 달라는 압류 및 추심명령 신청을 하였다.
그러나 사실은 피고인은 피해자에 대하여 위 1억 원의 채권이 없었다.
결국 피고인은 위와 같이 지방법원 사법보좌관을 기망하여 이에 속은 사법보좌관으로 하여금 2018. 3. 20. 경 위 법원 2019타채4825호로 위 카드사 매출채권에 대하여 금 1억 원을 청구금액으로 하는 채권압류 및 추심명령 결정을 하도록 하고, 그 결정이 2018. 3. 23. 제3채무자인 E 주식회사, F 주식회사, G 주식회사, H 주식회사, I 주식회사에 각각 송달되도록 하여 동액 상당의 재산상 이익을 취득하였다.
2. 지방법원2018타채5087호 관련 사기
계속하여 피고인은 2018. 3. 20. 경  서초동에 있는 지방법원 위 공정증서를 증거로 제출하면서 위 1억 원의 채권을 피청구채권으로 하여, 피해자 소유인 제3채무자 K에 대한 건물에 대한 임차보증금 반환 채권을 압류 및 추심하도록 해 달라는 압류 및 추심명령 신청을 하였다.
그러나 사실은 피고인은 피해자에 대하여 위 1억 원의 채권이 없었다.
결국 피고인은 위와 같이 지방법원 사법보좌관을 기망하여 이에 속은 사법보좌관으로 하여금 2018. 3. 22. 경 위 법원 2019타채5087호로 위 임차보증금반환채권에 대하여 금 1억 원을 청구금액으로 하는 채권압류 및 추심명령 결정을 하도록 하고, 그 결정이 2018. 3. 28. 제3채무자인 K에게 송달되도록 하여 동액 상당의 재산상 이익을 취득하였다.

facts_en:
The defendant, on or about January 12, 2017, at the notary office C located in B, executed a notarized document evidencing a loan agreement (Legal Office File No. 2017-84) with the victim D, whereby the defendant was designated as the creditor and the victim as the debtor.

The content of the notarized document provided that on January 12, 2017, the defendant had loaned KRW 100 million to the victim, and the victim agreed to repay the debt in installments over a five-year period from January 2018 through December 2022. However, contrary to the content recorded in the notarized document, the defendant had not in fact loaned KRW 100 million to the victim. Consequently, the KRW 100 million claim recorded in the notarized document did not exist.



# CRIMINAL ACTS

Notwithstanding the foregoing, the defendant, taking advantage of the fact that a notarized loan agreement existed between the defendant and the victim, resolved to fraudulently deceive the court by utilizing the notarized document and thereby to unlawfully appropriate property owned by the victim.

**1. Fraud Related to District Court Case No. 2018 Tacha 4825**

Accordingly, on or about March 16, 2018, the defendant submitted the notarized document as evidence to the District Court and filed an application for an order of garnishment and collection with respect to KRW 100 million in accounts receivable, designating the KRW 100 million claim as the subject claim to be garnished against third-party debtors E Corporation, F Corporation, G Corporation, H Corporation, and I Corporation, all of which owned accounts receivable owed by the aforementioned entities and belonging to the victim.

In truth, however, the defendant held no KRW 100 million claim against the victim.

Ultimately, the defendant fraudulently deceived a judicial assistant at the District Court, causing the deceived judicial assistant to issue a decision on or about March 20, 2018, under District Court Case No. 2019 Tacha 4825, ordering the garnishment and collection of the aforementioned credit card company accounts receivable in the amount of KRW 100 million as the claimed amount. The decision was served on or about March 23, 2018, respectively upon the third-party debtors E Corporation, F Corporation, G Corporation, H Corporation, and I Corporation, thereby enabling the defendant to acquire a pecuniary benefit equivalent to the aforementioned amount.

**2. Fraud Related to District Court Case No. 2018 Tacha 5087**

Subsequently, on or about March 20, 2018, the defendant submitted the notarized document as evidence to the District Court located in Seocho-dong and filed an application for an order of garnishment and collection, designating the KRW 100 million claim as the subject claim to be garnished, requesting garnishment and collection of the lessee's security deposit refund claim against third-party debtor K with respect to a building owned by the victim.

In truth, however, the defendant held no KRW 100 million claim against the victim.

Ultimately, the defendant fraudulently deceived a judicial assistant at the District Court, causing the deceived judicial assistant to issue a decision on or about March 22, 2018, under District Court Case No. 2019 Tacha 5087, ordering the garnishment and collection of the aforementioned lessee's security deposit refund claim in the amount of KRW 100 million as the claimed amount. The decision was served on or about March 28, 2018, upon the third-party debtor K, thereby enabling the defendant to acquire a pecuniary benefit equivalent to the aforementioned amount.

facts_kr:
1. 피해자 B에 대한 사기
피고인은 2016. 6. 22.경 알려지지 않은 어느 곳에서 피해자 B에게 "경제적으로 힘들어서 그런데 돈을 빌려달라. 내가 다른 사람으로부터 받을 돈도 있으니 돈을 빌려주면 최대한 빨리 변제하겠다."라고 말하였다. 그러나 사실 피고인은 당시 별다른 직업이나 수입이 없었고, C에 대한 개인 채무 2,000만 원 및 D에 대한 개인 채무 2,000만 원, 카드 빚 8,077,000원 등 많은 채무가 있었으며, 다른 사람에 대한 채권은 회수 여부가 불명확하였고, 피해자로부터 받은 돈 대부분을 도박에 사용할 생각이었다. 따라서 피해자로부터 돈을 받더라도 이를 제대로 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 같은 날 피고인 명의의 은행 계좌(E)로 300만 원을 송금받아 편취한 것을 비롯하여 그때부터 2018. 4. 24.경까지 별지 범죄일람표 기재와 같이 총 19회에 걸쳐 합계 4,083만 원을 교부받아 편취하였다.
2. 피해자 F에 대한 사기
피고인은 2017. 7. 중순경 피해자 F의 주거지에서 피해자에게 "내가 급해서 그런데, 네가 운행하는 모닝 승용차를 팔아서 돈을 빌려달라. 일단 차를 팔고 한 달 동안 렌트카를 끌고 다니면 한 달 뒤에 똑같은 차로 사주겠다."라고 말하였다. 그러나 사실 피고인은 당시 별다른 직업이나 수입이 없었고, C에 대한 개인 채무 2,000만 원 및 D에 대한 개인 채무 2,000만 원, 카드 빚 8,077,000원 등 많은 채무가 있었으며, 다른 사람에 대한 채권 또한 회수 여부가 불명확하였고, 피해자로부터 받은 돈을 전부 도박에 사용할 생각이었다. 따라서 피해자로부터 돈을 받더라도 이를 변제하거나 새로운 승용차를 구매하여 줄 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로 하여금 2017. 7. 31.경 피해자 운행의 H 모닝 승용차를 판매하도록 한 후, 같은 날 피고인이 사용하는 피해자 F 명의의 I은행 계좌(J)로 3,524,150원을 송금받아 편취하였다.
3. 피해자 K에 대한 사기
피고인은 2018. 2. 14.경 피해자 K이 운전하는 차량을 타고 함께 이동하던 중 피해자에게 "형님, 제가 지금 돈이 좀 필요한데 한 달만 쓰고 갚아드릴 테니까 2,000만 원만 빌려주십시오. 이자도 2부를 쳐서 드리겠습니다."라고 말하였다. 그러나 사실 피고인은 당시 별다른 직업이나 수입이 없었고, C에 대한 개인 채무 2,000만 원 및 D에 대한 개인 채무 2,000만 원, 카드 빚 8,077,000원 등 많은 채무가 있었으며, 다른 사람에 대한 채권 또한 회수 여부가 불명확하였고, 피해자로부터 받은 돈을 대부분 도박에 사용할 생각이었다. 따라서 피해자로부터 돈을 받더라도 이를 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2018. 2. 21.경 F 명의의 I은행 계좌(J)로 2,000만 원을 송금받아 편취하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. FRAUD AGAINST VICTIM B

The Defendant, on or about June 22, 2016, at an unidentified location, told Victim B as follows: "I am in financial hardship and need to borrow money. I have funds coming in from another person, so if you lend me money, I will repay it as quickly as possible." However, in fact, the Defendant at that time had no particular occupation or income, maintained substantial debts including KRW 20,000,000 owed to Person C, KRW 20,000,000 owed to Person D, credit card debt of KRW 8,077,000, and other liabilities. The Defendant's receivables from other parties were of uncertain collectibility, and the Defendant intended to use most of the money received from the Victim for gambling. Accordingly, even if the Defendant received money from the Victim, the Defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to repay it properly.

By deceiving the Victim in the manner described above, the Defendant, having thereby defrauded the deceived Victim, obtained by fraudulent conversion KRW 3,000,000 remitted to the Defendant's bank account (Account E) on the same day. Furthermore, from that date until on or about April 24, 2018, as detailed in the attached Schedule of Offenses, the Defendant obtained by fraudulent conversion a total of KRW 40,830,000 across nineteen separate occasions.

## 2. FRAUD AGAINST VICTIM F

The Defendant, on or about mid-July 2017, at the residence of Victim F, told the Victim as follows: "I am in urgent need, so sell the Morning passenger vehicle that you operate and lend me money. Once the vehicle is sold and you use a rental car for one month, I will buy you the same model car after one month." However, in fact, the Defendant at that time had no particular occupation or income, maintained substantial debts including KRW 20,000,000 owed to Person C, KRW 20,000,000 owed to Person D, credit card debt of KRW 8,077,000, and other liabilities. The Defendant's receivables from other parties were also of uncertain collectibility, and the Defendant intended to use all money received from the Victim for gambling. Accordingly, even if the Defendant received money from the Victim, the Defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to repay it or to purchase a new passenger vehicle for the Victim.

By deceiving the Victim in the manner described above, the Defendant, having thereby defrauded the deceived Victim, caused the Victim to sell the H Model Morning passenger vehicle (operated by the Victim) on or about July 31, 2017, and obtained by fraudulent conversion KRW 3,524,150 remitted to the bank account (Account J) in the name of Victim F at Bank I, which the Defendant used, on the same day.

## 3. FRAUD AGAINST VICTIM K

The Defendant, on or about February 14, 2018, while riding in and traveling together in a vehicle operated by Victim K, told the Victim as follows: "Sir, I currently need money, and I will repay it within one month, so please lend me KRW 20,000,000. I will also pay interest at the rate of two parts (percent)." However, in fact, the Defendant at that time had no particular occupation or income, maintained substantial debts including KRW 20,000,000 owed to Person C, KRW 20,000,000 owed to Person D, credit card debt of KRW 8,077,000, and other liabilities. The Defendant's receivables from other parties were also of uncertain collectibility, and the Defendant intended to use most of the money received from the Victim for gambling. Accordingly, even if the Defendant received money from the Victim, the Defendant had neither the intent nor the ability to repay it.

By deceiving the Victim in the manner described above, the Defendant, having thereby defrauded the deceived Victim, obtained by fraudulent conversion KRW 20,000,000 remitted to the bank account (Account J) in the name of F at Bank I on or about February 21, 2018.

facts_kr:
1. 피고인과 B의 공동범행
피고인과 B는 2017. 7. 25.경 C에 있는 D매장에서, 피해자 E에게 ‘피고인이 대표로 있는 미나리 엑기스를 만드는 공장에 10구좌에 해당하는 1,300만 원을 투자 하면 매주 150만 원의 수익을 지급하겠다'는 취지로 거짓말하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 피해자로부터 받은 미나리사업 투자금을 미나리사업을 진행하는데 사용하지 않고 이를 개인채무 변제, 개인 식사대금 지불 등 사적인 용도로 사용할 예정이었으며, 당시 피해자와 같은 미나리사업 투자자들로부터 받은 투자금을 미나리 사업과 무관한 ‘금 투자사업'에 상당 부분 지출하고 있었고 미나리 사업 선투자자들에 대한 수익금을 후순위 투자자들로부터 받은 투자금으로 돌려막기 하는 상황에 있었으며, B도 사업이 위와 같은 상황임을 알고 있었으므로, 피고인과 B는 피해자에게 투자금 명목으로 돈을 받더라도 투자수익금을 제대로 지불할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인과 B는 공모하여 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 피고인은 이에 속은 피해자로부터 같은 날 F은행이 발행한 13,000,000원권 수표 1장(수표번호: G)을 교부받았다.
2. 피고인의 단독 범행
가. 2017. 8. 10.경 범행
피고인은 2017. 8. 10.경 제1항 기재 장소에서, 피해자에게 ‘미나리엑기스 사업 관련하여 돈이 부족하니 250만 원을 빌려주면 다음 날 원금 및 이자 10%를 포함하여 돌려주겠다'는 취지로 거짓말 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 당시 신용상태가 좋지 않았고, 금 관련 사업에 돈을 투자하였다가 수익을 반환받지 못하였으며 피해자로부터 돈을 받더라도 개인채무 변제 등 사적인 용도로 사용할 생각이었으므로 피해자에게 다음날 이자를 포함한 돈을 갚을 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 즉석에서 차용금 명목으로 현금 250만 원을 교부받았다.
나. 2017. 8. 11.경 범행
피고인은 2017. 8. 11.경 소재 불상의 사무실에서, 피해자에게 ‘미나리엑기스 1구좌의 가격이 높으니 1구좌 당 약 38만 원으로 계산하여 3구좌 100만 원을 투자하면 매주 1구좌 당 5만 원을 수익으로 지급하겠다'는 취지로 거짓말 하였다. 그러나 사실 피고인은 제1항 기재 사유와 같이 피해자에게 투자금 명목으로 돈을 받더라도 투자수익금을 제대로 지불할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 즉석에서 피고인 명의의 기업은행 계좌(계좌번호 1 생략)로 투자금 명목으로 100만 원을 송금 받았다.

facts_en:
## 1. Joint Criminal Conduct Between the Defendant and B

On or about July 25, 2017, at a store D located in C, the Defendant and B made false representations to the Victim E to the effect that: "If you invest 13,000,000 won corresponding to 10 shares in a factory producing watercress essence under the Defendant's representation, we will pay you investment returns of 1,500,000 won per week."

However, in reality, the Defendant did not intend to use the investment funds for the watercress business received from the Victim. Instead, the Defendant intended to use such funds for private purposes, including repayment of personal debts and payment of personal meal expenses. At that time, the Defendant was allocating a substantial portion of investment funds received from the Victim and other investors in the watercress business to a "gold investment business" unrelated to the watercress business, and was engaging in a "Ponzi scheme" (fund rotation scheme) whereby investment returns to early investors in the watercress business were being paid from investment funds received from subsequent investors. B was also aware that the business was in such circumstances. Consequently, the Defendant and B, although they would receive money under the pretext of investment funds from the Victim, had neither the intention nor the ability to properly pay investment returns to the Victim.

The Defendant and B conspired together and, in the manner described above, fraudulently induced the Victim. As a result, the Defendant obtained from the deceived Victim on the same day one check for 13,000,000 won issued by Bank F (check number: G).

## 2. Sole Criminal Conduct of the Defendant

### A. Criminal Conduct on or about August 10, 2017

On or about August 10, 2017, at the location described in Section 1 above, the Defendant made false representations to the Victim to the effect that: "Due to insufficient funds related to the watercress essence business, if you lend me 2,500,000 won, I will repay you the principal plus 10 percent interest the next day."

However, in reality, the Defendant's credit status was poor at that time, and the Defendant had invested money in gold-related business ventures but had not recovered the investment returns. Even had the Defendant received funds from the Victim, the Defendant intended to use such funds for private purposes, including repayment of personal debts. Consequently, the Defendant had neither the intention nor the ability to repay to the Victim the loan amount including interest the next day.

The Defendant fraudulently induced the Victim in the manner described above, and as a result, obtained from the deceived Victim, on the spot, cash in the amount of 2,500,000 won under the pretext of a loan.

### B. Criminal Conduct on or about August 11, 2017

On or about August 11, 2017, at an office of unknown location, the Defendant made false representations to the Victim to the effect that: "Since the price per share of watercress essence is high, if you calculate it at approximately 380,000 won per share and invest 1,000,000 won for 3 shares, we will pay you investment returns of 50,000 won per share per week."

However, in reality, for the reasons set forth in Section 1 above, the Defendant, although receiving money from the Victim under the pretext of investment funds, had neither the intention nor the ability to properly pay investment returns to the Victim.

The Defendant fraudulently induced the Victim in the manner described above, and as a result, obtained from the deceived Victim, on the spot, a wire transfer of 1,000,000 won under the pretext of investment funds to a bank account in the Defendant's name at Gi Bank (account number 1 omitted).

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2016. 8. 23. 지방법원에서 사기죄 등으로 징역 1년 2월을 선고받고 2021. 10. 22. 위 판결이 확정되었다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 피고인의 남편인 B과 C에 있는 D 소유의 E아파트 F호 아파트에서 사실은 월세로 거주하고 있음에도 마치 고액의 보증금을 내고 거주하는 양 전세계약서를 위조한 다음, 이를 담보로 대부업자인 피해자 G을 기망하여 ‘전세금 담보대출'을 받기로 공모하였다.
위와 같은 공모에 따라 피고인은 B과 같이 2012. 8. 하순경 이하 불상지에서 행사할 목적으로 권한 없이 컴퓨터를 이용하여 ‘아파트 전세 계약서' 파일서식의 소재 지란에 "광역시 서구 C F호", 건물의 용도란에 "아파트", 보증금란에 "팔천오백만 원정(￦85,000,000)", 존속기간란에 "2011년 6월 17일부터 2013년 6월 17일까지(24개월)", 작성일자란에 "2011년 6월 17일", 임대인의 주소란에 "H", 주민번호란에 "(주민등록번호 1 생략)", 전화란에 "(전화번호 1 생략)", 성명란에 "D", 임차인의 주소란에 "특별시 I", 주민번호란에 "(주민등록번호 2 생략)", 전화란에 "(전화번호 2 생략)", 성명란에 "A" 등을 각 입력한 후 이를 출력한 다음, 임대인 "D" 이름 옆에 임의로 새겨 소지하고 있던 D의 도장을 찍었다.
계속하여 피고인과 B은 2012. 8. 28. 12:22경부터 2012. 8. 29. 17:00경까지 사이에 피해자에게 각각 수회 전화하여, 피해자에게 "우리 부부는 E아파트에서 보증금 8,500만 원에 전세를 살고 있는데 당신이 그 전세보증금을 담보로 4,000만 원을 대출해 주면 원금은 6개월 후에 반드시 변제하고 이자도 매월 120만원씩 틀림없이 지급하겠다, 그리고 당신이 E아파트로 오기만 하면 계약서 등 대출소요 서류 일체를 바로 드리겠으니 가급적 신속하게 방문해 달라."는 취지로 말하고, 피고인 부부를 방문한 피해자에게 앞서 위조한 전세계약서 등과 대출 소요서류를 교부하여 주었다.
그러나 사실 피고인 부부는 위와 같이 위조된 아파트 전세계약서로 피해자를 속여 대출금만 받아 가로챌 생각이었을 뿐 전세보증금 등 별다른 재산이나 수입원도 없어 피해자로부터 금전을 대출받더라도 이를 변제할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그리하여 피고인과 B은 공모하여, 이와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자로부터 2012. 8. 29.경 대출금 명목으로 4,000만 원을 피고인 명의의 신협계좌(계좌번호 1 생략)로 송금받았다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant received a sentence of one year and two months imprisonment for fraud and other offenses in the District Court on August 23, 2016. The said judgment became final and binding on October 22, 2021.

## [Criminal Acts]

The Defendant, together with her husband Person B, while residing in apartment unit F of Apartment E owned by Person D located in C, a metropolitan area, despite the fact that she was living there under a monthly rental arrangement, fabricated a Jeonse (long-term lease deposit) Contract as if she were residing there after having paid a substantial deposit. The Defendant then conspired with the victim Person G, a licensed moneylender, to fraudulently induce the victim by using said contract as security in order to obtain a "Jeonse Deposit-Backed Loan."

Pursuant to such conspiracy, the Defendant, together with Person B, for the purpose of execution thereafter, in or around late August 2012, at an unspecified location, without authorization utilized a computer to prepare an "Apartment Jeonse Contract" file format, entering the following information: in the location field, "Seo-gu, [Metropolitan City] C, Unit F"; in the building use field, "Apartment"; in the deposit amount field, "Eighty-five Million Won (₩85,000,000)"; in the lease duration field, "From June 17, 2011 to June 17, 2013 (24 months)"; in the date of preparation field, "June 17, 2011"; in the lessor's address field, "H"; in the lessor's resident registration number field, "(Resident Registration Number 1 - omitted)"; in the lessor's telephone field, "(Telephone Number 1 - omitted)"; in the lessor's name field, "D"; in the lessee's address field, "[Special City] I"; in the lessee's resident registration number field, "(Resident Registration Number 2 - omitted)"; in the lessee's telephone field, "(Telephone Number 2 - omitted)"; and in the lessee's name field, "A," respectively. The Defendant thereafter printed the document and affixed Person D's personal seal, which she possessed and kept in her possession without authorization, adjacent to the lessor's name "D."

Subsequently, the Defendant and Person B, between approximately 12:22 on August 28, 2012, and approximately 17:00 on August 29, 2012, made multiple telephone calls to the victim, respectively, and stated to the victim substantially as follows: "Our married couple is living in a Jeonse arrangement at Apartment E with a deposit of 84.5 million won; if you provide us with a loan of 40 million won secured by that Jeonse deposit, we will definitely repay the principal within six months and will without fail pay interest of 1.2 million won each month, and if you simply come to Apartment E, we will immediately provide you with all necessary loan documents including the contract, so please visit us as soon as possible." The Defendant couple then delivered to the victim, who visited them, the aforementioned forged Jeonse contract and other loan-related documents.

However, in reality, the Defendant couple harbored the intention merely to defraud the victim using the aforementioned forged apartment Jeonse contract and appropriate the loan proceeds. The Defendant couple possessed no significant property or income sources other than that, and therefore had neither the intent nor the ability to repay any monetary loan received from the victim.

Thus, the Defendant and Person B conspired together, thereby fraudulently deceiving the victim in this manner, and on or about August 29, 2012, received a transfer of 40 million won under the pretext of a loan to a credit union account in the Defendant's name (Account Number 1 - omitted) from the victim, who fell victim to the deception.

facts_kr:
2017고단2693
피고인은 금융기관의 부실채권(Non Performing Loan, 이하 ‘NPL'이라 함) 매매 및 투자 사업 등을 주로 하는 BF 주식회사(이하 ‘BF'라고 한다) 및 BG 주식회사(이하 ‘BG'라고 한다)의 실경영자이다.
피고인은 2014. 5. 13.경  BT, 5층에 있는 위 BF 사무실에서 피해자 NP에게 ‘지방법원AAR의 입찰보증금에 투자할 계약금과 잔대금을 지급하면 해당 물건을 낙찰 받는데 사용하고, 배당기일에서 7영업일에 정산을 하여 원금과 30%의 이자를 지급하겠다'라고 거짓말 하였다.
그러나 사실 피고인은 피해자로부터 계약금 등 명목으로 금원을 지급받더라도 위 금원으로 당시 BF가 부담하고 있는 거액의 대출이자, 다른 부실채권 매입자금, 기존 투자자들에 대한 정산금, 직원들 급여 등으로 사용할 계획이었고, 위 부실채권에 대하여 질권을 설정한 대출은행이 위 채권 배당금에 대한 우선적 처분권한이 있었으므로 피해자에게 약속한 이익금을 지급할 의사나 능력이 없었다.
그럼에도 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 기망하여 이에 속은 피해자와 채권양수도계약을 체결하고, 피해자로부터 계약금 등 명목으로 17,000,000원을 지급받았다.
이를 포함하여 피고인은 그 무렵부터 2014. 10. 6.경까지 위와 같은 방법으로 별지 범죄일람표 기재와 같이 총 5회에 걸쳐 피해자로부터 계약금 등 명목으로 합계 120,600,000원을 지급받았다.

facts_en:
# CASE NO. 2017GODAN2693

The Defendant is the actual operator of BF Corporation (hereinafter "BF") and BG Corporation (hereinafter "BG"), companies primarily engaged in the purchase, sale, and investment business of non-performing loans (NPL) held by financial institutions.

On or about May 13, 2014, the Defendant, at the BF office located on the 5th floor of Building BT, made false representations to Victim NP, stating: "If you pay the contract deposit and remaining payment for investment in the bid guarantee deposit for the District Court AAR auction, the funds will be used to acquire the subject property at auction, and upon the distribution date, settlement will be made within seven business days, at which time I will pay you the principal plus 30% interest."

However, in fact, the Defendant intended that even if he received funds from the Victim under the pretext of a contract deposit and the like, such funds would be used to pay substantial loan interest then borne by BF, purchase funds for other non-performing loans, settlement payments to existing investors, employee salaries, and similar expenses. Moreover, because the lending bank that had established a security interest in the non-performing loan possessed priority right to dispose of the dividends from such debt, the Defendant had neither the intention nor the capacity to pay the promised interest to the Victim.

Nevertheless, the Defendant deceived the Victim in the manner described above, induced the Victim into a debt assignment contract, and received 17,000,000 Korean won from the Victim under the pretext of a contract deposit and similar payments.

Including this transaction, from around that time until on or about October 6, 2014, the Defendant employed the same method to receive a total of 120,600,000 Korean won from the Victim under the pretext of contract deposits and similar payments on five separate occasions, as detailed in the Crime Schedule attached hereto.



# CASE NO. 2017GODAN4099

The Defendant is the actual operator of BF Corporation (hereinafter "BF") and BG Corporation (hereinafter "BG"), companies primarily engaged in the purchase, sale, and investment business of non-performing loans (NPL) held by financial institutions.

In mid-May 2014, the Defendant, at the BF office located on the 5th floor of Building BT, made false representations through AAT, the Songpa Branch Manager of the company who was previously acquainted with the Defendant's Executive Director C and Victim AAS, to Victim AAS, stating: "If you pay the contract deposit and remaining payment for investment in the bid guarantee deposit for the District Court AAU auction, the funds will be used to acquire the subject property at auction, and upon the distribution date, settlement will be made within seven business days, at which time I will pay you the principal plus 30% interest."

However, in fact, the Defendant intended that even if he received funds from the Victim under the pretext of a contract deposit and the like, such funds would be used to pay substantial loan interest then borne by BF, purchase funds for other non-performing loans, settlement payments to existing investors, employee salaries, and similar expenses. Moreover, because the lending bank that had established a security interest in the non-performing loan possessed priority right to dispose of the dividends from such debt, the Defendant had neither the intention nor the capacity to pay the promised interest to the Victim.

Nevertheless, the Defendant deceived the Victim in the manner described above, and induced the deceived Victim to remit funds under the pretext of auction contract deposits and similar payments on two separate occasions: 6,500,000 Korean won on May 15, 2014, and 6,500,000 Korean won on May 22, 2014, totaling 13,000,000 Korean won.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 10. 30. 11:50경 C안과에 진료실에서 의사인 피해자 D에게 진료를 받던 중 피해자가 진료설명을 자세히 해주지 않는다는 이유로 시비가 되어 말다툼을 하던 중 오른손 주먹으로 피해자의 목을 밀쳐 폭행하였다. 증거의 요지
1. 증인 D의 법정진술
1. D에 대한 경찰 진술조서
1. D의 진술서
1. 범죄인지, 사건발생 검거보고, 내사보고(피해사진 첨부 등), 내사보고(범행 당시 촬영 동영상 첨부), 내사보고(범행 당시 촬영 동영상 캡쳐 사진 첨부)
피고인 및 변호인은, 피고인이 피해자를 폭행한 사실 없고 폭행의 고의도 없었다고 주장한다.
그러나 이 법원이 적법하게 채택하여 조사한 증거들에 의하여 인정되는 다음과 같은 사정들, 즉 ① 피해자는 수사기관에서부터 이 법정에 이르기까지 일관되게 "피해자에게 결막에 염증이 있어 염증을 터트린 후 약물치료를 하자고 하면서 마취약을 넣자고 하니까 피고인이 '설명을 이따위로 하느냐'고 하며 욕을 했고, 참을 수 없어서 자신도 욕으로 대꾸했는데 피고인이 주먹을 쥔 채 목 성대 왼쪽을 두 차례 가격했다. 심한 정도는 아니었지만 위해를 가하려는 의도로 보였다"는 취지로 진술하고 있는 점, ② 피해자의 병원 간호사가 이 사건 직후인 2019. 10. 30. 11:51경 112에 '의사를 폭행했다'고 신고하여 경찰이 출동하였던 점, ③ 범행 당시 촬영된 동영상에 의하면 피고인이 피해자의 목 부위를 오른손으로 가격하는 장면이 명확하게 관찰되는 점, ④ 피고인도 수사기관에서 "피해자가 얼굴을 들이밀고 소리를 지르기에 '뭐 이런 자식이 있어'라고 말하면서 오른손 주먹을 쥐고 피해자의 목을 향해 내밀기는 했지만 접촉이 있었는지 사실 모르겠다. 피해자가 얼굴을 들이대고 가까이 오면서 욕설을 하기 때문에 밀어내기 위한 목적으로 목에 주먹을 접촉했으면 했지 폭행할 의도는 아니었다"는 취지로 진술하였던 점(증거기록 제41쪽), ⑤ 위 동영상에 의하면 피해자가 당시 피고인에게 얼굴을 들이 밀기는 하였으나 피고인과 어느 정도 거리가 있었고 그 또한 피고인이 손가락으로 피해자의 얼굴을 가까이 가리키며 삿대질을 하는 것에 대응하는 과정이었던 것으로 보이는 점, ⑥ 피해자가 피고인에게 일방적으로 욕설을 한 것이 아니라 피고인과 피해자 서로 상대방에게 욕설을 하였던 점 등을 종합하면, 피고인이 피해자를 폭행한 사실 및 그에 대한 고의를 충분히 인정할 수 있다. 따라서 피고인 및 변호인의 주장은 받아들이지 아니한다

facts_en:
## FACTS OF THE CASE

On October 30, 2019, at approximately 11:50 a.m., the Defendant, while receiving medical consultation from the Victim D, a physician, at the consultation room of C Ophthalmology Clinic, engaged in a verbal dispute with the Victim over the Victim's failure to provide detailed explanations regarding the medical consultation. During the ensuing quarrel, the Defendant assaulted the Victim by pushing the Victim's neck with the fist of the right hand.



## SUMMARY OF EVIDENCE

1. Courtroom testimony of Witness D
2. Police statement record of D
3. Written statement of D
4. Crime acknowledgment report, arrest report at the time of the incident, internal investigation report (with photographic evidence of injuries attached, etc.), internal investigation report (with video footage recorded at the time of the crime attached), internal investigation report (with photographic stills captured from the video footage recorded at the time of the crime attached)



## DEFENSE ARGUMENTS

The Defendant and Defense Counsel assert that the Defendant did not commit assault against the Victim and lacked any intent to commit such assault.



## COURT'S FINDINGS

However, based on the evidence lawfully admitted and examined by this Court, the following circumstances—which are proven by the record—permit the following conclusions:

① The Victim has consistently stated from the investigative agency through the present court proceeding as follows: "The Victim had inflammation of the conjunctiva. [The Defendant] suggested that after rupturing the inflammation, we would proceed with pharmacological treatment and administer anesthetic medication. When [the Defendant] said this], the Defendant cursed, saying 'How can you explain it like this?' Unable to endure, [the Victim] also responded with curse words. Thereupon, the Defendant, with fist clenched, struck the left side of the Victim's neck and vocal cords twice. While not severe, it appeared to be done with intent to cause harm." This testimony has remained consistent throughout the proceedings.

② Immediately following this incident, at approximately 11:51 a.m. on October 30, 2019, the hospital nurse called 112 and reported that a physician had been assaulted, whereupon police responded to the scene.

③ According to the video footage recorded at the time of the crime, the scene clearly shows the Defendant striking the Victim's neck area with the right hand.

④ The Defendant himself stated to the investigative agency as follows: "The Victim thrust their face forward and shouted. [I] said, 'What kind of bastard does this?' while clenching [my] right fist and extending it toward the Victim's neck. However, I am uncertain whether actual contact occurred. Because the Victim thrust their face forward, came close, and uttered curses, [my] intention was to push [them] away by making contact with the neck with [my] fist, not to commit assault." (Evidence Record, p. 41)

⑤ According to the aforementioned video footage, although the Victim did thrust their face forward toward the Defendant, there was a certain distance between the Defendant and the Victim. Additionally, this appeared to be a responsive action to the Defendant's pointing directly at the Victim's face with a finger in a provocative manner (*sadaejil*).

⑥ The Victim did not unilaterally direct curses at the Defendant; rather, both the Defendant and the Victim exchanged curse words with one another.



## COURT'S CONCLUSION

Synthesizing all the aforementioned circumstances, this Court finds that the fact of the Defendant's assault upon the Victim and the Defendant's intent therefor are sufficiently established. Accordingly, the arguments advanced by the Defendant and Defense Counsel are not accepted.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 1. 19. 04:00경부터 05:00경 사이 1층 주거지 방 안에서 자신의 집에 잠시 얹혀살고 있던 피해자 C과 사소한 다툼으로 언쟁을 하다가 퇴거할 것을 요구하였으나 이를 거절하자 화가 나 주먹으로 안경을 착용하고 있던 피해자의 오른쪽 눈을 1회 때리고 머리 뒤 부위를 2회 때려 폭행하였다. 이로써 피고인은 피해자에게 치료일수 미상의 외상성 출혈을 동반한 안구파열 등 정기적 경과 치료를 요하는 상해를 가하였다.
피고인 및 변호인은, 피해자가 퇴거를 불응하면서 피고인의 목을 조르는 등 유형력을 행사하여 뿌리친 일이 있을 뿐 주먹으로 때려 상해를 가한 일이 없고, 뿌리치는 행동은 정당방위에 해당한다고 주장한다. 어떠한 행위가 정당방위로 인정되려면 그 행위가 자기 또는 타인의 법익에 대한 현재의 부당한 침해를 방어하기 위한 것으로서 상당성이 있어야 하고, 이때 방위행위가 사회적으로 상당한 것인지는 침해행위에 의해 침해되는 법익의 종류와 정도, 침해의 방법, 침해행위의 완급, 방위행위에 의해 침해될 법익의 종류와 정도 등 일체의 구체적 사정들을 참작하여 판단하여야 한다. 이 법원이 적법하게 채택하여 조사한 증거들에 의하면, ① 피해상황을 진술하는 피해자의 진술은 상당히 구체적이고 일관되어서 신빙성이 있고, 피해자는 당시 피고인의 머리를 패트병으로 툭툭 건드렸다고 진술한 점, ② 사건 당일에 피고인이 '무단 침입자가 있어 때렸다'는 내용으로 112 신고를 하였고, 경찰이 현장에 출동하였고 눈에 피를 흘리고 있는 피해자를 구급차로 호송한 점, ③ 당시 출동 경찰관 D은 이 법정 및 수사기관에서 피고인으로부터 피해자가 피고인의 목을 졸랐다는 말은 듣지 못하였고, 피해자가 패트병으로 툭툭 밀쳤다는 말을 들었다고 진술한 점, ④ 피해자는 사건 당일 E병원으로 후송되었고, 피고인의 폭행으로 안구가 파열되어, 입원 당일 전신마취를 하여 각막일차봉합, 홍채재위치술 등을 시행받은 점 등에 비추어 보면, 피고인이 피해자에게 상해를 가하기 전 피해자가 패트병으로 피고인의 머리를 툭툭 쳤다고 보이고, 목을 조르는 등의 행위가 있었다는 증거는 없으며, 피해자의 상해의 정도가 상당히 중한 점에 비추어 보면 피고인이 피해자에게 상해를 가한 행위는 상당성이 있는 방위행위로 볼 수 없다. 따라서 피고인 및 변호인의 주장은 이유 없다.

facts_en:
On January 19, 2019, between approximately 04:00 and 05:00 hours, the Defendant, in a room on the first floor of a residential dwelling, engaged in a verbal altercation with Victim C, who was temporarily residing at the Defendant's home, over a trivial dispute. When the Defendant demanded that Victim C vacate the premises and Victim C refused, the Defendant became enraged and committed assault by striking Victim C's right eye (on which the Victim was wearing eyeglasses) once with a closed fist and striking the back of the Victim's head twice. Through these actions, the Defendant inflicted upon Victim C injuries requiring periodic follow-up care and treatment, including ocular rupture accompanied by traumatic hemorrhage of unknown duration for healing.

The Defendant and Defense Counsel assert that while Victim C refused to vacate and exercised physical force by choking the Defendant's neck, the Defendant merely pushed Victim C away without striking the Victim with a closed fist or inflicting injuries, and that the pushing action constitutes lawful self-defense. For any act to be recognized as lawful self-defense, that act must be undertaken to defend against a present unlawful infringement upon the legal interests of the Defendant or a third party, and such act must be reasonable. In determining whether a defensive act is socially reasonable, the court must consider all concrete circumstances, including the type and degree of legal interests infringed by the infringement, the method of infringement, the urgency or otherwise of the infringement, and the type and degree of legal interests that would be infringed by the defensive act.

Based on evidence properly admitted and examined by this court, the following findings are established: ① The Victim's statement describing the circumstances of the injury is substantially concrete and consistent, demonstrating credibility. The Victim testified that at the time the Defendant lightly tapped the Victim's head with a plastic bottle. ② On the date of the incident, the Defendant filed a report to the Police Emergency Line (112) stating that an unlawful intruder was present and had been struck; police responded to the scene and transported the Victim, who was bleeding from the eyes, by ambulance. ③ Responding Police Officer D testified in court and before investigating authorities that the Defendant did not state that Victim C choked the Defendant's neck, but rather that the Defendant stated the Victim lightly pushed the Defendant's head with a plastic bottle. ④ The Victim was transported to E Hospital on the date of the incident, where the Victim underwent general anesthesia and received treatment including primary corneal suture and iris repositioning surgery due to ocular rupture caused by the Defendant's assault on the date of hospitalization.

In light of these findings, it appears that Victim C lightly tapped the Defendant's head with a plastic bottle before the Defendant inflicted injuries upon the Victim. There is no evidence that the Victim engaged in acts such as choking the Defendant's neck. Moreover, considering the substantial severity of the Victim's injuries, the Defendant's act of inflicting injuries upon Victim C cannot be regarded as a reasonable defensive act. Accordingly, the assertions of the Defendant and Defense Counsel are without merit.

facts_kr:
1. 전제사실
피고인은 2016. 1. 13.부터 2016. 6. 9.까지 검찰청의 F부장검사로 재직하였고, 피해자 G은 2015. 4. 1. 검찰청 검사로 임용되어 2016. 1. 27.부터 사망 시까지 피고인의 지휘․감독 하에 검찰청 F부 검사로 근무하였다.
2. [Criminal Acts]
가. 업무 외적 영역에서의 폭행
피고인은 2016. 3. 31.경 상호불상의 술집에서, 다른 부 소속 검사들과 술을 마시다가 피해자를 불러내어 함께 술을 마셨고, 피해자가 술에 취한 피고인을 피고인의 집까지 데려다 주기 위해 함께 택시를 타고 가던 중, 손바닥으로 피해자의 등을 수회 때려 피해자를 폭행하였다.
나. 부 회식 중 폭행
피고인은 2016. 4. 4.경 검찰청 인근 J 식당에서, 소속 부 검사들과 저녁 회식을 하던 중 몇몇 검사들이 회식 중 피고인의 이야기에 집중하지 않는다는 이유로 테이블을 살짝 들었다가 놓으면서 화를 내고, 그 후 검사들과 함께 술을 마시다가 특별한 이유 없이 손바닥으로 피고인의 오른쪽에 앉아있던 피해자의 등을 마치 골프의 하프스윙을 하듯이 1회 내리쳐 피해자를 폭행하였다.
다. 업무 관련 질책 중 폭행
피고인은 2016. 5. 2.경 검찰청 인근 K 횟집에서, 소속 부 검사들과 저녁 회식 중 검사들에게 미제를 신속히 처리해야 한다고 언급하면서, 미제가 상대적으로 많은 피해자와 다른 검사를 가리키며 미제가 많다는 이유로 질책하고, 이어서 인근 상호불상의 호프집으로 자리를 옮겨서도, 피고인 옆에 앉은 피해자에게 미제가 많다고 계속하여 질책하다가 갑자기 몸을 틀어 오른 손바닥으로 ‘찰싹' 소리가 날 정도로 피해자의 등을 수회 때려 피해자를 폭행하였다.
라. 음주 중 폭행
피고인은 2016. 5. 11. 22:00경 상호불상의 술집에서, 이전에 함께 근무했던 검사들과 함께 술을 마시다가 피해자와 소속 부 검사를 술자리에 오게 하여 함께 술을 마시던 중 갑자기 옆에 앉아 있던 피해자의 등을 손바닥으로 5~6회 세게 때려 피해자를 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Foundational Facts

The Defendant served as Chief Prosecutor of Division F at the Prosecutor's Office from January 13, 2016 to June 9, 2016. Victim G was appointed as Prosecutor at the Prosecutor's Office on April 1, 2015, and served as a Prosecutor in Division F of the Prosecutor's Office under the Defendant's supervision and direction from January 27, 2016 until the time of death.

## 2. Criminal Acts

### a. Assault Outside the Scope of Official Duties

Around March 31, 2016, at a bar of unknown name, the Defendant was drinking with prosecutors from other divisions when he called out Victim G to join him. While they were drinking together, Victim G, who was intoxicated, accompanied the Defendant in a taxi to take him to the Defendant's residence. During this taxi ride, the Defendant struck Victim G's back multiple times with the palm of his hand, thereby committing assault.

### b. Assault During Departmental Dinner

Around April 4, 2016, at Restaurant J near the Prosecutor's Office, while the Defendant was having an evening dinner gathering with prosecutors from his division, he became angry when some of the prosecutors were not paying attention to his remarks. He lifted the table slightly and set it back down. Subsequently, while drinking with the prosecutors, without particular reason, the Defendant struck Victim G, who was seated to his right, with his palm on the back in a manner resembling a half-swing golf stroke—striking once—thereby committing assault.

### c. Assault During Work-Related Rebuke

Around May 2, 2016, at Restaurant K (a sashimi restaurant) near the Prosecutor's Office, during an evening dinner gathering with prosecutors from his division, the Defendant made remarks instructing the prosecutors to promptly process pending cases. He then pointed to Victim G and another prosecutor, criticizing them for having a relatively large number of unresolved cases. Subsequently, when the gathering moved to a nearby bar of unknown name, the Defendant continued to rebuke Victim G, who was seated next to him, for having many pending cases. He then abruptly turned his body and struck Victim G's back multiple times with his right palm with sufficient force to produce a "slapping" sound, thereby committing assault.

### d. Assault While Drinking

Around 10:00 p.m. on May 11, 2016, at a bar of unknown name, the Defendant was drinking with prosecutors with whom he had previously worked. He called Victim G and a prosecutor from his division to the drinking venue and they joined him in drinking together. Suddenly, the Defendant forcefully struck the back of Victim G, who was seated beside him, with his palm five to six times, thereby committing assault.

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 1997. 12. 29. 지방법원 폭력행위등처벌에관한법률위반죄로 벌금 50만 원, 2002. 2. 4. 지방법원 폭행죄로 벌금 30만 원, 2015. 10. 14. 지방법원 같은 죄로 벌금 30만 원, 2006. 6. 3. 같은 법원에서 같은 죄로 벌금 200만 원, 2016. 6. 21. 같은 법원에서 같은 죄로 벌금 200만 원의 약식명령을 각 각 발령받은 사람이다.
기초사실
피고인은 평소 몽둥이를 들고 다니면서 자신과 아무런 연관이 없는 이웃 혹은 일면식이 없는 사람들에게 시비를 걸거나, 건물 외벽에 돌을 던지는 등의 행동을 하는 등 주변 인물들에게는 공포의 대상이었다.
특히, 피고인은 여성들을 상대로 아무런 이유 없이 시비를 반복해오던 중, 2016. 1. 경 D은행 앞에 있는 피해자 B 운영의 액세서리 노점에서 액세서리를 구입한 이후부터 피해자 주변을 배회하며 '나랑 데이트 하자' 등의 말을 하며 지속적으로 집적여 던 중, 피해자가 피고인의 데이트 신청을 거절하자 이에 앙심을 품게 되었다.

[Criminal Acts]
1. 1차 상해
피고인은 2016. 7. 17. 10:40경 D은행 앞에 있는 피해자 운영의 액세서리 노점 앞에서, 아무런 이유 없이 자전거로 위 노점상 물품들을 치고 가 피해자로부터 항의를 받자, 피해자에게 "내 마음이다! 앞으로 장사를 못하게 하겠다 이 XXX아! 확 YY를 밟아버릴라!"라고 소리치면서 피고인의 우측 발뒤꿈치 부위로 피해자의 우측 엄지발가락 부위를 힘껏 밟아, 피해자에게 약 4주간의 치료가 필요한 우측족부 모지 원위지골 골절의 상해를 가하였다.
2. 2차 상해
피고인은 2016. 7. 31. 12:45경 제1항 기재 피해자 운영 노점상에서, 피해자로부터 제1항 기재와 같이 상해를 가한 점에 대하여 항의를 받자 "이 XXX아! 길 막지 말고 저리 꺼져!"라고 소리치면서 피해자의 얼굴 부위에 침을 뱉고, 계속하여 "YY도 밟아버릴 년이 어디서 지랄이야!"라고 소리치면서 발로 피해자의 좌측 갈비뼈 부위를 수회 걷어 차고, 양손으로 피해자의 양쪽 얼굴 부위를 수회 번갈아가며 때리는 등 하여 피해자에게 약 21일 간의 치료가 필요한 흉부 염좌 등의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant is a person who received the following summary orders (약식명령) from the District Court:

- December 29, 1997: A fine of 500,000 Korean won for violation of the Act on the Punishment of Violent Crimes, etc. (폭력행위등처벌에관한법률위반죄);
- February 4, 2002: A fine of 300,000 Korean won for assault (폭행죄);
- June 3, 2006: A fine of 2,000,000 Korean won for the same offense (assault);
- October 14, 2015: A fine of 300,000 Korean won for the same offense (assault);
- June 21, 2016: A fine of 2,000,000 Korean won for the same offense (assault).



## Basic Facts (기초사실)

The Defendant habitually carried a club (or cudgel) and engaged in the following conduct: initiating quarrels with neighbors or persons with whom he had no acquaintance and no connection whatsoever, and throwing stones at exterior walls of buildings. By such conduct, the Defendant became an object of fear to persons in his vicinity.

In particular, the Defendant repeatedly engaged in unprovoked quarrels targeting women. Around January 2016, after purchasing accessories from an accessory street vendor stall operated by Victim B located in front of D Bank, the Defendant loitered in the vicinity of the Victim and persistently made sexual advances toward her, stating words such as "Let's go on a date with me." When the Victim rejected the Defendant's request for a date, the Defendant harbored a grudge (or malice) against her.



## [Criminal Acts]

### 1. First Assault (1차 상해)

On July 17, 2016, at approximately 10:40, in front of the accessory street vendor stall operated by the Victim located in front of D Bank, the Defendant, without any justifiable reason, struck merchandise displayed at the stall with his bicycle. When the Victim lodged a protest, the Defendant shouted at the Victim: "It's my will! I will prevent you from running a business going forward, you fucking asshole! I'm going to stomp the fuck out of you!" (내 마음이다! 앞으로 장사를 못하게 하겠다 이 XXX아! 확 YY를 밟아버릴라!)

Thereafter, the Defendant forcefully stepped on the Victim's right hallux (great toe) with his right heel, thereby inflicting bodily injury upon the Victim: a fracture of the distal phalanx of the right hallux (우측족부 모지 원위지골 골절) requiring approximately four weeks of medical treatment.

### 2. Second Assault (2차 상해)

On July 31, 2016, at approximately 12:45, at the street vendor stall operated by the Victim as described in Item 1 above, when the Victim lodged a protest regarding the bodily injury inflicted as described in Item 1 above, the Defendant shouted at the Victim: "You fucking asshole! Don't block the road and get the fuck out of here!" (이 XXX아! 길 막지 말고 저리 꺼져!)

The Defendant then spat upon the Victim's face. Subsequently, the Defendant shouted: "This bitch who won't even allow me to stomp her ass—what the hell is she doing?!" (YY도 밟아버릴 년이 어디서 지랄이야!)

Thereafter, the Defendant kicked the Victim's left ribcage area multiple times with his feet and struck the Victim's bilateral facial areas multiple times in alternating fashion with both hands, thereby inflicting bodily injury upon the Victim: thoracic contusion, etc. (흉부 염좌 등) requiring approximately twenty-one days of medical treatment.

facts_kr:
피고인은 피해자 B과 현재 이혼 소송 중인 부부이다.
1. 피고인은 2020. 6. 18. 새벽경 피해자가 함께 사는 피고인의 주거지에서 피해자로부터 2018.에 있었던 피해자의 부정행위에 대한 고백을 듣고 화가 나 마시고 있던 술병 및 그릇 등을 바닥에 던지고 피해자에게 "어떻게 나를 배신할 수 있어! 이 나쁜 년아. 왜 그렇게 했어! 내가 뭘 잘못했는데 나한테 이런 벌을 주냐!"라고 말하며, 피해자의 머리, 팔, 가슴, 얼굴 등을 주먹으로 수 회 때려 피해자에게 치료일수를 알 수 없는 고막의 외상성 파열(조측)상 등을 가하였다.
2. 피고인은 2020. 6. 19. 01:00경 위 주거지에서 술에 취하여 피해자의 부정행위를 비난하며 식탁과 의자, 선풍기, 어항 등을 부수고, 피해자의 얼굴, 머리 등을 주먹으로 수 회 때리고 발로 몸통을 걷어차고, 계속하여 같은 날 02:00경 위 주소지 인근 천변으로 나가 피해자와 대화를 나누던 중 "그 새끼 찾아 조져야 된다, 그냥 놔둘 수 없다."고 하였으나 피해자가 연락할 길이 없다고 하자 피해자를 밀쳐 넘어뜨려 땅바닥에 머리를 부딪치게 하여 피해자에게 치료일수 미상의 미개방 두개골내 상처 등을 가하였다.
3. 피고인은 2020. 10. 27. 저녁경 위 주거지에서, 피고인의 피해자에 대한 2020. 8. 6.자 폭행 사건으로 인한 보호처분결정에 화를 내며, "니가 잘못했는데 내가 왜 벌을 받아야 되냐! 너네 둘 다 잡아서 벌 받아야 돼! 내가 그 새끼 고추 잘라 올 테니까 니가 내 앞에서 씹어 먹어!"라고 말하며 손으로 피해자를 밀치고 발로 걷어차고, 빈 플라스틱 맥주병을 피해자의 이마에 던져 피해자에게 치료일수를 알 수 없는 이마 부위 타박상 등을 가하였다.
4. 피고인은 2020. 11. 19. 새벽경 위 주거지에서 술을 마시던 중 피해자에게 폭언을 하면서 주먹과 발로 피해자를 폭행하고, 맨발로 피고인을 피해 집을 나가려는 피해자를 끌고 들어와 손과 발로 피해자를 수회 때려 피해자에게 14일간의 치료를 요하는 어깨 및 위팔의 타박상(우측) 및 손목 및 손의 기타부분의 타박상(좌측) 등을 가하였다.

facts_en:
**Defendant's Relationship to Victim:**
The Defendant is currently in divorce proceedings with Victim B, and they are married partners residing together.

**Count 1: Assault and Injury (June 18, 2020)**

In the early morning hours of June 18, 2020, at the Defendant's residence where the Victim was residing, upon hearing a confession from the Victim concerning the Victim's infidelity that had occurred in 2018, the Defendant became angry, threw a liquor bottle and dishes that he was holding onto the floor, and stated to the Victim: "How could you betray me! You bitch! Why did you do that! What did I do wrong that you would inflict such punishment on me!" The Defendant then struck the Victim multiple times with his fists on the head, arms, chest, and face, thereby inflicting upon the Victim a traumatic rupture of the tympanum (right ear) of indeterminate treatment duration and other injuries.

**Count 2: Aggravated Assault and Injury (June 18-19, 2020)**

On June 19, 2020, at approximately 01:00 hours, at the aforementioned residence, while intoxicated, the Defendant, while berating the Victim's infidelity, destroyed a dining table, chairs, a fan, and a fish tank. The Defendant then struck the Victim multiple times with his fists on the face and head and kicked the Victim's torso. Continuing at approximately 02:00 hours on the same day, the Defendant went to a riverbank near the aforementioned residence and, while in conversation with the Victim, stated: "I have to find that bastard and beat him up; I cannot just let this go." When the Victim responded that there was no way to contact the person in question, the Defendant pushed the Victim, causing her to fall to the ground and strike her head on the pavement, thereby inflicting upon the Victim an undisclosed closed head injury and other injuries requiring treatment.

**Count 3: Assault and Injury (October 27, 2020)**

On the evening of October 27, 2020, at the aforementioned residence, becoming angry over a protective order decision issued on August 6, 2020, as a result of a prior assault incident committed by the Defendant against the Victim, the Defendant stated: "You did something wrong, so why should I be punished! Both you and that bastard should be arrested and punished! I will go cut off that fucker's dick, and you will eat it in front of me!" The Defendant then pushed the Victim with his hand and kicked her with his foot. The Defendant then threw an empty plastic beer bottle at the Victim's forehead, thereby inflicting upon the Victim a contusion to the forehead of indeterminate treatment duration and other injuries.

**Count 4: Aggravated Assault and Injury (November 19, 2020)**

In the early morning hours of November 19, 2020, at the aforementioned residence, while consuming alcohol, the Defendant engaged in abusive language toward the Victim while assaulting her with his fists and feet. When the Victim attempted to leave the residence barefoot to escape the Defendant, the Defendant forcibly pulled her back inside. The Defendant then struck the Victim multiple times with his hands and feet, thereby inflicting upon the Victim contusions to the right shoulder and upper arm and contusions to the left wrist and other areas of the hand requiring fourteen (14) days of medical treatment and other injuries.

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2018. 9. 18. 지방법원 폭력행위등처벌에관한법률위반(공동상해)죄 등으로 징역 6월에 집행유예 2년을 선고받고, 집행유예 기간 중인 2019. 8. 13. 지방법원 특정범죄가중처벌등에관한법률위반(보복폭행등)죄 등으로 징역 1년을 선고받아 2019. 12. 5. 그 판결이 확정됨으로써 위 집행유예의 선고가 실효되었으며, 2020. 12. 8. 최종형의 집행을 종료하였다.
[Criminal Acts]
1. 피해자 B에 대한 범행
피고인은 2021. 1. 21. 13:50경 ‘C시장' 공중화장실 인근 도로에서, 술에 취하여 알 수 없는 이유로 일면식이 없는 피해자 B의 멱살을 잡고, 오른 주먹으로 피해자의 얼굴 부위를 5회 가량 때려 피해자에게 약 2주간의 치료가 필요한 이마의 표재성 손상을 가하였다.
2. 피해자 D에 대한 범행
피고인은 2021. 1. 21. 16:50경 ‘F' 식당 인근 도로에서, 술에 취하여 알 수 없는 이유로 지인인 피해자 D의 얼굴 부위를 주먹으로 수회 때리고, 발로 1회 걷어 차 피해자에게 약 28일간의 치료가 필요한 치아의 아탈구의 상해를 가하였다.
피고인은 2021. 2. 11. 17:30경 ‘H식당'에서 I와 함께 술을 마시던 중, 위 I를 만나기 위해 위 식당에 찾아온 피해자 J이 I에게 "집에 어서 가자."라고 말하며 I를 데리고 가려고 하자, 술에 취해 알 수 없는 이유로 피해자에게 "씹할 년아, 니가 뭔데 데리고 가려고 그래."라는 등의 욕설을 하였고, 이에 피해자로부터 "씹할 놈아, 니는 뭔데 지랄이야."라는 말을 듣자 손으로 피해자의 왼쪽 팔 부위를 강하게 잡고 피해자의 목과 얼굴 부위를 각 1회 밀친 후 멱살을 잡고 피해자를 위 식당 밖으로 나가게 한 다음, 다시 식당 안으로 들어오려고 시도하는 피해자의 가슴 부위를 수회 밀쳐 넘어뜨려 피해자에게 약 2주간의 치료가 필요한 전흉부 좌상 등을 가하였다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced on September 18, 2018, by the District Court to six months' imprisonment with a stay of execution for two years for violation of the Act on Punishment of Violent Crimes, etc. (joint assault), and other offenses. During the period of suspended execution, on August 13, 2019, the Defendant was sentenced by the District Court to one year's imprisonment for violation of the Act on Aggravated Punishment of Specific Crimes, etc. (retaliatory assault, etc.), and other offenses. The judgment became final on December 5, 2019, whereupon the previously imposed stay of execution was rendered void. The Defendant completed execution of the final sentence on December 8, 2020.

## [Criminal Acts]

### 1. Criminal Act Against Victim B

On January 21, 2021, at approximately 13:50, on a roadway near the public restroom of "C Market," while intoxicated and for reasons unknown, the Defendant, having no prior acquaintance with Victim B, seized the Victim by the scruff of the neck and struck the Victim's face approximately five times with a closed right fist, thereby inflicting superficial lacerations to the Victim's forehead requiring approximately two weeks of medical treatment.

### 2. Criminal Acts Against Victim D

On January 21, 2021, at approximately 16:50, on a roadway near the "F" restaurant, while intoxicated and for reasons unknown, the Defendant struck an acquaintance, Victim D, in the facial area multiple times with a closed fist and kicked the Victim once with a foot, thereby inflicting subluxation of the Victim's teeth requiring approximately 28 days of medical treatment.

### 3. Criminal Act Against Victim J

On February 11, 2021, at approximately 17:30, while drinking alcohol with Person I at the "H Restaurant," when Victim J arrived at the restaurant to meet Person I and, while speaking to Person I with the words "Let's go home immediately," attempted to take Person I away, the Defendant, while intoxicated and for reasons unknown, directed the following profane language at the Victim: "You fucking bitch, what the fuck do you think you're doing trying to take him away?" When the Victim responded with "You fucking bastard, what the hell are you doing?", the Defendant forcefully grabbed the Victim's left arm, thrust the Victim's neck and facial area once each, seized the Victim by the scruff of the neck, and forced the Victim outside the restaurant. Subsequently, when the Victim attempted to re-enter the restaurant, the Defendant thrust the Victim's chest area multiple times, causing the Victim to fall, thereby inflicting contusions to the anterior left thoracic region requiring approximately two weeks of medical treatment.

The Defendant has been in a romantic relationship with Victim B since approximately August 2014.

## 1. Offense of Approximately May 16, 2015

On approximately May 16, 2015, at the Defendant's residence located in an apartment, the Defendant, objecting to the Victim's tone of voice, struck the Victim's face and upper body approximately 10 times with his hands and kicked the Victim's legs and lower body approximately 10 times with his feet, thereby inflicting upon the Victim a lip laceration for which the treatment period could not be ascertained.

## 2. Offense of Approximately March 31, 2017

On approximately March 31, 2017, at the aforementioned location, the Defendant, objecting to the Victim's tone of voice, struck the Victim's face, hands, and upper body approximately 10 times with his hands and kicked the Victim's legs and lower body several times with his feet, thereby inflicting upon the Victim a sprain of the right wrist for which the treatment period could not be ascertained.

## 3. Offense of Approximately December 23, 2017

On approximately December 23, 2017, at the Victim's residence, the Defendant, objecting to the Victim's tone of voice, struck the Victim's face and upper body approximately 10 times with his hands, thereby inflicting upon the Victim a perforated tympanum of unspecified nature for which the treatment period could not be ascertained.

## 4. Offense of Approximately March 19, 2018

On approximately March 19, 2018, at the location described in Item 1 above, the Defendant, alleging that the Victim had lied, struck the Victim's abdomen, face, and other areas approximately 10 times with his hands, thereby inflicting upon the Victim a fractured nasal bone for which the treatment period could not be ascertained.

## 5. Offense of Approximately September 25, 2020

On approximately September 25, 2020, at approximately 19:00, at the location described in Item 1 above, the Defendant, alleging that the Victim had talked back to him, struck the Victim's legs and palms several times with a coat hanger, thereby inflicting upon the Victim contusions of the arms and legs for which the treatment period could not be ascertained.

## 6. Offense of Approximately March 13, 2021

On approximately March 13, 2021, at the location described in Item 1 above, the Defendant, alleging that the Victim had interfered with the Defendant's computer gaming, struck the Victim's face and head approximately 10 times with the palm of his hand, punched the Victim's chest several times with his fist, kicked the Victim's legs several times with his feet, and strangled the Victim's neck with his arm, thereby inflicting upon the Victim contusions of the thorax requiring treatment for approximately two weeks, among other injuries.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 6. 21. 23:51경 아파트 인근 인도에서, 걸어가던 중 피해자 D이 피고인을 쳐다본다는 이유로 주먹으로 피해자의 눈 부위를 1회 때리고, 피해자의 몸 부위를 수회 때려 폭행하였다.
증거의 요지 1. 피고인의 일부 법정진술
1. D에 대한 경찰 피의자신문조서
1. 현장사진
피고인은 피해자를 때린 사실은 인정하지만 피해자에 의한 부당한 침해를 방위하기 위한 것이므로 정당방위에 해당한다고 주장한다.
피고인과 피해자는 경찰에서 서로 상대방이 먼저 폭력을 행사하여 싸움으로 발전했다'는 취지로 진술하였고, 이에 더해 피고인은 피해자 일행이 자신을 말리던 중 피해자가 발로 배 부분을 가격하여 늑골이 골절되어 더 큰 피해를 입었다는 취지로 진술하였다. 피고인은 경찰에서 싸움의 경위에 관해 '길을 가다가 피해자를 쳐다보자 피해자가 욕을 하며 시비를 걸었다. 대꾸를 하니 피해자가 때렸고 피고인이 피하면서 머리 쪽을 살짝 맞았다. 옆에 아내도 있고 일방적으로 맞고 있을 수 없으니까 방어 차원에서 어쩔 수 없이 대항했다. 당시 대항하지 않았으면 아내가 보는 앞에서 두들겨 맞았을 것이다.'는 취지로 진술하였다. 이처럼 피고인과 피해자는 누가 먼저 폭력을 행사했는지에 관해서는 서로 주장이 다르지만 싸움을 했다는 점에 대해서는 진술이 일치하고, 피고인은 아내 앞에서 일방적으로 맞을 수 없어서 피해자에게 대항하였다고 진술하고 있으므로, 피고인의 행위를 자신의 법익에 대한 부당한 침해를 방위하기 위한 행위로 보기는 어렵다. 당시 피해자의 일행이 피고인을 말리고 있었던 점을 보더라도 상호간의 싸움이었던 것으로 보일 뿐 피고인의 행위가 공격적 방어행위에 해당하는 것으로 보이지도 않는다. 당시 피고인의 처가 11개월 된 아기를 다른 사람에게 맡기고 피해자의 처와 몸싸움을 한 점이나 피고인이 당시 여자들끼리 싸운 것도 몰랐던 점 등을 보면 피고인이 아기를 데리고 있었다고 하여 시비를 걸거나 싸움을 할 상황이 아니었다고 보기도 어렵다.
