facts_en:
On September 8, 2019, at approximately 21:00 in front of [Location] B, the Defendant, upon observing Victim D—an environmental sanitation worker employed by the [C]-gu Office—discarding garbage from within a Styrofoam box onto the ground while performing recycling collection duties, demanded that the Victim clean it up. When the Victim refused, the Defendant assaulted the Victim by, inter alia, pushing the Victim's neck with his hand while uttering profanities, stating: "I will beat you half to death." [Translated idiom: literally, "반 죽여 버리겠다" conveys a threat to cause severe bodily harm or near-fatal injury.]

**Summary of Evidence**

1. Partial court testimony of the Defendant
2. Court testimony of Witness D
3. Photographic evidence of injuries

**Defense Arguments and Court's Ruling**

The Defendant and his counsel assert that the Defendant did not assault the Victim. Alternatively, even if the Defendant assaulted the Victim, they contend that the Victim initiated physical contact by ramming his chest into the Defendant; therefore, the Defendant's pushing motion constituted lawful self-defense.

However, upon properly admitted and examined evidence before this Court, the facts sufficiently establish that the Defendant assaulted the Victim by pushing the Victim's neck with his hand.

With respect to the self-defense claim, although it appears that there was some verbal altercation between the Victim and the Defendant, the Victim testified that he did not assault the Defendant or ram him with his head. Additionally, the Defendant made no statement to investigative authorities alleging that he was assaulted by the Victim; rather, the Defendant stated that the Victim "pushed forward with his head," suggesting that the Victim made contact but did not commit an assault. Synthesizing these circumstances, this Court cannot recognize that the Defendant's pushing of the Victim's neck constitutes lawful self-defense under law. Accordingly, all of the Defendant's arguments are rejected.

그러나 이 법원이 적법하게 채택하여 조사한 증거들에 의하여 인정되는 다음과 같은 사정 즉, 피고인이 사고를 낸 후 피해자와 피고인 사이에 언쟁이 있었던 것으로 보이기는 하고 피해자가 피고인에게 다가서는 모습이 확인되기는 하나, 피해자나 그 일행은 피고인에게 별다른 유형력을 행사하지 않았고 피고인이 먼저 피해자에게 유형력을 행사한 점, 당시 피해자나 그 일행이 피고인에게 유형력을 행사하려는 몸짓을 보였다는 등 먼저 피고인에게 위협을 가하였다고 보기 어려운 점, 그럼에도 피고인은 자신을 향해 다가오는 피해자의 가슴을 손으로 밀치는 등 폭행을 가한 점 등을 종합하면, 피고인의 행위가 본능적으로 한 소극적 방어행위로서 사회상규에 어긋나는 행위가 아니라고 인정할 수 없으므로, 위 주장은 이유 없다.

facts_en:
On September 10, 2019, at approximately 22:42, at a parking lot located in B, the Defendant, while proxy-driving the vehicle of Victim C, collided with a vehicle parked to the rear. Upon this collision, the Defendant, on the ground that the Victim had failed to observe the rear-moving vehicle, committed assault by pushing the Victim's chest three times with his right hand.

**Summary of Evidence:**

1. Partial courtroom testimony of the Defendant
2. Courtroom testimony of Witness C
3. Photographs of the accident vehicle
4. One (1) CD
5. Investigation Report (CCTV Footage Confirmation Report)

**Defense Argument:**

The Defendant and his counsel contend that the Defendant's conduct constitutes a passively defensive act undertaken instinctively and therefore cannot be deemed conduct contrary to accepted social norms (사회상규, *sahoe sanggyu*).

**Court's Holding:**

However, based on the evidence properly admitted and examined by this Court, the following circumstances are established: Although it appears that there was an altercation between the Victim and the Defendant following the accident, and although the Victim is confirmed to have approached the Defendant, neither the Victim nor his associates exercised any physical force against the Defendant. Rather, the Defendant first exercised physical force against the Victim. Moreover, it is difficult to conclude that the Victim or his associates first posed a threat to the Defendant through gestures indicating an intent to exercise physical force. Notwithstanding these circumstances, the Defendant committed assault against the Victim—who was approaching him—by pushing the Victim's chest with his hand. Synthesizing these facts, this Court cannot acknowledge that the Defendant's conduct constitutes a passively defensive act undertaken instinctively and therefore does not constitute conduct contrary to accepted social norms. Accordingly, the above-stated argument is without merit.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 6. 4. 17:19경 B에 있는 C 앞 노상에서, 그전약 18년 동안 내연관계로 지내던 피해자 D과 말다툼을 하던 중 자리를 피하려는 피고인을 피해자가 따라와 옷을 붙잡는다는 이유로 피해자의 양 손목을 잡아 밀어 넘어뜨려 폭행하였다.
이 사건 공소사실은 '그 전 약 18년 동안 내연관계로 지내던 피해자' 대신 '그 전 약 18년 동안 사실혼 관계로 지내던 피해자'로 되어 있다. 그러나 피고인은 피해자와 내연관계에 있었을 뿐 사실혼 관계에 있지 않았다고 주장한다. 사실혼이란 당사자 사이에 주관적으로 혼인의 의사가 있고, 객관적으로도 사회관념상 가족질서적인 면에서 부부 공동생활을 인정할 만한 혼인생활의 실체가 있는 경우라야 한다(대법원 2010. 3. 25. 선고 2009다84141 판결 등 참조). 그런데 형사 절차인 이 사건 공판절차에 피해자가 참여하여 사실혼 관계 여부에 대해 피고인을 상대로 적극적으로 다투는 기회가 없었고, 따라서 이 부분에 대한 심리가 관련 당사자들의 주장 및 이들이 제출한 증거를 기초로 면밀히 이루어지지 않은 점, 이러한 상황에서 검사 및 피고인이 이 법정에 제출한 증거들만으로 피고인과 피해자 사이의 사실혼 관계 여부에 대해 판단하는 것은 부적절하다고 판단되는 점을 감안하여, 이 사건에서는 피고인이 인정하는 내연관계로 범죄사실을 인정한다.

facts_en:
On June 4, 2020, at approximately 17:19, on a public street in front of C located in B, the defendant engaged in a verbal dispute with the victim D, with whom the defendant had maintained a de facto conjugal relationship for approximately eighteen years prior. When the victim followed the defendant, who was attempting to leave the scene, and grabbed the defendant's clothing, the defendant seized both of the victim's wrists, pushed the victim down, and thereby committed assault (폭행).



**Evidentiary and Jurisdictional Issues Regarding Characterization of Relationship:**

The charge (공소사실) in this case characterizes the victim as a person "with whom the defendant had maintained a de facto marital relationship (사실혼 관계) for approximately eighteen years prior," whereas the charge as described in the facts uses the term "de facto conjugal relationship." However, the defendant contends that the defendant was in a de facto conjugal relationship with the victim only, and not in a de facto marital relationship (사실혼).

De facto marital relationship (사실혼) is defined as a relationship in which: (1) the parties subjectively possess the intention to be married, and (2) objectively, there exists the substantive reality of marital life that warrants recognition as spousal cohabitation in accordance with societal norms and familial order (see Supreme Court of Korea Decision No. 2009da84141, decided March 25, 2010, et al.).

However, the victim did not participate in the trial proceedings in this criminal case to actively contest the defendant regarding the question of whether a de facto marital relationship existed between the parties. Consequently, examination of this matter was not conducted with precision on the basis of the arguments and evidence submitted by the relevant parties. Taking into account that, under such circumstances, it would be inappropriate to determine the existence or non-existence of a de facto marital relationship between the defendant and the victim based solely upon the evidence submitted by the prosecutor and the defendant to this court, the court accepts the criminal facts as characterized by the defendant's admission of a de facto conjugal relationship in this case.

(피고인 및 변호인은 피해자가 술에 취한듯하여 정신을 차리라는 의미에서 피해자의 몸을 잡고 흔든 적은 있지만 공소사실과 같이 피해자를 폭행한 사실이 없다고 주장하고 있으나, 수사기관에서부터 이 법정에 이르기까지 공소사실과 같이 폭행을 당했다는 피해자의 진술이 일관되고 구체적인 점, 피해자가 허위의 진술을 할 만한 동기 내지 이유를 찾기 어려운 점, 당시 목격자들의 진술 중에 피고인이 피해자를 밀친 사실이 있다고 하는 부분은 피해자의 진술에 일부 부합하는 점 등을 종합하면, 피고인이 범죄사실과 같이 피해자를 폭행한 사실을 인정할 수 있으므로 피고인 및 변호인의 주장을 받아들이지 않는다.)

facts_en:
On July 12, 2019, at approximately 00:15 hours, the Defendant was drinking alcohol at Restaurant C together with the Victim D and acquaintances E and F, whom the Defendant knew previously. Upon observing the Victim smoking outside the establishment with F, the Defendant addressed the Victim, stating: "You've been cheating on your partner, haven't you? Are you fucking crazy?" (or "You're not unfaithful, you crazy bitch?"). The Defendant then pushed the Victim, causing the Victim to fall to the ground. When the Victim protested this conduct, the Defendant struck the Victim on the right cheek with the palm of his hand on one occasion, thereby committing an assault against the Victim.



### SUMMARY OF EVIDENCE

1. Partial testimony of the Defendant in open court
2. Testimony of Witness D in open court
3. Police interrogation record regarding D
4. Statement by D
5. Investigation report (witness F—telephone conversation); Investigation report (witness G—regarding the aforementioned conduct); Investigation report (reference person E—telephone conversation)



### COURT'S REASONING AND RULING ON CONTESTED FACTS

**Defense Position:**
The Defendant and Defendant's counsel assert that while the Defendant did grasp and shake the Victim's body for the purpose of bringing the Victim to his senses due to the Victim's apparent intoxication, the Defendant did not commit assault against the Victim as alleged in the charges (공소사실).

**Court's Finding:**
However, the Court rejects the assertions of the Defendant and Defendant's counsel. In synthesizing the totality of circumstances, the Court finds as follows:

1. The Victim's testimony regarding the commission of assault, consistent with the allegations charged, has remained uniform and specific throughout the investigation and proceedings before this Court;

2. The Victim lacks apparent motive or reason to make false statements;

3. Among the testimony of eyewitnesses present at the scene, statements acknowledging that the Defendant pushed the Victim partially corroborate the Victim's account;

Based on the foregoing, **the Court finds and accepts as proven that the Defendant committed assault against the Victim, consistent with the facts alleged in the charges (범죄사실).**

피고인은 2019. 4. 13. 05:39경 D 내에서 피고인의 일행인 E 등과 술을 마시다가 피해자 B과 눈이 마주치면서 시비가 되었다. 피고인은 피해자에게 "왜 처다보냐"라고 하면서 피해자에게 다가가 피해자의 멱살을 잡고 피해자를 위 포차 밖으로 끌고 나갔다. 피고인은 위 포차 밖에서 주먹으로 피해자의 얼굴을 1회 때린 다음 배와 어깨 부위를 5~6회 더 때렸다. 그 후 피고인은 주위 사람들의 만류로 위 포차 안으로 들어와 앉아 있던 피해자에게 달려들어 팔꿈치 부분으로 피해자의 목을 1회 더 때렸고, 피해자가 넘어지자 발로 피해자의 몸 부위를 밟아 피해자에게 약 14일간의 치료가 필요한 견갑부 염좌 등의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced on December 12, 2018, by the District Court to ten (10) months imprisonment with a suspended sentence of two (2) years for violation of the Punishment of Crimes of Violence, Etc. Act (joint fraud and extortion) and other offenses. The judgment became final on December 20, 2018, and the Defendant is currently serving the suspended sentence period.

## [Criminal Acts]

**1. Offense Against Victim B**

On April 13, 2019, at approximately 05:39, while drinking with his associates, including Person E, at location D, the Defendant made eye contact with Victim B, which escalated into a verbal altercation. The Defendant approached Victim B and said, "Why are you staring at me?" ("왜 처다보냐"), then seized Victim B by the collar and dragged him outside the venue. Outside the venue, the Defendant struck Victim B's face once with his fist, followed by approximately five to six additional strikes to the victim's abdomen and shoulder areas. Subsequently, dissuaded by bystanders, the Defendant returned inside the venue and rushed toward Victim B, who was seated, and struck the victim's neck once more using his elbow. When Victim B fell, the Defendant stepped on and trampled the victim's body, thereby inflicting injuries including scapular sprain requiring approximately fourteen (14) days of medical treatment.

**2. Offense Against Victim F**

At the same time and location described in Section 1 above, the Defendant engaged in a verbal altercation with Victim B in the manner described above and assaulted him. When Victim F, who was Victim B's associate, attempted to intervene and stop the assault, the Defendant bent Victim F's finger, thereby inflicting injuries including finger sprain requiring approximately fourteen (14) days of medical treatment.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2018. 7. 12. 지방법원 현주건조물방화미수죄로 징역 1년에 집행유예 2년을 선고받고 그 판결이 2018. 7. 20. 확정되었고, 2018. 6. 26. 같은 법원에서 폭행죄로 징역 3월을 선고받고 2018. 9.22. 구치소에서 그 형의 집행을 종료하였다.
1. 피해자 B에 대한 폭행 범행
피고인은 2019. 12.30. 15:40경 C에 있는 D 마트 앞 도로에서, 술에 만취한 상태에서 도로 한가운데에 아무런 이유 없이 서 있다가 자동차를 운전하여 그 도로를 지나고 있던 피해자 B이 피고인 때문에 지나갈 수 없게 되자 차에서 내려 피고인에게 "길을 비켜 달라"라고 말을 하였다는 이유로 화가 나, 피해자에게 욕설을 하고, 가지고 있던 우산으로 피해자의 배를 1회 밀치고, 주먹으로 피해자의 얼굴을 수회 때려 폭행하였다.
2. 피해자 E에 대한 폭행 범행
피고인은 제1항 기재와 같은 날 19:45경 F에 있는 G병원 1층에서, 술에 취한 채 그곳 병원에 들어가 병실로 올라가려 하다가 병원 접수처에서 근무하고 있던 병원 직원인 피해자 E으로부터 제지를 당하게 되자 화가 나, 피해자에게 욕설을 하면서 달려들어 손으로 피해자를 밀쳐 넘어뜨리고, 넘어진 피해자 위에 올라타 주먹으로 피해자의 얼굴을 약 3회 때려 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
## Prior Criminal Convictions

The Defendant was sentenced on July 12, 2018, by the District Court to imprisonment for one (1) year with a two (2) year suspension of execution for the crime of attempted arson of an occupied structure; said judgment became final on July 20, 2018. Additionally, the Defendant was sentenced on June 26, 2018, by the same court to imprisonment for three (3) months for the crime of assault; the execution of said sentence was completed on September 22, 2018, at the detention facility.



## 1. Assault Against Victim B

On December 30, 2019, at approximately 15:40, on the road in front of D Mart located in C, the Defendant, while in a state of acute intoxication, stood in the middle of the roadway without any legitimate reason. When Victim B, who was operating a motor vehicle and attempting to pass through said road, became unable to proceed due to the Defendant's position and exited the vehicle to ask the Defendant to "move out of the way," the Defendant became enraged. The Defendant then engaged in the following conduct against Victim B: uttered profane language and insults; thrust Victim B's abdomen once with an umbrella in the Defendant's possession; and struck Victim B's face multiple times with the Defendant's fist, thereby committing assault.



## 2. Assault Against Victim E

On the same date as set forth in Section 1, at approximately 19:45, on the first floor of G Hospital located in F, the Defendant, while in a state of intoxication, entered the hospital and attempted to proceed to the ward. Upon being restrained by Victim E, a hospital staff member working at the reception desk of said hospital, the Defendant became enraged. The Defendant then engaged in the following conduct: uttered profane language and insults while charging at Victim E; pushed Victim E down with the Defendant's hands, causing Victim E to fall; mounted the fallen Victim E; and struck Victim E's face approximately three (3) times with the Defendant's fist, thereby committing assault.

facts_kr:
1. 2019. 9. 1.경 범행
피고인은 2019. 9. 1. 22:00경 B아파트 C호에 있는 피고인의 주거지에서, 배우자인 피해자 D과 경제적 문제로 말다툼을 하던 중 집을 나가려다 피해자로부터 가로막히자 화가 나, 구두주걱으로 피해자의 어깨와 가슴을 수회 때려 피해자에게 약 2주간의 치료가 필요한 좌측 상완골 등의 다발성 타박상 등의 상해를 가하였다.
2. 2019. 9. 21.경 범행
피고인은 2019. 9. 21. 20:30경 위 제1항 기재 장소에서, 피고인의 외도 문제로 위 피해자와 말다툼을 하던 중 집을 나가려다 피해자로부터 가로막히자 화가 나, 주먹으로 피해자의 얼굴을 수회 때려 피해자에게 약 2주간의 치료가 필요한 입술 및 구강의 표재성 손상 등의 상해를 가하였다.
3. 2020. 3. 9.경 범행
피고인은 2020. 3. 9. 19:30경 E에 있는 피고인의 농장에서, 피고인의 외도 문제로 위 피해자와 말다툼을 하던 중 피해자에게 "이 씨발년아, 여기까지 왜 따라와서 지랄병이고"라고 하면서 손으로 피해자의 머리채를 붙잡아 자갈 바닥에 넘어뜨리고, 계속하여 바닥에 넘어진 피해자의 허리를 발로 수회 차고 주변에 있던 자갈을 피해자에게 던져, 피해자에게 약 2주간의 치료가 필요한 요추의 염좌 및 긴장 등의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Criminal Conduct of Approximately September 1, 2019

At approximately 22:00 on September 1, 2019, at the defendant's residence located at Unit C, B Apartment, the defendant engaged in a verbal quarrel with the victim D, the defendant's spouse, regarding economic matters. When the defendant attempted to leave the residence and was blocked by the victim, the defendant became angry and struck the victim's shoulders and chest multiple times with a wooden shoehorn, thereby inflicting injuries upon the victim, including multiple contusions of the left humerus and other areas, requiring approximately two weeks of treatment.

## 2. Criminal Conduct of Approximately September 21, 2019

At approximately 20:30 on September 21, 2019, at the location described in paragraph 1 above, the defendant engaged in a verbal quarrel with the aforementioned victim regarding the defendant's infidelity. When the defendant attempted to leave the residence and was blocked by the victim, the defendant became angry and struck the victim's face multiple times with the defendant's fist, thereby inflicting injuries upon the victim, including superficial wounds to the lips and oral cavity, requiring approximately two weeks of treatment.

## 3. Criminal Conduct of Approximately March 9, 2020

At approximately 19:30 on March 9, 2020, at the defendant's farm located in E, the defendant engaged in a verbal quarrel with the aforementioned victim regarding the defendant's infidelity. During the quarrel, the defendant verbally abused the victim, stating: "You fucking bitch, why are you following me here and acting so fucking crazy?" The defendant then seized the victim by the hair, causing the victim to fall to the gravel ground. The defendant subsequently kicked the victim's lower back multiple times as the victim lay on the ground and threw gravel from the surrounding area at the victim, thereby inflicting injuries upon the victim, including a lumbar sprain and strain, requiring approximately two weeks of treatment.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 2. 6. 지방법원 업무방해죄로 징역 8월에 집행유예 2년을 선고받고, 2020. 2. 14. 그 판결이 확정되었다.
피고인은 ‘C식당'을 운영하는 사람이고, 피해자 D는 E에 있는 ‘F'을 운영하는 사람이며, 피해자 G은 같은 읍에서 살면서 피고인과 이웃으로 살고 있는 사람이다.
피고인은 2019. 9. 5.경 피해자 D의 위 음식점에서 행패를 부려 영업을 방해한 사실로 위와 같이 집행유예 판결을 받은 것에 앙심을 품고 피해자 D에게 평소 좋지 않은 감정을 지니고 있었다.
피고인은 2020. 7. 18. 19:15경 위 ‘F' 음식점에 술에 만취하여 찾아가 피해자 D에게 "사과하러 왔다"고 말하였으나, 위 음식점 내에 있던 손님인 피해자 G으로부터 "6개월이 지나서 사과를 하러 왔으면 술을 마시지 않고 맨 정신에 와서 해야 되지 않겠냐"는 말을 듣자 화가 나, 피해자 G의 얼굴을 오른손으로 1회 때려 피해자 G에게 약 2주간의 치료가 필요한 볼의 표재성 손상 및 타박상 등의 상해를 가하고, 계속하여 이를 말리던 피해자 D의 얼굴을 오른손 주먹으로 2회 때려 피해자 D에게 약 6주간의 치료가 필요한 광대뼈 및 상악골의 상세불명 골절, 폐쇄성 안와의 골절, 상세불명의 치수염 등의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
**Prior Conviction:**
On February 6, 2020, the Defendant was sentenced by the District Court to eight months' imprisonment with a two-year suspended sentence for the offense of Obstruction of Business. The judgment became final and conclusive on February 14, 2020.

**Parties:**
The Defendant is a person who operates a restaurant called 'C Restaurant.' Victim D is a person who operates an establishment called 'F' located in E. Victim G is a person residing in the same township and living as a neighbor to the Defendant.

**Motive and Animus:**
Harboring resentment over the suspended sentence he received for engaging in disorderly conduct and obstructing the business operations at Victim D's aforementioned restaurant on approximately September 5, 2019, the Defendant maintained hostile feelings toward Victim D.

**Assault and Injury:**
On July 18, 2020, at approximately 19:15, the Defendant, in a state of intoxication, visited the 'F' restaurant and told Victim D, "I have come to apologize." However, upon hearing Victim G, a patron present inside the restaurant, remark, "If you came to apologize after six months have passed, you should not have come drunk but rather in a sober and proper state," the Defendant became angry. He then struck Victim G's face once with his right hand, thereby inflicting upon Victim G superficial abrasions and contusions of the cheek requiring approximately two weeks of treatment. Subsequently, continuing his assault, the Defendant struck Victim D's face twice with his right fist as Victim D attempted to stop him, thereby inflicting upon Victim D injuries including unspecified fractures of the zygomatic bone and maxilla, fracture of the orbital bone, and unspecified pulpitis, each requiring approximately six weeks of treatment.

facts_kr:
피고인 A는 피해자 B과 자매관계이고, 피해자 C는 피해자 B의 남편이다.
기초사실
피고인은 전에 가입한 보험이 신용불량자가 되어 그 보험에 세무서에서 압류가 들어올 것을 염려하여 피해자 B에게 명의를 돌려놓은 사실이 있다.
그러던 중 피해자 B은 피고인와 토지 거래 중 잘못되어 손해를 입었고, 피고인은 신용불량이 해제되어 피해자에게 명의를 원래대로 돌려 달라고 요구하였으나 피해자 B은 사과를 요구하며 거부하였다.
피고인은 이에 보험 명의를 찾고자 민사소송을 제기하여 지방법원 소송을 마치고 피해자들과 함께 나오면서 말다툼을 하다가 사건이 발생한 것으로 감정의 골이 깊은 사이다.

[Criminal Acts]
1. 피고인은 2017. 9. 20. 12:10경 지방법원 앞 노상에서 민사소송을 마치고 나오면서 화가 나 피해자 C에게 '눈을 뺀다'고 말하여, 피해자가 '빼라'고 대응하자 양손으로 피해자의 옷과 팔을 잡아 흔드는 등 폭행하였다.
2. 피고인은 위 제1항과 같은 일시, 장소에서 위 제1항과 같이 다투는 것을 보고 피해자 B이 그 자리를 피하여 걸어가자 갑자기 뒤에서 손으로 피해자의 등을 치고, 이에 피해자가 돌아서자 다시 오른손으로 가슴을 2회, 오른발로 왼쪽 종아리를 걷어차는 등으로 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
Defendant A is the sister of Victim B. Victim C is the husband of Victim B.



## FOUNDATIONAL FACTS

The Defendant had previously transferred the title of an insurance policy she had subscribed to in her own name to Victim B out of concern that, having become a credit delinquent, the National Tax Service would levy attachment against the policy. Subsequently, during a land transaction between the Defendant and Victim B, an error occurred resulting in financial loss to Victim B. After the Defendant's credit delinquent status was lifted, she demanded that Victim B restore the insurance policy title to her original name. However, Victim B refused, demanding an apology from the Defendant instead. The Defendant thereafter commenced a civil lawsuit to recover the insurance policy title and, upon concluding the proceedings at the District Court, engaged in a verbal altercation with the Victims as they exited the courthouse. The incident arose in the context of a deep-rooted emotional animosity between the parties.



## CRIMINAL ACTS

**1. Simple Assault against Victim C**

On September 20, 2017, at approximately 12:10 p.m., on a public road in front of the District Court, as the Defendant was leaving after concluding her civil lawsuit, she became enraged and threatened Victim C by saying, "I will gouge out your eyes." When Victim C responded by saying, "Go ahead," the Defendant grabbed Victim C's clothing and arm with both hands and shook him violently, thereby committing simple assault.

**2. Multiple Acts of Simple Assault against Victim B**

At the same date and location as described in Section 1 above, while the aforementioned altercation was ongoing, Victim B attempted to withdraw from the scene and walked away. The Defendant suddenly struck Victim B on the back with her hand from behind. When Victim B turned around to face her, the Defendant further assaulted Victim B by striking her chest twice with her right hand and kicking her left calf with her right foot.

facts_kr:
1. 피해자 B에 대한 폭행
피고인은 2019. 8. 23. 20:10경 C 앞 노상에서 그곳에 놓인 의자에 걸려 넘어지게 되자 그 의자를 들고 그곳에 주차된 D 트라제 승용차의 뒷 부분에 던졌고, 이에 피해자로부터 항의를 받자 피해자에게 욕설을 하면서 손바닥으로 피해자의 얼굴 부위를 1회 때리고, 목 부위를 움켜잡아 밀고, 손으로 피해자의 오른쪽 가슴 부분을 1회 꼬집는 등 폭행하였다.
2. 피해자 E에 대한 폭행
피고인은 위 일시·장소에서 피고인이 제1항 기재와 같이 B를 폭행한 것을 피해자가 말린다는 이유로, 손으로 피해자의 얼굴 부위를 수회 때리는 등 폭행하였다.
이에 대하여 피고인은 피해자들을 폭행한 사실이 없다며 다툰다.
피해자들의 수사기관에서의 진술과 이 법정에서의 증언이 정확히 일치하지는 아니하나, 사건 당일부터 일관되게 피고인에게 폭행당하였다고 진술하고 있다. 피고인은 경찰이 출동한 이후에도 B의 어깨를 밀치고 주먹으로 때리려다가 제지당하기도 하였고(피고인은 이 부분은 술을 많이 마셔서 기억이 잘 안 난다고 하면서도 피해자들을 폭행한 사실은 없다고 주장하고 있다), 기록에 첨부된 사진에 의하면 피고인과 피해자들 사이에 신체적인 접촉이 있었던 것으로 보인다.
결국 피고인의 주장은 받아들이지 아니한다.

facts_en:
## 1. Assault Against Victim B

On August 23, 2019, at approximately 20:10, on a public street in front of C, the Defendant tripped over a chair that was placed there. The Defendant then picked up the chair and threw it at the rear portion of a D-brand sedan automobile parked at that location. Upon receiving a protest from the Victim, the Defendant directed vulgar insults toward the Victim while striking the Victim's face with an open palm on one occasion, seizing and pushing the Victim's neck, and pinching the Victim's right chest area with his hand on one occasion, thereby committing assault.

## 2. Assault Against Victim E

At the aforementioned date and location, the Defendant committed assault against the Victim by striking the Victim's face area multiple times with his hand, on the grounds that the Victim attempted to stop the Defendant from assaulting B as described in paragraph 1 above.

## Defense and Court's Evaluation

The Defendant contests the facts alleged, denying that he assaulted either Victim.

The Victims' statements made to investigative authorities and their testimony presented in this courtroom do not correspond with complete precision; however, they have consistently maintained since the date of the incident that they were assaulted by the Defendant. After police arrived at the scene, the Defendant pushed the Victim B's shoulder and attempted to strike him with a closed fist before being restrained (the Defendant claims that due to consuming a large quantity of alcohol, he does not recall this portion well, yet maintains that he did not assault the Victims). According to photographs attached to the record, it is evident that physical contact occurred between the Defendant and the Victims.

Accordingly, the Defendant's assertions are rejected.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2018. 8. 17. 18:00경 B에 있는 피고인의 집에서, 피해자 C와 함께 술을 마시던 중 피해자가 "D 대통령은 훌륭한 사람이었다. 좋은 사람이다"라고 말하였다는 이유로 발로 피해자의 오른쪽 어깨 부위를 1회 걷어차고, 피해자의 뒷덜미를 잡고 밖으로 끌고 나가 밀쳐 피해자에게 약 56일간의 치료를 요하는 우측 상완골 외측 융기 관절내 골절 등의 상해를 가하였다.
피고인 및 변호인은, 피고인이 피해자를 때린 사실이 없고, 피해자가 현관 밖 계단에서 스스로 넘어져서 상해를 입었다고 주장하나, 기록에 의해 인정되는, 피해자는 이 법정에서 피고인이 오른 발로 피해자의 어깨를 차서 팔이 부러졌고, 뒷덜미를 잡고 자신을 현관 밖으로 끌고나가면서 엉덩이 등을 다쳤다고 진술한 점, 피해자는 피고인이 뒷덜미를 잡아 당겨 옷이 찢어졌다고 진술하였는데, 사건 직후 촬영된 사진에 의하면 피해자의 상의가 찢어져 있는 점(수사기록 제 10면), 상해진단서상 상해 부위 및 정도가 피해자의 위 진술에 부합하는 점, 피고인의 주장과 같이 피해자가 현관 밖에서 스스로 넘어지면서 오른쪽 어깨가 골절되기는 경험칙상 쉽지 않아 보이는 점, 등에 비추어 보면, 피고인은 범죄사실 기재와 같이 피해자에게 상해를 가하였다고 판단되므로, 위 주장은 받아들이지 아니한다

facts_en:
On August 17, 2018, at approximately 18:00, at the Defendant's residence located in B, while drinking alcohol together with Victim C, the Defendant, upon the grounds that the Victim stated "President D was an excellent person. He is a good person," kicked the Victim's right shoulder area once with his foot, grabbed the Victim by the nape of the neck, dragged the Victim outside, and pushed the Victim, thereby inflicting bodily injury upon the Victim requiring approximately 56 days of medical treatment, including an intra-articular fracture of the lateral epicondyle of the right humerus, among other injuries.

The Defendant and his counsel argue that the Defendant did not strike the Victim, and that the Victim sustained the injury by falling on his own from the stairs outside the entrance. However, based on the record, the Victim testified in open court that the Defendant kicked the Victim's shoulder with his right foot, fracturing the Victim's arm, and grabbed the Victim by the nape of the neck, dragged the Victim outside the entrance, thereby causing injury to the Victim's buttocks and other areas. The Victim further testified that the Defendant grabbed and pulled the Victim by the nape of the neck, tearing the Victim's upper garment. Photographic evidence taken immediately following the incident demonstrates that the Victim's upper garment was torn (Investigation Records, p. 10). The injury site and degree documented in the injury diagnosis certificate align with the Victim's foregoing testimony. It appears from the perspective of common experience that the Victim would not easily sustain a fracture of the right shoulder by falling on his own outside the entrance, as argued by the Defendant. In light of the foregoing, the Court finds that the Defendant inflicted bodily injury upon the Victim as stated in the facts of the offense charged, and therefore does not accept the Defendant's aforementioned argument.

facts_kr:
1. 피해자 B에 대한 상해
피고인은 2020. 10. 5. 00:50 C에 있는 D중학교 관사 E호 앞에서 평소 서운한 감정이 있었던 같은 학교 교사인 피해자 B을 불러내어 피해자의 머리채를 잡고 주먹으로 피해자의 얼굴을 2회 때리고, "무릎을 꿇어라. 내가 태권도 유단자다."라고 이야기하며 양 주먹으로 피해자의 얼굴을 10회 가량 때리고 이에 피해자가 바닥에 쓰러지자 발로 피해자의 얼굴과 허리 부위를 10회 가량 걷어찼다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자에게 약 28일간의 치료를 요하는 치아의 아탈구, 두피의 표재성 손상, 요추의 염좌 및 긴장 등의 상해를 가하였다.
2. 피해자 F에 대한 상해
피고인은 2020. 10. 5. 00:54 C에 있는 D중학교 관사 G호로 올라가 평소 서운한 감정이 있었던 같은 학교 교사인 피해자 F를 불러내어 "왜 나를 무시하느냐."라고 이야기하며 피해자의 정강이를 발로 수회 걷어차고, 피해자가 학교 일을 마음대로 하며 피고인을 무시했다고 이야기하며 주먹으로 피해자의 코와 턱, 입술 부위를 수회 때리고, 계속하여 주먹 안쪽으로 피해자의 얼굴을 수회 때렸다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자에게 약 21일간의 치료를 요하는 비골 골절, 기타 머리 부분의 표재성 손상, 타박상을 가하였다.

facts_en:
## 1. Assault Against Victim B

On October 5, 2020, at approximately 00:50, the Defendant summoned Victim B, a teacher at the same school toward whom the Defendant harbored long-standing resentment, to the front of Unit E of the D Middle School Official Residence located in C. The Defendant then grabbed Victim B by the hair, struck Victim B's face twice with his fists, and stated, "Get down on your knees. I am a taekwondo dan holder." Thereafter, the Defendant struck Victim B's face approximately 10 times with both fists. When Victim B fell to the ground as a result, the Defendant kicked Victim B's face and lower back area approximately 10 times with his foot.

By these actions, the Defendant inflicted upon Victim B injuries requiring approximately 28 days of treatment, including: subluxation of the teeth, superficial laceration of the scalp, and sprain and strain of the lumbar vertebrae.

## 2. Assault Against Victim F

On October 5, 2020, at approximately 00:54, the Defendant went up to Unit G of the D Middle School Official Residence located in C and summoned Victim F, a teacher at the same school toward whom the Defendant harbored long-standing resentment. The Defendant stated, "Why do you disrespect me?" and kicked Victim F's shin multiple times with his foot. The Defendant then stated that Victim F had conducted school affairs arbitrarily and disrespected the Defendant, and struck Victim F's nose, chin, and lip area multiple times with his fist. Subsequently, the Defendant struck Victim F's face multiple times with the inner side of his fist.

By these actions, the Defendant inflicted upon Victim F injuries requiring approximately 21 days of treatment, including: fracture of the fibula, superficial laceration of the head, and contusion.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 4. 12. 13:00경 B아파트 C호에서 거실에서 안방으로 들어가려고 하는 남편인 피해자 D의 오른쪽 허리 부위를 발로 차고 멱살을 잡는 등 폭행하였다.
증거의 요지 1. 증인 D의 법정진술
1. D에 경찰진술조서
1. D 고소장
1. 동영상CD
피고인측 주장에 관한 판단
피고인측은, 이혼소송 중인 피해자와 각방을 쓰고 있었는데 당시 피해자가 강제적으로 피고인 방으로 밀고 들어오기에 폭력이 생길 우려가 있어 밀쳤을 뿐, 피고인의 행위는 정당방위 또는 정당행위에 해당한다는 취지로 주장한다.
일단, 앞서 본 증거들에 의하면 피고인이 피해자의 허리 부위를 발로 차는 등의 행동을 한 사실이 인정되는데, 피고인은 이를 주관적으로 '밀쳤다'고 생각하고 있을지라도 그 행동이 폭행에 해당함은 자명하다. 기록에 의하더라도, 당시 피고인과 피해자가 서로 신경전을 벌이며 갈등이 극대화 되어 있는 상태였던 점은 인정되지만, 나아가 당시 피해자가 피고인에게 해를 끼칠 만한 급박한 상황이었다고까지 볼 자료는 없으며, 피고인 역시 '폭력이 생길 우려가 있었다'는 취지로 주장하고 있을 뿐이다. 피고인측의 위 정당방위 등 주장은 받아들이기 어렵다.

facts_en:
On April 12, 2019, at approximately 13:00, at Unit C, B Apartment, the defendant committed assault against the victim D, her husband, by kicking him on the right lower back area as he was attempting to enter the master bedroom from the living room, and by grabbing him by the collar.

**Summary of Evidence:**

1. In-court testimony of Witness D
2. Police Statement Record of D
3. Complaint Document filed by D
4. Video CD

**Determination Regarding the Defense's Arguments:**

The defendant contends that, while engaged in divorce proceedings, the parties occupied separate bedrooms, and at the time in question, the victim forcibly pushed his way into the defendant's room; that the defendant merely pushed back out of concern that violence might occur; and that the defendant's conduct therefore constitutes either self-defense or a justifiable act.

First, based on the evidence examined above, it is established that the defendant engaged in conduct including kicking the victim on the lower back area. Regardless of whether the defendant subjectively perceived her action as merely a "push," it is manifest that such conduct constitutes assault. According to the record, while it is acknowledged that at that time the defendant and the victim were engaged in a tense confrontation with conflict escalated to a maximum degree, there is no evidence demonstrating that the situation was so imminent and urgent as to cause the victim to inflict harm upon the defendant. Moreover, the defendant merely argues that "there was a concern that violence might occur." Accordingly, the defendant's assertion of self-defense and the like cannot be accepted.

facts_kr:
피고인과 피해자 B는 이혼 소송 중인 부부 사이이다.
1. 피고인은 2016. 10. 18. 21:00경 피고인과 피해자의 주거지인 C에 있는 전원주택 1층 거실에서, 피해자와 집안 살림 문제로 시비가 되어 말다툼을 하던 중 화가 나 양손으로 피해자의 머리채를 잡고 수회 흔들고, 주먹으로 피해자의 얼굴을 약 3회 때려 피해자에게 약 2주간의 치료가 필요한 다발성 좌상, 구강점막부 열상 등의 상해를 가하였다.
2. 피고인은 2018. 5. 30. 10:00경 피고인이 운영하는 D에 있는 ‘E' 휴대전화 대리점에서, 피해자와 학원 운영 문제로 시비가 되어 말다툼을 하던 중 화가 나 주먹으로 피해자의 머리, 왼쪽 눈, 팔뚝 부위 등을 약 3회 때려 피해자에게 약 2주간의 치료가 필요한 좌측 두정부, 안면, 상완 타박상 등의 상해를 가하였다.
3. 피고인은 2019. 4. 9. 19:00경 피고인이 운영하는 F에 있는 ‘E' 휴대전화 대리점에서, 피해자와 학원 차량 운행 문제로 시비가 되어 말다툼을 하던 중 화가 나 오른쪽 무릎으로 피해자의 음부를 1회 걷어 차 피해자에게 약 3주간의 치료가 필요한 외부 생식기관의 타박상, 복부 아래등 및 골반 부위의 상세불명 혈관 손상, 외상성 동맥 혈종 등의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
**The defendant and victim B are a married couple in the midst of divorce proceedings.**

**1. On October 18, 2016, at approximately 21:00, in the first-floor living room of a country house located in C, which is the residential address of the defendant and the victim, the defendant engaged in a verbal altercation with the victim over domestic household management issues. While quarreling, the defendant became angry, grabbed the victim's hair with both hands, shook the victim multiple times, and struck the victim's face approximately three times with his fists, thereby inflicting injuries upon the victim requiring approximately two weeks of medical treatment, including multiple contusions on the left side of the body and laceration of the oral mucous membrane.**

**2. On May 30, 2018, at approximately 10:00, at the 'E' mobile phone agency located in D, which is operated by the defendant, the defendant engaged in a verbal altercation with the victim over issues relating to the operation of a private academy. While quarreling, the defendant became angry and struck the victim approximately three times with his fists on the victim's head, left eye, and forearm regions, thereby inflicting injuries upon the victim requiring approximately two weeks of medical treatment, including contusion of the left parietal region, contusion of the facial area, and contusion of the upper arm.**

**3. On April 9, 2019, at approximately 19:00, at the 'E' mobile phone agency located in F, which is operated by the defendant, the defendant engaged in a verbal altercation with the victim over issues relating to the operation of a private academy vehicle. While quarreling, the defendant became angry and kicked the victim's external genitalia once with his right knee, thereby inflicting injuries upon the victim requiring approximately three weeks of medical treatment, including contusion of the external genitalia, unspecified vascular injury to the lower abdomen and pelvic region, and traumatic arterial hematoma.**

facts_kr:
피고인과 피해자 B는 2002년경부터 지금까지 약 18년간 법적 부부이다.
피고인은 2019. 2. 17. 20:10부터 20:45경까지 사이에 자신의 주거지인 C아파트 D호 방안에서 금전문제로 피해자에게 구박을 듣자 순간 흥분하여, 평소 복용하던 정신과 한약 10봉지가량을 베란다에서 가져와 뜯은 뒤 우동그릇에 담아 이를 한꺼번에 복용하려 하였고, 피해자가 이를 빼앗아 싱크대 개수대에 버리자 격분하여 "이 씹할, 그거 먹고 잠 자려고 하는데, 내 약을 왜 버리냐"라고 화를 내면서 재차 안방 서랍에 있던 양약을 5봉지 가량 뜯어 한손에 들고 이를 복용하려 하였다.
피해자가 이를 다시 빼앗으려 하자 그녀의 가슴을 1회 밀어 넘어뜨리고, 다시 일어나 자신이 들고 있는 약봉지를 계속 빼앗으려고 하는 피해자를 재차 1회 밀쳐 폭행하고 베란다로 이동한 뒤, 양약을 입에 털어 넣고 베란다에 있던 한약을 물 대신 이용하여 이를 복용하려던 것을 피해자가 베란다까지 따라 들어와 제지하자 격분하여 피해자의 왼쪽 손목을 오른손으로 쥐어 잡아 3회 가량 꺾어 폭행하고, 연이어 피해자의 오른손을 입으로 깨물어 폭행하였다.
이로써 피고인은 위와 같이 피해자를 폭행하여 그녀에게 14일간의 치료를 요하는 좌측 1번수지 염좌 및 양측 수부개방성 상처를 가하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant and Victim B have been married in law for approximately 18 years since around 2002 to the present.

On February 17, 2019, between 20:10 and approximately 20:45, in a room of Unit D in Apartment Complex C, which is the Defendant's residence, the Defendant, upon hearing reproaches from the Victim regarding financial matters, became suddenly agitated and excited. The Defendant retrieved approximately ten sachets of psychiatric herbal medicine (한약) that he had been habitually consuming from the balcony, tore them open, placed them in an udon noodle bowl, and attempted to consume all of them at once. When the Victim snatched these away and discarded them into the kitchen sink, the Defendant became indignant and angrily exclaimed, "You fucking bitch, I was trying to take these and sleep, why are you throwing away my medicine?" Thereupon, the Defendant again tore open approximately five sachets of Western medicine (양약) from a drawer in the master bedroom, held them in one hand, and attempted to consume them.

When the Victim again attempted to snatch these away from him, the Defendant pushed her in the chest once, causing her to fall. After she rose again and continued attempting to snatch away the medicine sachets he was holding, the Defendant assaulted her by pushing her once more. He then moved to the balcony, poured the Western medicine into his mouth, and attempted to consume it using herbal medicine on the balcony in place of water. When the Victim followed him onto the balcony and attempted to restrain him, the Defendant became indignant and, with his right hand, grasped the Victim's left wrist, bent it approximately three times, thereby committing battery. Subsequently, the Defendant bit the Victim's right hand with his mouth, thereby committing battery.

By means of the aforementioned assaults inflicted upon the Victim, the Defendant caused her to sustain injuries requiring 14 days of medical treatment, including a left first digit (thumb) sprain (좌측 1번수지 염좌) and bilateral open wounds to the hands (양측 수부개방성 상처).

facts_kr:
피고인은 피해자 B 등 부부 동반 4가족 총 8명에 대한 해외여행 계약을 체결하고 2019. 5. 28. 총 8박 10일간 여행인솔자 자격으로 동반 출국하여 스페인국 마드리드에 도착하여 2박 3일 일정으로 여행을 마친 뒤 같은 달 30. 저녁에 C 호텔에 투숙하였다.
피고인은 2019. 5. 30. 23:30경(현지 시각) 위 호텔 D호에서 피해자를 포함한 여행객, 현지 인솔자 등과 같이 술을 마시던 중, 해외여행 인솔에 대해서 여행객들로부터 질책을 받았다는 이유로 화가 난 상태에서, 피해자와 함께 피고인의 숙소인 E호로 자리를 옮긴 후 대화를 하던 중 말다툼이 벌어져 시비가 되었다.
피고인은 피해자에게 화를 내며 손바닥으로 피해자의 얼굴을 향해 때릴 듯이 휘두르며 "이 씹할년아!"라고 욕설을 하고, 주먹으로 피해자의 머리, 등, 얼굴, 가슴 부위를 수회 때리고, 계속해서 폭행으로 인해 넘어져 있는 피해자를 잡아 당겨 침대로 끌고 가 눕혀 놓고 주먹으로 머리를 수회 때리고, 기어가며 도망가는 피해자를 쫓아가 발로 옆구리를 1회 걷어찼다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자에게 약 42일간의 치료가 필요한 (복)강내로의 열린 상처 없는 간의 손상, 세 개의 늑골을 침범한 다발골절, 폐쇄성 등의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
**Defendant's Conduct and Facts of Assault**

The Defendant entered into an overseas travel contract with Victim B and three other couples, comprising eight persons in total, and departed the country on May 28, 2019, in the capacity of tour escort for an eight-night, ten-day itinerary. Upon arrival in Madrid, Spain, the Defendant completed a two-night, three-day tour schedule and checked into Hotel C on the evening of May 30 of the same month.

On May 30, 2019, at approximately 23:30 (local time), the Defendant was consuming alcoholic beverages in Room D of the aforementioned hotel in the company of tour participants, including the Victim, and a local tour escort, when the Defendant became angered after receiving reproaches from the tour participants regarding the management of the overseas itinerary. The Defendant subsequently relocated to Room E—the Defendant's own lodging—together with the Victim, and during conversation, a verbal altercation ensued, escalating into a dispute.

In a state of anger directed at the Victim, the Defendant swung his open palm toward the Victim's face in a striking motion while uttering the profanity, "You fucking bitch!" The Defendant then struck the Victim repeatedly with his fist on the head, back, face, and chest areas. Continuing the assault, after the Victim fell to the ground as a result of the blows, the Defendant seized and dragged the Victim to the bed, laid the Victim down, and struck the Victim's head multiple times with his fist. When the Victim attempted to escape by crawling away, the Defendant pursued and kicked the Victim once on the lateral torso with his foot.

As a result of this assault, the Defendant inflicted upon the Victim the following injuries, necessitating approximately forty-two days of medical treatment: blunt force trauma to the liver without laceration (closed intra-abdominal injury), multiple rib fractures involving three ribs, and closed trauma to the thoracic region.

facts_kr:
피고인은 일정한 직업이 없이 생활하는 사람이고, 피해자 B은 노동에 종사하는 사람이다.
피고인은 2020. 10. 28. 13:23경 C에 있는 D조합 본점에 용무가 있어 E 싼타페 승용차를 운전하여 부안군청 쪽에서 사거리 방면으로 진행하다 D조합 앞 인도상에 차량을 역주차 후 하차하려고 하였다.
마침 맞은편 인도를 따라 걸어오던 피해자는 피의차량 전면에 다가가 본넷트를 주먹으로 툭 치면서 피고인을 향해 손가락질하였는데 이를 보고 당황한 피고인이 황급히 하차하려고 운전석 문을 조금 연 순간 기어가 ‘D' 위치에 있어 피의차량이 서서히 밀려 전진하게 되어 앞 범퍼 부분과 피해자의 무릎이 접촉되어 피해자가 땅바닥에 엉덩방아를 찧으며 뒤로 넘어지게 되었다.
피고인은 하차 후 바닥에서 일어나려는 피해자에게 다가가 손을 내밀며 "장난치지말고 어서 일어나"라고 말하자 피해자가 "내가 보이스피싱범이냐?" 라고 따지면서 피고인의 오른팔을 붙잡고 늘어지며 진로를 방해하자 유도기술을 떠올려 양손으로 피해자의 오른 손목을 붙잡고 그대로 오른쪽으로 한 바퀴 돌리면서 땅바닥에 뿌리쳐 피해자를 넘어지게 하는 폭행을 행사하였다.
이로써 피해자에게 약 2주간의 안정을 요하는 무릎 부분의 염좌 및 긴장, 무릎의 타박상 등의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
**Defendant's and Victim's Background:**
The defendant is a person without steady employment, and Victim B is a person engaged in labor work.

**Factual Narrative:**

On October 28, 2020, at approximately 13:23, the defendant, having business to conduct at the D Cooperative headquarters located in C, was operating a Hyundai Santa Fe sedan vehicle. He was proceeding from the direction of the Buan County Office toward a four-way intersection when he attempted to reverse-park his vehicle on the sidewalk in front of the D Cooperative and subsequently exit the vehicle.

At that moment, Victim B, who had been walking along the opposite sidewalk, approached the front of the defendant's vehicle, struck the hood with his fist in a light tapping motion, and pointed his finger at the defendant. Upon witnessing this gesture, the defendant, startled and flustered, began to open the driver's side door to exit. However, the gear was positioned at 'D' (Drive), causing the defendant's vehicle to slowly creep forward. The front bumper came into contact with the victim's knee, causing the victim to fall backward and land on his buttocks on the ground.

After exiting the vehicle, the defendant approached the victim, who was attempting to rise from the ground, extended his hand, and said, "Don't joke around—get up now." The victim responded by asking, "Am I a voice phishing scammer?" while grasping the defendant's right arm and pulling on it, thereby obstructing the defendant's passage. The defendant, recalling judo techniques, seized the victim's right wrist with both hands, rotated it clockwise in a circular motion, and threw the victim forcefully to the ground, thereby committing an assault upon the victim.

**Injury Resulting from Assault:**

As a result, the defendant inflicted upon the victim injuries comprising a sprain and strain of the knee requiring approximately two weeks of rest, as well as contusions to the knee.

facts_kr:
피고인은 피해자 B의 남편이다.
1. 2019. 6. 2.자 범행
피고인은 2019. 6. 2. 14:00경 C, D호에 있는 피고인의 주거지에서 피해자가 말대답을 한다는 이유로 화가 나 유리컵을 들어 피해자의 손목에 던져 맞추는 등 피해자를 폭행하였다.
2. 2019. 7. 7.자 범행
피고인은 2019. 7. 7. 10:00경 피고인의 위 주거지에서 교회 예배 문제로 피해자와 말다툼 하던 중 화가 나 피해자를 밀치고 손으로 피해자의 목을 조른 다음 피해자의 머리를 잡고 김치냉장고에 2~3회 부딪히게 하는 등 피해자를 폭행하였다.
3. 2019. 12. 30.자 범행
피고인은 2019. 12. 30. 22:00경 피고인의 위 주거지에서 피해자가 제때 도시가스 명의를 이전하지 않았다는 이유로 피해자와 다투던 중 화가 나 피해자에게 욕설을 하면서 피해자를 밀어 바닥에 넘어뜨리는 등 피해자를 폭행하였다.
4. 2020. 1. 4.자 범행
피고인은 2020. 1. 4. 21:35경 피고인의 위 주거지에서 피해자와 도시가스요금 자동이체 문제로 말다툼을 하던 중 화가 나 CCTV가 설치되어 있지 않는 방으로 피해자의 양팔을 잡아끌고 양 손으로 피해자의 어깨를 누르며 위 방으로 끌고 들어가는 등 피해자를 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
**The Defendant is the husband of Victim B.**

**1. Criminal Conduct on June 2, 2019**

At approximately 14:00 on June 2, 2019, at the Defendant's residence located at Unit C, Building D, the Defendant became angry because the Victim spoke back to him, picked up a glass cup, and threw it at the Victim's wrist, striking her, thereby committing assault against the Victim.

**2. Criminal Conduct on July 7, 2019**

At approximately 10:00 on July 7, 2019, at the Defendant's aforementioned residence, while the Defendant and the Victim were in a verbal altercation regarding church worship matters, the Defendant became angry, pushed the Victim, grasped the Victim's neck with his hands and strangled her, then grabbed the Victim's head and struck her against a kimchi refrigerator two to three times, thereby committing assault against the Victim.

**3. Criminal Conduct on December 30, 2019**

At approximately 22:00 on December 30, 2019, at the Defendant's aforementioned residence, while the Defendant and the Victim were in a quarrel because the Victim failed to transfer the utility account for municipal gas in a timely manner, the Defendant became angry, hurled profanity at the Victim, pushed the Victim causing her to fall to the floor, thereby committing assault against the Victim.

**4. Criminal Conduct on January 4, 2020**

At approximately 21:35 on January 4, 2020, at the Defendant's aforementioned residence, while the Defendant and the Victim were in a verbal altercation regarding automatic withdrawal of municipal gas charges, the Defendant became angry, grabbed and dragged the Victim's both arms into a room in which no CCTV was installed, pressed down on the Victim's shoulders with both hands while dragging her into said room, thereby committing assault against the Victim.

facts_kr:
피고인은 피해자 B과 2014. 10.경부터 2018. 12.경까지 사실혼 관계를 유지하였다.
1. 2018. 7. 12.자 폭행
피고인은 2018. 7. 12. 23:00경 C에 있는 주거지에서 에어콘을 켜기 위하여 피해자에게 리모콘을 달라고 하였으나 피해자로부터 리모콘을 갖고 있지 않다는 말을 듣고 무시를 당하였다며 피해자와 말다툼을 하다가 피해자에게 휴대전화기를 달라고 하였고, 이를 거부하며 휴대전화기를 가슴에 껴안고 엎드려 있는 피해자의 머리를 손으로 잡아 바닥에 눌렀다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 폭행하였다.
2. 2018. 11. 4.자 폭행
피고인은 2018. 11. 4. 22:00경 제1항 기재 장소에서 피고인의 아들 문제로 피해자와 말다툼을 하던 중 피해자가 휴대전화기로 녹음을 한다고 오해하여 피해자에게 휴대전화기를 달라고 하였으나 거절당하자 휴대전화기를 안고 있는 피해자의 머리 부위를 주먹으로 때렸다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 폭행하였다.
3. 2018. 12. 26.자 폭행
피고인은 2018. 12. 26. 02:30경 제1항 기재 장소에서 피해자에게 테블릿 PC의 소리를 줄여달라고 하였으나 거절당하자 화가 나 피해자의 엉덩이 부위를 발로 찼다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
**Factual Background:**

The Defendant maintained a de facto marital relationship with Victim B from approximately October 2014 to approximately December 2018.

**1. Assault on July 12, 2018**

On July 12, 2018, at approximately 23:00, at the Defendant's residence located in C, the Defendant requested a remote control from Victim B in order to turn on the air conditioning. Upon receiving a response from Victim B that she did not have the remote control, the Defendant felt disrespected and engaged in a verbal altercation with Victim B. The Defendant then demanded that Victim B hand over her mobile phone. When Victim B refused and lay in a prone position while cradling the mobile phone against her chest, the Defendant grabbed Victim B's head with his hand and pressed it against the floor.

By these actions, the Defendant committed assault against Victim B.

**2. Assault on November 4, 2018**

On November 4, 2018, at approximately 22:00, at the location described in paragraph 1 above, the Defendant was engaged in a verbal altercation with Victim B regarding a matter concerning the Defendant's son. The Defendant misinterpreted Victim B's actions as an attempt to make a recording on her mobile phone and demanded that she surrender the mobile phone. When Victim B refused, the Defendant struck Victim B on the head with his fist while she was holding the mobile phone.

By these actions, the Defendant committed assault against Victim B.

**3. Assault on December 26, 2018**

On December 26, 2018, at approximately 02:30, at the location described in paragraph 1 above, the Defendant requested that Victim B reduce the volume on a tablet PC. Upon Victim B's refusal, the Defendant became angry and kicked Victim B in the buttocks area with his foot.

By these actions, the Defendant committed assault against Victim B.

facts_kr:
피고인은 피해자 B과 2017. 4. 15.경부터 같은 해 9. 30.경까지 사실혼관계였고, 현재는 이혼소송과 재산분할청구소송 중이다.
1. 2016. 10. 2.경 폭행
피고인은 2016. 10. 2. 18:00경 올라오는 고속도로 위 피해자가 운전하는 SM5 승용차 안에서, 피해자가 과거 여자친구를 친구들과의 모임에 데려왔다는 이유로 다투던 중 중 화가 나 손으로 피해자의 어깨와 손 등을 수회 때리고 손톱으로 피해자의 양 팔을 잡아 뜯고, 긁는 방법으로 피해자를 폭행하였다.
2. 2017. 5. 25.경 폭행
피고인은 2017. 5. 25. 23:00경 C에 있는 주거지에서 부부관계와 피해자의 수입에 대해 다투던 중 화가 나 손으로 피해자의 어깨와 손 등을 수회 때리고, 손톱으로 피해자의 양 팔을 잡아 뜯고, 긁는 방법으로 폭행하였다.
3. 2017. 8. 28.경 폭행
피고인은 2017. 8. 28. 19:00경 위 주거지에서, 피해자가 운전 중 휴대폰을 조작하는 것을 보고 이를 제지하였음에도 계속 운전 중 휴대폰을 만졌다는 이유로 다투던 중 화가 나 손으로 피해자의 등, 어깨를 수회 때리고, 손톱으로 피해자의 양 팔을 잡아 뜯고, 긁는 방법으로 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant and Victim B maintained a de facto marital relationship from approximately April 15, 2017, to approximately September 30, 2017. They are currently engaged in divorce litigation and a property division claim lawsuit.

## 1. Assault on October 2, 2016

On October 2, 2016, at approximately 18:00, while inside an SM5 sedan operated by the Victim on an ascending expressway, the Defendant became angry during an argument with the Victim over the Victim's past conduct of bringing a former girlfriend to a social gathering with friends. The Defendant then assaulted the Victim by: (a) striking the Victim's shoulders and hands multiple times with his hands; and (b) grabbing, tearing, and scratching the Victim's both arms using his fingernails.

## 2. Assault on May 25, 2017

On May 25, 2017, at approximately 23:00, at a residence located in C, the Defendant became angry during an argument with the Victim concerning marital relations and the Victim's income. The Defendant then assaulted the Victim by: (a) striking the Victim's shoulders and hands multiple times with his hands; and (b) grabbing, tearing, and scratching the Victim's both arms using his fingernails.

## 3. Assault on August 28, 2017

On August 28, 2017, at approximately 19:00, at the aforementioned residence, the Defendant observed the Victim manipulating a mobile phone while driving. Although the Defendant attempted to stop this behavior, the Victim continued to touch the mobile phone while driving. The Defendant became angry and assaulted the Victim by: (a) striking the Victim's back and shoulders multiple times with his hands; and (b) grabbing, tearing, and scratching the Victim's both arms using his fingernails.

facts_kr:
[Criminal Record]
피고인은 2019. 7. 11. 지방법원에서 상해죄 등으로 징역 8월을 선고받고 2019. 11. 24. 구치소에서 그 형의 집행을 종료하였고, 2020. 6. 24. 같은 법원에서 업무방해죄로 징역 6월을 선고받고 2020. 12. 21. 구치소에서 그 형의 집행을 종료하였다.

[Criminal Acts]
피고인은 피해자 B과 2018.경 약 5개월간 연인관계였던 사람이다.
피고인은 피해자가 근무하는 마트에 찾아가 업무를 방해한 사건으로 기소되어 징역형을 선고받고 2020. 12. 21. 출소하였는데 출소 직후 피해자에게 ‘자리를 잡을 때까지 도와 달라.'라고 요청하면서 피해자와 매일 통화를 하였다.

## [Criminal Record]

The Defendant was sentenced to eight (8) months' imprisonment for the offense of Assault, et al., by the District Court on July 11, 2019, and completed execution of the sentence at the Detention Facility on November 24, 2019. The Defendant was subsequently sentenced to six (6) months' imprisonment for the offense of Obstruction of Business on June 24, 2020, by the same court, and completed execution of the sentence at the Detention Facility on December 21, 2020.



## [Criminal Acts]

The Defendant was a person who maintained a romantic relationship with Victim B for approximately five (5) months around 2018.

The Defendant was prosecuted for obstructing business by visiting the supermarket where the Victim was employed, was sentenced to a term of imprisonment, and was released on December 21, 2020. Shortly after his release, the Defendant repeatedly requested the Victim, stating "Please help me until I get settled," and engaged in daily telephone conversations with the Victim.

On January 8, 2021, at approximately the morning hour, the Defendant called the Victim and stated, "I saw you talking with another man at the supermarket," thereby demonstrating continued refusal to accept the separation from the Victim and displaying obsessive behavior toward the Victim. This provoked the Victim's anger, leading to a verbal altercation. On the same day at approximately 21:00 hours, the Defendant visited D located in C and attempted to speak with the Victim, who was working. When the Victim ignored him and entered the office, the Defendant followed the Victim, seized the Victim by the nape of the neck with one hand, then grasped the Victim's face with the other hand and pushed, causing the Victim to fall to the ground, thereby committing Assault.

## Defendant's Status and Criminal History
### (Recidivism)

The Defendant received a sentence of one year and six months imprisonment and custodial treatment order on January 12, 2017, from the District Court for violation of the Act on the Aggravated Punishment, etc. of Specific Crimes (Theft) and other offenses. The Defendant completed the execution of said sentence at the Eastern Detention Center on July 11, 2018. Subsequently, on December 21, 2018, the District Court sentenced the Defendant to one year imprisonment for Obstruction of Official Duties and Assault. The Defendant is currently serving said sentence at a correctional institution.

## [Criminal Acts]

On or about December 27, 2020, while at Correctional Institution B, the Defendant engaged in a verbal altercation with the Victim D, who was confined in Cell C, and received a disciplinary reprimand as a result thereof.

Thereafter, on December 28, 2020, at approximately 08:55, while moving toward the exercise yard at the aforementioned location, the Defendant spotted the Victim. The Defendant's anger regarding the verbal altercation from the previous day remained unresolved. The Defendant approached the Victim and said, "Why are you speaking that way?" Upon hearing the Victim respond, "Don't talk to me," the Defendant became enraged and struck the Victim's facial area once with his left hand. The Defendant then struck the Victim's facial area a second time with his right fist. As the Victim retreated, the Defendant struck the Victim's facial area two additional times with both hands. The Defendant then pursued the Victim, who was attempting to evade, and swung his left fist toward the Victim.

In this manner, the Defendant committed a Battery upon the Victim as described above.

# CRIMINAL RECORD

The Defendant was sentenced on October 28, 2020, by the District Court to four months imprisonment with a suspended sentence of two years and a fine of 50,000 won for Property Damage and other offenses; the above judgment became final on November 5, 2020. The Defendant was subsequently sentenced on November 6, 2020, by the District Court to three months imprisonment with a suspended sentence of one year for Property Damage; the above judgment became final on November 14, 2020.

# CRIMINAL ACTS

**[Case No. 2020고단2603]**

On April 1, 2020, at approximately 11:15, while aboard an express train bound for Hospital C passing near a Subway Station in the Seoul Metropolitan Area, the Defendant engaged in disorderly conduct toward an unidentified passenger. When Victim D intervened to stop him, the Defendant became enraged and assaulted Victim D by scratching Victim D's facial area with his hands, pulling Victim D's hair, and scratching Victim D's clavicular region.

**[Case No. 2020고단2726]**

On March 31, 2020, at approximately 20:54, at Store H operated by Victim G located at Station F on Subway Line [designation] in Location E, the Defendant asked Victim G, "Give me a plastic bag." When Victim G responded, "Plastic bags are sold items," and handed the Defendant a paper bag instead of a plastic bag, the Defendant became enraged. The Defendant threw the paper bag he had received at Victim G's face, striking it, and struck Victim G's face once with his hand, thereby assaulting Victim G.

facts_en:
# CASE NO. 2019고단265

## [Criminal Record]

The defendant was sentenced to six months' imprisonment on January 16, 2019, by the District Court for property destruction and assault. The judgment became final on August 20, 2019.

## [Criminal Acts]

The defendant and Victim B were patients admitted to the same hospital. On January 12, 2019, at approximately 21:10, in the smoking room on the third floor of Hospital D located in C, the defendant struck Person E, citing that E's loud conversation was disturbing. After being stopped from fighting by the victim and others, as the defendant was entering a protective room, upon sighting the victim standing beside a water purifier, the defendant uttered profanities and kicked the victim's scrotum once with his right foot.

By this conduct, the defendant assaulted the victim.



# CASE NO. 2019고단411

## [Criminal Record]

The defendant was sentenced to six months' imprisonment on January 16, 2019, by the District Court for property destruction and assault. The judgment became final on August 20, 2019.

## [Criminal Acts]

On January 12, 2019, at approximately 19:10, the defendant entered Restaurant H, operated by Victim G, located in F, as a customer and consumed alcohol with his companions. While drinking, the defendant repeatedly made remarks to the victim that the victim resembled a comedian. When the victim, angered, told the defendant to stop, the defendant continued to provoke the victim, seized the victim by the collar, and violently shook the victim, causing the victim's clothing to tear. By this conduct, the defendant assaulted the victim.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 8. 7.20:20경 지하철역 5호선 내 승강장에서 술을 마신 채 갑자기 소리를 크게 질렀고, 이에 피해자 B이 피고인을 쳐다보자 피해자에게 "40대도 안 돼 보이는 놈이"라고 말하며 시비를 걸었고, 이에 피해자가 따지자 화가 나 손으로 피해자의 멱살을 잡고 손으로 피해자의 목을 1회 때린 후 도망가려고 지하철에 탑승하였고, 이에 피해자가 피고인을 쫓아 그 지하철에 탑승하였다.
그러자 피고인은 지하철 안에서 손으로 피해자의 가슴을 수회 때리고 발로 피해자의 양 종아리를 수회 걷어찬 다음 같은 구에 있는 종로3가역에서 하차하였고, 이에 피해자도 하차하여 피고인을 쫓아가자 손으로 피해자의 멱살을 잡고 손으로 피해자의 목을 1회 때린 후 다시 도망가려고 지하철에 탑승하였고, 이에 피해자가 피고인을 쫓아 그 지하철에 탑승하였다.
계속하여 피고인은 지하철 안에서 손으로 피해자의 목과 가슴을 수회 때리고 발로 피해자의 종아리를 걷어찬 후 같은 구에 있는 C역에서 하차하였고, 이에 피해자도 하차하여 피고인을 쫓아가자 손으로 피해자의 멱살을 잡고 손으로 피해자의 목을 수회 때렸다. 이로써 피고인은 피해자를 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
On August 7, 2019, at approximately 20:20 hours, the Defendant, while intoxicated, suddenly shouted loudly on the platform of Line 5 at a subway station. When Victim B looked at the Defendant, the Defendant initiated a verbal altercation by saying to the Victim, "You don't even look like you're in your forties," directed at the Victim. When the Victim objected, the Defendant became angered, grabbed the Victim by the collar with his hand, struck the Victim's neck once with his hand, and then boarded a subway train in an attempt to flee. The Victim pursued the Defendant and boarded the same train.

Thereupon, the Defendant struck the Victim's chest multiple times with his hand inside the train and kicked the Victim's both calves multiple times with his foot. The Defendant then disembarked at Jongno 3-ga Station in the same district. When the Victim also disembarked and pursued the Defendant, the Defendant grabbed the Victim by the collar with his hand, struck the Victim's neck once with his hand, and again boarded a subway train in an attempt to flee. The Victim pursued the Defendant and boarded the same train.

Subsequently, inside the train, the Defendant struck the Victim's neck and chest multiple times with his hand and kicked the Victim's calf with his foot. The Defendant then disembarked at C Station in the same district. When the Victim also disembarked and pursued the Defendant, the Defendant grabbed the Victim by the collar with his hand and struck the Victim's neck multiple times with his hand. By these actions, the Defendant committed an assault against the Victim.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2013. 2.경부터 2014. 12.경까지 B에 있는 재단법인 C의 대표이사를 역임하였던 사람이고, 피해자 D은 위 C의 공연기획팀에서 근무하였던 사람이다.
피고인은 2014. 8. 27. 밤 시간 불상경 외국에 있는 E호텔 1층 만찬장에서 C의 유럽 공연을 마친 기념으로 C 연주단원, C 후원회원들, F 예술감독, F의 해외 매니지먼트 회사인 G사(社) 관계자 등이 참석하는 연회를 개최하였는데, 위 연회 진행 과정에서 피해자 등 C 직원들이 대표이사인 피고인보다 F 예술감독 부부와 G사(社) 관계자에 대한 예우에 더 신경을 쓰는 모습, G사(社) 측 관계자의 피고인 등 C 임직원을 대하는 태도 등으로 인해 언짢아있는 상태에서 일정을 마치고 만찬장 밖으로 나갔고 피해자와 H이 피고인의 뒤를 따랐다.
피고인은 위 만찬장 밖 복도에서 피해자의 앞에서 걷다가 갑자기 돌아서서 뒤따르던 피해자를 향하여 영어로 '그들이 나를 어떻게 그렇게 대하느냐'는 취지로 화를 내면서 피해자의 왼쪽 쇄골 밑 가슴 부분을 손가락으로 1회 찔러 피해자의 몸이 휘청거리게 하였다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자를 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
**Defendant's Position and Victim's Employment:**

The Defendant served as Representative Director of Foundation C located in B from approximately February 2013 to approximately December 2014. Victim D was an employee of the Performance Planning Team at Foundation C.

**Incident on August 27, 2014:**

On the evening of August 27, 2014, at the banquet hall on the first floor of Hotel E located in an unidentified foreign country, the Defendant hosted a reception commemorating the completion of Foundation C's European concert tour. The reception was attended by Foundation C orchestra members, Foundation C patrons, Art Director F, personnel from G Company—the overseas management firm of Art Director F—and others.

During the course of the reception, the Defendant became displeased, observing that Foundation C employees, including the Victim, were paying greater deference and attention to Art Director F and his spouse, as well as to G Company personnel, than to the Defendant in his capacity as Representative Director. The Defendant was further displeased by the attitude displayed by G Company personnel toward Foundation C executives and employees. After the scheduled events concluded, the Defendant exited the banquet hall, with the Victim and H following behind him.

**Assault:**

In the corridor outside the banquet hall, while walking ahead of the Victim, the Defendant abruptly turned around and, facing the Victim who was following behind, expressed anger in English, to the effect that "how could they treat me that way." In doing so, the Defendant jabbed the Victim's chest beneath the left clavicle with his finger on one occasion, causing the Victim's body to stagger.

**Legal Conclusion:**

By the aforementioned conduct, the Defendant committed assault against the Victim.

facts_kr:
1. 2019고정339
피고인은 피해자 B에게 ‘아로니아' 제품을 판매하였는데 피해자가 대금을 제때 주지 않는다는 이유로 피해자에게 ‘아로니아' 제품의 반품을 요구하였다.
피고인은 2018. 10. 18. 19:00경 C건물 D호에 있는 피고인의 집에서 피해자가 찾아와 ‘아로니아' 제품을 현관 바닥에 던지자 이에 화가 나 발로 피해자의 가슴 부위를 1회 차고 양손으로 피해자의 머리채를 잡아 뜯었다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자에게 약 5주간의 치료가 필요한 전흉벽(복장뼈) 골절의 상해를 가하였다.

피고인은 2019. 12. 3. 10:30경 지방법원 2층 로비에서 피해자와 대화를 하면서 피고인이 피해자에게 머리카락 빠진 사진을 보여주자 피해자가 "머리카락 조금 빠지셨네요"라고 하였다는 이유로 손에 들고 있던 플라스틱 재질의 서류철로 그녀의 머리를 1회 내리쳐 그녀로 하여금 2주간의 치료를 요하는 두피의 표재성 손상, 타박상의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
## Case 1: 2019고정339

The defendant sold an "Aronia" product to victim B. When the victim failed to pay the purchase price in a timely manner, the defendant demanded that the victim return the "Aronia" product.

On October 18, 2018, at approximately 19:00, at the defendant's residence located in Unit D, Building C, the victim came to the defendant's home and threw the "Aronia" product onto the floor of the entrance hall. Enraged by this action, the defendant kicked the victim once in the chest area with his foot and, using both hands, grabbed and tore out the victim's hair.

As a result of these actions, the defendant inflicted an injury upon the victim requiring approximately five weeks of treatment: a fracture of the anterior thoracic wall (sternum).



## Case 2: 2020고정34

The defendant is engaged in civil litigation with victim E's mother. The victim appeared in court on the date of the incident as a representative (proxy).

On December 3, 2019, at approximately 10:30, in the lobby on the second floor of the District Court, the defendant was in conversation with the victim. The defendant showed the victim a photograph depicting hair loss. When the victim responded by saying, "It looks like you've lost some hair," the defendant, holding a plastic document folder in his hand, struck the victim's head once with this folder. This action inflicted an injury upon the victim requiring two weeks of treatment: superficial injury to the scalp and contusion.

facts_kr:
피고인과 피해자 B는 법적으로 혼인한 부부사이로서, 2016.경부터 별거중이고, 현재 이혼 조정 기간 중에 있다.
피고인은 2019. 7. 29. 21:30경 D동 1층 출입문 앞 노상에서, 피해자를 만나러 위 C에 찾아갔으나 그곳에 피해자와 내연관계를 의심하고 있던 남자의 차가 주차되어 있는 것을 보고 화가 나, 피해자의 집으로 찾아가 문을 두드렸으나 피해자가 문을 열어주지 않자, 112에 "아내가 자살 우려가 있다"고 신고하여 경찰관과 119구급대원을 피해자의 집에 방문하게 하였다.
이후 경찰관과 구급대원이 위와 같이 피해자의 집에 찾아와 아무런 이상이 없다는 것을 확인한 후 돌아갔고, 피해자가 대문 틈으로 피고인이 돌아갔는지 확인하려는 찰나 문틈 사이로 피해자가 키우던 애완견이 밖으로 뛰어나가자, 피고인은 그 애완견을 잡으러 뒤따라 나온 피해자를 위 C D동 1층 앞에서 발견하고 양손으로 피해자의 멱살을 잡아당기고, 계속하여 집으로 들어가려는 피해자의 뒷목을 잡아당기고, 주먹으로 피해자의 입술 및 머리 부위를 수회 때려 피해자에게 약 3주간의 치료가 필요한 경부의 전종의 염좌 및 긴장 등의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
**Background Relationship:**
The defendant and victim B are legally married spouses. They have been living separately since approximately 2016 and are currently in divorce mediation proceedings.

**Facts of the Incident:**

On July 29, 2019, at approximately 21:30, at the roadside in front of the entrance door on the first floor of Building D, the defendant went to location C to meet the victim. Upon discovering a vehicle belonging to a man whom the defendant suspected to be in a de facto marital relationship with the victim parked there, the defendant became angry. The defendant then proceeded to the victim's residence and knocked on the door. When the victim refused to open the door, the defendant called 112 (emergency services) and reported that "my wife has suicidal tendencies," thereby causing police officers and paramedics from the 119 emergency medical service to visit the victim's residence.

Subsequently, after the police officer and paramedic visited the victim's residence as described above and confirmed that there was no emergency situation, they departed. While the victim was attempting to ascertain through a gap in the gate whether the defendant had left, the defendant's victim's pet dog rushed out through the gap. The defendant discovered the victim, who had come out to catch the dog, in front of Building D on the first floor of location C. The defendant then seized the victim's collar with both hands and pulled forcefully. Subsequently, as the victim attempted to return into the residence, the defendant grabbed the victim by the back of the neck and pulled forcefully. The defendant then struck the victim multiple times with his fists on the lips and head area, thereby inflicting injuries upon the victim, including acute cervical sprain and muscle strain (tension) of the entire cervical region requiring approximately three weeks of medical treatment.

facts_kr:
피고인은 B건물 C호에, 피해자 D은 위 B빌라 E호에 각 거주하는 사람들로, 피해자 D이 장기간 빌라 주차장에 화물자동차 1대를 운행하지 않은 채 주차해 놓은 문제 등으로 피고인 등 입주민들과의 잦은 갈등으로 평소 사이가 좋지 않아 다른 곳으로 이사를 가겠다고 말하였으나 다시 임대차계약을 하여 그곳에 거주하기에 이르렀다.
1. 피고인은 2019. 9. 30. 22:40경 피해자 D의 집 앞에서, 피해자의 처 F에게 그날 동녀가 피고인 운영의 학원에 찾아와 사과의 뜻으로 놓고 간 화장지를 건네며 "왜 이사를 가지 않냐"고 따지다가 마침 거실에서 나와 처를 데리고 집안으로 들어가려고 출입문을 닫으려는 피해자 D에게 "이야기를 좀 하자"며 손으로 그 출입문을 붙잡자 피해자 D이 양손으로 자신의 가슴을 밀쳤다는 이유로 손으로 피해자 D의 손목을 1회 잡아당기고, 뒤에서 양팔로 피해자 D의 목을 감아 조여 피해자를 폭행하였다.
2. 피고인은 제1항 기재 일시, 장소에서, 피해자 F이 휴대전화로 위와 같이 남편을 때리는 피고인의 모습을 촬영하려고 하자 화가 나 손으로 피해자 F의 팔을 쳐 피해자 F을 폭행하였다.

facts_en:
**Background and Context**

The Defendant resides in Unit C of Building B, and Victim D resides in Unit E of the same villa complex (hereinafter "Building B"). The two parties had maintained poor relations due to frequent conflicts with other residents, including the Defendant, stemming primarily from Victim D's practice of parking a cargo truck in the villa's parking lot for an extended period without operating it. Although Victim D had stated an intention to relocate to another residence, Victim D subsequently renewed the lease agreement and continued to reside at the said location.

**Count 1: Assault Against Victim D**

On September 30, 2019, at approximately 22:40, in front of Victim D's residence, the Defendant approached Victim D's wife, Person F, and handed her tissue paper that Victim D's daughter had left at the Defendant's privately operated academy as a gesture of apology. The Defendant then demanded, "Why are you not moving out?" When Victim D subsequently emerged from the living room, took hold of his wife, and attempted to enter the residence by closing the entrance door, the Defendant stated, "Let's talk for a moment," and grasped the entrance door with his hand. In response, Victim D pushed the Defendant's chest with both hands. Thereupon, the Defendant—by way of retaliation—seized Victim D's wrist with his hand and pulled it once, and thereafter wrapped both arms around Victim D's neck from behind and squeezed it, thereby committing an assault upon Victim D.

**Count 2: Assault Against Victim F**

At the same time and place as described in Count 1 above, when Victim F attempted to record on her mobile telephone the Defendant's act of striking her husband as described above, the Defendant became enraged and struck Victim F's arm with his hand, thereby committing an assault upon Victim F.

facts_kr:
피고인은 피해자 B과 약7개월간 교제 및 동거했던 사이이다.
피고인은 2019. 7.31. 04:00경 C에 있는 피고인이 운영하는 D 애완견 미용샵에 연결된 주거지 침실에서 잠을 자던 중, 피해자가 잠꼬대를 하여 피고인이 잠에서 깼다는 이유로 위 주거지 부엌에서 피해자의 목을 1회 조르고, 이어서 피해자와 계속 말다툼을 하면서 '이제 그만 헤어지자. 내 카드로 카드깡한 돈을 갚아 달라'는 요구를 받고 차용증을 써 주었음에도 이를 다시 빼앗으려고 시도하여 이에 피해자가 빼앗기지 않기 위해 거실 소파에 웅크리자, 피해자의 뒤에서 달려들어 오른손으로 피해자의 목을 조르고, 왼손으로 위 차용증이 들어 있는 휴대전화를 빼앗고, 이에 피해자가 몸을 웅크리자 "너 진짜 죽고 싶냐"라고 말하며 왼손 및 양손으로 피해자의 목을 수회 조르고, 이에 피해자가 "너 지금 뭐하는 거야. 사람 죽이려고 그러는 거야?"라며 항의하자 "이 눈을 파버려야 해", "죽어라"라고 말하며 양 손 엄지로 피해자의 눈두덩이를 세게 눌렀다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자에게 약 2주간의 치료를 요하는 목의 상세불명 부분의 표재성 손상 등을 가하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant and Victim B maintained a romantic relationship and cohabited for approximately seven months.

On July 31, 2019, at approximately 04:00 hours, while the Defendant was sleeping in a bedroom of a residential unit attached to D, a pet grooming shop operated by the Defendant located in C, the Victim began talking in her sleep, which awakened the Defendant. As a consequence, the Defendant proceeded to the kitchen of the residential unit and manually strangled the Victim's neck once. Thereafter, the Defendant and Victim engaged in a continued verbal altercation during which the Defendant demanded, "Let's break up now. Pay back the money you obtained through card loans using my card." Although the Defendant subsequently wrote a promissory note in response to this demand, the Defendant then attempted to retake the promissory note. When the Victim, in an effort to prevent the promissory note from being taken, crouched on the living room sofa, the Defendant rushed at the Victim from behind, manually strangled the Victim's neck with his right hand, seized the Victim's cellular telephone containing the promissory note with his left hand, and, when the Victim crouched her body further, stated, "Do you really want to die?" while manually strangling the Victim's neck on multiple occasions with his left hand and both hands. When the Victim protested by asking, "What are you doing right now? Are you trying to kill a person?", the Defendant stated, "I should gouge out your eyes" and "Die," while forcefully pressing the Victim's eye sockets with both thumbs.

As a result of these acts, the Defendant inflicted upon the Victim superficial injuries of unspecified parts of the neck requiring approximately two weeks of medical treatment.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2019. 6. 28. 15:30경 남구 B에 있는 'C공장' 후문 내 사무실 앞에서 피해자 D와 업무 문제로 말다툼을 하던 중 화가 나, 팔로 피해자의 몸을 밀치고, 손에 들고 있던 안전모로 피해자의 왼쪽 뺨을 1회 때려 피해자를 폭행하였다.
증거의 요지 1. 제4회 공판조서 중 증인 E의 진술기재
1. 제5회 공판조서 중 증인 F의 진술기재
1. D에 대한 경찰 피의자신문조서
1. D의 진술서
피고인 및 변호인은 피고인이 피해자를 폭행한 사실이 없다고 주장하나, 위 증거에 의하여 인정되는 다음과 같은 사정들, 즉 ① 피해자는 사건 현장에서부터 이 법정에 이르기까지 일관하여 '피고인이 안전모를 잡고 있던 손으로 피해자의 목 부위를 밀치면서 안전모가 왼쪽 뺨에 스쳐 입안이 터져서 피까지 났다'는 취지로 진술한 점, ② 목격자 E 역시 이 법정에서 '피고인이 안전모를 휘둘러 피해자가 왼쪽 얼굴을 스치듯이 맞았다'고 진술하여 피해자의 진술에 부합하는 점 등을 종합하여 보면, 피고인이 판시 범죄사실 기재와 같이 피해자를 폭행한 사실이 충분히 인정된다. 따라서 피고인 및 변호인의 주장은 받아들이지 않는다.

facts_en:
On June 28, 2019, at approximately 15:30, in front of the office located within the rear entrance of 'C Factory' in Nam-gu, District B, the accused engaged in a verbal altercation with the victim D regarding a work-related matter. Becoming enraged during this dispute, the accused pushed the victim's body with his arm and struck the victim's left cheek once with a safety helmet that he was holding in his hand, thereby committing assault against the victim.



**SUMMARY OF EVIDENCE**

1. Statement of Witness E as recorded in the Fourth Session Court Record
2. Statement of Witness F as recorded in the Fifth Session Court Record
3. Police Suspect Interrogation Record regarding D
4. Statement of D



**COURT'S REASONING AND FINDINGS**

The accused and his counsel assert that the accused did not commit assault against the victim. However, based on the evidence set forth above, the following circumstances are established: ① The victim has consistently maintained from the scene of the incident through this court proceeding that "the accused pushed the victim's neck area with the hand holding the safety helmet, causing the helmet to strike the victim's left cheek, resulting in a laceration inside the mouth that bled." ② Eyewitness E also testified in this court that "the accused swung the safety helmet, striking the victim's left face in a glancing manner," which corroborates the victim's account. Considering these circumstances in their entirety, the fact that the accused committed assault against the victim, as stated in the factual allegations of the indictment, is sufficiently established. Accordingly, the contentions of the accused and his counsel are rejected.

facts_kr:
전제사실
B과 C, D과 E은 각 부부사이로서 2020.5.30.오후 10시경 김포시 F 상가에 있는 'G'라는 상호의 식당에 방문하여 치킨과 맥주를 주문하여 먹었다. 피고인과 H은 그 당시 위 G 식당에서 일용직 종업원으로 근무하였다. 이미 어느 정도 술에 취한 상태였던 B 일행은 위 식당에 방문할 당시 장미꽃을 들고 왔는데, 위 꽃잎이 흩날려 다른 테이블이 떨어지자, 다른 손님들이 식당 종업원인 피고인에게 항의하였다. 이에 피고인은 C에게 이러한 사정을 설명하면서 꽃잎을 치워줄 것을 요구하였다. C은 잠시 후 이러한 피고인의 요구를 불쾌하게 생각하고 위 식당 주인 I과 피고인에게 항의함에 따라 위 식당 앞에서 B 일행과 피고인, H 등 위 식당 종업원들 사이에 싸움이 벌어졌다.

[Criminal Acts]

facts_en:
## Preliminary Facts

Person B and Person C, and Person D and Person E, respectively comprised two married couples. At approximately 10:00 p.m. on May 30, 2020, they visited a restaurant operating under the name 'G' located in a commercial complex in Gimpo City, designated location F. They ordered chicken and beer and consumed them. The defendant and Person H were employed as daily wage workers at the restaurant 'G' at that time. Person B's group, already in a moderately intoxicated state when they visited the restaurant, had brought roses with them. As the rose petals scattered and fell upon other tables, other patrons lodged a complaint with the defendant, who was a restaurant employee. Thereupon, the defendant explained the circumstances to Person C and demanded that the petals be cleaned up. After a short time, Person C took offense at the defendant's demand and lodged a protest against both the restaurant owner, Person I, and the defendant. As a result, a physical altercation erupted in front of the restaurant 'G' between Person B's group and the defendant, Person H, and other restaurant employees.

## Criminal Acts

On May 30, 2020, at approximately 22:53, in front of the restaurant 'G', the defendant witnessed Victim B thrust Person H backward with his abdomen, and Victim D grasp and thrust Person H's neck and facial area with both hands. Enraged by this, the defendant approached from behind Victim B, encircled Victim B's neck with his right arm, and pulled forcefully, causing Victim B to fall to the ground. The defendant thereafter assaulted Victim B by pressing Victim B's prone body downward against the floor using both hands and knees.

facts_kr:
피고인은 2020. 4.경 중구 B에 있는 휴대폰 판매점에서 근무하던 중 같은 직원인 피해자 C를 만나, 2021. 5.경까지 피해자와 교제하다가 2021. 5. 31.경 헤어진 사이이다.
피고인은 2021. 6. 3. 17:00경 피해자에게 "만나서 헤어진 이유를 알고 싶고, 짐도 가지고 가라"는 취지의 메신저 문자메세지를 보내자, 피해자가 이에 응하여 피해자는 같은 날 21:00경 피고인의 주거지인 오피스텔에 방문하게 되었다.
피고인은 2021. 6. 3. 23:00경 D건물 E호 자신의 오피스텔 안에서 위와 같이 피해자와 단둘이 있게 되자, 피해자에게 ‘바람을 피웠기 때문에 헤어지자고 한 것이 아닌지' 추궁하며 피해자의 휴대전화 비밀번호를 해제한 후 건네달라고 요구하였으나, 피해자가 이를 거절하자 화가 나, 피해자의 다리, 엉덩이 부위를 수회 차고, 넘어진 피해자의 얼굴을 발로 내리찍었다.
이로써 피고인은 피해자에게 14일 간의 치료가 필요한 우안 안구타박상 및 눈꺼풀타박상, 결막출혈, 망막진탕 및 28일 간의 치료가 필요한 안와 바닥의 골절 등의 상해를 가하였다.

facts_en:
The Defendant and Victim C were colleagues working at a mobile phone sales shop located in B, Jung-gu. They began dating approximately in April 2020 and maintained a romantic relationship until approximately May 31, 2021, when they separated.

On June 3, 2021, at approximately 17:00, the Defendant sent a messenger text message to the Victim stating, in substance, "I want to know the reason we broke up, and [you should] come get your belongings." In response to this message, the Victim visited the Defendant's residence, an officetel, at approximately 21:00 on the same date.

At approximately 23:00 on June 3, 2021, while alone with the Victim inside Unit E of Building D, the Defendant's officetel, the Defendant interrogated the Victim by asking, in essence, "Did you cheat on me, which is why you wanted to break up?" The Defendant then demanded that the Victim unlock and surrender her mobile phone. When the Victim refused this demand, the Defendant became enraged and repeatedly kicked the Victim's legs and buttocks. After the Victim fell, the Defendant stomped on the Victim's face with his foot.

As a result of these acts, the Defendant inflicted the following injuries upon the Victim: (1) blunt ocular trauma to the right eye and eyelid contusion, requiring fourteen (14) days of treatment; (2) conjunctival hemorrhage; (3) retinal concussion; and (4) fracture of the orbital floor, requiring twenty-eight (28) days of treatment.

피고인은 2020. 3. 18. 18:00경 자신이 운영하는 B에 있는 'C' 입구에서 피해자 D과 시비를 벌이다 안으로 들어오려는 그녀의 상반신을 상반신으로 밀어 폭행하였다.

1. 사진
피고인의 주장에 대한 판단
피고인은, 피해자가 가게에 못 들어오게 막은 사실은 있으나, 상반신으로 피해자를 민 사실은 없고, 설령 피고인의 위 주장이 받아들이지 않는다고 하더라도 피고인의 행위는 정당방위에 해당한다고 주장한다.
살피건대, 이 법원에서 적법하게 채택하여 조사한 증거들에 의하여 인정되는 아래와 같은 사정, 즉 피해자는 수사기관 및 이 법정에서 피고인이 자신의 상반신을 민 경위와 과정에 대하여 자세하게 진술한 점, 피고인과 피해자가 싸우는 과정을 목격한 E의 수사기관 및 이 법정에서의 진술도 피해자의 위 진술에 부합하는 점 등에 비추어 보면, 피고인의 이 부분 주장은 받아들이지 아니한다.
그 다음으로 정당방위 주장에 대하여 보건대, 피고인과 피해자가 싸우게 된 경위, 과정 등을 종합하면, 피고인의 행위가 정당방위에 해당한다고 보기 어렵다.
